Name: Belcorp
Description:
We are a multinational beauty corporation with a presence in 14 countries. Since our beginnings, we have supported thousands of women in achieving economic independence through the direct selling business. We have three brands—L’BEL, ésika, and Cyzone—that allow us to offer our consumers the best experiences with high-quality products.

With our purpose, We drive beauty to achieve personal fulfillment, we seek to inspire each person to give their best to achieve the extraordinary.

We are committed to sustainability, and our strategy considers environmental, social, and governance aspects to contribute to sustainable development in the countries where we operate. That is why we work across five key pillars:

Women’s empowerment
We promote women’s empowerment, as we are convinced of its impact on the transformation of women, their families, and their communities, as well as on the construction of a more just, prosperous, and sustainable society.

Extraordinary talent
We have a team of more than 6,000 employees in 14 countries who are transforming the beauty industry and quickly adapting to the ongoing challenges of business and the world.

Caring for the planet
We are committed to protecting the environment throughout our entire value chain, considering both present and future generations.

Integrity and transparency
Through our policies and internal mechanisms, we foster ethical and transparent actions at all levels of the company, considering the impacts on our environment and value chain.

Responsible products
We offer high-quality, safe, innovative, and sustainable products, aligned with the responsible use of natural resources.

Learn more about Belcorp at www.belcorp.biz

Name: LVMH Perfumes & Cosmetics
Description: LVMH’s Perfumes & Cosmetics activities benefit from exceptional dynamism that relies on both the longevity and development of key lines, and on the boldness of new creations. The brands cultivate what makes them unique and is guaranteed to make them stand out for their devotees in a highly competitive global market. The success of the Perfumes & Cosmetics division depends on finding the right balance between major historic Houses such as Parfums Christian Dior, Parfums Givenchy and Guerlain, and young brands with strong potential like Benefit Cosmetics, Fresh and Make Up For Ever… All are driven by the same values: a quest for excellence, creativity, innovation and perfect mastery of their image.

Name: OUAI
Description:
We believe that life is hard and looking good should be easy. We’re giving you realistic goals that you can actually achieve—with quick how-to videos, so you’re always ready for that selfie situation. A brand that looks dope enough to Instagram, but epic enough to actually get the job done? Yes OUAI. 

OUAI restores hair health from the outside and from within, through effective haircare products and proven nutritional supplements developed by an MD. Our shampoos and conditioners are sulfate-free and employ smart keratin to repair and improve hair strength. Even our styling products are designed to nourish hair and bring out its natural beauty.

Name: Laverne Group | مجموعة لافيرن
Description: Perfume company, leading the industry in creating modern scents that are connected to middle eastern culture.

Name: Urban Decay Cosmetics
Description:
It's pretty. Maybe a little twisted. But never prissy. Makeup for your eyes, lips, nails, hair, and skin. It's always beautiful but sometimes unusual. It's makeup for individuals, not for those who want to blend in. Have fun, experiment, toy with a look that borders on dangerous. Shimmer, glitter, sparkle, sheen...use it all and change your face to match your mood. Go from a pixie to a vixen, from a rock star to a starlet. Be who you want to be today, just don't be average.

Urban Decay is beauty with an edge. It is feminine, dangerous, and fun...appealing to celebrities, rock stars and anyone who relishes her individuality and dares to express it.

Urban Decay is an Equal Opportunity Employer.

Name: Intercos Group
Description:
Intercos is the leading global supplier and strategic innovation partner to the color cosmetics and skin, hair, personal care and fragrances industry with research centers, production sites and marketing offices in North America, South America, Europe and Asia.

Intercos has an unprecedented ability to scout, anticipate and influence trends in the beauty industry, which, combined with its best-in-class R&D capabilities, puts the Company at the forefront of innovation. 

As a result, Intercos develops and manufactures cosmetics for the most well-known brands in the industry. The Company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Milan, Italy.

Name: Dot & Key Skincare
Description:
Dot & Key is an award-winning skincare company established to transform the idea of 'skincare' into a fun, easy, and acceptable notion.

A fresh take on skincare. One that's founded on the understanding that everyone is unique. Through our range of advanced skincare products, we address lifestyle needs that are often overlooked.

THE BEST OF
NATURE & SCIENCE

The amount of thought and care we put in at every step is reflected in the results. We start by sourcing the best natural ingredients from across the globe. Then, we process them using cutting-edge science to create unique formulations that deliver on their promise. Think of a wide array of effective remedies that are as gentle as nature itself.
FULL OF LOVE
FREE OF TOXINS

Glance at our list of ingredients, and you won't find any toxic chemicals like parabens, sulfates, and phthalates. Everything we make is clinically tested and cruelty-free, so you can use it without worry in the world. This is the Dot & Key promise: superior skincare that's absolutely safe, delightfully gentle, and unquestionably effective.

Name: amika
Description:
loved by stylists. powered by results. all hair is welcome.

amika means friend. we're a fearless, Brooklyn-born, salon-raised haircare brand + a friend to all hair, hairstylists, the planet + you. 

we're rooted in clinical results. each product is infused with our intoxicating scent + powered by our superfruit soul, sea buckthorn. known as one of the earth's most omega-rich plant sources, this potent berry nourishes your skin, scalp + strands. 
 
we're a proud pal to the planet + certified B-Corp. from sustainably sourced ingredients + recyclable packaging to our energy-saving production processes, we pledge to reduce our greenhouse gas emissions, waste + energy to reach Net Zero by 2030. 

having grown up in salons, we know better than anyone how important stylists are—they're our confidantes + community. think of us at your at-home hairapist, here to empower self-expression + bring joy to your haircare experience. all hair is welcome.

Name: Moroccanoil
Description: A story of success, an impulse for innovation, and a relentless pursuit of simple, high-performing oil-infused beauty products fashioned an iconic brand: Moroccanoil. As the pioneer of oil-infused haircare, our original Moroccanoil Treatment created the worldwide buzz on argan oil and paved the way for an extensive line of premium oil-infused haircare products to address the needs of all hair types. By popular demand, Moroccanoil has launched Moroccanoil Body: luxurious, head-to-toe collections inspired by the sea, sand, breeze, and scents of the Mediterranean. Infused with argan oil, signature to the brand, these proprietary formulas leave skin nourished, naturally radiant, and irresistibly beautiful. Today, Moroccanoil is available in over 85 countries worldwide.

Name: Baruel
Description:
Empresa 100% nacional e presente há mais de 120 anos no mercado, a Baruel atua nos mercados de higiene e cuidados pessoais a partir de um extenso portfólio de produtos voltados para o bem-estar do consumidor.
 
Fundada em 1892, a empresa é líder de mercado em cuidados com os pés com a sua linha Tenys Pé Baruel, além de destaque presença no segmento infantil, com as linhas Turma da Xuxinha e Disney Frozen, e de proteção, com os Repelentes Baruel. Seu último lançamento, a Baruel Protect, traz produtos antissépticos voltados para a proteção e cuidados higiênicos. 
 
Com produtos distribuídos em mais de 170 mil pontos de vendas em todo o País, a Baruel vem crescendo ao longo dos anos e se fortalecendo com valores que promovem a saúde e a proteção do consumidor.
 
A marca ainda exerce uma preocupação efetiva com a sociedade em que está situada, sempre prezando por um auxílio à comunidades carentes. Com doações ao longo dos anos, a Baruel vem promovendo conscientização da população sobre higienização e cuidados pessoais.

Name: Bobbi Brown Cosmetics
Description:
Bobbi Brown first arrived on the beauty scene in 1991 with the launch of Bobbi Brown Essentials, 10 brown-based lipstick shades created to fill a void in the market of simple, flattering and wearable makeup.  Bobbi's unique approach to cosmetics was a long-awaited gift for women who wanted a more natural look, and therefore caught the attention of cosmetics empire of The Estée Lauder Companies, which acquired Bobbi Brown Cosmetics in 1995. Today, Bobbi Brown Cosmetics is a global brand, having expanded beyond lipstick to a full range of color cosmetics and skincare. With a presence in more than 60 countries, Bobbi Brown Cosmetics is coveted by world renowned makeup artists, celebrities and style makers for effortless, natural beauty.

Careers at Bobbi Brown
At Bobbi Brown there are several different types of job opportunities available.  More information about the job opportunities click here.  We are an equal opportunity employer.

Name: Sun Bum
Description: In 2010 we started making products to protect our friends and families from the sun. Since then, we’ve grown a bit, but we haven’t changed. Our Cocoa Beach office is an old Florida beach house off A1A. Our Moonlight Beach office is in the groovy little town of Encinitas, California, just a block away from the sand. And like any good beach day, everyone’s welcomed to the bonfire. We care about our people and making more meaningful connections outside. We make products the way we like them, and we hope you like them too.

Name: Minimalist
Description:
Founded in 2020 with the belief that the beauty industry requires a revolution with respect to TRANSPARENCY. At Minimalist, we create hard-working, clean, easy to understand, and affordable skincare for all.

Let's Talk Science.

Name: Wepink
Description: Bem-vindos ao seu único e essencial mundo rosa. A Wepink veio para inovar o conceito beleza e a importância do cuidado.

Name: BECCA Cosmetics
Description: At BECCA we are the Experts in the Beauty of Light. Light is the source of what makes us beautiful & individual. Light is our inspiration and at the very heart of every product we develop. We are the authority on shade in complexion and colour. Our approach is inclusive and simple – to create an equally balanced range of shades from the fairest to the deepest skin tones.

Name: Dailus
Description:
Uma marca de cosméticos nacional, autêntica e inclusiva! Com uma identidade visual moderna e cheia de personalidade, a DAILUS é divertida, descolada, disruptiva, diferente e democrática.

Sempre de olho nas demandas do consumidor, somos movidos pelas tendências de beleza da vida real! Desenvolvemos maquiagens, produtos para cuidados com a pele e esmaltes de alta qualidade e preços acessíveis, que fazem parte de um portfólio que atende cada vez mais a todos.

Somos uma empresa cruelty-free, que não realiza testes em animais, e temos o certificado do PETA. Também possuímos uma linha repleta de produtos veganos, ou seja, que não levam nenhum tipo de matéria-prima de origem animal em sua composição.

Para quem gosta do make tudo ou do make nada, das unhas de uma ou várias cores... Você não precisa usar nada, mas se quiser se divertir estamos aqui!

Name: Juleriaque S.A
Description: Juleriaque es la cadena de perfumerías más importante del país, con una trayectoria de 40 años en el mundo de la belleza y 45 sucursales físicas ubicadas en Capital Federal y Gran Buenos Aires, Córdoba, Mar del Plata, Rosario, Mendoza, Salta, Tucumán y Neuquén. La tienda online de Juleriaque lidera el comercio electrónico de lujo en el país, completando el alcance territorial de la empresa, en toda la Argentina. La posibilidad de encontrar las líneas de cosmética que hoy marcan tendencia en el mercado internacional y todas las fragancias del mundo, son hoy los pilares del constante crecimiento de la empresa, sumado a detalles como el diseño vanguardista de sus locales, una dinámica propuesta comercial, el servicio y la atención. La cadena sostiene su promesa de innovación, sofisticación, estilo y tendencia.

Name: Hinode Group
Description:
A Hinode é uma multinacional brasileira de beleza, fragrâncias e bem-estar com mais de 35 anos de história. Nascemos do sonho de nossos fundadores, Adelaide e Francisco Rodrigues e, hoje, levamos oportunidades reais de transformação de vidas a centenas de milhares de pessoas.

Temos ainda uma comunidade de empreendedores com mais de 600 mil pessoas engajadas em fazer negócio através da revenda de produtos, da construção de uma rede de empreendedorismo global ou dos dois, promovendo a geração de renda aliada à realização de sonhos.

Acreditamos em uma beleza integral, que reflete por fora o cuidado que vem de dentro. E demonstramos isso no nosso portfólio, com mais de 300 produtos multifuncionais e multibenefícios, desenvolvidos com qualidade e performance, que levam mais praticidade à rotina e estimulam a autoconfiança.

Somos uma marca com propósito e causas reais, que acredita na transformação do mundo por meio de suas ações e do protagonismo de cada um. Contamos com iniciativas como o Programa Pérolas, uma das maiores plataformas de liderança e empreendedorismo feminino do Brasil, o Instituto FAR e seus projetos de ajuda humanitária e educação para crianças e jovens, a UH – Universidade Hinode, que beneficia a sociedade com profissionais mais preparados e capacitados e a Plataforma Impacta, que promove a transparência das ações de ESG.

Na Hinode, todos têm a oportunidade de alcançar os seus sonhos. Afinal, aqui, quando você desperta o seu sol, desperta o extraordinário. Desperta oportunidades.

Hinode, desperte seu sol.

Name: Aroma-Zone
Description:
For over 20 years, Aroma-Zone has been committed to making natural beauty and well-being accessible to all by combining science, quality, and effectiveness. A pioneer and expert in the field, the brand carefully selects the finest active ingredients from passionate producers worldwide, ensuring natural, safe, and high-performance formulations.

With over 2,000 products and a network of 23 boutiques, Aroma-Zone offers a unique range of skincare and essential oils designed to meet everyone’s needs, following an ethical and responsible approach.

Constantly evolving, Aroma-Zone continues its mission with the same ambition: to bring the best of nature, backed by scientific expertise, while respecting both people and the planet.

Name: ELEMIS
Description:
Award-winning British Skincare Brand

B Corp Certified

Name: The INKEY List | B Corp
Description: We are effective not expensive.

Name: Nazca Cosméticos
Description:
Com quase quatro décadas de história, a Nazca é referência em cuidados para cabelos e pele, oferecendo produtos de alta qualidade que aliam inovação, bem-estar e eficácia. Nosso propósito vai além da beleza: queremos transformar rotinas em momentos especiais, promovendo conexões genuínas e experiências sensoriais únicas.

Guiados pela nossa essência: Nutrindo relações e revelando sensações, buscamos criar vínculos de confiança com nossos clientes, parceiros e colaboradores. Cada produto que desenvolvemos é pensado para atender às necessidades reais do nosso público, respeitando sua individualidade e celebrando sua autenticidade.

Na Nazca, cuidado e tradição caminham juntos, sempre com o compromisso de entregar o melhor em cada detalhe.

Se quiser saber, nos acompanhe nas redes sociais: 

Instagram: @nazcacosmeticos
Tik Tok: Nazca Cosméticos
Facebook: Nazca Cosméticos
Youtube: Nazca Cosméticos

Name: Typology
Description:
Typology is a Paris based skincare brand on a mission to disrupt skincare and consumer industry for better. Typology is a Bcorp certified company since inception.

Job requests: https://www.typology.com/rejoindre-lequipe
Press enquiries: press@typology.com
Follow us on Instagram : @typologyparis

Name: IMAGE Skincare
Description:
The #1 Spa and Salon Professional Skincare Brand
Clinical skincare to help you Age Later
 
In an industry complicated by unnecessary chemicals, IMAGE Skincare founder Janna Ronert set out to create products powered by smart botanicals and high percentages of safe, proven active ingredients – something she couldn’t find on the market Janna believed that all women deserve simplicity, value and results when it comes to their skincare.

Today, our company’s highly active products are available in more than 60 countries worldwide, and have become the regimens of choice for top estheticians, dermatologists and plastic surgeons around the globe. Our brand’s 21-year dedication to the professional community has earned IMAGE a cult-like following among those in-the-skincare-know, making it one of the best kept secrets in the industry.

IMAGE Skincare is backed by clinical results. Created in 2003 by an esthetician, formulated by Dr. Marc Ronert, a plastic surgeon, and represented by a network of over 50,000 skincare professionals, IMAGE knows skin inside and out: how to protect it, what makes it healthy, and what keeps it younger looking.  

Are you looking to join the IMAGE Nation? Here are few things you should know about working at IMAGE Skincare:

We pride ourselves on 5 pillars that serve as our foundation for success:
- INNOVATION 
- EDUCATION 
- SERVICE & SUPPORT
- CULTURE 
- GIVING BACK
 
We love meeting and hiring new talents who lead by example on:
- Passion
- Motivation
- Maximum Effort
- Work Ethic
- High Energy
- Positive Attitude
- Exceeding Expectations
- Coachability
- Being Prepared
 
If all these words resonate with you, you could be the next one to join our incredible adventure. Look at our job openings NOW and we hope to hear from you very soon.

Name: LABORATOIRE NATIVE
Description: Le Laboratoire Native est né du rachat récent de la marque historique Roger&Gallet au groupe L'Oréal et d'Alès Groupe: Liérac, Phytosolba, Jowaé. Son ambition est de devenir un des acteurs majeurs de la cosmétique en particulier dans le soin du corps et du visage, capillaire, de la parfumerie et de l’hygiène. Laboratoire Native propose une gamme complète de soins beauté grâce à ses laboratoires intégrés et à ses marques spécialisées. Avec ses marques emblématiques, Laboratoire Native est le référent de la beauté technique, expert en dermo-cosmétique & phyto-cosmétique et propose un univers unique et exceptionnel de senteurs, de soins, et de parfums. Le groupe s'engage dans le redéploiement et la redynamisation de ces marques dans une ambiance start-up, avec un très haut niveau de professionnalisme de l'équipe dirigeante, pragmatisme, efficacité, confiance et convivialité. Les marques du groupe sont aujourd'hui distribuées en France et dans plus de 45 pays à l'international dans les circuits pharmacie, parapharmacie, parfumerie, grands magasins

Name: VERALAB
Description: Veralab è un marchio dell’azienda Re-Forme srl azienda attiva nel settore della cosmetica avanzata e della vendita di prodotti cosmetici.

Name: MAKEUP BY MARIO
Description:
Renowned Makeup Artist Mario Dedivanovic is one of the most acclaimed, followed, and influential makeup artists in the world. Sought after for his artistry, passion, professionalism, and attention to detail, Mario specializes in subtle transformations, helping draw out the most flawless version of an individual’s natural complexion and features. 
From education to social media to innovation, Mario is a visionary and pioneer at the leading edge of the beauty industry. He has built a global following, having taught and popularized the best-known makeup techniques of the last decade and ignited viral trends that have inspired and forever altered the beauty landscape. 
2020 marks Mario’s 20th year as a makeup artist, and the debut of his namesake beauty brand, MAKEUP BY MARIO, inspired by two decades of groundbreaking makeup artistry. Mario’s meticulously crafted collection of pro products and tools are developed with the professional artist in mind, using the highest-quality formulas created to elevate application and recreate his signature techniques, in universal shades for all skin tones.

Name: Kiss New York
Description:
Criada em 1989 nos Estados Unidos, a KISS New York, líder mundial em cílios e unhas postiças atua em 108 países ao redor do mundo.
No Brasil desde 2009, a empresa tem em seu portfólio, linhas de cuidados para as unhas, aparelhos e acessórios para os cabelos e maquiagem. Com produtos que atendem as necessidades da mulher real e independente, a KISS New York tem como filosofia “força, modernidade, confiança, paixão e inovação”.

"Paixão é o que nos move, nos permite observar os obstáculos e desafios com um olhar diferente. Nossa energia e determinação é o que nos diferencia. Temos orgulho do que fazemos aqui na Kiss New York."
John Chang CEO & President

Bring the Salon Home

Name: Mahogany Cosméticos
Description: Somos uma marca premium de perfumaria e cosméticos. Qualidade, autenticidade e exuberância em produtos que revelam a personalidade e valorizam os diferentes estilos.

Name: Nazih Group
Description:
Nazih Group was founded in 1975 and is present in 21 countries across the MENA (Middle East and North Africa) region in addition to Europe & Canada.

Nazih Group is present in 21 countries with a workforce comprising 1000+ passionate employees. Our customers and business partners trust our group for the quality of products and services we offer in various business sectors including Marketing & Advertising, Manufacturing, Distribution, Construction & Building Materials, and Real Estate Development.

Submit Your CV:

nazih.com/careers
recruitment@nazih.com

Name: PAYOT
Description:
PAYOT est une marque de soins de beauté française, créée par la Docteure Nadia PAYOT en 1920. 

Née dans l’intimité des salons de beauté, au contact des femmes, elle a souhaité mettre son expertise professionnelle au service de leurs besoins et envies. Une approche conservée à travers le temps et qui a fondé une vision très personnelle de la beauté : pour PAYOT, la beauté est affaire de confiance en soi. Une confiance qui se révèle, s’entretient et peut se renforcer. 
Ainsi, pour accompagner cette quête, PAYOT conçoit des produits responsables et sensoriels, associés à une gestuelle, spécificité qui a fait de la marque l’inventeur du concept de facialiste. L’association au geste exacerbe l’efficacité du produit, promesse d’une belle peau. La sensorialité renforce le lien entre l’individu et son corps - promesse de se sentir mieux dans SA peau. Un alignement qui est la condition sine qua none à la création de cette confiance, conquête personnelle de chaque instant. 
 
PAYOT, la beauté en mouvement. 


Find us on social networks to follow our adventures:
 Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/payotofficial/?hl=fr
 Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/payotfr
 Youtube : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzrNGqTWbuXk2dzr8qBsw2A
 Tiktok : https://www.tiktok.com/@payotskincare

Name: UNIFARCO
Description:
Unifarco is a partnership of pharmacists who, for over 30 years now, have shared the same philosophy, the same values and the same code of professional ethics with a particular commitment to respect for people and their welfare.

Today the company can count on a growing client-base in Italy, Austria, Switzerland, Germany, Spain and France.

Starting from the study of the beneficial properties of plants and using scientific methods to reveal their therapeutic capacity, Unifarco's R&D laboratory has set modern formulation parameters that enhance the applications of the product to ensure maximum efficacy and total safety.

Inspired by the power of nature and the quest for innovation through applied research, Unifarco has created three product lines, all formulated to minimize allergy risks.
• The Research Pharmacists line of cosmetic and hygiene products and food supplements, personalized with the pharmacist’s own brand, whose name is a guarantee to customers of the products’ quality and reliability. 
• The Ceramol line of dermatological cosmetics.
• The Dolomia make-up line.

Name: Gisou by Negin Mirsalehi
Description:
HONEY INFUSED BEAUTY

Gisou is born out of a passion for bees and haircare, based on a six-generation beekeeping heritage, our products are inspired by and made with the finest, sustainably sourced ingredients from our very own Mirsalehi Bee Garden. 

At Gisou we are on a mission to share our HONEY GLOW. As a rapidly growing scale-up, we're dedicated to crafting iconic beauty products, and building a world-class team to drive our vision and brand forward. We are talent obsessed and deeply believe that the raw skills of our people, and their collective brilliance is what makes us truly extraordinary!

Name: Rosé All Day
Description:
Rosé All Day is proudly a local brand, born and raised in Indonesia and inspired by you! We create mindful and fuss-free makeup and skincare products to elevate your natural beauty. Here at Rosé, we are committed to giving you only the best – where nature meets science and innovation meets quality. 

At Rosé, we strive to evolve and set the standard for excellence in the local beauty industry. We believe the power of collaboration, innovation, and dedication are the pillars of our continued growth and success.

We stands for BEAUTY (Bold Innovation, Excellence, Authenticity. Unity, Trust and Yearning for Growth)

Join the Rosé Team by dropping your CV to hiring@roseallday.co with ‘Your Name - Position’ as the title.

Name: ULYSSE NEGOCE
Description:
ULYSSE NÉGOCE, Distributeur Exclusif des grandes marques internationales de la parfumerie de luxe et des cosmétiques en Tunisie.

Partenaire privilégié des grandes Maisons : CHANEL, DOLCE&GABBANA, NARCISO RODRIGUEZ, ELIE SAAB, ISSEY MIYAKE, SHISEIDO, BVLGARI, SISLEY, CINQ MONDES, COLLISTAR, DEBORAH, WOMEN’SECRET, PEPE JEANS, BETE, BETER ELITE… ,

Name: Madi International
Description:
Madi International is a multi-brand, multi-trade channel distributor covering all beauty categories including hair, skin, and nail care. Founded in 1991, Madi International has expanded its reach and diversified its offerings over the years, launching different businesses that cater to the evolving needs of the beauty industry. Operating across the United Arab Emirates, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Oman, and Bahrain, each division within the Group supports the others, creating a robust ecosystem that is responsive to market changes and deeply aligned with consumer needs and expectations.
 
Originally founded as a one-stop shop for salons, Madi International remains devoted to this core segment, continually driving its success and expansion into various other trade channels such as pharmacies, retail stores, and e-commerce. Our ability to adapt and respond to market demands has positioned us as the preferred regional partner for brands aiming to penetrate these markets, owing to our proven expertise in brand building and market trendsetting.
 
Madi International operates across numerous countries, leading with innovative beauty solutions and modernizing the beauty business landscape in the GCC. From traditional specialized outlets to comprehensive beauty service hubs, our adaptability has been pivotal. Within Madi International, we also address needs through our Consumer Products Division, catering to pharmacies, beauty stores, and a robust e-commerce network. Additionally, our Wholesale and Export Division extends our reach beyond direct consumer interactions.

Name: Revision Skincare
Description: Revision Skincare products deliver benefits you can see for yourself, as part of a rejuvenating regimen or enhancements to in-office procedures. Our commitment to clinical testing is modeled on the principles of pharmaceutical protocols, and our pioneering innovation disrupts the status quo. Our superior formulation philosophy delivers transformative results while promoting skin health.

Name: Beesline
Description:
Beesline has been pioneering clean formulation for over 30 years! 

A leading clean skincare brand, Beesline is now present in more than 25 countries, across 6 continents. With recent expansions to 5 European countries—Norway, Sweden, Italy, France, and Austria—and the fastest growing market being China with a solid double-digit growth; we continue to solidify our reputation for excellence.

Our founders, a chemist and a pharmacist, established Beesline in 1993. Today, we are on a mission to disrupt the boundaries of the beauty industry and accelerate the action to protect our planet.

Our products are certified COSMOS ORGANIC for being up to 100% organic, our ingredients are up to 100% natural, cruelty-free, ethically sourced, and dermatologically tested. We are free from harsh ingredients, petrochemicals, or parabens and never tested on animals. Our safe formulations follow the ISO 16128 1 and 2, the European Cosmetics regulation (EC) N° 1223/2009, and the CIR recommendations.

Inspired by the science of Apitherapy, our formulations harness the power of bee byproducts for alternative treatments. As a beegan company, we are committed to sourcing bee byproducts sustainably, and supporting ethical beekeeping and wild bee conservation.

Innovation and sustainability are at the heart of everything we do. We are leading the refill revolution with our water-free Forever range, which was awarded #1 innovation in the "Natural & Organic" category at the Cosmoprof Awards, among 600 worldwide participants. 

Our innovations embody four key factors that drive consumers to choose us: effective formulas, beautiful packaging, pleasant application, and sustainable experience.

We believe in collaborative partnership and offer regulatory, marketing, commercial, educational, and scientific support to any new partner.

Beesline develops and manufactures its products in ISO 22716-certified state-of-the-art facilities located across 6 strategic locations in Lebanon, Egypt, and UAE.

Name: Cosmetica Italia - associazione nazionale imprese cosmetiche
Description:
Dal 1967 Cosmetica Italia è la voce dell’industria cosmetica nazionale e della sua filiera. Conta tra le sue fila oltre 630 imprese - multinazionali, piccole e medie realtà legate al territorio e a produzioni specifiche - per un totale di 36mila addetti diretti che diventano 391mila sull’intera filiera cosmetica.

La compagine associativa rappresenta il 90% del fatturato del settore che ha superato gli 11,8 miliardi nel 2021; questo valore raggiunge i 33 miliardi analizzando il sistema economico allargato della filiera.

Negli anni Cosmetica Italia si è affermata come riferimento del comparto in ambito tecnico-normativo ed economico. Supporta inoltre le imprese nello sviluppo del loro business in Italia e all’estero e promuove la reputazione del settore con progetti di comunicazione mirati.

Aderendo a Federchimica, Cosmetica Italia è l’unica associazione di rappresentanza del settore nel panorama confindustriale ed è la più grande a livello europeo come membro di Cosmetics Europe.

Fin dalla sua fondazione è inoltre partner istituzionale di BolognaFiere Cosmoprof nella promozione della più grande manifestazione fieristica al mondo dedicata alla cosmesi.

Completa le attività di Cosmetica Italia, Cosmetica Italia Servizi, società impegnata nella formazione specialistica di settore e nell’erogazione di servizi specifici per le imprese come consulenza e testing.

Inoltre, sono legate all’Associazione anche Accademia del Profumo, per promuove l’esclusività e la cultura della profumeria selettiva, e Camera Italiana dell’Acconciatura, che sostiene la filiera di riferimento.

Cosmetica Italia pensa anche al sociale patrocinando dal 2006 l’associazione La forza e il sorriso – L.G.F.B. Italia, promotrice di laboratori di bellezza gratuiti a favore di donne in trattamento oncologico.

ABC cosmetici, attraverso l’omonimo sito web, è infine il progetto targato Cosmetica Italia per favorire una corretta informazione al consumatore sui cosmetici e sul loro utilizzo.

Name: Skelt Beauty Brands
Description:
O grupo Skelt Beauty Brands é formado por três marcas incríveis: Skelt Cosmetics, Creamy Skincare e The Joy Lab. 

A Skelt surgiu em 2017, e é hoje a queridinha das celebridades que adoram um bronze dourado. Criamos o autobronzeador perfeito, com ingredientes de excelência que promovem um efeito natural e de longa duração. Levamos o glow do tapete vermelho para as nossas clientes, garantindo um bronzeado além do verão. 

Já a Creamy Skincare surgiu no finalzinho de 2019, trazendo fórmulas inteligentes com alta concentração de ativos comprovadamente eficazes. Apenas o essencial para tratar a pele a fundo com excelente custo-benefício. A verdadeira revolução skincare! 

E a The Joy Lab, marca mais recente do grupo, com sua entrada em 2023, traz a filosofia kaizen e produtos com foco no sensorial e em alta performance.

Nossos produtos são acessíveis para todos, sem distinções de raça, sexo, idade, credo ou signo. Somos para a pele! 

Aqui, valorizamos autonomia, inovação e colaboração. Nosso ambiente é dinâmico e acolhedor, onde cada Skelter tem voz e protagoniza sua trajetória. Buscamos crescimento contínuo – para nossas marcas e para nossas pessoas –, criando um espaço onde cada desafio é uma oportunidade de aprendizado.

Ser Skelter é acreditar na potência da beleza dentro e fora. A beleza de ser quem somos começa aqui.

Name: PRINCIPIA
Description: Dermocosméticos com alta performance, transparência e preços justos.

Name: frank body
Description:
Famous for my coffee body scrub, I now have a full high performance, clean skincare range; available worldwide. 

For more information, visit www.frankbody.com and follow @frank_bod.

Name: DERMA&HEALTH
Description:
DERMA&HEALTH is at the forefront of dermatology, aesthetic skincare and healthcare. We are a pioneering developer of breakthrough formulations for the face and body. We are also an internationally renowned health and beauty brand. We are experts in marketing, export and import and distribution for the pharmaceuticals sector. In short, we are the driving force behind some of the world’s best-loved health and beauty products.

The story so far
Founded in 2006, Derma&Health has become a leading brand in clinics, pharmacies and homes worldwide. Our strategy has always been firmly focused on innovating skincare and healthcare, and with our strengths in science, innovation, marketing and logistics, we are rapidly changing the market.

We understand our consumers – and we know just how to anticipate and satisfy the needs of the millions of people looking for skincare and healthcare solutions. As well as focusing on the here and now, we examine consumer trends of the future to ensure that we stay ahead of the game. We know what our consumers want and we have the know-how to deliver it and engage them.

Our Philosophy
At Derma&Health, we are passionate about providing men and women with revolutionary, scientifically proven and evidence-based technology that delivers the best possible results for the face and body.

Our approach is simple – to research and develop products that push the boundaries of health and skincare and to combine science and luxury to heal, treat and pamper the consumer. Our philosophy goes far beyond simply anti-ageing and visibly reducing wrinkles; it embodies our desire to deliver well being and happiness.

Name: BIOLOGIQUE RECHERCHE
Description:
For more than forty years, Biologique Recherche has been writing a unique and visionary page in the history of high-end personalized skin care. 

The Biologique Recherche Methodology has a reputation for astounding effectiveness based on a clinical approach to beauty care using pure, concentrated and raw ingredients, as well as innovative and meticulous protocols and procedures.

Biologique Recherche is an international brand, now available in 80 countries. 

The Ambassade, its flagship beauty institute, is located at the prestigious Avenue des Champs-Elysées, in Paris.

Name: WYCON cosmetics
Description:
WYCON Cosmetics è un brand italiano nato nel 2009 da un’intuizione di Gianfranco Satta, imprenditore e distributore storico nel settore della cosmetica femminile e Raffaella Pagano, product manager, profonda conoscitrice del mondo del make-up e body care.
L’idea alla base del progetto è stata semplice ma complessa al tempo stesso: rompere gli schemi del mercato della cosmesi,caratterizzato esclusivamente da marchi che propongono prodotti a prezzi esorbitanti, per offrire a tutti la possibilità di acquistare collezioni di Make-Up, Skin Care e Body Care di elevata qualità, al giusto prezzo ed accessibili a tutti.
 L’esperienza nel settore, la conoscenza dell’intera filiera produttiva e dei trend beauty, sono state le basi per dar vita ad un concept retail che soddisfacesse i desideri dei consumatori ogni giorno: l’intuizione ha portato all’eliminazione di costosi passaggi intermedi tra produttore e consumatore, investendo sulla qualità delle texture e skinfeel pur mantenendo un posizionamento sul mercato molto competitivo.
Perché pagare un prodotto più del dovuto quando in realtà non lo merita?
 È stata questa la domanda alla quale WYCON cosmetics ha dato risposta con la nascita del primo store, proponendo una collezione totalmente Made in Italy.
 Risposta così apprezzata dalle consumatrici da far diventare il brand uno dei leader di mercato attualmente presenti in Italia con più di 300 negozi monomarca nelle principali città, oltre alla presenza in Portogallo, Grecia, Romania, Francia, Kosovo, Russia, Kazakistan, Libano, Serbia, Malta, Svizzeria, Georgia e Middle East.

Name: Cosmetics Europe - The Personal Care Association
Description:
Cosmetics Europe - The Personal Care Association has been the voice of Europe’s cosmetic, toiletry and perfumery industry since 1962.

As the industry’s European trade association, Cosmetics Europe's membership consists of:

       •  22 active corporate members,
       •  29 active associations members,
       •  8 supporting corporate members,
       •  4 supporting association members,
       •  6 correspondent members.

Cosmetics Europe represents the cosmetics and personal care industry in Europe. The vast majority of Europe’s 500 million consumers use cosmetic and personal care products on a daily basis to protect their health, enhance their well-being and boost their self-esteem. Ranging from antiperspirants, dermo-cosmetics, fragrances, make-up and shampoos, to soaps, sunscreens and toothpastes, cosmetics and personal care products play an essential role in all stages of our life. 

Valued at €96 billion at retail sales price in 2023, Europe is a global flagship market for cosmetics and personal care products.

In 2023, the industry supported 3.5 million jobs across Europe with over 259,244 people employed directly, and a further 2.68 million indirectly in the cosmetics value chain.

Name: Yamá Cosméticos
Description:
A Yamá Cosméticos nasceu em 1967 do sonho de Paulo Yamamora, que com muita luta e persistência conseguiu construir essa marca que hoje é referência nacional em cosméticos.

Atualmente são mais de 200 produtos, com destaque principal para a linha de Pó Descolorante, que é líder de vendas no Brasil (canal perfumaria). Vale lembrar também do famoso Creme Yamasterol, que foi o primeiro produto da empresa e até hoje é um grande sucesso.

Sempre inovando e buscando atender à cada necessidade específica, a Yamá investe forte no desenvolvimento de produtos de alta tecnologia para cuidar da sua beleza e garantir o seu bem estar.
___

Yamá Cosméticos was born in 1967 from the dream of Paulo Yamamora, who with much struggle and persistence managed to build this brand that is now a national reference in cosmetics in Brazil.

Currently, there are more than 200 products, with the main highlight being the Pó Descolorante line, which is the Brazilian sales leader (perfumery channel). It is also worth remembering the famous Cream Yamasterol, which was the first product of the company and to this day is a great success.

Always innovating and seeking to meet each specific need, Yamá invests heavily in the development of high technology products to take care of its beauty and ensure its well being.

Name: NASHI ARGAN
Description:
Nashi Argan is a lifestyle cosmetic brand born in 2010 from an idea of Landoll Milano Company, leader of  professional hair care industry since 1966. 

A line of products that can be easily used at home with the same results as in professional salons, Nashi Argan is 100% made in Italy cosmetic brand that listens to customers’ requests and meets their needs with passion and efficiency. 

All products are characterised by the heady fragrance of Nashi Argan: sweet and spicy notes are so unique and beloved that they gave birth to the Fragrance line! 

Nashi Argan is focused on building an immersive beauty experience through passion, love and engagement of the customers, the  #NashiLovers, through multiple formats and touchpoints, from partner hair salons to shop in shops, from Nashi flagship stores to Nashi Salons, where is possible to live the ultimate experience.

In Italy Nashi relies on more than 2000 salon partners, while worldwide developed an international distribution network in more than 50 countries, from product distribution to franchising development agreements. 
Thanks to a strict selective distribution policy which does not allow indiscriminate online sales, Nashi Argan products are found exclusively where they are supposed to be.

Name: COOLA
Description:
COOLA is the quintessential slice of California life. We embody the best parts of living here: a fusion of organic wellness, an outdoor, active lifestyle, and supporting local and diverse communities—passions we want to share with you through our products.

We all try to eat better, live smarter, love more, and be more present and engaged in our experiences. We want you to enjoy every simple, happy moment and feel confident that our products are protecting and improving your skin in the healthiest way possible.

At COOLA, we choose the most innovative, scientifically advanced ingredients that are also as natural, organic, sustainable, and locally sourced as can be.

Our dedicated team works out of a collaborative, art-filled office in southern California where we can be true to our mission and lifestyle. We’re committed to giving back at every level—from helping to support a global awareness of skin cancer awareness and treatment around the world while protecting our global greater environment, to support and uplift local communities through how we source our ingredients.

COOLA’s goal is to bring you better products, create a better community, and contribute to developing a better world. All while making you look and feel your natural, radiant best.

Name: Beekman 1802
Description:
Beekman 1802 was founded by Dr. Brent Ridge & Josh Kilmer-Purcell on a single act of Kindness. Powered by the science of goat milk and Kindness, our formulas are designed to deeply hydrate and nourish the skin without irritation. As the Sensitive Skin Experts,  we proudly create microbiome-friendly products that are certified cruelty-free and safe for sensitive skin. Each drop of goat milk contains 31 active nutrients that are clinically proven to strengthen the skin barrier and visibly restore skin to its healthiest state.

We retail through our e-commerce site, Ulta Beauty, our historic Kindness Shop in Sharon Springs, NY, HSN & QVC, and other leading retailers across the country.

Our Headquarters is in Schenectady, NY, where all of our creative, marketing, and sales-related functions are located.  We also operate in Sharon Springs, NY and Orlando, FL. We also have a robust hybrid, remote, and Field team. We are always on the hunt for diverse, Kind individuals to join Team Beekman. 

Beekman 1802 is a proud equal opportunity employer of all qualified persons.

Name: Alpaya Dermaceuticals
Description:
ALPAYA Dermaceuticals cilt ve saç problemlerine, etkili ve yenilikçi çözümler üretmek için araştırmalar yapan ve Eczacı Kenan Alpay öncülüğünde, en önemli birimi AR-GE olan dinamik bir kurumdur.

Sonuca odaklı, güvenli,  sözünü tutan ürünler üretmek  temel amacımızdır. 

Ürün kalitesini doğrudan etkileyen stabilite testleri, mikrobiyolojik, mikroskopik ve spektrofotometrik incelemeleri, SPF tayin testleri, renk değişimleri, TEWL (nem kaybı) ve cilt ph'ı gibi analizleri yaptığımız Ar-Ge Merkezimizde;

• Bilimsel verileri tarıyor, literatürü takip ediyor, doğanın kimyasını okuyoruz.
• Ürünlerimizde farklılıklar yaratıp kalıcı üstünlükler sağlamak için; kullandığımız içerikleri detaylı araştırıyor, nihai onayı vermeden önce yüzlerce kez yeniden ve yeniden test edip, sayısız laboratuvar çalışması yapıyoruz.
• Doğal içeriklerin bir arada kullanıldığında gösterdikleri sinerjik etkinin bilincindeyiz ve bu sinerjiyi formüllerimize aktarıyoruz.
• Geliştirdiğimiz formüllerin hem güvenlik hem etkinlik testlerini yapıyoruz.

Etkili, doğal, güvenli, saf ve temiz ürünler sunmak, AR-GE’den başlayarak tüm kadrolarımızın benimsediği ortak değerimizdir.

Name: Naturalps
Description:
Naturalps, located in Montreux “the pearl of the Swiss Riviera”, is the specialist in innovative private label cosmetics from bulk (ready-to-go, tailor made) to full service. 
We will surprise you with new textures, new actives and new concepts while always offering :
- Swiss quality
- Flexibility
- Efficiency
- Innovation

Name: ESI Show
Description:
Welcome to ESI Show, Canada's Premier Beauty Industry Trade Show that stands as the largest gathering of professionals and suppliers from across the entire beauty industry!
Why settle for the ordinary when you can indulge in the extraordinary? Immerse yourself in an unparalleled experience where innovation, education, and networking converge to elevate your expertise and expand your horizons.



2025 upcoming ESI SHOWS - Toronto, Montreal.

Name: Diva International S.r.l.
Description:
THE COMPANY

The company, active in the cosmetics field for the past 25 years, is specialized in the production of wet wipes both on its own brands and as private label.

The factory is set in Spello, near to Assisi, and the production unit is placed in an area of over  10,000 square meters.

The company is always driven by the new market and customers requests and needs,continuosly improving its own commercial and technical resources in two specific channels:

The cosmetic sector
The household sector
VISION & MISSION

Innovative solutions for high quality products
Diva international has always offered innovative solutions to develop high quality products at a fair price.
This is possible thanks to a constant reseach & development activity, to bring forward customer’s needs.
The long-time experience and the specialization are the key to choose the right raw materials , eco friendly and natural.

OUR CLIENTS

Diva international is active in more than a market, serving both national and international prestigious clients, as:

Large retailers
Pharmacy
Restaurant industry
Cosmetic companies
Airline companies
THE STRUCTURE

The production line is composed of 30 automatized lines to realize flow packs and single wrapped wet wipes, with different welding methods.

INNOVATION

Diva International is all along focused on the market evolution and committed in the development of new products. From the foundation of the company, the uniqueness of the company was clear. Diva was the first to bring in the Italian market cotton wipes and tissues.

More info at:

Company website
www.divaint.com

Name: LQF - Laboratório Farmacêutico
Description:
Com sede própria com mais de 2.600 m2 e situada na cidade de São José do Rio Preto/SP, a LQF segue e respeita todos os padrões de qualidade e controle exigidos pela indústria farmacêutica e conta com os equipamentos mais modernos disponíveis no mercado.

A LQF é dirigida por profissionais que contam com vasta experiência de mais de 30 anos na área industrial farmacêutica e um corpo técnico altamente especializado no desenvolvimento, fabricação, envase e acondicionamento de produtos cosméticos de alta performance.

Todo processo de fabricação é mantido acompanhando sistemas operacionais validados com supervisão e manuseios de profissionais treinados e capacitados, seguindo as BPF (Boas Praticas de Fabricação) da ANVISA, que assegura a qualidade em todas as fases dos processos produtivos, garantindo que seja cumprida toda e qualquer especificação do rigoroso controle que é exigido exclusivamente para as industrias farmacêuticas. 

O prédio da LQF, desde seu projeto inicial, foi construído para ser uma das maiores indústrias do segmento de cosméticos, higiene pessoal e beleza do país.

Missão:
Fabricar produtos que proporcionem confiança, resultado e bem estar às pessoas.

Visão:
Ser referência em Desenvolvimento e Fabricação de produtos de beleza, cuidados e tratamentos.
Location: São José do Rio Preto, São Paulo

Name: Alianza Terceirização de Cosméticos
Description:
Fundada em 2000, a Alianza tem como característica a excelência em terceirização de cosméticos. Temos expertise para desenvolver projetos com formulações personalizadas e fornecemos todo o suporte para o lançamento de uma linha de cosméticos. Desenvolvemos também projetos personalizados para house care e para o mercado artesanal em geral.

Alguns dos tipos de produtos que fabricamos:

- Shampoos
- Condicionadores
- Máscaras
- Cremes Corporais
- Géis
- Pomadas
- Difusores de Ambiente
- Perfumes e Deo Colonias
- Maquiagem Líquida (bases, gloss labial, etc..)
- Esmaltes em Gel

Para conhecer melhor nossos serviços acesse nosso site e redes sociais:

Site: www.alianzacosmeticos.com.br
Facebook: www.facebook.com/alianzacosmeticos

Name: Future Cosmetics
Description:
Future Cosmetics is the international company leader in distributing cosmetic products in Spain. It was founded in 1990 and for more than 25 years now we’ve been focused on distributing colour cosmetics and skincare with innovative and alternative products as well as merchandising and display solutions. Thanks to our experience with the main perfumery chains in our market we have become a highly professional company.
 
We distribute more than 20 international brands, such as Essence, Catrice, Gosh Copenhagen, Sleek MakeUP, Real Techniques, Batiste, Ecotools, Prestige Cosmetics, It’s Skin, Palladio, 7th Heaven, Eylure, UBU, Kinetics, Beautik PRO, Kiss and many others.
 
We are a young and dynamic company with a high capacity of managing logistics. We work with a great amount of SKUs in our warehouse which leads us to a big sales capacity. We supply our products to more than 1K customers -counting the main Spanish retailers among them- and we have a strong presence in almost 3,2K doors.
 
We are happy to share our 2015 data:
- More than 14,500K SKUs shipped
- 3,181 POS being supplied
- Nationwide presence

Future Cosmetics is the global company that brings us tomorrow’s trends today.

Name: Phytomer USA
Description:
Thanks to its unique professional know-how, for close to 50 years, PHYTOMER has been creating manual treatment protocols exclusively for spas and beauty salons. These protocols are practiced by the best beauty therapists around the world in 10,000 outlets, including hundreds of prestigious hotel spas. 

PHYTOMER is a pioneer in marine biotechnologies. We develop in-house cutting-edge active ingredients. And we put together, with great passion, highly innovative products to deliver outstanding performance. All of these products are made in Saint-Malo, France, with a continuing committed approach to preserving the environment. 

Generation after generation, we have been transforming the sea into skin care to better reveal women's beauty.

Name: DAR Kozmetik
Description:
Dar kozmetik, provides private-label services in cosmetics and pharmaceutical industries and also manage company owned brands. Our Brands: Zubio & Soltis

Explore our products & brands in the following links: https://soltisshop.com/ 
https://zubio.co

Name: EIDEAL
Description:
Founded in 2008, EIDEAL is a leading provider and distributor of premium hair tools and professional beauty brands across the Middle East and North Africa.

What began with Haysam Eid, a hairstylist who saw a gap for high-quality, salon-grade tools tailored to the region, has grown into a brand built on innovation, precision, and purpose.

Today, EIDEAL partners with over 1,000 salons, owns twss its own hair tools brand and represents world-renowned brands such as Davines, Olaplex, Amazon Keratin, Comfort Zone and more. With offices in Dubai and Lebanon, EIDEAL continue to set the standard for professional excellence in the beauty industry.

At our core, we are driven by our values — Excellence, Innovation, Diversity, Ethics, Accountability, and Loyalty — empowering stylists and clients alike to look and feel their best. Our edge lies in combining world-class products with a personal touch, ensuring every partnership feels seen, supported, and inspired.

Name: Haute Custom Beauty
Description:
Our mission is to revolutionize the beauty industry by merging dermatology and technology, providing the most advanced and personalized, skin wellness.

We help consumers exceed expectations through personalized, clean skincare solutions, unattainable with competitor's one-size-fits-all offerings.

Born from merging a 3-generation European Spa based in Barcelona and a research-based family based out of Austin to develop a proprietary algorithm and a full skincare line.

Name: DUST+CREAM
Description:
DUST+CREAM is a dynamic brand of cosmetics, makeup and personal care products. With more than 80 stores in Greece and Cyprus we are covering all beauty and personal care needs with "best value for money products". 

In DUST+CREAM stores our customers can choose from a wide range of choices and selections. The products are scientifically tested and guaranteed to comply with the specifications set by the Greek National Organization for Medicines (EOF) and EU regulations. 
#beautyismyplayground #againstanimaltesting

Name: SweetCare
Description:
Sweetcare is an official online retailer of premium beauty and health products, carefully selecting over 25,000 products from over 600 brands and working directly with the brands or their licensed distributors through long-established partnerships. 

Launched in 2008, SweetCare was founded to meet the challenge of improving lives through the endless power of beauty and health. 

We are born from a new wave of the beauty business, based on a progressive consumer experience: provide plenty of buying options of guaranteed high-quality products and advanced highly-performing treatments, sensibly priced, hand-in-hand with current trends and concerns. 

We see customer care as an extension of our integrity. Our team of professional beauty experts and pharmacists works every day to offer a unique online experience, through meaningful and relevant products, service, and personal, one-to-one guidance to tackle all needs.

In our daily operations, we continuously strive to minimize ecological implications, by using biodegradable paper and glueless boxes, reusing all packaging materials, purchasing from local suppliers to avoid environmental pressures from long-distance transport, and increasing the number of brands with clean beauty concerns.

At the heart of SweetCare, we embrace all beauty and do not accept unrealistic standards of perfection: we want to make people feel good but still unique. We are committed to addressing all needs, regardless of gender, age, or ethnicity.

Proudly Portuguese, ranked by Financial Times FT 1000 fastest growing companies, SweetCare is an organization providing an open, passionate, and agile work environment of exploration, empowerment, and opportunities to lead the way to bring the best to all our customers.

This is SweetCare. Because we care.

Name: The 7 Virtues Beauty Inc.
Description:
At The 7 Virtues, we make perfumes that are good for the world, and good for your soul. 

We’re a socially and environmentally conscious brand that sustainably sources ingredients from around the world. Our aromatherapy scents are cruelty-free, hypoallergenic, and free of phthalates, parabens, formaldehyde, and sulfates.

Our hero perfumes are Vanilla Woods, Cherry Ambition, Amber Vanilla, Coconut Sun, Lotus Pear and Santal Vanille. Our aromatherapy perfumes are now available Exclusively in Sephora Canada, USA, EU, UK and AUS/NZ.

In the summer of 2024, we opened our flag ship perfume atelier in the Queen's Marque in Halifax where clients design and name their own bespoke perfume.

Name: CurlMix
Description: Our 4 step system helps curly women achieve the best Wash + Go ever without toxic ingredients, giving you moisturized, defined, frizz-free curls.

Name: Dr. Wondersmile
Description:
Since launching in 2018, Wondersmile has been changing the way people access health and wellbeing. We started with teeth straightening and then added teeth whitening.  

We’ve expanded from one clinic in Australia, to locations and services across Europe, Asia and most recently North America. Our treatments and services utilise technology to make health and wellbeing more affordable and accessible for our customers. We’re on a mission to politely disrupt the industry one product at a time and we’ve only just begun. 

At Wondersmile, we take teeth straightening and our customer care seriously, but not ourselves. As a company, as teams, and as individuals we’re committed to continuous improvement. And we do it all with a genuine passion and smile. 

We’re a young company and we’re growing fast. We make that possible through innovative technologies and digital solutions which help us to work and grow more efficiently.

Name: Hampshire Cosmetics
Description:
With some 40 years of experience in the fragrance, toiletries and personal care markets, Hampshire Cosmetics has accumulated an extensive portfolio to offer clients. The move from Contract Filler to Full Service Provider over a number of years, has seen the company build on this heritage to enhance its offering and enable clients to take advantage of Hampshire Cosmetics’ philosophy “Full Service… Full Stop”.

The company’s integrated capability allows it to support clients in a wide range of manufacturing, liquid filling and packaging formats. Our in-house creative team has extensive resources and experienced staff to support customer specific or blue-sky product creations encompassing skin and hair care, fragrance, men’s toiletries, bath and “adult” market products.

With its range of accreditations and strong commitment to Environmental, Ethical and Quality values, Hampshire Cosmetics offers its clients a full service facility encompassing all these elements throughout the life cycle of product development and delivery.

We are always interested to discuss new ideas, concepts and proposals and all clients can be assured of our commitment to confidentiality at all times.

Name: Epicutis Skin Care
Description:
Epicutis Skin Care Range is a proudly South African company that primarily manufactures a variety of personal care products.

Our products range from fragranced and non-fragranced body creams, to lotions, and so much more.

Epicutis offers customers a new, vibrant, and exciting product range that is suitable for the entire family.

Our key objective is to supply high quality products at affordable prices across all the market segments.

Our ingredients are carefully selected by skin specialists, uniquely blended, each with a specific benefit to your skin, for sustained, visible and intentional results.

Name: Mankind
Description: Leading Male grooming and Style website.  Beauty Expert is the parent company for leading online retail of high end Beauty Products.

Name: Bella Lash
Description: Bella Lash develops and offers premium eyelash extension products and training for beauty professionals. We proudly design and manufacture most of our products in the USA.

Name: Boots Pharmacy
Description: Boots Pharmacy is a cosmetics company based out of 90 Nottingham Road Eastwood , NOTTINGHAM, United Kingdom.

Name: Kinetics. Modern nail brand
Description:
Kinetics Nail Systems is a Latvian manufacturer of Professional Nail care and Skin care products with 20+ years of experience and partners in more than 40 countries around the world.
We have our own R&D lab and all products are developed and manufactured in-house. 

We are small and creative team that appreciates honesty and attention to detail. We care deeply about the result and we are ready to go the extra mile to achieve it. We highly value and trust in our professional and passionate team that encourages us to dream big. Challenging ourselves makes us stronger and smarter with every step we take, and we believe the best way to live life is by exploring it. 

If you want to explore new heights with our friendly team, let us know.

Name: Nail Technician
Description: A nail technician is a beauty specialist who is responsible for the grooming and appearance of a client's fingernails and toenails. He or she provides manicures, pedicures, nail shaping, cuticle grooming, callus removal, synthetic nail treatments, and application of nail polish for their clients.

Name: Cosméticos Valmy
Description: Con más de 45 años en el mercado, somos una empresa pionera en fabricación y comercialización de productos de belleza y cuidado personal, que satisface las necesidades de nuestros consumidores y trabajadores.

Name: Active Box - cosmetically different
Description:
Active Box - cosmetically different

From the idea of "eco-beauty" born Active Box, an innovative and unique reality, in the cosmetic field, able to anticipate the marketing trends offering a wide range of exclusive active ingredients.

Our philosophy and our success is fuelled by a constant research and selection, all over the world, of new and advanced technologies and sophisticated ingredients for Personal Care applications.

Maintenance of the genetic material integrity, anti-thermal ageing, cell longevity enhancement, mitochondrial protection, encapsulated mimicking peptides, are just some of the new features offered by Active Box.

Our mission is based on the respect of the environment and on the development of a sustainable business strategy. Active Box is constantly committed in the choice of international technological partners and in the promotion of innovative organic ingredients, strictly "cruelty-free".

The company, through an highly interactive web site and an important technical and managerial know-how, also offers a strategic marketing and communications consultancy in research and development stages.

Active Box is supported by additional facilities site in Zurich, Prague and Barcelona, which help to provide technical and sales support abroad.

Name: id beauty
Description:
Founded in 1995 by Alexandre Cukier, ID Beauty Group has developed strong competencies in three core activities : the formulation and manufacture of high-tech cosmetic products via AG Labs, the conception and development of anti-aging cosmetic brands and the international distribution of cosmetic products and fragrances with a tailored commercial strategy for each brand.

Regarding the formulation business, id beauty is the owner of AG Labs located in New Jersey, which developed the exclusive complex formula of each cosmetic brand of the group. Thus, they ensure the final products effectiveness, which is approved by independant testing labs.

Regarding the development business, id beauty is the owner of both Rexaline, which has become a reference in anti-aging superhydratation and is now distributed in 23 countries, and Wonderskin, launched in 2013, which combines for the first time in a single product 4 powerful active anti-aging ingredients in their purest form. id beauty exclusive brands are distributed by famous retailers such as Sephora, Douglas, Nocibé, Planet Parfum, Ile de Beauté...

Regarding the distribution business, id beauty acts as a distributor for the most prestigious groups in the fragrance and cosmetics indutries in 30 countries in Europe and in North-America and on 3 segments : selective distribution, mass-selective distribution and mass-market distribution.

Offices :
- Paris : 31 rue François 1er 75008 Paris

Rooted in Bharat, we make self-care accessible across every region and skin tone, tailoring our range to suit diverse climatic and cultural needs. All our formulations are cruelty-free, vegan, and dermatologically approved, delivering authentic results that honor your truth, not trends.

We go beyond just products; we create experiences. From discovery to delivery, our focus is always on how you feel, what you need, and what your skin truly deserves.
Because when it’s Sotrue, it shows. And it starts with you.

Name: Hertz Perfumes & Cosmetics
Description:
Hertz Chemicals Private Limited is a mature yet exciting and innovative company. Our name denotes success, perfection and a style that transcends international borders.

Founded in 1975 the head and corporate offices are in North and South Mumbai. Our state-of-the-art manufacturing facility is strategically located in Daman, Gujarat.

Our in house creative teams design new fragrances for each segment of the society and are fully equipped to carry out new product development from scratch to finish.
We can bring a product from concept to market in record time because of our incomparable design and manufacturing capabilities.

Hertz products are available in over 29 countries. Our own subsidiaries guarantee professional knowledge of key local markets.

Hertz group is amongst the largest Indian manufacturers & supplier of various perfumes and enjoys excellent reputation with all the local regulatory authorities and its various stakeholders like employees, suppliers & customers.

Name: Skin Creamery
Description:
In a world flooded with information and choice, Skin Creamery exists to simplify skin care, stripping bare your daily routine to the essentials that naturally nourish and nurture the skin. The Skin Creamery ethos is to be kind to the earth, and kind to your skin. The range was founded in 2014, by Hannah Rubin, with a commitment to natural, simple living. Hannah’s childhood in South Africa’s verdant Garden Route region fostered in her a passion for a conscious way of life. Her training exposed her to quality skin care products and top spas, where she learned a deep appreciation for the carefully composed feel and scent of each luxury product; and the way each carried a unique sense of wellbeing or upliftment. Intrigued by these sensory experiences, Hannah studied the composition of products, researching ingredients and their properties.

To bring calm and ease to her busy daily routine, Hannah envisioned a beautiful skin care product that could be placed beside the bath or shower – one product for face and body, with an all-over hydrating effect that wouldn’t compromise on quality. Working closely with a specialising chemist, she crafted the Everyday Cream over the course of a year and a half – and the journey that is Skin Creamery had begun.

Throughout the years, Hannah has remained committed to using only the finest organic ingredients. This means each component in Skin Creamery products is more gentle on the skin and less likely to cause irritation. Every ingredient is selected for its unique healing qualities and ability to easily penetrate the skin.

The Skin Creamery vision is to instill a daily ritual of simple self-care, which translates into a loving appreciation for who you are, just as you are.

Name: AccuFix Cosmetics Pvt. Ltd.
Description: Toxic ingredients can be sourced from synthetic and natural sources. At AccuFix Cosmetics, we are committed to using clean, biocompatible and bioavailable ingredients that offer tangible benefits for your skin. We believe that science and nature work best together and strive to bring you the best ingredients from both worlds to ensure that our products are safe and effective.

Name: ModelCo
Description:
Ever since we dreamt up our cult ModelCo Turbo Lashwand Eyelash Curler over 15 years ago, we’ve been thinking in pink. As a former model agent, our CEO Shelley had an intuitive knack for anticipating what women (really) wanted in their makeup bags and bathroom cabinets. And so, with the goal of believable, achievable beauty, we launched our first-to-market heated eyelash curler in 2002, followed by our innovative, world-first Tan Airbrush in A Can. 

ModelCo quickly grew into a complete collection of clever, quick-fix, beauty enhancers to help us all look effortlessly amazing and ready for everything. Soon enough, we became widely known and loved for our novel prep products, on-trend colour cosmetics, simple-but-smart, natural skin care, and award-winning self-tanning solutions. 
 
20 years later, we (still) dream big but talk truths. We are beauty futurists dedicated to our search for the next big breakthrough and sharing it with our customers around the world. We’re proud to have created over 250 products and we test them all in Australia on models, not animals, which has earnt us cruelty-free kudos and a big tick from PETA.

Name: Australian Glow
Description:
Inside a bright neon lab, somewhere in the Australian desert, a secret formula was developed by people in clean white coats, to create the perfect, bronzed self tan. This little bottle was so in love with human skin, and only ever seeing lab coats made it lonely and sad. Until one day, it decided to escape. 

The bottle rolled around and around in search of dry skin to hydrate, keep healthy, and share its  golden glow. Luckily, it found self lovers everywhere who were so happy to feel confident and cute from its special ingredients. Then it had lots of formula babies, and together they became Australian Glow. 

What is the Australian Glow? It’s the aura of confidence you get from a perfect tan. The fuzzy feeling after a compliment from a friend. When you catch your reflection and love what you see. When your skin’s good. Or it’s not, and you know it doesn’t matter anyway. Australian Glow is about self tan that puts your skin first, with hydrating ingredients to nourish and make your golden glow stick around cause it loves you so much.

So, have you just met your longest lasting tan yet? Yes :)

Name: Xlash
Description:
Hi we're Xlash, nice to meet you.

Our story started with the humble dream of bringing longer lashes to the world. Way back in 2012 (yeah we’re that old) we noticed the lengths people went to to make their lashes pop-- it was pricey and hard to keep up. So we set out on a mission to simplify things-- create an option (for those who wanted it) that was safe and really works, didn’t break the bank, and most importantly was easy to use.

XLASH isn’t just a product but a hi-tech solution, with a lot of love that went into that first 3ml bottle and every single one since.

Name: CAMORAK
Description:
Welcome to the Camorak World!
Founded in 1964 by Domenico Palumberi and Carla Mazza, we are now in the hands of the third generation!
With 60 years of experience, we stand as a reference in the cosmetic industry, characterized by products with a high level of natural ingredients and proven effectiveness.

Our mission?
To transform the concept of beauty through innovation and dedication.

Cosmetic Lines
At Camorak, we don't just produce cosmetics; we create personalized experiences:
-	We offer standard cosmetic lines, "start to go," where the label with the client's logo is applied, even for small batches.
-	We develop new and exclusive formulations based on specific customer requests.

We stand by our commitment to your vision. Our flexibility is your strength.

Pioneers of Organic Beauty in Italy
We were among the first to introduce organic elements into Italian cosmetics, combining beauty and sustainability.

Certified Excellence
We ensure the highest quality and safety in every product. Our focus on safety and excellence is underscored by our certifications:
GMP (ISO 22716) -ISO 9001 -Bio Eco AIAB – Cosmos

Join us on this journey of innovation, where beauty meets a commitment to a sustainable future.

Description:
Alva é um movimento que transforma!

Transforma a rotina de cuidado pessoal em cuidado da saúde, da família e do meio ambiente. Transforma a beleza convencional em beleza limpa.

Somos uma marca que oferece produtos de cuidado pessoal com compromisso social, com ingredientes reais e que beneficiam toda a cadeia de produção. 

PAIXÃO PELO NATURAL

ANTENADOS

CONHECIMENTO QUE TRANSFORMA 
Quanto mais nos aprofundamos, mais sentimos que é nossa responsabilidade passar a informação adiante. Incentivamos o compartilhamento do conhecimento: seja entre colaboradores, clientes e parceiros ou com a sociedade como um todo.

Name: Beauty People Cosmetics
Description:
Beauty People: Celebrate Beauty Everyday

At Beauty People Cosmetics India, we believe beauty isn’t reserved for special occasions — it’s a part of who you are, every single day. With more than 30 years of expertise in cosmetics manufacturing, we’ve built a brand that goes beyond makeup — delivering products that enhance your beauty while caring for your skin.

Our tagline, “Celebrate Beauty Everyday,” reflects our philosophy: that beauty should be joyful, effortless, and inclusive. Whether you’re getting ready for work, a wedding, or simply embracing your daily routine — Beauty People creates makeup that helps you feel confident, seen, and celebrated.

Our formulations are powered by skincare-enriched ingredients like Vitamin E, shea butter, hyaluronic acid, and plant-based oils — offering nourishment along with vibrant, long-lasting color. Every product is lightweight, dermatologically tested, and developed specifically for Indian skin tones and weather conditions, ensuring comfort and high performance.

What sets us apart is our in-house R&D, led by a team of Ph.D. doctorates and postgraduates in cosmetic technology, ensuring science-backed innovation at every step. Complementing this is our branding and marketing team, spearheaded by professionals from the National Institute of Fashion Technology (NIFT) with deep expertise in brand building and strategic marketing across top international beauty and lifestyle brands.

We are proud to be India’s first brand to achieve the 21-Free formula in nail polish — eliminating 21 harmful toxins without compromising on finish or wear. With a robust presence at over 25,000 retail counters across India, Beauty People is accessible, affordable, and constantly evolving.

Our entire range is vegan, cruelty-free, paraben-free, and non-toxic — designed for both makeup beginners and beauty enthusiasts who want products that perform with purpose.

Celebrate beauty in the bold, the soft, and the everyday — with Beauty People.

Name: MATIERE BRUTE LAB
Description:
« Notre raison d’être, vous aider à vous sentir bien dans votre peau »
                                                           
                                                               
                                                                   
Matière Brute est née d’une vision.

Celle d’un monde où la cosmétique revient à l’essentiel.
Où la beauté n’est pas façonnée, mais célébrée.
Où la nature n’est pas forcée, mais respectée.
Où l’on rayonne naturellement à chaque âge, quel que soit son type de peau.
Où l’on bénéficie du meilleur de chaque ingrédient naturel, sans le corrompre.

Alors nous avons créé Matière Brut Lab.

Un laboratoire français et innovant qui réalise des soins cosmétiques naturels, universels et unisexes.

Des formules concentrées, saines et efficaces, sans aucun conservateur ni artifice.
Parce que nous sommes indépendants, nous faisons les choses à notre façon.
En respectant l'environnement, et le cycle naturel des saisons.
En choisissant nos partenaires et nos producteurs en circuit court.
En étant exigeant sur les méthodes de cultures et les modes de transformation, pour préserver l'efficacité des matières premières et le vivant.

De quoi permettre à chacun de se sentir bien dans sa peau, tout au long de l’année !

Name: Yves Rocher Vietnam
Description:
Yves Rocher has been present in Vietnam for over 10 years. The brand has 45 branches and more than 300 employees across the country (Hanoi, Haiphong, Danang, Ho Chi Minh City, Binh Duong), and is headquartered in Ho Chi Minh City. An initiator of plant-based cosmetics, Yves Rocher wishes to offer his customers accessible products made from natural ingredients.

Unique business model

Over 60 years ago, the Yves Rocher Brand created a cosmetic born from a unique know-how that combines a commitment to nature, respect for communities and a passion for well-being while allowing people to reconnect with their true nature.

Both a botanist, manufacturer and retailer, Yves Rocher is the only global brand of beauty products to choose to control the entire life cycle of its products: from the plant to the skin of its 30 million customers. It is thanks to this specificity that the Brand is a pioneer in the protection of the environment.
