Name: WNF Óleos Essenciais
Description:
A WNF (World Natural Fragrances) foi fundada em 1995, com raízes na Suíça e no Brasil, a partir da integração entre natureza, ciência e propósito. A marca nasceu com a missão de levar os benefícios dos óleos essenciais ao cotidiano das pessoas, iniciando suas operações com a importação de óleos essenciais suíços para envase e comercialização no Brasil.

Um dos marcos do crescimento foi a aquisição da Fazenda das Lavandas, localizada em Monte Verde (MG), onde se iniciou o cultivo próprio de lavandas e outras plantas aromáticas, consolidando a verticalização da produção. Com o tempo, a área passou a ser também conhecida como Fazenda dos Alecrins, refletindo a ampliação da biodiversidade cultivada.

A WNF se consolidou como referência em aromaterapia, cosméticos naturais e práticas sustentáveis. Com modelo de negócios orientado pelos princípios ESG, mantém uma produção rastreável, respeita os ciclos da natureza e atua com ética e responsabilidade em toda a cadeia — da semente ao consumidor final. Seu propósito é promover saúde e bem-estar por meio do cuidado com a terra, com os processos e com a sociedade.

Em 2024, a WNF – World’s Natural Fragrances reafirma seu apoio aos Dez Princípios do Pacto Global da ONU, nas áreas de Direitos Humanos, Trabalho, Meio Ambiente e Anticorrupção, fortalecendo seu compromisso com um futuro mais justo, ético e sustentável.

Name: Union Swiss
Description:
Union Swiss (Pty) Ltd
Union Swiss researches, develops and manufactures skincare products under the Bio‑Oil, Bi‑Oil and Bioil brands. The company was started in 1954 to import Swiss skincare products into the Union of South Africa. It later began researching and developing its own skincare products and in 2000, under new ownership, was expanded from a local skincare company to a multinational organisation, which today has a presence worldwide. Union Swiss focuses exclusively on research, development and manufacture, with the distribution and selling of its products licensed to a leading local skincare company in each country.

Name: Sweet Hair Professional
Description:
Temos uma proposta diferenciada de promover uma experiência única para os clientes que utilizam o produto, através de uma constante inovação. Os produtos da marca são cuidadosamente desenvolvidos baseados em estudos de mercado, gerando assim novas tecnologias, com fragrâncias e ingredientes específicos para cada tipo de cabelo.
Agindo sempre de forma ousada e inovadora, a Sweet Hair Professional conta com uma equipe visionária e veloz no desenvolvimento de novas ações e produtos. A Sweet Hair Professional é a marca de cosméticos que cresce a cada dia, alcançando lugar de destaque no ramo da beleza por propor ao cabeleireiro uma parceria, onde a liberdade de expressão de todo o seu talento é respeitada e admirada, proporcionando assim um resultado surpreendentemente agradável para o cliente final, para o próprio cabeleireiro e para todos da Sweet Hair Professional. Através de um estudo profundo de mercado a empresa trouxe novas tecnologias, fragrâncias e ingredientes específicos, encontrando as composições exatas para cada tipo de cabelo. Presente em diversos países desenvolveu um alto padrão de qualidade, visando resultados, beleza e a saúde dos seus clientes, desde os profissionais que utilizam os produtos até os nossos consumidores que são apaixonados pela marca. O luxo é uma constante na marca e está por toda parte, nas embalagens, nos acessórios, nas sacolas, enfim, em cada detalhe. Tudo para que as mulheres e os homens sintam-se especiais e tenham momentos de puro deleite.

Name: عبدالصمد القرشي
Description: عبدالصمد القرشي is a cosmetics company based out of Fashion, United Arab Emirates.

Name: Bioclean
Description:
Há 25 anos o Grupo Bioclean promove beleza  e autoestima através de seus produtos que são sinônimos de qualidade. 
Com investimento constante em pesquisa e desenvolvimento e uma equipe técnica altamente qualificada, a Bioclean consolidou-se no mercado brasileiro com sua marca Depil Bella, líder no segmento de depilação.  A Depil Bella apresenta a linha mais completa em produtos depilatórios do Brasil, com um portfolio amplo de produtos para pré-depilação, depilação, pós-depilação e tratamento de pele.

Além do mercado depilatório, a Bioclean atua no mercado da estética e dermocosméticos com as marcas: Flér Dermocosméticos e Raavi Dermocosméticos. Ambas as marcas oferecem produtos profissionais e de auto-cuidado para tratamentos estéticos corporais e faciais, com resultados comprovados e dermatologicamente testados. Suas formulações são elaboradas com ativos eficazes, com base nas mais recentes novidades do segmento estético.

Name: LUIS BIEN
Description:
2022 yılında Opontia Holding - Scandi Kozmetik bünyesine katılan Luis Bien, kişisel bakım alanında günlük kullanıma uygun ve kişiye özel niş ürünleri ile hizmet vermektedir.

In the year 2022, Luis Bien, integrated into the Opontia Holding - Scandi Cosmetics conglomerate, offers specialized and bespoke personal care products, catering to individual needs with its daily-use and niche formulations.

Name: Nail Creation
Description:
Nail Creation is an international brand for professional nail styling products that was established in 1993. Dedicated to supply nail technicians with the best nail products available, Nail Creation has been advancing the technology of nail products in order to achieve maximum performance and perfect results. Nail Creation is among the leading brands in nail design worldwide. Nail Creation specializes in both gel and acrylic for nail design and sculpturing. Nail Creation is a strong brand, has a uniform international image, high-class presentation, and great profit margins. The nail industry is exceptionally dynamic and has its own unique developments and styling trends. With our own R&D department and production facilities, we have all products, know-how and training facilities in-house, which makes it possible to offer all new creative developments to the nail industry. We are committed to creating timesaving, effective products to enable technicians to work more efficiently, profitably and perfectly, nail after nail.

* 30+ years experience
* High quality product range
* Gel, acrylic and supplementary products
* Competitive pricing
* Great profit margins
* High-class international brand image
* In-house R&D department
* In-house production facilities
* Turnkey total marketing concept

Name: GRUPO SUISSA
Description: O Grupo Suissa surgiu em 1950 após a aquisição, pela família Arnaud, da Perfumaria Floramélia, presente no mercado desde 1928. Já conhecida por fabricar a Loção Camélia do Brasil, a nova direção adicionou ao conceito tradicional uma visão moderna e tecnológica, com o permanente aumento da linha de produtos

Name: Bounce Curl
Description:
Bounce Curl is a minority Woman Owned, award winning brand that creates clean products based on modern Science & Nature. Our brand is built with purpose & representation really matters to us. That is why we created products for different hair types such as Wavy, Curly, & Coily Hair.

Bounce Curl was Inspired by our ancestors' traditional remedies from the Middle East & North Africa. We carefully select ingredients that can style, moisturize and hold your beautiful hair. Our products are made with Pure Love & our mission is to "Help You Embrace The Natural You!"

Name: COSMETICA
Description:
Nuestro equipo trabaja para brindar en cada de los productos el beneficio que espera el consumidor, superando sus expectativas. 

Gracias a nuestros proveedores, asesores técnicos y el gran equipo de trabajo de R&D de COSMÉTICA podemos proporcionar productos de belleza con calidad de talla mundial.

Name: La Bonne Brosse
Description:
Take the beauty of your hair into your own hands, through a durable gesture : Scalp & Hair brushing. 

Rediscover the primal gesture of brushing - and its miracle benefits on the health & beauty of your hair - through a modern design.

Made in France. Designed in Paris. Sourced in Jura mountains. Crafted in L'Oise valley.

Name: Cosmedesk - Cosmetic Regulatory Solutions
Description:
Cosmedesk is a software platform focused on providing an innovative solution to automate the creation of Product Information File (PIF) and all documents required by EU regulation 1223/2009.

Cosmedesk aims to harness the most advanced technology and regulatory know-how so as to make compliance easier, faster, better. 

Cosmedesk empowers Responsible Persons and Safety Assessors to produce the PIF and the Cosmetic Product Safety Report (CPSR) in a faster and efficient manner, saving more than half of the time spent with its preparation and bureaucracy. The documents produced are based in high-quality standards and formatting, rich in terms of content, and with a high level of detail.

Visit us at http://www.cosmedesk.com/

Name: Institut Karité Paris
Description:
Institut Karité Paris has developed a very exclusive and unique Shea Butter-based cosmetic line.

Institut Karité Paris is a French cosmetics brand which was born in 2004 after several years of research on Shea Butter.

Research shows that Shea Butter, single-handedly, satisfy all the skin needs, Institut Karité Paris has decided to make it its active flagship ingredient. The brand now offers a complete range of care for the face, body and hair as well as a dedicated line for men care.

With a strong international presence (over 30 countries), Institut Karité Paris brand is distributed in department stores, perfumeries, concept stores, drugstores, spas and beauty salons, and airlines.

Since July 2008, the brand is also present on internet with an e-shop: www.institutkariteparis.com offering delivery over the world.

All products are designed and made in France.

Institut Karité Paris wants to introduce and generalize this sacred universal care that caters to all skin types from adult to child and bring together women from all continents around the same desire: to be beautiful!

The cosmetic features of Shea Butter are rich and exceptional vitamins that provide the skin's essential needs : A and D for skin revitalization E for reoxygenating and F for elasticity.

Name: LACAPAC
Description:
Producimos esmaltes para uñas para las principales marcas de Argentina. Tenemos un predio de 3.500m2 dedicado íntegramente a productos para uñas.

Durante los últimos años hemos alcanzado el liderazgo de mercado en esta categoría de productos. Nuestra empresa diseña, desarrolla, fabrica, importa y exporta millones de unidades anualmente.

Es nuestro objetivo llegar al año 2030 con una producción anual de 20 millones de unidades.

Name: Signature Cosmetics
Description:
INTRODUCTION
Signature Cosmetics is a niche retailer of cosmetics and toiletry products, with a chain of over 175 stores throughout Southern Africa. Signature’s primary products include colour cosmetics, fragrances, body sprays, and skin treatments.

PHILOSOPHY AND PURPOSE
At Signature Cosmetics one does not have to pay a fortune to look and feel great. Signature products were created for men and women – sophisticated or carefree – student or professional – young or old – we have the products to suit every lifestyle.


BACKGROUND
In early 2010, Signature Cosmetics entered a new era. It was acquired by a consortium of shareholders whose collective vision was to take Signature to new heights by enhancing the brand and expanding Signature throughout Africa.

Name: Domeli'C
Description:
The DomeliC Cosmetic Industry (Pvt) Ltd. is established In 2011. Company aims to position it by providing services and products in the field of sourcing organic Skin care, Personal care, Hair products formulation research and development of organic cosmetics. We stand proudly by the natural skin care products we sell, knowing that their purity and efficacy are helping people to nurture their health and beauty as well as inspiring them to recognize and foster beauty and well-being in others. We’re active in our local communities and engage in projects the world over that help transform disadvantage into self-reliance and economic sustainability. 
Pakistan: https://domelic.pk
USA: https://domelic.com

Name: Cream Team S.A.
Description:
CREAM TEAM SA is a dynamic growing manufacturing and trading company since its establishment in 2000, has emerged as one of the first companies of beauty and cosmetics in Greece and Europe.  
The company has a production unit based in Thessaloniki, Greece with its own chemical and R&D facilities. We are against animal testing and all the products are scientifically tested and guaranteed according to the specifications of the National Organisation of Medicines of Greece (EOF), while the company functions under the certification of Good Manufacturing Practice System according to ISO 22716: 2007, for the production and storage of cosmetic products, by TUV AUSTRIA HELLAS.
CREAMTEAM SA, owns the "DUST+CREAM" brand, with a range of over 5,000 SKUs in makeup, cosmetics and personal care to cover all the needs of every modern woman and man. The company directly supplies the DUST+CREAM stores, a smart concept of chain stores, without intermediaries, achieving low costs in all its products. 
Additionally, based on the principle of "best value for money" in beauty products and maintaining the same level of prices, we invest a significant part of our profits in the continuous research and technological development of our production unit, constantly enriching the range of products and services covering the increasing needs of our customers.
At CREAMTEAM SA we are preparing to take the next steps in Greece and abroad and we continue to dynamically develop new products with natural ingredients, maintaining the quality and the reliability of the CREAM TEAM and DUST+CREAM brand.

#creamteamsa
#dustandcream
#beautyismyplayground 
#beautyismyworkplace

Name: RPE Group
Description:
Nosso propósito é transformar a realidade do profissional da beleza para que ele alcance o reconhecimento profissional.

Estamos há mais de 15 anos no mercado e somos umas das líderes na distribuição de cosméticos profissionais em quase todo o Estado de São Paulo e no Triângulo Mineiro. Trabalhamos com marcas renomadas como Schwarzkopf, Redken, Tec Italy, Senscience, Secrets, Barber Jack e Forever You. Todos esses anos nos proporcionaram experiência, dinamismo e resolutividade em nossas operações.

Contamos com equipe de representantes e técnicos constantemente treinada para atuar como consultores de nossos clientes, levando soluções que irão revolucionar o dia a dia do salão.

Temos a missão de trazer os melhores educadores para especializar os profissionais da beleza, dando acesso a uma verdadeira revolução em suas carreiras.

Tudo isso pautado por uma relação de honestidade, ética e comprometimento em entregar soluções de alta qualidade em educação e cosméticos, criando condições para a sua ascensão profissional acontecer.

Name: SiO Beauty
Description:
SiO (pronounced See-Oh!) is a revolutionary line of medical-grade silicone patches for the face, neck & décolleté clinically proven to smooth wrinkles overnight! Founded by Gigi Howard, a sister, mother, Southerner, and business woman, Gigi is a firm advocate in the power of the right attitude and pair of high heels to solve any problem.

After tireless research and refinement, SiO’s transformative capabilities stem from the science of its intrinsic medical technology. Even the name is a reflection of the organic components at work: Silicon and Oxygen. Together, these elements create a breathable and occlusive "micro-climate" which promotes optimal hydration, normalising regulation and collagen stimulation. 

Featured in Vogue, NYTimes, Vanity Fair and more, Gigi designed SiO Beauty to exclusively give women and men beautiful, wrinkle-free skin so that they can feel comfortable as their best selves. Goodnight Wrinkles!

Name: DERMASENCE | Medicos Kosmetik GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Everything is about healthy skin here: DERMASENCE is the specialist for medical skincare. 
Since 1991 DERMASENCE medical skincare is the epitome of dermatological competence and consistent focus on efficacy and tolerability in skin care. It stands for innovative developments and products with the highest compatibility. Medical skin care for the whole family. Recommended by dermatologists. 

Invented in Münster. Made in Germany.
 
DERMASENCE products are developed in the company headquarters in Münster and manufactured exclusively in Germany. Nationwide, around 180 employees work for DERMASENCE. More than 50 medical skin care products are distributed exclusively through pharmacies - in addition to Germany, DERMASENCE is also available in Austria and the Netherlands. In this way, a competent, customer-oriented consultation is guaranteed. Every day, dermatologists and pharmacists recommend DERMASENCE's medical skincare. Advice in the pharmacy plays a special role here. A broad qualification programme supports the pharmacies as local contacts.

Our legal notice: https://www.dermasence.com/legal/legal-notice  
Our privacy policy: https://www.dermasence.com/legal/privacy-policy

Name: Beauty Business School
Description:
Primera y única escuela de negocios privada enfocada al sector de la belleza. Impulsada por el Beauty Cluster, nace con el objetivo de desplegar una formación de excelencia para la industria y aspira a alcanzar la máxima satisfacción tanto de estudiantes como de profesionales del sector.

Somos un equipo multidisciplinar formado por perfiles complementarios con amplia trayectoria en diversos proyectos emprendedores, formativos y casos de éxito.

Nos mueve y nos une: estar al día y a adaptarnos a los cambios incesantes, la pasión profesional y la necesidad de generar y atraer talento, el aprendizaje conectado con la práctica y la experimentación, el 'lifelong learning' y la co-creación como proceso de mejora y crecimiento.

Name: Supreme Shavers India Private Limited
Description: Supreme Shavers is the 4th largest manufacturer and largest private label manufacturer of Double Edge Blades and Disposable Shaving Razor in India.

Name: Markwins Beauty Brands International LTD
Description:
Markwins Beauty Brands International has its Finance, Marketing, Sales and Customer Service HQ for EMEA in Milan, Italy, and our Logistic and Distribution Center HQ for EMEA in Barcelona, Spain.
 
Markwins Beauty Brands is a LA (California) based company, global leader in beauty and cosmetics. The Company, founded in 1984 by Eric Chen, is distinguished by groundbreaking product innovation, reimagined go to market strategies, leading edge supply chain dynamics and inclusive, disruptive and digital oriented communication. From humble, disruptive origins, the Company famous early as the pioneer of compact palettes and gift sets stands today as one of beauty’s largest privately held firms and is recognized within the industry as top “brand builder”. Its products are sold and distributed in over 80.000 point of sales and in more than 80 countries around the world.

Name: Biocosmética EXEL
Description:
Desde sus inicios, Exel desarrolla sus productos en armonía con el cuidado del medio ambiente, utiliza envases PET reciclables, es pionero en sus fórmulas Mineral Oil Free (sin petrolatos) y en la implementación de procesos de extracción de máxima pureza.

Exel Nu Natural, concepto que renueva la esencia del laboratorio, inaugura una nueva era de Supratecnología combinada con activos naturales.
Exel, el laboratorio argentino de proyección mundial con más certificaciones internacionales de calidad, es elegido por compañías globales como fuente de ingredientes activos.
Nace una nueva cosmética profesional que une Naturaleza y Tecnología en un perfecto equilibrio. Porque volver a la naturaleza es volver a nosotros mismos. Es revalorizar el origen.

La belleza sustentable es Exel Nu Natural.
Location: Ciudad Autonoma de Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires

Name: Grupo Ervas Finas - O Boticário
Description: O Grupo Ervas Finas é uma rede de franquias de O Boticário (cosméticos e perfumes brasileiros), com sede na cidade de Jaú-SP., Possui lojas em várias cidades do interior Centro Oeste Paulista como Jaú, Bauru, Brotas, Barra Bonita, Dois Córregos, Itirapina e São Manuel e também no litoral Sul de São Paulo atuando na Praia Grande, Mongaguá e Peruíbe. Seus principais produtos são fragrâncias, cremes e produtos para maquiagem.

Name: Gamarde - Laboratoires Jerodia
Description:
L’alliance de l’Eau Thermale de Gamarde-les-Bains et de la nature au service de la peau.

Depuis 2006, soucieux de faire découvrir le potentiel inestimable qu’offrent la nature et les plantes, nous avons développé une gamme complète 100% Made in France de soins Dermocosm'Ethic Bio et 100 % d’origine naturelle* pour toute la famille. Nos soins sont formulés avec de l’Eau Thermale de Gamarde-les-Bains aux vertus dermatologiques exceptionnelles, elle est reconnue pour ses propriétés apaisantes et anti-irritantes par l’Académie de Médecine depuis 1841.

Spécialistes des problématiques de peau, nous sommes très attentifs au choix de nos ingrédients. C’est pourquoi nous sélectionnons dans notre centre de recherche, dirigé par une Pharmacienne, les meilleurs actifs dermatologiques d’origine naturelle pour apporter du confort et de l’efficacité à toutes les peaux délicates.

Notre expertise en Dermocosm éthic bio, nous permet de nous exonérer des substances de synthèse et de proposer des formules parfaitement autoconservées naturellement. 
 
Nous nous engageons à vous offrir des soins aux formules d’origine naturelle alliant plaisir et innocuité, permettant ainsi à la beauté de chaque femme et chaque homme, de s’exprimer naturellement.

*pour la grande majorité des formules

Name: Dp Derm
Description:
Our mission is to empower professionals and individuals with the tools, knowledge, and innovation to transform skin health, instill lasting confidence, and build a connected, results-driven community.

Our vision is to be the leader in microneedling and skin regeneration solutions in the US, driving innovation that transforms the way skin health and aesthetics are approached — safely, effectively, and ethically.

Our Values are: Integrity, Innovation, Excellence, Accountability, Empowerment and Service.

The FDA Cleared Dermapen 4 Microneedling device from Dermapenworld is the No.1 microneedling device in the world. Along with Dp Dermaceuticals protocol skincare products, which are Non-Negotiables during skin needling, the Dermapen 4 has provided exceptional outcomes when combined with our effective homecare regimes.

Our latest breakthrough, HLA-G Exosomes, are taking the anti-aging world by storm. By combining In-clinic treatment serums with a take home Exosome booster, you can provide your clients with a complete anti-aging solution.

Our true passion is to combine the infinite discoveries within nature & technology.  Skin care & wellness provide the perfect platform to integrate these inspirations, resulting in endless possibilities. 

Through Epicuren’s continuous progression, our company’s core priorities remain constant: customer experience, wellness, environmental awareness, & evolution.

Name: Laboratorios Chantelet S.A.
Description:
Laboratorios Chantelet es una compañía española y familiar, dedicada al desarrollo y fabricación a terceros de productos cosméticos. Dotada de instalaciones vanguardistas, equipos y maquinaria lo que nos permite ofrecer un servicio excelente. Nuestro personal está cualificado y en constante formación, mejorando sus conocimientos y manteniéndose al día en los últimos avances en el sector.
Años de experiencia en este campo nos avalan como expertos en el desarrollo, formulación, fabricación de productos para el cuidado de la piel, y proporcionando apoyo técnico y legal a nuestros clientes.
Con todas estas cualidades, Laboratorios Chantelet es el socio ideal para las empresas que buscan la calidad, la seguridad y la excelencia en la fabricación y desarrollo de los productos con marca blanca / propia.

Name: Blushington Holdings Inc.
Description:
Founded in 2011 by sisters and Co-Founders Stephi Cohen and Nicki Maron on the belief that people of all ages and backgrounds deserve to feel confident and beautiful, the brand has seen great success over a decade and is now selling franchises. Blushington is the blowout, makeup and skincare lounge franchise disrupting the beauty industry by offering the three most in demand beauty services, in one appointment all under one roof. Committed to inclusivity, the brand welcomes customers of all ages, backgrounds and hair textures. Offering franchisees multiple recurring revenue streams through in-store and on demand services, Blushington has created a robust business model designed for longevity.  For more information, please visit: https://blushington.com/pages/franchise. 

Visit our NYC Flagship in Midtown Manhattan to experience our beauty services. Book your appointment now: https://blushington.com/#book-now. 

Become a Blushington Beauty Advisor and own your very own, free online shop to sell products from our edit of 50+ brands and earn 20% commission that is paid out monthly.  There is no upfront investment in inventory.  Blushington holds all inventory and ships out the products on your behalf directly to your customers.  To open your free online shop email info@blushington.com. Beauty Advisors receive a 30% discount on all products for personal use.  

Join our Blushington community today!

Visit www.blushington.com or @blushington to learn more.

Name: Evan Pharma
Description:
Evan Pharma is an Egyptian company that manufactures its products with international technology and quality that is comparable to the largest skin and hair care companies in terms of quality and types.

Evan Pharma offers a great range of facial, skin, and hair care solutions.
Obtained the approval of the Ministry of Health.

Name: Weleda España
Description:
Nuestra pasión por la naturaleza y el ser humano es nuestra razón de ser. Desde 1921, nuestra misión ha sido ofrecerte una cosmética eficaz procedente de ingredientes de origen 100% natural, de forma sostenible y con el mínimo impacto en el medio ambiente. 
Este es un reto que nos hace sentir orgullosos día a día.

Name: Vitta Gold Cosmetics
Description:
Vitta Gold Cosmetics is a global beauty company born at the intersection of Brazilian biodiversity and advanced cosmetic science.

Inspired by the richness of the Brazilian flora, we develop high-performance hair and skin solutions by combining bioactive botanical ingredients with cutting-edge cosmetic technology. Our formulations are designed to deliver efficacy, safety, and sensorial excellence across all hair and skin types.

With two highly technological manufacturing facilities, Vitta Gold ensures strict quality control, scalability, and comprehensive support for partners worldwide.

Today, Vitta Gold Cosmetics distributes premium products to more than 100 countries, serving professional salons, distributors, end customers and private label partners with innovation, reliability, and consistency.

Our mission is to translate the natural power of Brazil into globally competitive cosmetic solutions, where nature and technology work in perfect balance to elevate beauty standards worldwide.

Name: Bonvie Haircare
Description: Solving hair problems in Indonesia through Haircare Products

Name: Kay Beauty
Description: Founded in 2019, Kay Beauty is jointly developed between Bollywood actress Katrina Kaif, and India’s largest Specialty Beauty and Personal Care Platform, Nykaa, creating a bridge between high glamour and skincare. Each product is enriched with skin-loving ingredients that have been hand-picked by Katrina and  built on the principle #MakeupThatKares. Kay Beauty products are cruelty free and truly define the premium category through its packaging and finest quality formulations. Besides being true to the global trend of #MakeupOnTheGo, the products are high on performance. The brand is exclusively available on the Nykaa website and app, and at all Nykaa stores across India.

Name: COSMOYA Laboratory I Cosmetic formulation I Solar innovation I CIR approved
Description:
The Cosmoya laboratory is at your service to help you create your own cosmetics. We'll be with you every step of the way, to help you create the products that are right for you.

The CIR-accredited Cosmoya - Innovation Solaire laboratory is the ideal partner for creating tomorrow's formulations.
Our team is at your service to help you create cosmetics that reflect your image. 
We support brands and raw material suppliers at every stage of their projects, from idea to industrialization.

We specialize in suncare and skincare formulations.

Contact us to discover our innovative chassis!

Name: Cosmobeauty
Description:
Uma empresa com avançadas conquistas mundiais em cosmetologia, focada no desenvolvimento de cosméticos para tratamentos estéticos, dermatológicos e fisioterápicos.

A Cosmobeauty, grife profissional de cosmecêuticos, é indicada para uso em cabine, exclusivamente por dermatologistas e esteticistas. O diferencial das linhas facial e corporal é o uso de matéria-prima importada de última geração e alta tecnologia, com a adaptação necessária à pele característica do povo brasileiro e ao clima tropical do País. É uma das linhas preferidas das esteticistas que trabalham com produtos de alta qualidade, já que promove resultados imediatos e permanentes.

SAC (11) 4196-1500 Demais localidades 0800 880 1500

Description:
Premium Beauty Media publishes the websites PremiumBeautyNews.com and BrazilBeautyNews.com providing trade news and information to insiders of the cosmetics and beauty industries (fragrance, toiletries, skincare, face care and hair care products, make-up) as well as related sectors (e.g. wellness products, diet and supplement foods). We also provide a wealth of additional business services.

Just check us out at www.premiumbeautynews.com or www.brazilbeautynews.com

Name: CARGO Cosmetics
Description:
For 15 years CARGO Cosmetics has been a staple on the sets of film and television as well as in the makeup bags of women worldwide.  Uncompromised product quality and first-to-market innovations have created a loyal following amongst the world’s most renowned makeup artists.  By consulting with and listening to the needs of makeup professionals and consumers, CARGO Cosmetics takes their “secret tips” and turns them into better, easier and smarter products.  From high-definition foundations that create flawless skin but escape the scrutiny of high-def cameras to cutting-edge packaging and expertly coordinated kits that offer step-by-step regimens, CARGO Cosmetics offers a wide breath of color cosmetics and tools that allow every woman to customize her beauty look with confidence and ease.  An industry insider favorite, CARGO Cosmetics has received some of the beauty industry’s most prestigious awards and accolades. Visit www.cargocosmetics for additional information and product availability.

Description: From This Island is a personal care company that harnesses superfoods and hero ingredients from the islands of Indonesia, the world’s largest archipelago. Uniquely equipped with patented technology and a team of experts, FTI seeks to provide consumers with safe and effective skincare products.

Name: The Hair Addict
Description:
The Hair Addict began in 2016 as a closed Facebook group promoting self-love and turning it into second nature for its audience.
Our goal is for all women to love themselves enough to invest the time and the energy needed to care for their hair in a sustainable healthy way. 
We want them to love themselves enough to stand their ground and embrace their natural hair on all occasions.
Currently, The Hair Addict’s social media platforms have now expanded to include around 300k members and have been featured more than 50 times by local and international media (newspapers, magazines, television, and radio).

Facebook Group: https://www.facebook.com/groups/530733733775051/

Facebook Page: https://www.facebook.com/thehairaddictofficial/

The Natural Hair Fest: https://www.facebook.com/thenaturalhairfest/

Name: La bouche rouge, Paris
Description:
Since launching in 2017, La bouche rouge has been defining a new standard in pure, sustainable beauty as the French Clean Beauty Pioneer. 

Concerned that the Cosmetics industry is the third largest environmental polluter, and that 83% of the World's water is polluted with microplastics, La bouche rouge has decided to avoid the use of plastic from the product itself, to the formula and production processes. 

Starting with the lipstick as its icon, the Paris-based makeup Maison has set out to unite French traditional craftsmanship, and eco-responsibility. 

In 2020 the Maison has grown its collection to a full sustainable and revolutionary make up line – clean, microplastic-free and refillable. 

The range was created through the prism of the Maison’s four main values: responsibility, sustainability, traceability and creativity. 

Clean beauty. Good for you and the planet. Refillable and Responsible.

Name: Natural Cosmetic Lab
Description:
En Natural Cosmetic Lab somos especialistas en fabricación para terceros de cosmética natural y ecológica certificada. Ofrecemos un servicio integral, a la carta, con todo lo necesario para crear una marca propia de cosmética. Te acompañamos y asesoramos durante todo el proceso y entregamos el producto listo para su distribución al público final. Creemos que contar con un producto exclusivo y efectivo ayuda a fidelizar clientes marcando así una diferencia con la competencia, aportando personalidad y distinción.

Fabricamos con formulaciones efectivas, personalizadas y con ingredientes de gran calidad 100% naturales. Bajo estos principios, trabajamos día a día por mejorar los resultados de nuestras líneas de producto, centradas en la cosmética facial, corporal, capilar y bucodental tanto para adultos, como infantil y para mascotas. 
Productos certificados por Bio Inspecta y avalados por la Asociación Vida Sana. 

Porque apostamos por la belleza desde la salud, el bienestar y el respeto hacia nuestro cuerpo y hacia el medio ambiente.

Si quieres saber más sobre nuestro trabajo puedes solicitar información a través de  contacto@naturalcosmeticlab.com

Name: G.M. COLLIN
Description:
G.M. COLLIN’s journey began in 1957, when Dr. Lapinet, a renowned Parisian dermatologist, pioneered the use of collagen pellicles on burn victims to help heal and regain the healthy look of their skin.

For the past 60 years, G.M. COLLIN has continued its tradition of excellence and innovation with the mission of providing the opportunity for everyone to discover both their unique beauty and absolute self-confidence.

G.M. COLLIN develops superior skin care products, from preventive care to combating the first signs of aging and for mature skin, achieving unmatched results for all skin types and conditions, thanks to its recognized expertise and innovative ingredients.

___________________________________________________________________

Le voyage de G.M. COLLIN commença en 1957, lorsque Dr. Lapinet, un dermatologue parisien réputé, utilisa pour la première fois des pellicules de collagène afin d’aider la peau de grands brulés à guérir et retrouver une apparence saine.

Avec la mission de permettre à chaque personne de découvrir sa beauté unique et sa confiance en soi absolue, G.M. COLLIN poursuit sa tradition d’excellence et d’innovation, depuis plus de 60 ans.

Afin d’atteindre des résultats sans pareils, grâce à une expertise reconnue et des ingrédients novateurs, G.M. COLLIN développe des produits de soins de la peau de qualité supérieure pour tous les types et conditions de peau ainsi que pour toutes les catégories des produits anti-âge, de la prévention jusqu’aux peaux matures, en passant par les premiers signes de l’âge.

Name: Omy Laboratoires
Description:
Omy Laboratoires is a Canadian skincare laboratory that offers a 100% customized day cream, night cream and serum, as well as a range of versatile, ready-to-use products. Start your Omy Laboratoires beauty journey today by performing a SkinIA analysis and get a skincare routine designed to evolve with you. Vegan, Cruelty free, B-Corp Certified.

Notre technologie d’analyse cutanée par photo permet d’avec seulement une photo téléchargée sur notre site, d’analyser quatre paramètres de la peau (rides, tâches pigmentaires, rougeurs et pores), pour ainsi proposer à la clientèle un choix d’ingrédients idéales pour répondre à ses besoins cutanés. (disponible à compter de mars 2019)

Name: Carmen Perfumes
Description: Carmen Perfumes was founded in the heart of the Middle East, where the art of perfumery has been revered for centuries. The brand’s origins can be traced back to a small family-owned workshop, where skilled artisans meticulously blended the finest natural ingredients to create captivating scents.

Name: BIOK LAB
Description:
The BIOK LAB was founded by 5 scientists in biochemistry with a high passion to innovate with natural ingredients for our skin's healthy look. Already we count over 30 years of experience in the field of cosmetics by creating and producing natural and organic products enriched with plant-based, herbal, bio-technological and synthetic active ingredients to provide healthy skin, hair and teeth.

Nature and innovation remain the core of our philosophy, which brings together experts in biology, chemistry, odontology, dermatology and cosmetics. We conduct thorough research and promote complete honesty. And it works! Our products are recognized by dermatologists and dental care professionals. Our high quality and efficiency are valued by people in the Nordic countries and in Central, Western Europe.

Explore our products & brands in the following links:
www.ecodenta.eu (super+natural oral care)
www.kiligcosmetics.eu (natural cosmetic for busy urbanities)
www.margarita.eu (Baltics nature inspired cosmetic for whole family)

Name: O&M
Description:
At the core of O&M we would love hairdressers and their clients to live healthier lives. We believe in clean, kind and original haircare that combines the latest in science and nature to provide professional salon results. Our Australian-born colour and styling products are safe and beautiful to use, staying true to our core values and our mission to create the highest performing clean hair products in the world. Lead by a progressive new colouring approach, Clean Colour Technology (CCT)- our permanent professional hair colour with zero ammonia, PPD or resorcinol is the  game changer that performs beyond all expectations, with no toxic fumes or harmful side-effects.

Above all, our mission is to provide and continue to pioneer the cleanest, kindest and most professional hair colour in the world because we believe caring for your hair is caring for yourself.

Name: Shajgoj Limited
Description: The Ultimate Beauty & Personal Care Destination In Bangladesh

Name: TRI-K Industries
Description:
Celebrating our 50th anniversary this year, TRI-K Industries, Inc. has been a leading provider of sustainable specialty ingredients since 1974. Our mission is to inspire consumer brands and enable their success by delivering differentiating technologies, prioritizing product efficacy and sustainability. Motivated by our core values of Empathy, Curiosity, and Excellence, our customers and partners get the attention, agility, and innovation they need to be successful in the marketplace.  We specialize in proteins, including amino acids and natural peptides, modern preservatives, and multi-active, multi-functional ingredient solutions. Our in-house development team continually pioneers new materials, differentiating our customers’ brands. We strive to amplify consumers’ voices within our organization, ensuring we bring relevant offerings and innovations to the market.

Major Markets
TRI-K’s portfolio includes products for all major segments of the personal care industry: skin care, hair care, sun care, body care, baby care, color cosmetics and more.

Name: Cream Co.
Description:
Multi-functional skincare solutions for everyday.

We redefine beauty standards and simplify your skincare routine by offering innovative formulations and pioneering products. We aim to offer the best solutions for your skin with our dermatologically tested, hypoallergenic, clean and vegan products.

Clean. Safe. Glowy.

Each product added to our family is created with the purest ingredients and R&D studies carefully carried out by experts. Our solutions are hypoallergenic, formulated without using allergens and pore-clogging ingredients that are harmful to our skin and environment, and dermatologically tested in Europe.
We consider all the external factors that affect your skin to offer you a safe skincare experience with clean ingredients. 

Non-toxic.

We don’t incluede any allergy-causing or hormone imbalance  ingredients in any of our products. We develop and produce our products following European Regulations and principles of clean, non-toxic ingredients suitable for sensitive skin. 

We do not use more than 2,000 banned or harmful ingredients, following the Cream Co. standards we have created according to these principles and our research.

Why do we avoid these ingredients in our products? 

Because these ingredients:
Contain carcinogens.
Affect hormones.
Cause skin sensitivities and allergies.
Are toxic/harmful to our environment.
Are toxic/harmful to the human body.

Skincare enhanced.

As Cream Co., our biggest goal is to provide clean skincare solutions for all skin problems for people of all skin types. We are improving ourselves by adapting to the ever-changing trends day by day. We aim to nourish the skin by protecting it in all aspects.

Name: Dr. BRANDT
Description:
A visionary in the world of cosmetic dermatology, Dr. Fredric Brandt was light years ahead of his contemporaries. In all aspects of his work, he broke the boundaries of convention. His cutting-edge techniques and procedures, landmark FDA studies, and state-of-the-art cosmetic devices and skincare products blazed revolutionary trails in the field.

The evolution of 
Dr. BRANDT skincare continues to stretch beyond the scope of imagination — passion and dedication, the driving force. Bringing together an advisory board of forward-thinking experts, renowned for their innovative approach to skincare, and an exclusive partnership with one of the most influential research teams in the country — The University of Miami’s Department of Dermatology and Cutaneous Surgery — Dr. BRANDT skincare is always at the forefront of groundbreaking findings.

This unique synergy, in which the experts’ individual practices, the university’s research department and the product development team inform and inspire one another, puts Dr. BRANDT skincare in a class by itself. Known as The Brandt Method, this proprietary means of synthesizing its multiple assets ensures the most cutting edge technology in skincare and the most powerful anti-aging results for its knowledgeable skincare advocates.

Name: SLG Brands
Description:
We are an international brand incubator business that create powerfully soulful brands. From within our in-house studio and lab, we use the power of design, formulation innovation and highly imaginative marketing to enrich brand appeal and to stimulate brand growth.
Our portfolio of vibrant and authentic beauty & male grooming brands is a synergy of indie brand cool and global brand authority.   COLAB DRY SHAMPOO | RHYME & REASON | JOHNNY’S CHOP SHOP | VELVOTAN | SUPERDRY PERFORMANCE GROOMING | LAURA ASHLEY BEAUTY | RADLEY BEAUTY | HAPPY PLACE by FERNE COTTON |

Name: NABLA Cosmetics
Description:
Bringing transparency into makeup.
NABLA was created not to lie but to challenge the conventional aspects of the market and to give life to an experience of the highest quality. 
NABLA is makeup in collaboration with Nature. Our research is based on high performance balanced with the use of carefully selected ingredients that are preferably natural. When synthetic ingredients are needed, NABLA takes care of selecting the best and always specifies their presence. 
Every single product comes from an idea and we work with passion to create it using the most avant-garde resources on the scene. 
With the same dedication we love to take care of our clients through constant customer care and a relationship of reciprocal exchange. Just as NABLA wants to be an inspiration for its clients we want them to inspire NABLA. 
NABLA is an independent brand that will seek to be an inspiration whilst always protecting personal freedom and which will seek to be an evocation in every single product. It wants to be a source of individuality and a means to create a personal style, bearing in mind that behind all makeup there is a reflection and that true beauty goes beyond the illusion of appearance. 
Through strong Ethics, Honesty, Humanity and Responsibility, NABLA wants to take care of the product, the individual and the message.

Name: Pastel Cosmetics
Description:
PİNKAR Kimya Sanayii ve Tic. A.Ş.’nin öyküsü 1938 yılında, kolonya, sabun ve kozmetik üretmek için kurulan bir aile işletmesinin başarı öyküsüdür. 

Bu öykü Fredo Bebe Kolonyaları, Fredo Bebe Pudrası, Policolor Saç Boyaları, Scherk Cilt Bakım Ürünleri, Tarr Erkek Losyonu, Canoe Güzellik Pudraları ve Blendax şampuanları gibi markaların üretimi ile başlayan, bugünde 1988 yılında üretime başlayan PASTEL markası ile devam eden bir öykü. 

Pastel’in ardından başarımız Top Girl serisi, Top Gun, Snob ve Apache erkek parfümleri, Dolce kadın parfümü ile devam etti. 

Bugün; PİNKAR Kimya Sanayii ve Ticaret A.Ş., kuruluşundan bu yana, moda dünyasındaki yenilikleri çok daha yakından izleyerek, tüketicilerin dünya trendlerine paralel değişen taleplerini karşılamak için çalışıyor. Son yıllarda ihracata da yönelik üretime geçen PİNKAR’ın ürünleri dünya pazarlarında çok büyük beğeni topluyor. 

Yarattığı markalarla uluslararası pazarlarda da gücünü kanıtlayan PİNKAR, geçmişte olduğu gibi gelecekte de bilgi birikimini ve deneyimlerini yeni kuşaklara aktararak, daha sağlıklı ve güvenli ürünlerle insanlara daha güzel bir yaşam sunmayı hedefliyor. 

Firmamız uluslararası belgelendirme kuruluşu “BM TRADA” tarafından “Kalite Güvence Sistemi ISO 9001:2000” ile belgelendirilmiştir.

Name: Skinbae India
Description: All our products are 100% original, ethically sourced & put to the test before being sent to you. We take pride in being honest and ethical while providing you with the best quality!

Name: Arvelon
Description:
We were tired of being boarded with a set of expectations on what beauty should be by companies that only cared about pushing their products.

At Arvelon, we believe healthy skin is beautiful skin and endeavor to create products that are effective, accessible, and usable for everyone.

As confidence from our customers grew and conversations with them turned to discussions, we knew we had to give back by being more inclusive and approachable. We proudly boast of being the only Skincare Brand in Pakistan that you can just ring up and ask to consult with a Skin Expert- at no charge to you. Just a means to the end goal of helping people achieve their best skin, firstly through education and then through product. We believe that these conversations helped us grow and better understand what users wanted from a skincare brand. We also discovered a neglected subset of people who were interested in Skincare but didn't know how to even get started.

This engagement influences decision-making to the very core at Arvelon, which is why we've evolved to both improve our formula as well as introduce new products.

Arvelon's in-house skin specialists, product designers, customer care reps and operations staff are the real superstars. We firmly believe that employee-care and appreciation must start at the grassroots and everyone must play their part in ensuring an environment conducive to innovation and develop a habit of success.

Name: SHEGLAM
Description:
Next-Gen Beauty Made to Explore
SHEGLAM is more than beauty, it’s a creative universe where you can explore, experiment and express yourself through glamorous-yet-affordable products. Because beauty shouldn’t be determined by your budget. Instead, it’s defined by YOU — your feedback, your wishlist, your desires… and the mark that you want to leave. 
Beautifully affordable, affordablly beautiful
 100% Cruelty-free
#SHEGLAMfam voice: service@sheglam.com

Name: Cosbel Distribuidora de Cosméticos Ltda.
Description:
A Cosbel é uma empresa com mais de 85 anos de existência e com mais de 50 anos de experiência no mercado de revenda e distribuição de produtos cosméticos, beleza e perfumaria.
Possui mais de 10 mil clientes entre supermercados, atacados, lojas de departamento, perfumarias, salões de beleza, etc.
Dispondo de moderna tecnologia e uma equipe de vendas qualificada e treinada com grande conhecimento no mercado, a Cosbel oferece a seus clientes uma imensa variedade de produtos e serviços ligados a beleza

Name: The Fragrance Group
Description:
The Fragrance Group was founded as the exclusive US distributor for a select group of prestige specialty fragrance brands.  Our mission is to build the business of small to medium volume brands through strong digital and brick and mortar strategies.  Our business model allows us to provide hands on service to our retail partners to accomplish our mission.

We distribute and/or license Adamo, Affinessence, Akro Fragrances by Olivier Cresp, Banana Republic Fragrances, Birkholz, Christian Siriano Fragrances, Gleam London, Gravel, Gritti, Maison J.U.S, MIND GAMES, Morph, and TUMI Fragrances.

The Fragrance Group is a committed team of well known industry professionals with decades of experience across multiple channels of the U.S. retail industry.  With a core competency in Sales and Marketing to in Digital and Retail Sales and Department Store, Specialty, Cosmetic Specialty, Independent Perfumeries and Pharmacies.

Name: Farmaceutici Dott. Ciccarelli
Description:
Farmaceutici Dottor Ciccarelli è un'azienda italiana che opera nel mercato dell'igiene orale, della cosmesi e del toiletries. Si tratta di un'istituzione che si è evoluta dalla dimensione del piccolo laboratorio farmaceutico, fino a diventare una realtà industriale importante e moderna, in grado di offrire prodotti di alta qualità, puntando su investimenti in ricerca e sviluppo ed innovazione, e sempre nel rispetto della trasparenza per i propri consumatori.
I prodotti, rigorosamente Made in Italy sono commercializzati in Italia e in circa 60 paesi in tutto il mondo, in GDO, nel canale farmaceutico e parafarmaceutico, ma anche online e tramite televendite, grazie ad una diffusa rete di vendita e di distribuzione.

Name: Balance Me Skincare
Description:
Balance Me is a British made aromatherapy-inspired natural skincare brand, using clinically proven botanically active ingredients. Our award-winning, performance-driven products are designed to solve skin concerns, enhance skin health, inspire wellbeing and deliver results, naturally.

Founded in 2005 by sisters Clare and Rebecca Hopkins, our mission is to bring balance and wellbeing to everyone we touch; we’re accessible and inclusive. 

We display the natural percentage on the front of all packaging and our clear formulas are free from parabens, sulphates, microbeads and silicones. We never test on animals. Most of our products are vegan and packaging is over 95% recyclable.
 
The brand is available to purchase nationwide in the UK via balanceme.co.uk, John Lewis, Marks & Spencer, Waitrose, Wholefoods, Sainsbury’s, Ocado, LookFantastic, FeelUnique and other online retailers.

Name: SkinLabo
Description:
We are a skincare brand, founded in 2016 and quickly becoming a skincare brand of choice for more than 2 million consumers in more than 20 countries across Europe and the United States.
We put individual needs at the center and offer customized and effective laboratory treatments based on our customers' needs. 
We combine deep scientific knowledge with an understanding of skin needs, investing in the selection of the best Italian Research and Innovation Partner Laboratories and offering clean and effective formulations that contain only essential ingredients. 
We are proudly 100% Made in Italy, Cruelty Free, Plastic Neutral and our deliveries are Carbon Neutral. 
This is because we believe that body care should never be at the expense of the planet we live on.

Name: Bel Col Cosméticos
Description:
A Bel Col Cosméticos, especializada no desenvolvimento de produtos pautados na biotecnologia e engenharia genética unidas por rigorosos padrões de qualidade, atua no mercado brasileiro há mais de 20 anos e mantém representações nas principais cidades do Brasil e em outros países.

Focando seus produtos nas linhas de tratamentos para manchas, acne e rejuvenescimento, a Bel Col Cosméticos conta com uma moderna infra-estrutura e com uma experiente equipe de atendimento que oferece suporte técnico e comercial para o público consumidor.

Mantendo um compromisso direto com a pesquisa científica, fato que a levou a dominar a tecnologia de aplicação do colágeno e incorporá-lo como parte integrante de seu próprio nome: Bel, de beleza e Col, de colágeno.

Além dos fluidos de colágeno, a marca também conta com várias opções em produtos faciais e corporais, tanto para uso profissional em consultórios, como para aplicação domiciliar diária.

Para os profissionais da pele, a Bel Col oferece produtos de higienização e tonificação, antiacne, ácidos, máscaras e cremes biotecnológicos que rejuvenescem, regeneram e proporcionam maior luminosidade, uniformidade e clareamento à pele.

Name: Ksisters
Description: Your K-beauty & K-lifestyle destination by Jungmin.

Name: OCEANIC S.A.
Description:
OCEANIC for 40 years has been recognized as a manufacturer that specializes in cosmetics and dermocosmetics designed to meet the needs of sensitive, allergy-prone skin Thanks to years of experience that has resulted in creation of products of remarkable quality, Oceanic’s brand AA has become renowned brand of anti-allergenic cosmetics, valued in Poland and in the world. Our products guarantee exceptional skin safety and technological advancement:

•	Each line of cosmetics is 100% tested with people having sensitive and prone to allergies skin 
•	Our formulas are developed with dermatologists and allergy specialists of Medical University of Gdańsk
•	We use certified ingredients, free from allergenic and irritating agents
•	We implement the latest technologies and achievements in dermatology

OCEANIC’s factory in Poland is one of the leading European pharmaceutical and cosmetic factories , that has been checked and certified as meeting strict GMP (Good Manufacturing Practice) requirements.  Our passion for quality, innovativeness and modernity  has brought OCEANIC over a hundred of national and international awards and distinctions.

Name: Just Italia S.p.a.
Description:
Dal 1984 Just Italia porta su tutto il territorio nazionale la qualità naturale dei cosmetici svizzeri Just, attraverso la vendita diretta a domicilio tramite Party. 
La gamma Just, diffusa in oltre 30 Paesi e presente in Italia con oltre 90 prodotti per il benessere e l’igiene della persona e della casa, è formulata in Svizzera secondo i principi definiti dal fondatore Ulrich Jüstrich nel 1930: 
- alta presenza di ingredienti naturali;
- rigorosa selezione dei migliori oli essenziali ed estratti vegetali; -
 formulazioni che offrono il massimo beneficio, grazie ad un patrimonio di conoscenza che sposa il tradizionale metodo galenico e la moderna cosmetologia.

Il mercato italiano riserva ai prodotti Just un consenso crescente: migliaia di famiglie premiano con la loro fedeltà la qualità delle formule, il rigore dei controlli in osservanza alle normative europee e svizzere, la possibilità di acquisto tramite gli Incaricati per le vendite a domicilio.

Grazie a questa scelta l’azienda mantiene con il pubblico una solida relazione: accogliendo a casa gli incaricati Just, i consumatori possono ricevere consigli di benessere e indicazioni d’uso personalizzate, frutto della preparazione fornita da Just Academy, e stabilire relazioni fondate su ascolto, dialogo e disponibilità. 

L’attenzione alla dimensione relazionale al centro del mondo Just è testimoniata anche dall'attività di Fondazione Just Italia: nata nel 2008, sostiene i progetti sociali delle organizzazioni non profit e, attraverso la relazione tra organizzazioni, operatori, comitato scientifico, incaricati e clienti di Just Italia, dà vita a una possibilità di cambiamento per tante persone. 

L’eccellenza dei prodotti, la vendita a domicilio, una rete di professionisti in grado di stabilire relazioni di valore, così come l’impegno in attività di responsabilità sociale e ambientale, sono le chiavi di lettura di uno sviluppo che ha consolidato il brand e la reputazione dell’azienda.

Name: FIABILA
Description:
FIABILA offers an unrivalled range of technologies and formulas for nail polishes, special effects and daily or specific care, sometimes combined for a color & care approach thanks to its unique mastery of all the production processes available on the market.
Its offer ranges from product design to full service, including advice, manufacturing and packaging, in line with the expectations of brands, whatever their positioning, without compromising on quality and safety. It relies on in-house R&D, its scientific knowledge of nails and close proximity to consumers, thanks to its own test panel of 800 contacts.

Founded in 1977 by Pierre Miasnik, FIABILA is headed by Filippo Manucci, its Chairman and CEO since March 2024. The company employs over 500 people, including 55 dedicated to R&D worldwide, in 10 factories in 6 countries: France, Poland, India, Japan, USA and Brazil. FIABILA is a member of the Value of Beauty Alliance, the Global Compact program and is rated EcoVadis Platinum.

Name: Cellublue
Description:
Lancement en 2013  de son 1er produit iconique : la ventouse,  
la marque est devenue incontournable des soins anti-cellulite minceur et vergetures,

En 2022, CelluBlue a convaincu plus de 1 millions de femmes, une présence reconnue sur les réseaux, des produits aux formules ultra clean,100% fabriqués en France et des accessoires électriques ultra performants.

En 2023, de nouvelles grandes aventures en perspective et un rayonnement de la marque à l’International…

Rejoignez plus de 700K femmes 

Retrouvez nous sur 
Instagram - Facebook - Youtube : @cellublue

www.instagram.com/cellublue/
www.facebook.com/CellublueFR
www.tiktok.com/@cellublue
www.youtube.com/c/CelluBlue
www.pinterest.fr/cellublue/
twitter.com/Cellublue

Name: Pereja
Description:
Kuruluşu bir asıra dayalı PE RE JA , ilk başta küçük bir atölye de kolonya üretimi ile başladı. Kalitesi ve özgün kokusu ile çok beğenilen PE RE JA limon çiçeği kolonyası 1950’lerin sonuna gelindiğinde Türkiye’de en fazla tercih edilen kolonya haline gelmişti. 1960’ların başında sanayileşme sürecine giren Pereja Kozmetik, başta kolonya, parfüm, çubuklu oda kokusu, oda ve kumaş spreyi gibi kokulu bakım ürünlerinin yanı sıra sabun, şampuan, vücut losyonu kişisel bakım ve kozmetik ürünleri üretimi yapmaktadır.

Ürünlerini insan ve çevre sağlığına zarar vermeksizin uluslararası standartlarda üreterek tüketicisine sunan Pereja İleri Kimya Sanayi, Türk kozmetik endüstrisinin lider kuruluşlarından biridir. Türkiye'de ilk limon kolonyası markasına adını veren Pereja, ayrıca ülkemizde Sandy markası ile ilk sıvı sabunu üreterek sektöre ilkleri kazandırmıştır.1970 li yıllarda Avrupa’da en iyi parfüm ve en iyi şampuan ödülleri alan marka uluslararası alanda da başarısını duyurmuştur.

Bünyesinde maison pereja, sandy, verdure, vivien, wilson gibi birçok markayı barındıran firma, pek çok ulusal ve uluslararası tanınmış tekstil ve süpermarket zincirleri için de private label üretim yapmaktadır.

Parekendecilik sektöründe de kendini gösteren firma; PEREJA Store ve üst segment markası olan Maison Pereja mağazalarıyla müşterileriyle buluşmaktadır.

Name: KADALYS
Description:
KADALYS is the first organic and eco-conscious skincare brand that upcycles banana agri-waste into patented and clinically proven bio-actives that rejuvenate skin. Inspired by French Caribbean traditional medicine, and backed by 10 years of research, KADALYS products are certified organic, vegan, and cruelty-free while adhering to ethical, sustainable, and fair-trade practices. All planters are also shareholders. The brand's ingredients are sourced and manufactured in an ethical and eco-friendly way. KADALYS is Black and female founded.  
 
---------

Première marque de cosmétologie naturelle aux actifs de Bananier
Soins anti-âge aux musactifs de Banane

Shirley Billot a lancé en 2012 une gamme de cosmétiques biologiques à base d’actifs de bananier, Kadalys. 

Après un travail soutenu avec des centres de recherches, la marque a mis en avant les propriétés antioxydantes exceptionnelles des actifs de bananier.

La gamme s'étend des soins anti-âge et peeling exfoliant aux huiles précieuses.

La marque a crée également la Musatherapy consistant à traiter les signes de l'âge par l'association des soins avec des végétaux frais en spa.

Name: Framesi
Description:
DEEP-ROOTED IDEALS AND VALUES 
• A family business 
The manageable scale of our company withstands international expansion and finds its reason for existence in the daily commitment to hairdressers that began in 1945
• Our mission
The success of hairdressers, in their capacity as stylists and entrepreneurs 
• 100% made in Italy
Creativity, good taste and style: the very essence of Italy, highly valued all over the world 
• Attention to people 
A unique project based on common goals to be shared with staff and customers alike

RESEARCH AND QUALITY PRODUCTS 
• Major investments in research and in the development of cutting-edge formulations 
• The highest standards, thanks to carefully selected raw materials and a field-proven series of checks and controls 
• State-of-the-art production technology 
• Consultancy from prestigious Italian universities and US scientific institutes 
• Framesi Interiors: refined designs for welcoming and functional salon furnishings and fittings 
• Framesi Accessories: safety, ergonomics and top quality applied to implements for professional use

ITALIAN STYLE FRAMESI AND ITALIAN STYLE ENERGY: TWO INTERNATIONALLY RENOWNED STYLING TEAMS 
• The collection: a yearly research project into colors, volumes and styling designed to propose the latest trends and satisfy the public’s expectations 
• A unique and original cutting method that optimizes the quality/time ratio and ensures economic advantages for the salon
• Fashion, technique and style in a series of seminars, the contents of which can immediately be implemented in the salon

TRAINING, ESTABLISHED FRAMESI PROGRAMMES AND SPECIAL PROJECTS 
• A wide choice of technical, stylistic and business seminars with which to build a training pathway customized to individual interests 
• The reliability of experience and a clear vision of the future in a calendar of courses, seminars and great events
• Some of the best-tried and most effective teaching methods in the professional training sector

Name: BELLA
Description: BELLA was born out of a dream to create exceptional beauty solutions using 100% vegan innovation with unique formulations & precious ingredients. Our founder Sabina believes in products with powerful performance & instant results. Anchored by generations of product creation, experience beautifully curated products infused with flowers, fruits & crystals to 'wow' you at every moment. As a passionate philanthropist, 1% of all sales go to causes that matter. Join us on this global journey to bring each & every one of you, the best that beauty has to offer.

Name: BLOOMUP Natural beauty (Énergie Fruit, Énergiqa skincare)
Description:
Depuis 2013, nous visons à devenir la référence de la beauté & du bien-être naturels, en incubant nos love brands qui allient plaisir sensoriel, efficacité prouvée et responsabilité environnementale.

Engagés concrètement, nous concevons des produits et des routines simples, sûrs et désirables pour le plus grand nombre, avec un effet immédiat et des bénéfices durables, à prix juste, dans le respect des personnes et de la planète.

Avec des marques complémentaires comme ÉNERGIE FRUIT et ÉNERGIQA, Bloomup répond aux besoins d’une clientèle engagée sur des catégories complémentaires, de l’essentiel naturel accessible à l’accessible premium, en apportant, chaque jour, du plaisir dans le quotidien.

MADE IN FRANCE - min. 95% origine naturelle - VEGAN - EFFICACITE PROUVEE - CERTIFIE BCORP

Name: Missha Türkiye
Description:
Güney Kore kozmetiğinin en iyi markalarının distribütörlüğünü yapmakta olan firmamız 2013 yılında kurulmuştur. 6 adet online satış platformu olmak üzere, Türkiye genelinde de 17 aktif mağazası ile hizmet vermektedir. Kozmetik dünyasının en kaliteli ve popüler ürünlerini müşterilerimize sunmanın gururunu yaşıyoruz. Müşterilerimizden aldığımız geri bildirimler doğrultusunda, müşteri ihtiyaçlarımıza dönük eşsiz ürün gamı ve benzersiz çeşitliliğiyle müşterilerimize doyumsuz kozmetik deneyimi sunuyoruz. Kaliteden ödün vermeyen, popüler ve yenilikçi ürünleri müşterilerimizle buluşturma yeteneğimizi hep canlı tutarak, müşterilerimize en yeni ve en etkili güzellik çözümlerini sunmak için tutkuyla çalışıyoruz.
 
Şirket kültürümüzün temelinde, çalışan ve müşteri mutluluğu, şeffaflık, tutku, yenilikçilik, özgünlük, cesaret ve kapsayıcılık yer almaktadır.  Esnek, ergonomik ve mutlu bir iş ortamının, yaratıcılığı geliştirdiğine ve verimliliği artırdığına inanırız. Her ekip üyesinin düşüncelerini ve fikirlerini önemsiyor, farklı bakış açılarına değer veriyoruz. Çalışanlarımızın yetenek ve becerileri doğrultusunda istedikleri alanlarda kariyer yapmaları için fırsatlar sunuyoruz. Bu yolculuğu eğitim ve gelişimle destekliyoruz.
 
Ürün geliştirmeden müşteri etkileşimlerine kadar, kalite ve müşteri hizmetleri mükemmelliğine olan bağlılığımız vazgeçilmezimizdir. Müşterilerimizin kişiselleştirilmiş ilgi ve özel ihtiyaçlarına hitap eden çözümler almalarını sağlamak için kendimizi geliştirmeye devam ediyoruz.
 
 
Missha Türkiye’de çalışma atmosferimiz, iş birliği ve tutkunun bir karışımıdır. Açık iletişimi, bilgi paylaşımını ve sürekli öğrenmeyi teşvik ediyoruz. Ekip üyelerimiz hem kendimizde hem de ürünlerimizde en iyiyi ortaya çıkarmak için ortak bir vizyonla hareket etmektedir. Pozitif bir çalışma ortamının, pozitiflik yayan ürünlere dönüştüğüne ve www.missha.com.tr ile her etkileşimin güzellik yoluyla yaşamları iyileştirmeye olan bağlılığımızı yansıtmasını sağladığına inanıyoruz.

Name: BITE Beauty
Description:
Handcrafted in downtown Toronto, BITE BEAUTY was born with a singular idea; create lipstick that is remarkably different. Sourcing good-enough-to-eat ingredients, developing innovative formulas, and producing each and every product in-house, BITE BEAUTY manufactures without compromise, ensuring only the highest standards for colour, texture, and performance.  With its sole focus on lips, BITE BEAUTY proves you don’t have to sacrifice performance for a product made from nature. 

Available exclusively at Sephora USA and Canada and via the Sephora.com website.

Name: BYBI Beauty
Description:
BYBI is a natural, certified vegan & cruelty free skincare brand from London, UK. We are skincare experts committed to bringing you really great beauty products that actually work, using only ingredients that we know will directly benefit the skin. We believe in transparency, because everyone deserves to know what’s in their beauty products, and innovation, because natural doesn’t have to mean basic.

Founded in 2017 by bloggers Dominika Minarovic and Elsie Rutterford, our skincare range is sold in the UK, Europe, the  USA and APAC.

Name: Probelle Cosmética
Description:
Probelle, a Brazilian company that values quality, innovation and high performance in professional cosmetics, currently with a strong presence in the national market and expanding its operations globally, supported by a new plant inaugurated in 2018.

Specialist in nutrition and hair revitalization, Probelle uses state-of-the-art raw materials and essential oils to provide the absolute nutrition to your hair, with oustanding performance formulations.

We are ready for the great challenge of serving the beauty market with multifunctional cosmetics and conquer the admiration of professionals and consumers worldwide.

Name: Nature's Beauty Creations Ltd
Description:
Nature's Beauty Creations Ltd is Sri Lanka's largest & most awarded herbal cosmetics manufacturer. Its leading brands include Nature's Secrets, Panda Baby, Champion, elithe, Chandi Panda and Misumi. 

The production facility surpasses European GMP quality requirements and is accredited with international ISO standards. It is also the only cosmetics company to have won Sri Lanka's highest National Green Award - Gold for unwavering commitment towards environmental conservation & sustainability, and has also won the country's highest award for employee health & well-being; Sri Lanka Corporate Health & Productivity - Gold Award (large category). 

The company also grows and maintains Sri Lanka's largest collection of medicinal plants for conservation & research around its production facility.

Name: Independent Beauty Association
Description:
A non-profit trade association for the Independent Cosmetic and Personal Care Industry.

We are proud to help our members foster the creativity and innovation that is the heart of the cosmetics and personal care industry.

IBA, the Independent Beauty Association (formerly ICMAD, Independent Cosmetics Manufacturers & Distributors), is a non-profit trade association supporting creative, innovative companies, from startups to established multinational businesses of all sizes. IBA is here to help our members succeed in the rapidly changing, highly competitive global cosmetics and personal care industry. Since 1974, our association has provided essential guidance and support through business tools, publications, education, networking opportunities, and legislative advocacy.

Name: Circadia
Description:
Circadia utilizes the body’s circadian rhythms, defending skin from environmental insult during the day, and stimulating repair mechanisms during sleep. The professional treatments are distinguished by Dr. Pugliese’s discovery that skin repair can be achieved without inducing damage. The SWiCH Dermal Rejuvenation System is a peel alternative that stimulates the Krebs cycle to enhance energy production and cell turnover. Circadia’s body care includes the most effective anti-cellulite product in the industry, a category pioneered by Dr. Pugliese’s research.  

Circadia’s new products, utilize non-paraben preservative systems, includes line extensions and specialty items for comprehensive treatment of wrinkles, pigmentation disorders, acne and rosacea.  The new packaging enhances shelf appeal.

Circadia’s corporate facilities are in rural Pennsylvania. It houses operations, product development and manufacturing. The Circadia Institute offers seminars in Pennsylvania and across the US. 
New accounts are not obligated to a minimum purchase. Practitioners are trained in-house by a regional distributor. 

Circadia by Dr. Pugliese has a rich history and bright future. Dr. Pugliese, age 87, remains a strong, influential voice in the science of aging skin. Michael Pugliese has earned a distinguished reputation as a lecturer in skin science, and innovator in product formulation.   

Demonstrations and lectures are listed on the website at www.circadia.com.

Name: Laboratoris FELTOR
Description:
Laboratoris Feltor is a contract manufacturing company.
We don’t have an own products. We are your production site.

Feltor’s commitment to service translates into helping you to find the best product/process combination. At our pilot plant, we perform process simulations for an optimal price/performance ratio.

OUR STRENGTH, OUR PEOPLE

Name: Lisap Laboratori Cosmetici S.p.A.
Description:
LISAP Laboratori Cosmetici SpA designs, develops, and manufactures hair and beauty products since 1952. 

Our mission: making every hairstylist’s job a pleasant, shared experience by creating an international professional beauty network. 

LISAP products result from our laboratories’ research and stand out for their safe and effective formula, high-quality results, and ease of use.

Part of @HQholding

#WEDOBEAUTIFULHAIR

Name: LABORATOIRE OZALYS
Description:
Ozalys est une marque 100% française, qui dispose de son propre laboratoire, créée par des femmes pour les femmes.
Nous utilisons le meilleur des ingrédients naturels et synthétiques, en concentrant nos efforts de recherche à la substitution des ingrédients suspectés dangereux pour la santé.

Nous accompagnons les femmes à tous les moments sensibles de leur vie, à travers une gamme de dix produits qui répond aux exigences des peaux les plus fragiles.

Name: Donatti Professionale
Illamasqua
Description:
Hailed as the most significant make-up launch in over twenty years, independent, British make-up brand Illamasqua brings truly professional make-up to the High street for the first time.

This make-up brand, that empowers people to express their individuality, has been making a scene in London since its launch in November 2008. The product of a heady mix of influences; from its roots in the dark and illicit 1920s Berlin club scene, to a rich heritage in the manufacture of make-up for film and theatre, Illamasqua takes it’s inspiration from members of the ‘alternative scenes’ for whom self-expression is paramount. Champions of creativity and fighting against injustice wherever we go, our highly-pigmented, long lasting products provide consumers and make-up artists alike with the products and inspiration to ensure they can express themselves, whoever they are and whatever look they want to achieve.

After debuting in Selfridges Oxford Street, in the biggest retail space ever awarded to an unknown brand, Illamasqua can now be found in the best retailers in seven territories across the world including the USA, UAE and Australia and South East Asia.

Name: Cheekbone Beauty Cosmetics INC
Description:
Cheekbone Beauty is an Indigenous-owned and born on social media sustainable colour cosmetics brand.  Cheekbone Beauty is known for creating clean, vegan and sustainable colour cosmetics using Indigenous wisdom.

Keeping in line with her Anishinaabe roots, Jenn’s Cheekbone Beauty launched a less-waste line of lipsticks in 2020, called SUSTAIN, our big vison leave a big impact on the lives of Indigenous youth while leaving less of an impact on the planet. Cheekbone’s aim is to not only make a difference in the lives of Indigenous youth through our donations addressing the educational funding gap. But mostly to create a space in the beauty industry where Indigenous youth feel represented and seen. 

Giving back to our community is a fundamental part of Cheekbone's mission. Our streams of giving include product donations, monetary donations, or project-focused donations.



Cheekbone Beauty has donated over $150,000 in total to a wide variety of causes. This includes Shannen’s Dream and the FNCS, product donations to not-for-profits and other organizations, the Navajo Water Project, and One Tree Planted. As Cheekbone Beauty grows, so do our charitable goals, limiting the profitability of the organization. True to our roots, Cheekbone’s definition of success is not based on what you attain for yourself, but instead in what you give back to your community.

The real impact is felt through the emails, DM's and conversations with Indigenous youth that are really feeling their value in the world.

Name: RANS Beauty by Nagita Slavina
Description: RANS Beauty is a body care product developed by Nagita Slavina, with infused Natural Essential Oils and AHA Fruit.

Name: Cozie I Certifiée B Corp & Cosmébio
Description:
Notre mission : encourager la transition écologique en offrant une réelle alternative aux cosmétiques traditionnels mais aussi solides.
 
Tous nos produits sont formulés à partir d’ingrédients d’origine naturelle et biologiques, conditionnés en France dans des contenants en verre, sans suremballage, et donc vraiment zéro-déchet.
Mais surtout ils sont très sensoriels. Leurs textures et leurs odeurs sont un vrai bonheur !

Tous nos contenants sont en verre consignés. Cela signifie qu’une fois vides, nous les récupérons, les lavons en ESAT dans des conditions d’hygiène stricte avant de les remettre en circulation.      
 
Dès la création de Cozie, notre objectif était d’aller le plus loin possible dans notre démarche zéro déchet. C’est ainsi que nous avons eu idée alors révolutionnaire : développer des machines de vrac spécialisées dans le refill des produits cosmétiques pour les commerces de proximité.

Voici comment sont nées la Dozeuse et la Dozette.

- Instagram : https://instagram.com/coziebio?igshid=YmMyMTA2M2Y=

Name: OLEHENRIKSEN
Description: OLEHENRIKSEN products and treatments are designed to elevate skin to the best it can possibly be with a synergy of the highest quality natural botanicals and the latest state of the art equipment and technology. Our mission is to create efficacious products that allow customers to experience the transformation of their body, mind and spirit. Made with natural botanicals and antioxidant rich ingredients, OLEHENRIKSEN products are designed to target and treat every skin type and concern, from anti-aging to acne and everything in between.

Name: Danessa Myricks Beauty
Description:
We develop innovative multifunctional products that work everyplace, on every face. Our high-performing products give makeup artists and consumers alike the freedom to play outside the box.

All of our products are cruelty-free.

Name: GALA COSMETICI |              Your natural beauty partner
Description:
Gala Srl SB, fondata nel 2004, unisce etica, innovazione e dedizione. Per Altromercato abbiamo creato Natyr – benessere solidale, la prima linea cosmetica con oltre il 50% di materie prime provenienti dal commercio equo e solidale. Specializzati nella produzione conto terzi di cosmetici naturali e biologici per drugstore, GDO, erboristeria, profumeria e farmaceutica, realizziamo formulazioni fino al 100% naturali, vegan e prive di derivati del petrolio e parabeni, garantendo standard di elevata qualità e sicurezza. Come Società Benefit, integriamo etica e sostenibilità in ogni aspetto del nostro lavoro.

Gala Srl SB, founded in 2004, combines ethics, innovation, and dedication. For Altromercato, we developed Natyr – benessere solidale, the first cosmetic line with over 50% of raw materials sourced from fair trade. Specialized in private label and contract manufacturing of natural and organic cosmetics for drugstores, mass retail (GDO), herbalists, perfumery, and the pharmaceutical sector, we create formulations with up to 100% natural-origin ingredients. Our products are vegan, free from petroleum derivatives and parabens, ensuring high standards of quality and safety. As a Benefit Corporation, we integrate ethics and sustainability into every aspect of our work.

Name: iTiT Cosmetics
