Description: Founded in 2011 by Raquel Melgarejo Antequera and Mirko Panico, iTiT takes care of the entire process of producing cosmetic products for lips, eyes and face, from the initial concepts to the chemical formulation of the product, from production to packaging, always looking at the latest trends in fashion and self-care. The eclectic and transversal approach to the cosmetic sector, the qualified staff, the continuous research of leaner and more efficient production processes have assured iTiT numerous acknowledgments and certifications including ISO 22716 and ISO 9001.

Name: El Yasmina Cosmetics
Description: Launched in 1979, Yasmina Cosmetics quickly positioned itself as one of the leading cosmetics companies in Egypt and abroad, The company has been serving generation after generation, producing more than 100 brands and serving thousands of customers. We focus on continuous innovation to make sure we always meet people’s needs with our superior quality and competitive prices.

Name: Babe Original
Description: You're an Original, Babe.

Name: Bogart
Description:
Since 1975, Bogart is an independent family business listed on the Euronext Paris market, which fully owns or produces under license 9 fragrances and cosmetics brands, including Méthode Jeanne Piaubert, Carven Parfums, Stendhal, Jacques Bogart, Ted Lapidus, Naf Naf,  Chevignon, Ted Lapidus Mode, April and Close. 

The Group has also developed a retail network of 413 stores in France, Belgium, Luxemburg, Germany, Israël and UAE as part of a vertical integration strategy.

Our unique manufacturer/retailer positionning allows us to sell our products in more than 90 countries.

Bogart ensures the development of iconic French brands in the world of fashion and beauty, respecting their identity and providing all the resources needed for the creation, manufacture and selective distribution of their products.

- Total knowledge and control of the product's life cycle, from its conception and production in our factories in France to distribution
- A portfolio of additional internationally known brands
- All our products have been manufactured and packaged in our 2 factories in France for more than 20 years

Name: Marin Skincare
Description:
We make transformative, Glycoprotein-powered essentials for dry, damaged skin. 

Founded by two bioengineers who ‘scratched our own itch’, we help people suffering from dry, damaged and upset skin, using a Glycoprotein found in lobster as our key ingredient.

Name: Nexton
Description: Nexton is a market leader in the manufacturing of personal care products. With a broad range of products varying from Baby Care to Men’s Care, Nexton’s products are formulated and produced using rigorous testing and the highest quality manufacturing facilities. Our aim is to provide our consumers with safe and effective personal care products that are perfect for use by babies and all other members of the family.

Name: MISSHA
Description:
Missha is one of the world’s leading creators of high quality and affordable K-beauty products and trends. Inspired by the educated consumer, Missha strives to empower the modern-day beauty enthusiast by spreading the knowledge of K-beauty trends through innovative, effective, and affordable cosmetic products. Missha is constantly striving to meet the needs of the global customer and to provide the utmost satisfaction. 

Follow us on social media!
IG: @misshaus
FB: @misshaus
Twitter: @misshaus
Pinterest: @misshaus

Missha US Inc. is a subsidiary of Able C&C US Inc. Sister brands include A’pieu, MeFactory, Merzy, Honesi, Sengdo, Bodyholic, Cellapy, and Lapothicell.


Website:
www.missha.net (Global Site) 
www.misshaus.com (US Site)

Name: Hera Cosméticos
Description: Importadora Nacional de Cosméticos.

Name: Astra Make-Up
Description:
Astra Make Up  was founded by the chemist-pharmacist Giuliano Settimi in 1988 and his son Simone, together with his wife Lucia, has brought it to astonishing levels. As a matter of fact, Astra has a steady presence in over 30 countries world wide and our export sales increase every year.
We are proud that Astra is the make up brand that bring up the made in Italy values since our birth, making high level products at a honest price.

Name: PRAVANA
Description:
PRAVANA is a global salon professional hair care and color trailblazer, offering stylists and consumers groundbreaking, cutting edge products that are revolutionizing the hair world, one strand at a time. Its core mission is to deliver unparalleled, high performance beauty solutions to salon professionals and consumers everywhere that are unprecedented and unmatched in both quality and value.

PRAVANA leads the trends with the best-selling ChromaSilk professional hair color line, high-performing hair care & styling products, groundbreaking blonding regimens and more. PRAVANA is responsible for pioneering the creative color trend with the introduction of its long-lasting, vibrant VIVIDS line over 10 years ago, evolving into an award-winning collection of unique shades. Throughout the years, PRAVANA has continually maintained its status as an innovator. PRAVANA goes beyond traditional product creation by redefining hair products, offering beauty solutions that challenge the norms and enhance the basics. With these tools, PRAVANA has taken the reigns in developing the latest hair trends, continuously creating never-before-seen, provocative, inspirational techniques, formulas & look books by the industry’s most prolific stylists. Through literature, imagery and digital presence, PRAVANA has bridged the gap between the professional & mainstream while consistently upholding the authority of the stylist like no brand has done before. 

In 2017, PRAVANA was acquired by Henkel and is now headquartered in the world-class #AcademyofHair in Culver City, Calif.

Name: HERbeauty
Description:
ABOUT US: 

Welcome to HERbeauty community! We're so happy you're here. Here's a little bit about us : 

This brand was conceptualized in 2020, in the midst of the pandemic, when our founders saw a gap in the Pakistani beauty market. They realized there was a need for a better beauty standard, one that truly championed Pakistani women; Gave them better quality products, with better ingredients and  better representation. And just like that their mission birthed HERbeauty, a clean&kind skincare and wellness brand rooted in purpose.

CLEAN&KIND - All HER formulas are super clean and bio compatible with all skin types. Clinically tested, dermatologist approved, leaping bunny and vegan certified. And wait there's more…. No parabens and sulfates are used, and we will never test on animals. Making us 100% cruelty and toxin free! 

 INNOVATION
After years of trials and testing, we designed highly effective, multitasking blends for perfectly balanced and boosted skin. Our formulas are curated by mixing clinically proven actives with nature's most transformative ingredients. Giving you science backed, potent products that not only deliver results, but are gentle and care for your skin's health. 

INCLUSIVITY AND DIVERSITY 
We are committed to crushing beauty standards by providing genuine representation. Our skincare is for every skin type, tone and texture. We aim to celebrate you just as you are! No babes left behind. 

 SELF CARE 
Self-care is the core of our brand as we believe beauty, taking care of yourself, and mental health are deeply connected.   HER is on a mission to support and uplift women through every phase of their lives. To accomplish this goal, we created: HERvoice, our wellness pledge. Through HERvoice ,we are committed to donating % of all our sales towards funding mental health services to all across Pakistan. 

Join us in our journey to shake up the beauty industry by promoting clean,kind and inclusive skincare that prioritizes you.

Name: LAWLESS Beauty
Description:
There are no rules in beauty. 

"My mission is to create high performance, clean makeup that is supercharged with uncompromising ingredient quality, clinically tested to visibly improve the quality of your skin, so you can reap the benefits of your makeup for years to come."
- Annie Lawless, Founder & Creator of Lawless Beauty

Name: BeautyStat Cosmetics
Description:
Result Driven Skincare for All Skin Types

As a cosmetic chemist founded company, we’ve seen firsthand how the current market is saturated with products that are basically just smoke and mirrors. We promise to be transparent and help you cut through the clutter because at the end of the day, our goal is the same – to feel confident in our own skin.

We only use premium quality ingredients that have been scientifically provento be effective.Combined with our patented technology, we elevate these performance-driven actives to deliver formulas that not only work but work fast.

Name: PROLAB Cosmetics
Description:
Com mais de 20 anos de história, a Prolab Cosmetics é uma indústria brasileira especializada no desenvolvimento de soluções profissionais para beleza e cuidado capilar. Desde 2000, seguimos impulsionados por quatro pilares fundamentais: ética, segurança, qualidade e inovação.
Nossa estrutura conta com um parque fabril de 2.900 m², localizada na cidade Diadema (SP), abriga os setores de produção, envase, estocagem, um moderno Laboratório de Pesquisa e Desenvolvimento e um Centro de Formação Técnica, dedicado à capacitação de profissionais e à realização de workshops e lançamentos.
Nosso portfólio é composto por marcas que atendem diferentes demandas do mercado profissional, entre elas: Ativare, Nutrat, Iluminata, Tonalittá, Braliz, Super Look e Super Pé.
Atualmente, a Prolab está presente em salões e pontos de venda de todo o Brasil e mantém um forte posicionamento internacional, com exportações para mais de 30 países nas Américas, Europa e Oriente Médio, além de participação ativa nos principais eventos e feiras globais do setor de cosméticos.
Inovação, performance e resultados reais: é assim que seguimos transformando a beleza profissional ao redor do mundo.

Name: State Beauty Supply
Description: Salon Distribution Company representing:  Redken, Pureology, Matrix, L'Oreal Professionnel, Serie Expert, Mizani, Joico, OPI, CND, Clinical Care Skin Solutions, American Crew, Pravana, TiGi, DevaCurl, Sexy Hair Concepts, Belvedere, Takara Belmont, Continuum Foot Spas

Name: HSA Cosmetics S.p.A.
Description:
Established in 1982 in the heart of Europe, we embody different souls in beauty. Hair color has always been our core business: with the know-how of skilled researchers, we develop innovative hair formulas with a main focus on quality.

We have expanded to a 360° approach to beauty, becoming comprehensive beauty specialists. Today, we are one of the leading private label reality in the beauty field. As part of our journey, HSA Cosmetics is also the proud owner of renowned haircare brands such as Esla Italy, Nouvelle, Addmino-18, Silky, and Toujours, as well as the skincare brand Guudcure, all of which reflect our commitment to excellence in beauty.

With a 45,000 sqm factory, we always think big:

• 30 tons and 150,000 hair color tubes of daily production
• Over 500 shades available in multiple formulations
• 35 full trucks delivered every week
• Over 200 brands developed and currently manufactured
• 30 years of experience
• Presence in over 90 countries worldwide

Our expertise allows us to deliver cutting-edge products that resonate across diverse markets and beauty needs.

Name: Rose Inc
Description: Clean beauty powered by science. High-performance color and skincare by Rosie Huntington-Whiteley.

Name: Gama Chile S.A.
Description: Empresa dedicada a la cosmética capilar, equipamiento y locales propios, una amplia gama de productos técnicos y profesionales, con una solida base de ventas a nivel nacional e internacional. Productos importantes son la marca Wella, Ga.ma (Alisadores, secadores, onduladores, calientacmas,etc.), Braun, Farmavita, Otowil,

Name: Kryolan Cosmetics (India) P. ltd
Description:
Kryolan Cosmetics (India) P. ltd is a subsidiary of the 1945 founded Berlin Professional Make-up company Kryolan GmbH.

At Kryolan, we make make-up. But not like anybody else. Because unlike everybody else, we actually make our make-up. As one of the first cosmetics brands in the world, we use our own formulas and recipes to manufacture our own products. “We offer professional make-up to the industry so they can accomplish their tasks effectively and create incredible works of art”

We think of them. We create them. Formulate them and love them into existence. We’ve been doing this over 80 years. And we’re still doing it today.

There is only one real professional make-up maker. There is only one Kryolan. 

•Never tested on animals and uses food grade quality ingredients whenever available
•Meets and exceeds all standards; FDA, EU, GMP and  KRYOLAN PROFESSIONAL MAKE-UP is now the first range of color make-up products to receive the Seal of Quality Approval from the European Centre for Allergy Research Foundation (ECARF).

Name: Yes! Cosmetics
Description:
A Yes! Cosmetics é uma empresa nacional de cosméticos em atuação desde 2000. O ponto de partida foi o sonho de três sócios: Cândido Espinheira, Felipe Espinheira e Ketty de Jesus, com apenas 12 deo colônias e 15 cores de batons. Hoje, são cerca de 300 itens, entre perfumaria, cuidados corporais, maquiagens e acessórios, além de uma linha exclusiva com a apresentadora Sabrina Sato. Tudo com alta qualidade, inovação constante e preços acessíveis para posicionar a marca como uma referência de moda e estilo.

Em 2016, a Yes! iniciou no franchising e possui mais de 80 unidades franqueadas nos estados de Amazonas, Bahia, Ceará, Distrito Federal, Maranhão, Mato Grosso, Minas Gerais, Pará, Paraná, Pernambuco, Piauí, Rio de Janeiro, Rio Grande do Norte, Rondônia, Rio Grande do Sul, Santa Catarina e São Paulo.

Name: asambeauty
Description:
Was aus Leidenschaft für die Wirkstoffkraft der Traube vor 60 Jahren begann, ist heute eines der erfolgreichsten Familienunternehmen auf dem deutschen Beauty-Markt. 

Vom Private-Label-Produzent entwickelte sich asambeauty zu einem führenden Multi-Channel-Beauty-Unternehmen (E-Commerce, Retail, TV Sales), dessen Eigenmarken Millionen von Kosmetikfans weltweit begeistern und helfen, die eigene, ganz individuelle Schönheit zu entfalten. 

Dabei fließt die jahrzehntelange Skin Care Expertise auch in andere Produktkategorien wie dekorative Kosmetik oder Haarpflege mit ein. Dies stellt das interne Forschungs- und Entwicklungsteam mit über 30 Beschäftigten sicher. Mehrere Patente belegen das außergewöhnliche Know-how, das asambeauty zum Innovationstreiber der Beauty-Branche macht.
Auch Nachhaltigkeit und soziales Engagement sind fest in der Unternehmenskultur verankert: So setzt asambeauty auf ein nachhaltiges Verpackungskonzept mit Refill-Lösungen und Recycling-Materialien. Die Produkte sind tierversuchsfrei und überwiegend vegan. Die komplette Wertschöpfungskette findet 
in Deutschland statt – zur Reduzierung des CO2-Fußabdrucks und Schonung der Ressourcen. Die Produktionsstätten in Bayern und Rheinland-Pfalz tragen zur Arbeitsplatzsicherung und wirtschaftlichen Stärkung der Regionen bei. Seiner gesellschaftlichen Verantwortung wird asambeauty außerdem durch die Unterstützung gemeinnütziger Organisationen gerecht.

Mit M. Asam, ahuhu, Youthlift und Kräuterhof bietet asambeauty alles für die Schönheit von Kopf bis Fuß: naturnah und effektiv, Premium-Qualität “Made in Germany” zu einem fairen Preis.

Zur Holding, der BHI Beauty & Health Investment Group, gehören die M. Asam GmbH, ASAMBEAUTY GmbH, ahuhu GmbH, InnoBeauty GmbH sowie die Asam Betriebs-GmbH. Mehr über die Asam Betriebs-GmbH und das Thema Private Label findet Ihr hier:  www.asam-cosmetics.com.

https://www.asambeauty.com/datenschutzbestimmungen/social-media

Name: Cosmetorium
Description:
España es un centro de excelencia en la formulación, fabricación
y distribución de productos cosméticos y de cuidado personal. 

En un mercado tan competitivo y dinámico como el cosmético, la SEQC consideró necesario establecer un foro que satisficiera las necesidades de los profesionales involucrados en los procesos creativos, de diseño, desarrollo, marketing y producción.
Cosmetorium nace para satisfacer esa necesidad.

Name: Ayouthveda by AIMIL
Description:
Ayouthveda - Bridging Ayurveda and Modern Phytotherapy
A Global Personal Care Brand  Over 40 Years of Trusted Aimil Legacy  Redefining Modern Ayurveda
At AIMIL Ayouthveda, we blend the timeless wisdom of Ayurveda with the cutting-edge science of phytotherapy to create safe, effective, and therapeutic personal care solutions tailored to modern consumers' needs.
Founded by Dr. Sanchit Sharma, a renowned scientist in phytochemistry and natural products, Ayouthveda was launched on February 14, 2020, drawing from the trusted foundation of AIMIL Pharmaceuticals (established in 1984).
 Our holistic range spans Face, Hair, Bath & Body, Intimate & Oral Care, and Wellness, featuring:
 Free-from harsh chemicals, parabens, sulfates, silicones & artificial fragrances
 Science-backed, dermatologically tested & cruelty-free formulations
 Personalized skincare designed for holistic well-being
Active in 38+ countries, we meet stringent global safety and efficacy benchmarks, including EU regulations.
 Accessible Premium Ayurveda
 Research-Driven Therapeutic Care
 Nature-Inspired, Science-Validated, Globally Admired
Join us in revolutionizing the personal care industry with clean, conscious, and credible Ayurveda.

Name: PhiAcademy Group
Description:
PhiAcademy is a global leader in the permanent makeup industry, renowned for innovation, artistry, and excellence. Operating in over 160 countries, we set the highest standards in beauty by providing superior products, advanced techniques, and world-class education for beauty professionals.

Our core activities include the production and global distribution of premium permanent makeup products and essential tools for professional treatments. We also empower beauty professionals through the prestigious PhiAcademy, beauty academy offering comprehensive training programs designed for both beginners and experienced artists.  

At the heart of our expertise is the revolutionary PhiBrows Method, a groundbreaking microblading technique created by Mr. Branko Babic. 

We are also proud to offer Super Pigment, regarded as the best microblading pigment, known for its exceptional color retention, safety, and professional results. Our production facilities in Germany and Serbia adhere to EU REACH standards, ensuring the highest quality.

We sell our products primarily through our official e-commerce platform, PhiShop.com, while also partnering with distributors in multiple countries worldwide, ensuring broad access to our premium products. Our main distribution center in Vienna, Austria enables us to efficiently serve our global global network of customers and partners door to door.  

With over 100,000 students trained and a growing community of satisfied customers, PhiAcademy continues to lead in beauty education and professional products.

For more information about our companies and applications, follow the links below: 
• PhiAcademy DOO Serbia https://phi-academy.com/
• PhiAcademy GmbH Austria https://phishop.com/ 
• VonBerg Pharma GmbH Germany 
  http://vonbergpharma.com/
•Craftmaster GmbH Austria
•Craftmaster App IOS, Android
• PhiApp IOS, Android

Join PhiAcademy in redefining beauty standards through innovation, precision, and artistry.

Name: Mented Cosmetics
Description: Mented Cosmetics is a venture-backed, premium beauty brand transforming the industry with products and marketing that celebrate the beauty of diversity. Mented was started in a 1-bedroom Harlem apartment; we’ve got humble beginnings and a global vision, and we need teammates with the humility and big dreams to match. At Mented we bring our whole selves to work, because changing the landscape of beauty - and the world along with it - requires more than intelligence; it takes passion, grit, and character. We’re building a diverse team that loves helping our community feel beautiful - if that sounds like it’s up your alley, learn about joining our team. We have several open positions, click on the link to learn more.

Name: DEOC Cosmetics LLC.
Description:
DEOC cosmetics is a natural skincare brand. Our brand was founded by Dr. Mohamed Maged pharmacist & CEO of DEOC cosmetics, Dec. 2019 - Cairo, Egypt.
DEOC has just launched first line of skincare products. And we had more than 3000+ happy customer reviews on our products on our social platforms & website. 
Our main aim in deoc., is building a big natural community who cares about quality of content, products & above all to create a great impact on each & everyone in our community, especially women of Egypt.
Together we are also giving anyone information on how to love themselves & the environment they are surrounded by. You are welcome to join our passionate driven Family by just being your natural self, showing off your humanity, by showing the imperfections that perfectly flatters your skin. The brains behind DEOC is a mix of agricultural and chemistry, and the development of it is based on your definition of beauty; based on your feedback. We are only here to root for your shine, to help you care for yourself and expand the “Natural” society. 

What’s DEOC?
An idea birthed from loving nature and being kind human beings. A passionate pharmacist with big dreams, he was wandering the lands in Germany. In his head, he missed his home: Egypt, and its wonderful fields. He worked in agricultural field for 4 years, and his love for chemistry is still intertwined in between. He wants to expand his beliefs, that loving nature and being kind human beings will save us more years. An idea became suddenly so clear. His reality became: DEOC (deutsch egyptian organic cosmetics), a natural cosmetics brand for everyone: eco-friendly, cruelty free and with premium quality. Not only are we giving you our beloved products, but we are also giving you information on how to love yourself and the environment you are surrounded with.

Name: AIRCOS PASCUAL
Description:
AIRCOS is a French family company combining knowledge, quality, know-how and creativity. It has been a partner to key players in the cosmetic industry for 40 years.
Thanks to our unique expertise and driven by our passion for products, textures and colors, we offer customized, innovative and technically applicable solutions to market issues, while maintaining high quality standards and great attention to details.

Our offer is complete, from packaging to formulation including the development and production stages, in order to provide all-in-one answers to customer needs and to manage an entire make-up line. This solution not only simplifies the whole supply chain, it is also a cost-effective way to offer original “made in France” products.
Our conduct is based on reactivity, transparency and strong commitment.

In the heart of the cosmetic valley, AIRCOS has two modern industrial plants equipped with highly adaptable state-of-the-art machinery, in compliance with cosmetic and pharmaceutical regulations and following the most stringent international standards and regulations. We offer a unique optimized supply-chain process for full-service projects.

Name: Zao Make-up
Description:
L'entreprise Cosm'Etika France détient la marque Zao Make-Up.

Zao Make-Up est la première marque de maquillage rechargeable, 100% naturelle et certifiée Bio par Ecocert*.

Zao Make-Up est avant tout la rencontre d’une équipe, animée par le désir de proposer des produits respectueux de la planète et des hommes, dans une volonté affirmée de créer du sens.

DECOUVREZ LE MAQUILLAGE NATUREL ET BIO ZAO :
Pour une mise en beauté respectueuse de la peau, ZAO a développé des formules 100% d’origine naturelle, certifiées  bio* et Vegan. Laissez-vous séduire par des couleurs lumineuses et des textures alliant confort et longue durée. 
Pour une démarche encore plus cohérente ZAO a crée des packagings naturels en bambou, au design moderne et élégant.

RECHARGEABLE ET DURABLE :
Le système innovant des recharges rend chaque produit écologique et économique. Ainsi on peut très facilement remplacer son produit en ne rachetant que la recharge et en conservant le contenant bambou pour le réutiliser à l’infini. 

ETHIQUE ET RESPONSABLE :
Le maquillage ZAO est respectueux de la peau 
et de l’environnement :
-avec 100% d’ingrédients naturels
-certifié BIO* par Ecocert (Label Cosmébio)
-sans dérivés pétrochimiques, ni conservateurs synthétiques
-certifié Cruelty Free : sans tests sur les animaux
-certifié Vegan : sans ingrédients d’origine 
animale (cochenille, cire d’abeille,...)

*sauf crayons (certifiés Eco) et vernis à ongles

Name: Kira Labs Inc.
Description:
Kira Labs Inc, a cosmetic manufacturer established in 2003, has become a leading beauty innovator and market driver for Face, Body, Hair and Home products. An early adopter to the ecommerce revolution, Kira Labs has since grown to vertically market & manufacture over 35 brands worldwide B2B & B2C through Brick and Mortar, Digital and a 360 degree omnichannel strategy. Kira Labs has been recognized globally for its product quality and was recently named Florida Exporter of the Year 2017, Presidents E Export Award 2018 and South Florida Manufacturer of the Year 2019.

 Kira Labs continues to grow and maintain a continuous improvement culture with the support of a strong executive, R&D, manufacturing, design, marketing & sales teams. Our G.M.P compliant facility follows best practice process and protocol and products contain the highest concentrations of active ingredients to deliver dramatic results with the end user satisfaction level in-mind.. 
 
Research and Development is a key component to our success – the Kira Labs scientific team actively sources the latest in ingredient technology from around the world, while our product team maintains an active presence at industry events to keep abreast of emerging trends in products, packaging and design. Because our facility houses all aspects of development and manufacture, from formulation to design and packaging, we are often first to market with the latest innovations in skincare, while adhering to the most stringent procedures and protocols. Our retail websites provide an unparalleled test marketing opportunity for all stock products, with immediate customer feedback allowing for improvements to formulations, packaging and design, and sales information.

Name: Institute of Personal Care Science
Description:
The Institute of Personal Care Science is Australia's premier cosmetic product and personal care training Institute offering Diplomas in Personal Care Development, Promotion and Formulation. We are at the forefront of industry approved training for the cosmetic formulators, marketers and personal care professionals of tomorrow. Our Diplomas are offered nationwide through Distance Education, so you can study to improve your career opportunities at a time and place that suits you; with the support of our industry professionals assisting you all the way.

We are also a Contract Formulating House and Reguatory Consultancy, providing cosmetic, therapeutic good and wholistic food product formulations for a variety of small, medium and large multi-national companies along with marketing stories and regulatory compliance within Australia and around the world.

Name: Ach.Brito
Description:
O início da história da Ach. Brito remonta a 1887 com a fundação da Claus & Schweder, no Porto, pelos alemães Ferdinand Claus e George Schweder. 

A Ach. Brito é fundada em 1918 pelos irmãos Affonso e Aquilles de Brito, que em 1925 adquirem a Claus & Schweder, juntando a inovação à experiência. 

Com novas redes de distribuição e novos produtos, a liderança no mercado é consolidada e, em 1994, a empresa passa para os bisnetos de Achilles de Brito: Aquiles e Sónia. A reestruturação e o reposicionamento do portefólio são o mote para uma nova era com a entrada em novos mercados com a marca de luxo do grupo, Claus Porto.

2015 traz uma nova administração e, com ela, novos planos de expansão com aposta no design, consolidação da presença no mercado nacional e internacionalização dos produtos que são, há mais de 130 anos, referência na área da cosmética.

_

Ach. Brito started at 1887 when Claus & Schweder was founded, in Oporto, by the germans Ferdinand Claus and George Schweder. 

Ach. Brito was founded in 1918 by the brothers Affonso and Aquilles de Brito and it is in 1925 that Ach. Brito acquires Claus & Schweder combining experience and inovation. 

With new distribution networks and new products, the market leadership is consolidated and, in 1994, the company passes to Achilles de Brito’s great-grandchildren: Aquiles and Sónia. After some changes and the repositioning of the portfolio, a new era started with the entry into new markets with the luxury brand of the group, Claus Porto.

In 2015, a new administration brings new expansion plans for the company, which go through a clear bet on the design, consolidation of the national market and internationalization.

Name: SABON FRANCE
Description:
Tout commence en 1997 quand deux amis d’enfance ouvrent une boutique de savons artisanaux, élaborés selon une recette traditionnelle Australienne de plus de 70 ans.

Sabon s'inspire des merveilles de la nature pour créer des produits de beauté , senteurs et objets pour la maison, à partir d’ingrédients naturels et précieux, à s’offrir ou à offrir pour se sentir bien et ré-enchanter le quotidien !

Name: Naseem Perfumes
Description:
Naseem Perfumes - Formulating Emotions since 2000.
"Fragrance is what to the Nose, What music is to the Ears".

Founded by Mr. Ali Husain in the early 2000.
He is the Pioneering force who founded this company and nurtured Naseem perfumes like his own child leading the path through every dark tunnel. 

Today we are Involved in the manufacturing of leading Non-Alcoholic Products such as Perfume Oil, Air Freshener, Body Lotion, Body Spray and our Exotic Collections of Bakhoor.

Name: Laboratoire Odysud
Description:
Laboratoire Odysud est une entreprise française de #cosmétiques certifiés bio, basée à Agen (Lot-et-Garonne). 
Nous sommes détenteurs de Acorelle, marque pionnière de la cosmétique certifiée bio, à l’écoute des #femmes depuis presque 15 ans. Inspirés par la nature pour créer des cosmétiques innovants et sources de bien-être, nous développons des soins certifiés bio d’hygiène et de #beauté, fabriqués en #France, respectueux de votre #santé et de l’#environnement.

Name: Laboratoire Shadeline
Description:
Le Laboratoire SHADELINE est une entité du Groupe ANJAC HEALTH & BEAUTY.
Spécialisée en Recherche & Développement et Production de produits dermocosmétiques, parapharmaceutiques et de dispositifs médicaux à usage topique.
Caractérisé par haut niveau de technicité et de qualité, le laboratoire est certifié ISO 22716 (GMP cosmétiques) et ISO 13485 (Conception, Développement et Production de Dispositifs Médicaux).
SHADELINE crée et fabrique tous types de formulations innovantes et efficaces pour des produits dermatologiques : produits Bébé, produits solaires, produits d’hygiène et de beauté, produits de correction des désordre cutanés et produits de cicatrisation.
En assurant veille technologique et règlementaire permanente, SHADELINE reste à l'écoute des tendances et des dernières innovations pour proposer à ses clients les meilleures solutions.
SHADELINE accompagne ses clients pour l'ensemble de leurs obligations règlementaires en matière de constitution des dossiers techniques jusqu'à l'obtention des attestions d'évaluation de la sécurité. (Monitoring des tests de tolérance et d'innocuité : Patch test d'irritation cutanée, test d'irritation oculaire, test de sensibilisation et de photosensibilisation, test d'usage en conditions réelles sur humains volontaires).
La satisfaction de nos clients est une priorité qui est inscrite dans notre charte qualité.

Name: ARCON Kozmetik
Description:
Arcon Kozmetik was founded by Burç Aksoy and Deniz Aksoy in 1997, and it has become one of the leading companies in Turkey in its field.

Arcon Kozmetik started its successful journey in the world of cosmetics with the brand Yardley, and it took a significant step in 1999 to start a cooperation with Dior, the world leader in selective cosmetics. It has always kept its innovative stance; and undertook distribution of the brands; Hermes, Jean Paul Gaultier, Dolce&Gabbana, Issey Miyake, Narciso Rodriguez, Elie Saab, Zadig&Voltaire Sensai, Paco Rabanne, Carolina Herrera and La Prairie successfully.

Arcon Kozmetik carries its long-term and creative marketing strategies forward step by step with its employees who are developing themselves continuously, and it is one of the pioneers in the selective cosmetics sector in Turkey. It takes on the distributorship of the most prominent and prestigious brands in the world and it is increasing its market share each year.

It prefers innovative approaches in corporate matters and in marketing processes, and it is making use of technology in all fields with its young and dynamic team.

Arcon Kozmetik grows more each year and it has Regional Representations in Ankara and İzmir in addition to the center in Istanbul.

Name: PT MICA JAYA PRATAMA (MINERAL BOTANICA)
Description:
A LINE OF INNOVATIVE DECORATIVE AND SKIN CARE PRODUCTS ORIGINALLY DEVELOPED IN LOS ANGELES, CALIFORNIA. WITH GROWING AWARENESS OF DANGERS OF COSMETICS LACED WITH UNSAFE AND POTENTIALLY HARMFUL INGREDIENTS TO HUMAN AND ENVIRONMENT, WE HAVE DECIDED TO FORMULATE OUR PRODUCTS USING, WHEREVER POSSIBLE, HEALTHIER ALTERNATIVES.
THE ADVANCEMENT OF SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY OVERALL HAVE ALLOWED FOR PREVIOUSLY IMPOSSIBLE METHODS OF PRODUCTION BE MADE POSSIBLE. WITH THAT IN MIND, WE HAVE SET THE COURSE FOR PRODUCING COSMETICS THAT ARE NOT ONLY SAFE TO USE BUT CAN BE BENEFICIAL TO OUR USERS.
FIRST, WE ELIMINATED MANY CHEMICALS THAT ARE DEEMED TO BE UNSAFE FOR USE. NEXT WE WENT ON A QUEST TO FIND EXTRACTS, ESSENTIAL OILS AND NATURALLY DERIVED INGREDIENTS THAT HAVE UNIQUE PROPERTIES, THINGS WITH RESTORATIVE EFFECTS AND BENEFITS TO ITS USER.

Name: Adamis Business Innovation
Description:
Adamis Group Italia è una Società di immagine che guarda il mondo non solo come un “mercato” fatto di azioni e reazioni ma come un universo che regala sogni e trasmette idee. 
Affrontiamo la quotidianità con passione e con estrema attenzione ai particolari. La nostra Policy aziendale si basa su rigidi standard qualitativi di controllo e sviluppo, messi in pratica quotidianamente e che richiedono sforzi importanti; questo ci permette di offrire il miglior servizio personalizzato per ogni cliente.

Siamo convinti che i dettagli facciano la differenza.

Lavorare in Adamis vuol dire accostarsi al nostro mondo fatto di dedizione e impegno, contornati da creatività e fantasia.

Scegliere Adamis come azienda partner vuol dire avere la certezza di vivere in qualsiasi momento non solo la creazione e lo sviluppo di un servizio ma soprattutto un’esperienza emozionale fatta di attenzioni e risultati.

Siete pronti a farvi emozionare?

Benvenuti nel Mondo Adamis.

Name: Biogenesis Labs
Description:
BIOGENESIS is a full service FDA registered contract manufacturer of Skin Care, Over-The-Counter (OTC) preparations and Color Cosmetic products.

Since 1997, our philosophy has been centered on building long-term relationships with our customers and suppliers to deliver effective solutions meeting a vast range of manufacturing requirements. We have a broad and valued customer portfolio, ranging from large multi-nationals to smaller firms with niche market products.

Offering total client confidentiality, we can provide flexible solutions for a speedy route to market for a significant range of products including Liquids, Creams, Powders, Ointments and Gels. We have enjoyed consistent growth since our inception due to our focus on product quality, service, superior customer relationships and competitive pricing.

Our customers market their products in prestigious National and International Department Stores, National Drug Stores Chains, the Internet, QVC and National Catalogs.

BIOGENESIS offers complete procurement of raw materials, manufacturing and filling services by utilizing today's most recent technological advancements in our state-of-the-art laboratories, housed within a Certified Green Building. 

We execute day to day operations through a state of the art web based custom manufacturing management system. The system tracks projects from receiving of Customer Components, Raw Material Inventory, QC Control, Formulation all the way through the Shipment of Manufactured Goods.

Name: YONELLE
Description:
Innowacje to nasza specjalność. Dzięki autorskiej koncepcji SKIN PENETRATION REVOLUTION oraz NANODYSKOM - innowacyjnym nośnikom substancji aktywnych, które pokonują aż 14 warstw komórek naskórka - dokonujemy rewolucji w odmładzaniu wyglądu skóry. Wiemy, że dobry skład to tylko część sukcesu. Kluczowe jest wnikanie składników aktywnych, za którym dopiero idzie efekt.

Założycielki marki YONELLE: Jolanta Zwolińska – biolog, autorytet w środowisku profesjonalistów branży beauty od ponad 30 lat oraz Małgorzata Chełkowska – doktor nauk chemicznych i naukowiec, tworząca kosmetyki od ponad 20 lat, połączyła przełomowa idea. Ma ona swoje źródło w wieloletniej praktyce i naukowych analizach: „Nie sztuką jest zastosować w kosmetykach wszystkie najnowsze aktywne składniki. Sztuką jest sprawić, by przebiły się przez barierę naskórka – tylko wtedy mogą skutecznie działać. To największe wyzwanie kosmetologii XXI wieku i priorytet marki YONELLE”.

YONELLE zachwyca Polki ponadprzeciętną skutecznością kosmetyków, innowacyjnym podejściem do ich tworzenia oraz zachwycającymi formułami. Nie bez powodu jej produkty nazywane są „wynalazkami” – niektórych rozwiązań nie sposób porównać z niczym stosowanym dotychczas w kosmetykach. To także piękne opakowania w satynowych woreczkach, zniewalające zapachy, przyjemność z pielęgnacji. I co najważniejsze - spełnione obietnice. Zachwycającą gładkość i wyraźne odmłodzenie wyglądu skóry.

Name: Natural Plant Products
Description:
Natural Plant Products’ is a 100% farmer owned cooperative operating in the Willamette Valley of Oregon, USA for over 30 years.  Profits go back to support our farmers, provide living wages for our employees, and to service organizations and charities across the Willamette Valley community.  

Natural Plant Products is the original Meadowfoam oil manufacturer, a unique oil which provides the longest natural oxidative stability across vegetable oils, while providing distinctive skin feel and texture.  Natural Plant Products also provides other natural oils including our Daikon Radish Oil. 

Natural Plant Products follows sustainable practices and has been recognized as a Gold medal supplier by EcoVadis, March 2025.

Name: Kuria Mal & Sons
Description:
Cultivating, producing and exporting henna since before the Indian independence, our family is one the first to start the business of Henna in India. Having the experience passed on from a long lineage of entrepreneurs in the same trade has given us a strong sense of business acumen and understanding. It has led us to establish this company, which excels on its three founding pillars - Consistent Quality, Research & Development and On-time Delivery.

Kuria Mal & Sons was founded in 1986, as a 100% export oriented partnership business. Since then various henna based products have been developed and exported to over 28 countries. Our main brand Glory Henna was launched in 1992, which is celebrating its 30 years of dominance in Henna based hair color sector. It has maintained the maximum market share among its major importing countries and is holding steady year on year. Overtime with change in consumer behaviour and market volatility, we have continuously evolved by introducing new brands and products.

Apart from dealing in henna, we have a wide range of Hair Care & Color products. We also provide 100% natural Glory cleansing face packs for men and women with added benefits of rose, cucumber, turmeric, sandalwood and orange peel extracts.

We have been pioneering the henna and natural cosmetics market for decades and unveil only the best quality herbal cosmetics products. Our experts, having profound knowledge of modern technology, are highly skilled and proficient in preparing an impeccable gamut of herbal products using natural ingredients, making them non-harmful in nature.

Name: VIE at home
Description:
Award winning Skin Care, Make Up and Bath & Body products.  Shop with VIE at home online or hold a Party with one of our UK wide Consultants.

And we don't just sell Make Up!  You can also buy trend inspired Jewellery, gorgeous Homeware and fantastic Aromatherapy products to help treat your mood.

Our philosophy remains the same as it was when we originally launched in 1997 (under our previous name Virgin Vie At Home): premium products at affordable prices that can be enjoyed from the comfort of your own home.

Name: Hassan Mukhtar & Brothers LLC
Description:
History:

The company was found in 1931 in Sharjah by Mr. Mukhtar Al-Yousuf (late) and named after his oldest son Mr. Hassan Mukhtar. In 1945 the operation moved to Dubai, the trading center of the region. Within 5 years, the first division was established dealing mainly with cigarettes. In 1958, this division was set up, dealing with toiletries and other fast moving consumable goods.

We are exclusive Agents and Distributors of Toiletries & Accessories of Royal Mirage, Eternal Love, Brut, and Denim.

Hassan Mukhtar & Brothers L.L.C. consists of 170 staff, of which includes 25 sales-people, 47 merchandisers, an in-house promoter team and have on-going partnerships with multiple agencies. Administration and management staff are based in our Al Barsha Head Office, while our sales and logistics operations from secondary Emirate locations. Our experienced team have a wealth of knowledge on all varying retail accounts in the UAE and ensure that our brands have ‘best in class’ placement in stores.

Our Distribution:

Strong relationships require strong foundations. Our central offices (conveniently situated on the Sheikh Zayed Road in Al Barsha, Dubai) ensure easy access for suppliers. 

Our warehouse facilities (in Dubai and Abu Dhabi) are in excess of 9,000 sq.ft. each, provide space for over 4,000 pallets and are pivotal with providing on time delivery of stock . 

Deliveries are via a fleet of 3.5 ton/7 ton trucks, cargo vans for smaller outlets, and van sales for direct business.

Our Export Division:

Hassan Mukhtar & Brother is one of the leading distributors in the United Arab Emirates.  A master agent of many multinationals brands with appointed distributor’s in India, Pakistan, Nepal, Bangladesh, Tanzania, Oman, Malaysia, Singapore, and are planning to add 4 more countries in 2015.

Name: Cimera Care Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
CIMERA CARE PVT. LTD. is one of the leading dermo-cosmetic manufacturing company in India. We offer private label manufacturing services with advanced progressive solutions for complete skin care, hair care and personal care products. We are devoted to novel cosmetic formulation and manufacturing for third parties, with extensive knowledge, experience and proven track record in the area of dermo-cosmetics. Our state of the art manufacturing infrastructure with latest equipment & machineries for novel & customized cosmetic solutions and our plant is located at Sidcul, Haridwar (Uttarakhand).
Our Vision
Our Vision is to take over the leading market position in the Skin Care Products segment by continuously producing high-quality, natural, innovative cosmetic products that are friendly.
Our Mission
Our mission is to provide the best quality products and exceptional services to our customers, offering a wide range of unique cosmetics & skincare formulations.

Name: Osée
Description:
L’ambition de Osée ? Insuffler à toutes l’envie de s’inventer, se réinventer, s’affirmer, sans limite !

Osée est une attitude. La Osée Girl s’octroie le droit de prendre soin d’elle, d’innover et de briller aux yeux de tous avec une chevelure de sirène. La Osée Girl renouvelle son look au gré de ses envies et des tendances du moment.

Osée est une efficacité testée. A chaque utilisation, grâce à une routine simple, les cheveux sont renforcés et sublimés.

Osée est une façon de vivre. Chaque jour les produits Osée permettent de jouer avec son image.

N’hésitez plus, soyez votre propre muse.

Name: Sol de Ibiza
Description: Sol de Ibiza is a families-owned company located in the island of Ibiza. We blend zinc oxide and the finest plant oils to make the world's fairest sunscreen.
Location: Santa Eulalia del Río, Balearic Islands

Name: LEHVOSS Personal Care
Description:
LEHVOSS Personal Care - Your expert distribution partner for smart and sustainable solutions.
LEHVOSS Personal Care is the Pan-European division of LEHVOSS Group focused on innovative solutions for the personal care market. With a broad portfolio of raw materials, a personalised approach, and services, it helps customers innovate with confidence.

Name: Mrs.HIGHBROW Professional
Description: Mrs.Highbrow is a leader in the professional beauty industry, specializing in eyebrows and eyelashes.  With over 10 years of experience, the highly-specialized team provides only the best well-researched products, online courses & trainings, and personalized customer advice. Mrs.Highbrow is proud to continue innovating, bringing quality, expertise and beautiful products to salon specialists worldwide.

Name: SKINLIFE
Description: SKINLIFE the ultimate destination for premium niche perfumery and cosmetics in Portugal.

Name: Pelle Naturale Skincare
Description:
The Pelle Naturale brand develops skincare products inspired by its European roots and the Mediterranean lifestyle. Co-founders Lucy and Nicole aim to serve their customers with the highest quality products delivered through a family atmosphere.

Our brand specializes in naturally simple skincare that is paraben free, sulfate free, cruelty free and USA made.

At Pelle Naturale we are focused on creating a business model that helps others to build a way of life where they are always free to pursue happiness and harmony. 

Our independent sales distributors can work from home in their own time whilst also having the support of a family atmosphere and direct contact with the company founders.

Name: NUSKA expert capillaire
Description:
NUSKA "expert-capillaire" est née d'une rencontre entre 2 experts du bio et  2 experts de produits capillaires professionnels, qui après de riches expériences faites de succès, de beauté et de bio, se sont associés pour relever un défi : créer une nouvelle génération de produits capillaires certifiés bio, aussi efficaces que les produits de salons de coiffure.

NUSKA propose une gamme complète pour prendre soin de tous les types de cheveux : 10 Shampoings bio, 5 Masques capillaires bio, 3 Huiles capillaires bio et une gamme de coloration naturelle inédite, sans henné. 
NUSKA est une marque 100% française et 100% spécialiste qui offre des routines capillaires complètes naturelles et certifiées bio.

Les formules novatrices sont élaborées, testées et approuvées par les coiffeurs, afin de garantir une qualité salon de coiffure. 
Nos produits sont distribués dans les magasins bio et les pharmacies.

Name: ELÉGENCÉ
Description:
Elégencé Teeth Whitening

 Revolutionary Cosmetic Teeth Whitening Products & In-clinic Treatments.

 Dentist Approved & Clinically Proven Formula!

Name: Meu Q
Description:
Produtos de hair care personalizados

Meu Q é uma resposta aos produtos comuns que o mercado oferece. Aqueles produtos genéricos, feitos para atender a grupos de pessoas, mas que particularmente não beneficiam especificamente a ninguém.
São produtos comuns porque não consideram a sua individualidade e, menos ainda, os diferentes momentos da sua vida. Sua pluralidade.
Os produtos Meu Q são desenvolvidos exclusivamente para atender às necessidades do seus cabelos e possibilitar que você explore as suas mais diversas nuances da sua autoexpressão.
Nosso propósito é empoderar a individualidade de seu cabelo valorizando ao máximo toda a sua pluralidade. Uma multiplicidade que ser revela nos seus objetivos, gostos, preferências e estilo vida.

#individualidadeplural #Encontresuapluralidade

Name: La Maison des Coquettes
Description:
La Maison des Coquettes ?! 
Venir chez nous, c’est d’abord arriver dans un lieu unique, cocooning et se sentir « comme à La Maison ». 
Détendue, à l’aise et dans un cadre chaleureux, venez découvrir nos soins et ateliers dans nos centres franchisés
Coquettes à tous les âges, de la pointe des pieds à la pointe des cils, vous sublimer sur chacune des extrémités...pour vous rendre exceptionnelle !
La Maison des Coquettes est une marque française qui, par son originalité et son concept, connait un véritable succès.
 Vous souhaitez nous rendre visite dans l'un de nos instituts ?
ou
 Vous êtes professionnel(le), diplômé(e) de l’univers de l’esthétique, vous envisagez de créer votre institut et êtes à la recherche d’un nouveau regard sur la profession ?
Vous êtes intéressé(e) par notre univers et concept et souhaitez le développer sous la forme d'un contrat de licence de marque ?
Contactez-nous ! 
La Maison des Coquettes cherche à s'implanter en centre-ville ou agglomération et recherche de nouvelles coquettes.
Merci de vos partages 
#coquettes #esthétique #franchise #beauté #marquefrançaise #institut

Name: ZiZANIA Biobotanica
Description:
Natural cosmetics with a modern twist: at ZiZAN!A, we create the best cosmetics with carefully chosen ingredients, all withouth compromises on quality and texture. Zizania is a spin-off from Zollinger Bio - the leaders in organic seeds in Switzerland. For our cosmetics, we upcycle valuable plant from our seed production that would otherwise be discarded.

Our goals:
- Clean Beauty: short formulas avoiding "nasties"
- High concentrations of botanical ingredients upcycled from our gardens
- Sustainable products without compromising on quality

Zizan!a is the botanical revolution!

Name: Leif Products
Description: Leif celebrates the diverse flora of our land. Botanical extracts and essential oils combine in clean formulations that come packaged with a modern outlook.

Name: Gyada Cosmetics
Description:
Gyada Cosmetics is a brand of Eco-Bio, Vegan e Cruelty Free cosmetic products.
Research&Development as a perfect solution to obtain a high quality product and with the natural formulation always. This is our professional choice for creating own any products. We usually study and test each cosmetic for much time in order to find absolute perfection and winning detail. High quality and efficacy of products is obtained by natural formulation, biological and vegetal essences.
In Gyada Cosmetics products there are not: BHA-BHT-COLOURAN-EDTA-PEG-PARABENS-PETROLATUM-SLES-SLS-SILICONE. In addition, all products are Nickel Tested.
We think each product is like a jewel: precious, unique and inimitable. A fine present for lovers of wellness, beauty and nature.

Why Gyada?
The name of Gyada is a result of many influences that hold love, beauty and life.
The Giada stone is composed of different minerals with delicate green colour and crystalline reflections, and it is connected to 4 Chakra. The fourth is the heart Chakra, here energizing and physique functions of human being spin around it.
Gyada is also a feminine name, a faithful friend. A creator of little dreams that can become true.

Name: Bay Dermatology and Cosmetic Surgery, P.A.
Description:
Since 1988, Bay Dermatology and Cosmetic Surgery has offered Central Florida patients for advanced treatment of all skin, hair and nail disorders. Our Board Certified dermatologists specialize in diseases of the skin, skin cancer, psoriasis therapy, and ultraviolet light therapy, as well as a variety of cosmetic procedures. All of our procedures are performed with the utmost care and we take great pride in the personal, one-on-one attention we provide to our patients.
 
With offices conveniently located in Port Richey, Tampa, Largo, Spring Hill, St. Petersburg, Palm Harbor and Homosassa, Bay Dermatology and Cosmetic Surgery is the only practice of its kind serving all of Pasco, Hillsborough, Pinellas, Hernando and Citrus Counties.
 
In 1998, Bay Dermatology and Cosmetic Surgery opened Bay Skin Care. Here, a professional team of licensed aestheticians works in association with our physicians to promote skin health and offer a wide variety of services and medical grade skin care products. Our aesthetician services are available for post-operative care for cosmetic, laser and other surgical procedures.
 
Bay Dermatology & Cosmetic Surgery is also a teaching facility affiliated with NOVA Southeastern College of Osteopathic Medicine. Routinely, medical students, interns and residents rotate through its offices learning the most up to date and state-of-the-art diagnostic and treatment modalities in dermatology.

Name: Avon Bulgaria
Description:
The beauty of doing good

We’re committed to doing good with our people, purpose and product. We create an environment where you can do purposeful work and have a meaningful career. We embrace individuality and know it’s beautiful to be you. Relationships are at the heart of everything we do and we empower you to work in a way that works for you. We recognise your contributions and offer a truly rewarding deal. 

We are Avon.

Name: SBTRCT skincare
Description:
We’re SBTRCT; a new skincare company dedicated to making beautiful, highly effective, solid skincare.

It seems we're all waking up to how our everyday choices, both positively and negatively, impact the planet. But the skincare industry has been slow to catch on.That’s why when we decided to launch a new range, we decided to do things a little bit differently; guilt free skincare, so your ethics don’t have to be left at the bathroom door.

We take the very best proven ingredients and reduce them down to their most potent form. We only use only what’s necessary, to create products that deliver exceptional skincare benefits – only without the unnecessary ‘filler’ ingredients or wasteful excess packaging of most traditional creams and serums.

All our products are cruelty free, palm oil free, soap free and have minimum water content. They’re suitable for vegans, perfect for travel and have packaging that is 100% compostable. All made with love here in the UK.

Name: Weleda CZ/SK
Description:
Weleda je švýcarská farmaceutická firma vyrábějící přírodní léčiva a kosmetiku. Vznikla v roce 1921 jako malá farmaceutická laboratoř. Dnes je celosvětově největším výrobcem léčiv antroposofické medicíny a čisté přírodní kosmetiky. Dceřinné společnosti a obchodní zastoupení nalezneme ve více než 50 zemích světa. I u nás má Weleda dlouhou tradici. Patří mezi nejstarší z celé velké rodiny firem Weleda. Veleda spol. s r.o. byla založena v tehdejším Československu již v roce 1926.

Motto: "V souladu s člověkem a přírodou."

Name: Luonkos Finland
Description: Rakkaudella käsintehtyä suomalaista luonnonkosmetiikkaa Naantalista. Innovatiivista, tehokasta sekä aitoa hoitavuutta. Olemme arvopohjainen start-up; käytämme vain parhaita luomu öljyjä, sertifioituja raaka-aineita, superfoodeja sekä saaristosta kerättyjä tehokasveja.

Name: Elégencé Teeth Whitening
Description:
Elégencé Teeth Whitening

 Revolutionary Cosmetic Teeth Whitening Products & In-clinic Treatments.

 Dentist Approved & Clinically Proven Formula!

Name: Soñar Import Envases y Químicos
Description: Nos esforzamos cada día por ofrecer nuevos productos a nuestros clientes, productos que harán que marque la diferencia, productos con variados materiales, colores y tamaños para la industria cosmética, farmacéutica y alimentaria.

Name: Skin Cafe Limited
Description: Welcome to Skin Cafe Limited. Skin Cafe started in 2016 in Bangladesh as a pioneer of pure organic skin care. We believe in the virtues of a holistic life & came together to promote the message of an organic green lifestyle.

Name: Hayah Laboratories
Description: HAYAH Laboratories was founded in 2016 to develop a unique line of Dermo-cosmetic products which provide solutions to basic skin problems.

Name: Bloom and Blossom
Description:
Bloom and Blossom is all about natural, results-driven body care and wellness products to make you look good and feel great.

We have built a female founded, multi award winning, British made brand upon the strong understanding of the need for effective body care at every stage of a woman’s life; from nurturing maternity and baby products, to high performance hand, leg and body care, to our iconic frankincense-based sleep range and brand new menopause edit.

UK and European Stockists

UK stockists include Marks and Spencer, Waitrose, Anthropologie, Oliver Bonas, Next, Argos, ASDA, Debenhams, Planet Organic, Funky Pigeon, FeelUnique, LookFantastic, Very, Amazon.

European stockists include Laconicum, Made for Moms, Niche Beauty, Amazon.

Also available for domestic and international shipping direct from the Bloom and Blossom website.

Brand Love

There is a significant buzz around the Bloom and Blossom brand and we have received incredible support, gaining cult status amongst beauty editors, industry tastemakers, consumers and a string of A-list fans including Royals, pop stars, TV presenters, sports stars, social media influencers and models.

Our Products

At Bloom and Blossom, every ingredient has earned its right to be included. Our ingredients are of the highest quality and include maximum levels of active ingredients (the ingredients that actually do the work and give the results).

• NO microplastics, NO parabens, SLS, petrochemicals or colourants.
• Made with the care and knowledge to restore and to nurture.
• Conform to the highest standards of laboratory testing and analysis and are, of course, never tested on animals.
• Easy to use and completely safe during pregnancy and for new mothers and babies.
• Proudly made in the United Kingdom.

Name: EMCS Indústria - LTDA
Description: A EMCS Indústria foi fundada no ano de 2003, sob o nome de Anuar Cosméticos, com a intenção de desenvolver produtos cosméticos para atender as exigências e necessidades dos profissionais do mercado cosmético, apresentando uma variedade de produtos com a presença de ativos naturais e inovadores de alta qualidade, sempre mantendo o compromisso com  a saúde dos profissionais e o cuidado com o meio ambiente.

Name: LYCON Cosmetics Australia
Description:
LYCON was established in Australia in 1978, by internationally acclaimed beauty therapist Lydia Jordane. LYCON enjoys a well deserved international reputation as the crème de la crème of depilatory waxes and is the wax of choice in top spas and salons in over 90 countries. Formulated with the finest resins, pure beeswax, sensuous aromatherapy and natural plant oils, LYCON is the world leader in quality waxes which deliver superior results every time!

Formulated with the finest natural resins, bees wax and sensuous aromatherapy, LYCON delivers superior results, removing stubborn hair as short as 1mm like no other. At the same time, LYCON low temperature, super pliable and gentle waxes, provide a nurturing and skin conditioning treatment for extra client comfort, even on  the most sensitive skins. Professionals use LYCON with confidence, to achieve completely hair free results for all types of hair growth, everytime. LYCON enjoys unparalleled recognition worldwide for unsurpassed product quality and professional integrity.

LYCON has been setting waxing standards on a global scale for decades and remains the market leader.

Name: Petite 'n Pretty
Description:
Petite ‘n Pretty sparks the imaginations of the next generations through product made just for them. Everything is designed to work with petite-sized features, each shade and finish is developed to be age appropriate and every formula is proven safe.

We’re here to provide young creatives with the best first beauty experience and inspire them as they embark on their beauty journey.

Name: Laboratorio Pais
Description:
Laboratorio de Comética Pais es la Empresa argentina líder por excelencia en el rubro de Jabones Finos de Tocador. Nuestra presencia en el mercado garantiza
la calidad en la tercerización de sus productos, a través de las más representativas y acreditadas firmas del sector faramacéutico, cosmético, de regalería, venta directa y hotelería.
Con más de 20 años de trayectoria y constante crecimiento, hemos incorporado una amplia línea de cosmética y domisanitarios, logrando de esta manera, cubrir ampliamente el abanico de necesidades de nuestros clientes.

En el año 2012 inauguramos nuestra nueva planta, la cual cuanta con más de
3.500 m² cubiertos, maquinaria de última tecnología y un laboratorio de control de calidad de última generación, que nos permite garantizar a nuestros clientes, un servicio de excelencia y calidad sustentado en el uso de materias primas e insumos controlados según especificaciones de calidad, el cumplimiento de Buenas Practicas de Manufactura (GMP) y un sistema de auditorias periódicas.

Nuestro staff está formado por profesionales especializados en cada área. Nuestra estrategia se fundamenta en utilizar recursos humanos con capacitación permanente, el equipamiento adecuado y la comunicación integradora del liderazgo participativo entre todos los actores que intervienen en el proceso, con el objetivo de lograr la eficiencia y compromiso para la obtención de productos de primer nivel.

Name: SARL BAZICOS ALGERIE
Description: Le domaine d’activité de la Sarl BAZICOS ALGÉRIE est  le développement, la fabrication et la commercialisation des produits de parfumerie & cosmétiques et des produits d’entretien.

Name: Emuage
Description: Émuage is an innovative solution allowing professionals to manufacture fresh personalized cosmetics for their customers, from capsules of raw material and water.

Name: Couleurs Gaïa
Description:
Pionnière de la coloration 100% végétale pour cheveux, Couleurs Gaïa est née en 2007 de la rencontre entre Bénédicte Boisdron (coiffeuse) et Hélène Landreau (bio esthéticienne). 
Exclusivement dédiée aux professionnels de la coiffure, notre marque propose aujourd’hui une gamme de soins capillaires bio complète et est considérée comme une référence du marché.

Les quelques 800 coiffeurs Couleurs Gaïa apprécient particulièrement la qualité de nos produits et de nos formations, notre accompagnement commercial et technique ainsi que l’état d’esprit positif et dynamique qui anime notre équipe.

Name: HF PERFUMES
Description: Hélène Prévot, créatrice-parfumeure compose des identités olfactives uniques pour la parfumerie fine de niche et de luxe, les parfums d'ambiance et les produits cosmétiques. Riche de ses 25 ans d'expérience en France et à l'international, elle formule des parfums sur-mesure pour les commandes privées et les professionnels dans le respect du projet, du budget, de la cible et de la législation.

Name: Dessange Paris
Description:
World's Top Salon and Beauty Brand, Dessange Paris is now in Muscat.
Come, enjoy a relaxing escape amidst Dessange's luxurious setting. Our team offers professional hair, beauty and spa treatments in a beautiful state of the art, private salon setting.

Name: Mii Cosmetics
Description:
Mii’s creation is inspired by the wants and wishes of thousands of beauty spa and salon devotees, as well as a passionate team of beauty experts.

Combining the finest ingredients, Mii offers effortless application and unrivalled expertise to reveal your natural beauty. The collection also includes a mineral makeup line infused with precious gemstones, thirteen tailored brushes, with handbag heroes; Flawless Face Base, Moisturising Lip Lover, Pure Wonder Concealer and Glamorous Trio Bronzing Face Finish.

With Mii, makeup is easy to choose, easy to use and easy to understand; for the confidence to create a look that is uniquely, completely, unmistakably you.

So when you look in the mirror, you can say…That’s Mii.



Mii Cosmetics is a Gerrard International brand (est.1991)

Name: Angela Caglia Skincare
Description:
Angela Caglia is the first skincare brand to commercialize human-derived stem cell technology, marking a true breakthrough in the integration of regenerative medicine into topical skincare. Grounded in biotechnology, our formulations feature a patent-pending proprietary human-derived stem cell technology, a scientific innovation designed to support skin longevity at the cellular level.

Billions of ethically sourced mesenchymal stem cell-derived exosomes, growth factors, and peptides don’t simply address surface symptoms they support the reprogramming of aging skin, restoring barrier integrity, stimulating collagen production, calming chronic inflammation, and promoting true dermal regeneration. The result is stronger, more resilient skin that resists premature aging and maintains its vitality over time.

At the heart of the brand is celebrity master esthetician Angela Caglia, whose decades of treating clients such as Barbra Streisand, Sting, and Helena Christensen shaped her deep understanding of what skin truly needs to stay healthy, resilient, and radiant over time. The brand’s genesis, however, was also deeply personal: inspired by her mother’s battle with Alzheimer’s, Angela became deeply engaged in the emerging science of regenerative medicine and its applications in both cellular health and skin longevity. She realized this science, though well-studied in clinical fields, had yet to be fully realized in skincare. And so began her mission: to bring this extraordinary cellular technology to topical formulations, without needles, downtime, or compromise.
Combining this clinical insight with her passion for formulation, Angela created a Method that marries scientific performance with sensorial elegance. Each product is designed to be powerful on its own but together, they work synergistically to amplify results and build long-term skin resilience.
Rooted in regenerative medicine. Powered by human biology. Designed to promote healthy aging.

Name: Sirpea Spa
Description: SIRPEA Spa based close to the centre of Milan – Italy, with a structure of more than 10,000 sq.m, has been manufacturing and distributing cosmetics and perfumery brands of international level since 1947. With a wide range of products and several brands, specialized in retail  as well professional products sold in Perfumeries, Departments Stores, Pharmacies, Drugstores,  Luxury Shops, Beauty Centres and SPA and International distribution in about 10 Countries. SIRPEA is committed to the development and implementation of highly innovative cosmetics products. Our research team, in both Italy and Switzerland, collaborate with scientists to formulate unique skin care, perfumery and make-up lines. SIRPEA uses only the highest quality ingredients from plants or crops to be grown in the laboratory or certified, does not use parabens, does not carry out animal tests.

Name: BOHOBOCO • PERFUME
Description:
BOHOBOCO • PERFUME is a brand that was created from a childhood dream of the Creative Director Michał Gilbert Lach. The visionary achieved true fulfillment and creative freedom only while working on a perfume collection. He fell completely in love with the process of creating them. Its depth became the true calling that allowed him to find the goal of his professional path. The feeling sprouted while working on composition No. 1, which premiered in 2012. This unique perfume won the hearts of many people, and thus confirmed his belief in the idea. This initial success encouraged Michał Gilbert Lach to start creating new unique fragrances. BOHOBOCO • PERFUME collection premiered in 2016. The sensual No. 1 is among them. This time with a new name VANILLA • BLACK PEPPER. 

BOHOBOCO • PERFUME is a collection of niche perfumes that seduce and intrigue with their depth. Unisex is their middle name, and the soul of fragrances are the internal transformation, experience and rebirth. They are perfect for both women and men. By creating a beautiful history of freedom and tolerance, they are a showcase of the soul of each of us. 

The crystal bottles contain inspirations, emotions, stories and moments that, like magical creatures, are passed on when the essence is released. The person wearing a given composition connects it with his interior and interprets it in his own unique way. This is how an amazing, invisible energy is created. It affects not only the senses but also the soul, causing new, addictive feelings.

Name: Herdora Indústria de Cosméticos Ltda
Description: Somos uma indústria e comércio de cosméticos em geral, com produção própria e terceirização de produção, temos marcas próprias e trabalhamos com o mercado de linha profissional para cuidados capilares

Name: Mirabelle Korea
Description: MIRABELLE KOREA was launched on 24th May 2017 with the motive to bring K-beauty products to the Indian market. We were the First Brand to launch sheet masks in India and have been doing so successfully for the past 6 years. Mirabelle, the leading Korean Cosmetic Company, is specialized in Cosmetics Research and Development. At present, the company is unleashing specialized skincare products with Korean technology suitable for all types of Indian skin.

Name: DERETIL NATURE
Description:
Somos fabricantes de ingredientes bioactivos de origen natural y abastecemos los mercados de alimentación humana y animal y el sector cosmético con extractos naturales purificados procedentes del olivo, la uva y la stevia de origen exclusivamente español con altos estándares de ingredientes naturales activos. 

Nuestro compromiso es servir dichos segmentos con productos de alto valor añadido, sostenibles y seguros. Las gamas de extractos naturales creadas son el resultado de nuestra propia actividad en materia de Investigación y Desarrollo, desde la escala de laboratorio a la planta industrial. 

La fábrica de Deretil Nature se encuentra ubicada en Villaricos, Cuevas del Almanzora, Almería y la oficina comercial en Barcelona.

Name: Beardburys
Description: BEARDBURYS by CAROBELS is the most complete male grooming brand 100% "Made in Spain". We only use artisanal recipes developed specifically for men, for their care and styling. Thanks to that, we have become a national reference. Because to be demanding is not to give up the genuine.

Name: Bonnie Beauty
Description:
Bonnie Beauty increases the effectiveness of skincare products on the market through its algorithm with which it creates customized creams for each skin. 

Bonnie Beauty, however, is not just a cosmetics company, but a movement that aims to create scientific awareness about self-care and skin issues.


Bonnie Beauty is: self-love, innovation, transparency, and respect for the environment.

Name: Saint Algue France
Description:
Depuis 40 ans, Saint Algue conjugue beauté des femmes et naturel.
 
Visagistes et à l’écoute de la planète, les coiffeurs Saint Algue ont à cœur d’accueillir et conseiller leurs clients dans des salons chaleureux, dédiés au bien-être, dans une ambiance joyeuse et printanière, quelle que soit la saison ! Coquelicots, champs de fleurs, tonalités orangées, tout est fait pour booster votre moral en même temps que vos cheveux.

Prendre soin de soi en prenant soin de la planète, tel est le leitmotiv de Saint Algue. Aussi, les produits professionnels sont formulés à base d’ingrédients naturels et bio afin de minimiser leur empreinte écologique. Dans les salons, textiles bio, économiseurs d’eau aux bacs, papier recyclable et messages éco-concernés sur les miroirs.

Adaptez votre style à votre personnalité grâce à notre Diagnostic Visagisme personnalisé et laissez-vous chouchouter avec les soins Bien-Etre...

Name: KRONOKARE COSMETICS
Description:
KRONOKARE, THE MOST FRENCH INDIAN BRAND!

Indian and French blends and knowledge are well known to be the best in terms of hair & skin care and are an integral part of both the cultures. They are both world renowned and so far unparalleled in terms of quality and ingredients.

Kronokare was founded in 2008 by a French man who fell in love with India: Cyril Feuillebois. His vision remains to create an unmatched natural, effective, and fuss free line of products which is the amalgamation of best from both India and France.
While proudly made in India, Kronokare products are formulated with precious exquisite native flora, extracted pure essential oils, rare botanical extracts, and precious seed oils sourced from France and India.

Adding to the authenticity of ingredients, is the promise of supreme French quality and unique concoction recipes, producing the best blend of Indian vibe and French proficiency possible.

Kronokare products are created for today's audience who think, ponder, try and then choose the best. Every product is designed for an easy usage and for an urban user. KronoKare's formula delivers fast and efficient results and are designed to be combined together, offering a unique skin care routine to its users. Last, Urban citizens being constantly on the go, Kronokare always packs its goodies in a travel friendly manner.

Name: Hairmiles Hair Extensions
Description:
Hairmiles is the leading manufacturer of luxury brand in professional hair lengthening and thickening systems based in Dubai. The brand is recognized as an international leader and the most successful provider of professional 100% Real Remy hair with unparalleled premium grade quality.

We only use reﬁned, hand-selected 100% real human hair, that is characterized by the extraordinary healthy, natural-looking appearance and feel of the hair, resulting in a natural bounce and elasticity. The hair is purchased around the world based on strict ethical principles. It is tested with extensive Hairmiles quality control standards and patented with the most gentle processing and highest technology methods for coloring.

With such strict guidelines, Hairmiles is recognized for its hair quality - attracting international top stylists, countless stars in ﬁlm and TV, models and other high proﬁle celebrities worldwide.

Hairmiles hair is available in a vast variety of more than 60 shades of colors ranging from subtle natural browns to brilliant red shades and a wide range of blonde tones to intensely wild trend colors. We can also customize all kinds of hair extensions and package it for your own brand.

Name: Crystal Clear Clinical
Description:
With an amazing reputation amongst beauty professionals and celebrities, presence in luxury salons worldwide and a founder who’s determined to innovate even more pioneering treatments in the world of skincare, there’s no doubt that Crystal Clear is a truly innovative global brand.

Since we launched Crystal Clear in 1995, Founder Sharon Hilditch MBE  FCGI has been committed to solving the important skincare issues that make such a difference to our customers’ lives. As well as this commitment, we’ve got a set of four key values that guide every decision we make. They represent who we are, and we’d never compromise them!

Firstly, we’re dedicated to innovating new treatments and products to solve your skincare needs: whether you suffer from acne, dry skin or simply need an extremely effective anti-ageing treatment or product. Secondly, we always aim to be uplifting, from the ambience in our salons to our new product ranges. Building on this, we want to be inspirational with our positive attitude to skincare. And finally, we’re results-focused: whether we’re holding a personal consultation or developing a brand new salon treatment.

Name: Cosmetion Srl
Description: Cosmetion combines the needs with a dynamic approach and high-quality cosmetics for the B2B sector. Cosmetion's mission is simple but ambitious: to constantly innovate and create exceptional cosmetic products that meet customer needs.

Name: La Perla Beauty
Description:
True to its iconic lingerie heritage, La Perla’s new luxury fragrances and beauty products are crafted by women, for women and dedicated to the highest standard in craftsmanship and exquisite design.

With sustainability at the heart of each product’s conception, the precious fragrance ingredients, luxurious yet clean formulas and refillable designs empower today’s women to express their femininity without compromise.

Discover our creations on www.beautybylaperla.com

Name: Dr. LEVY Switzerland
Description:
As a pioneer in both dermatology and aesthetics, Dr. Phillip Levy was the first to introduce Botox, CO2 laser-resurfacing as far back as 1995 in Switzerland. He is world-renowned for his patented Nefertiti Lift, which dramatically re-contours the jawline with no surgery. 

While delivering outstanding age-reversing results from botulinum toxin and hyaluronic acid injections, Dr. Phillip Levy never gave up on complementing these techniques with skin treatments that can stop and reverse the signs of ageing on the skin.

After the discovery of dermal stem cell reservoirs in December 2009, the source of your skin’s own, most powerful anti-ageing system, Dr. Phillip developed his patented ArganCellActiv, the world’s first cosmeceutical formula proven to stimulate these skin-transforming mother cells.

Years of research and expertise culminated in Dr. LEVY Switzerland, an award-winning medi-luxe skincare line with rapid, proven results.

Name: Paoma Paris
Description:
Paoma propose des soins biologiques et raffinés.
Le savoir-faire d’experts de l’univers cosmétique.
Le luxe à la française, la nature comme héritage, la science comme expertise.

Une marque haut de gamme écoresponsable et française dont les formules inédites sont naturelles, vegan, et certifiées biologiques. Paoma offre l’alliance d’une expérience unique à l’efficacité d’actifs certifiés, pour un rituel beauté éco-éthique. 

AWARDS | Cosmébio | Innovation Durable

Name: Ager S.r.l.
Description: Ager's Testing Laboratories offer to cosmetic industries a full range of services including analysis, study and research on cosmetic ingredients and finished products. Our procedures are compliant with Good Laboratory Practice (GLP, GCP) and are continually updated in consideration of the European and international legislations.

Name: GAMMA & BROSS
Description:
Leader in the design and manufacturing of furniture and equipment for high-end beauty salons and spas. 
Designed by top international designers like Karim Rashid, Fendi, F.A. Porsche, Giugiaro Design, our products are sold through selected distributors in more than 50 countries and our direct showrooms in New York, Paris and Cologne.

Name: Foxybae Hair
Description:
FoxyBae Hair is a West Coast beauty brand based in Los Angeles, California. We believe in empowering men and women everywhere to be their truest and FOXIEST selves!
Our salon-quality hair tools were designed with all hair types in mind. Whether you're a pro stylist or just an everyday glam kind of bae, our range of multi-functional hot tools will add the right amount of FOXY to your styling routine.
                                                                                               
Our hair care line is uniquely formulated to achieve all the #HAIRGOALS you can imagine. Every formula is vegan, cruelty free, and free of any sulfates or parabens, making them safe for color-treated hair.
