Each product has been developed, tested, and vetted by our team to ensure our baes love the final product as much as we do!
NO SULFATES, NO CRUELTY, NO FOX GIVEN.

Name: Hairdreams Haarhandels GmbH
Description:
Hairdreams Haarhandels GmbH, headquartered in Graz, is an exclusive partner to hairdressers world-wide. Hairdreams is considered an international industry leader and the most successful supplier of professional human hair for hair creation for lengthening and -thickening.  


Hairdreams exclusively uses real human hair of the highest quality, which is characterized by outstanding health. This hair is procured all over the world in adherence to strict ethical guidelines, it is tested according to extensive Hairdreams quality control standards, and finally gently refined using patented techniques. 


The result of these efforts is an outstanding quality which has become the hallmark of Hairdreams, and which has led many international top stylists all over the world to work with Hairdreams hair. Countless international movie stars, models, and other celebrities swear by the high-quality products made by  Hairdreams.

Service:
Hairdreams puts top priority on the support of its partner salons in all aspects of their business. 
The service teams provide excellent customer service and fast, reliable shipping â usually within 24 hours. 
In addition, Hairdreams offers its partners extensive marketing and sales support, ranging from national advertising campaigns to a wide variety of marketing materials for local and in-salon promotion

Products:
- Hairdreams Extensions (Bondings & Tapes)
- Hairdreams Inspos
- Hair Thickening (MicroLines System)
- Hairdreams Stop&Grow
- Hair Care Products
- Patented Application Systems 
- Accessories

Name: CALECIM Professional
Description:
In 2004, the scientists at CellResearch Corporation discovered a new source of nutrients in the Umbilical Cord Lining Membrane – the outermost ‘skin’ of the mammalian umbilical cord. With this scientific breakthrough, CALECIM, was invented and first introduced to the cosmeceutical world.

Today, after over ten years of research and development, CALECIM, is renowned for its patented technology. CALECIM contains a refined formulation of proteins and nutrients in a conditioned media, which is methodically derived from Umbilical Cord Lining. All to bring you a never-before skin solution that will fight the visible signs of ageing skin.

Name: Texas Beauty Labs
Description:
Specializing in affordable, convenient, and innovative small-batch beauty, Texas Beauty labs provides high-quality, natural personal care products at industry-low minimums. 

Our services include ready-to-sell bulk bases, custom formulation, reverse formulation, contract manufacturing + private labeling, fulfillment services, and consultations. Our 16,000+ square foot, FDA registered facility is in Austin, Texas, where we have the capacity to produce hundreds to thousands of products each day.

We specialize in manufacturing products that are as natural as they are beautiful for you to share with your clients, eliminating unnecessary chemicals and using organic ingredients when available.  Whether you're in startup mode or looking to expand your existing business,  Texas Beauty Labs is here to help you achieve your dream!

Name: Luminus
Description:
Founded in Brazil by two young entrepreneurs, Luminus’s first product was launched in 2015: Luminus Hair. Overnight, their vitamin complex grabbed the public’s eye and became a darling of Brazilian women.

Today Luminus Hair is considered to be a leader in Brazil’s beauty market, and has since launched new products such as Luminus Men, Luminus Skin and Luminus Mask, to better attend their client’s diverse needs.

Excellence and entrepreneurship are in our DNA. Luminus does not stop: we believe it is always necessary to think beyond and therefore we are increasingly prepared to meet the specific needs of each hair and win even more passionate clients.

See more in: usa.luminushair.net

Name: The Beauty Partners
Description:
The first commercial outsourcing service dedicated to cosmetic brands in selective distribution.
What if we help you to sustain your brand in selective distribution?
Sales outsourcing, reimagined for the beauty of tomorrow.
The Beauty Partners offers you the first outsourced business development service: retail management, 360° retail strategy, commercial negotiation, training, and merchandising for cosmetic brands in the French and European markets.
Cosmetic brands, let’s accelerate your business development!

Name: FIORUCCI Fragrâncias e Cosméticos
Description:
Despertar a beleza de cada pessoa é o compromisso diário da Fiorucci. 
Há mais de 50 anos desenvolvemos produtos que completam os sonhos, o visual e a beleza em todas as formas.

Name: BENCHMARK by kdc/one
Description: Whether it’s for disruptive innovation, category-defining products, or complex formulating challenges, savvy marketers turn to Benchmark Cosmetic Laboratories to co-create what’s next in beauty. As a true hub of innovation on the West Coast, Benchmark works with hundreds of ingredient suppliers who give the lab a first look at new ingredients, often long before they’re on the market. We’ve nurtured strong relationships with leading researchers at top universities who work with Benchmark to find paths to commercialization for their cutting-edge ideas. We believe in the power of innovation to transform businesses, industries, and the quality of our lives, and we bring that mindset to the formulating bench every day.

Name: Maison Eole
Description:
C'est au départ du Domaine familial du Chant d'Eole que j'ai créé ma gamme de cosmétiques Natural Certified et éco-responsable. 

Made in Belgium, la collection "Maison Eole" trouve sa source dans les actifs de la vigne.

Name: Functionalab Group, a GROWTH 500 Company
Description:
FUNCTIONALAB GROUP is comprised of 4 innovative canadian cosmetics companies: Jouviance, Functionalab, Dermapure and Project Skin MD.

Functionalab Group is an innovative developer and marketer of beauty brands focused on the most attractive and fastest-growing segments: the retail dermo-cosmetics market with Jouviance and the professional aesthetic market with Dermapure and Functionalab. Focusing on two distinct distribution channels, the Group brings innovation and learnings from each of the professional and retail markets to the consumer.

•	Jouviance is the #1 Canadian-based dermatologist-developed line of skincare and makeup, distributed in more than 3300 retail points of sale in Canada, at CVS Pharmacies in the United States and at exclusive beauty stores in Korea.
•	Dermapure is the leading and fastest growing network of aesthetic medicine clinics offering non-invasive treatments combining the latest innovations in skin rejuvenating technologies with Functionalab’s exclusive line of professional cosmeceuticals and dietary beauty supplements to fight the most common signs of skin aging effectively. 

Functionalab Group is a GROWTH 500 company

For more information on our brands, please visit www.jouviance.com/, www.dermapure.com/en/, and www.functionalab.com/en/.

Name: Clinical Resolution Laboratory, Inc.
Description:
Clinical Resolution Lab. has been designing, building, and distributing aesthetic skincare products and cosmeceuticals for global markets since 2000. Based in California, USA, we develop instruments and techniques that produce exceptional results in the cosmetic and medical industries for skin care. 

	Our mission is to create, innovate, and sell high-end clinical quality cosmeceutical products for medical professionals. CRL is committed to Anti-Aging health and skin care. We have developed a reputation through our leading personal care technology, developing industry trends, product positioning, and large-scale manufacturing. 

	We work with dermatologists, plastic surgeons, independent chemists, and testing organizations. They monitor each phase through cooperation, starting from product conceptualization, research, development, and distribution. This team of experts specializes in providing innovative product concepts, efficacious active complexes, and new methods to improve the delivery of active ingredients. Our dedication to research produces effective multi-functional products that set us apart from our competitors.

	Today, the company continues to pursue updated technology and excellence, quickly bringing new products to the marketplace that address healthcare and physician needs. We are confident that you will be as pleased and excited about the products as we are here at Clinical Resolution Laboratory. Our goal remains to develop cosmeceutical and nutraceutical solutions that make a difference!

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/clinicalresolutionlab/ 
Tik-Tok: https://www.tiktok.com/@clinicalresolutionlabinc
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ClinicalResolutionLab
Call (213) 384-0500 or Email: info@skincarecrl.com for more information.

Name: Reminiscence Parfums
Description: Juan- les-Pins, 1970. The first REMINISCENCE boutique is full of singular objects gathered during travels from around the world, instilled with the bewitching scent of patchouli, a symbol of dreamy faraway places. The carelessness of the French Riviera is tinged with oriental exoticism, an artistic soul, and a bohemian spirit . The brand's first fragrance, Patchouli , affirms its uniqueness from the outset . Meeting with immediate success, it forged the characteristics that guide the story of REMINISCENCE until today.

Name: O Boticário Guarapuava
Description:
Somos representantes de renomadas marcas em Guarapuava e arredores, como O Boticário, ‘Quem disse, Berenice?’, O.U.I e Eudora.

Name: DALTON COSMETICS GERMANY GmbH
Description:
DALTON COSMETICS GERMANY GmbH ist eine der international führenden Marken im Bereich der Meereskosmetik. Mit einer über 40-jährigen Firmentradition verfügen wir über eine starke wirtschaftliche Basis in Deutschland, Europa und vielen Märkten weltweit. Wir legen Wert auf hohe Qualität, streben ständig nach neuen Innovationen und nutzen moderne Technologien. Unsere Mitarbeiter arbeiten in flachen Hierarchien mit viel Eigenverantwortlichkeit. Unsere Kultur ist offen, dynamisch und kommunikativ. Wir lernen aus Fehlern, machen neue Erfahrungen und entwickeln uns ständig weiter. Wir sind ein starkes Team mit gemeinsamen Zielen.

Interessiert? Wir freuen uns über deine Initiativbewerbung.

Name: R3 Professional
Guararapes Industrial
Description: A Guararapes Industrial é uma empresa Pernambucana que trabalha nas áreas de Cosméticos e Embalagens plásticas, onde nosso principal objetivo é gerar a satisfação total de nossos clientes.

Name: M.Z. Cosméticos Ltda.
Description:
Somos uma empresa atuando no mercado de cosméticos desde 1986. Inicialmente com marca própria, criada, desenvolvida, fabricada e comercializada por nós.

A partir da venda da marca em 2001, passamos a nos dedicar exclusivamente à terceirização de produtos, quando surge a M.Z. Cosméticos.

Nosso laboratório de desenvolvimento está sempre pesquisando novas tendências e procurando assessorar nossos clientes nas suas diversas necessidades.

Desde sua criação, a M.Z. Cosméticos prima pela qualidade de seus produtos, utilizando sempre matérias primas de alto padrão, sem nunca deixar de lado sua consciência ambiental. Nosso atendimento personalizado nos permite atender qualquer perfil de cliente e suas mais variadas necessidades, desde o desenvolvimento até a industrialização.

Atualmente temos em linha de produção mais de 500 itens desenvolvidos, fabricados e envasados por nós, nas áreas capilar, corporal e facial.

Entre em contato, e agende sua visita!

Name: Jajis Innovation - India
Description:
About Us:

At Jaji’s Innovation Pvt Ltd, we are a beacon of creativity and excellence in the beauty and wellness industry. Founded by the visionary Dr. Jajimole K, our company, headquartered in the culturally rich and diverse state of Kerala, India, embodies innovation at its core.

With a dedicated team of over 200 professionals, we specialize in crafting unique experiences across various sectors, including our proprietary cosmetic brand "JAJI’s", modern food courts, and ambient cafes. Each venture is a testament to our commitment to quality, innovation, and customer delight.

 Our Mission:

To revolutionize the beauty and wellness landscape by integrating traditional values with contemporary practices. We aim to create sustainable, high-quality products and services that cater to the evolving needs of our customers.

 Innovation at Heart:

Our company thrives on the spirit of innovation. We continuously seek out new ways to enhance customer experiences, whether through our products or the ambiance we create in our food courts and cafes. Our team is encouraged to think outside the box, leading to groundbreaking solutions and unparalleled service.

 Global Outlook:

As we expand our horizons, our goal is to make a mark on the global stage. We are constantly exploring international trends and integrating them with our unique ethos to create a blend that is both globally appealing and uniquely Jaji’s.

 Connect with Us:

Follow our journey as we continue to innovate and inspire. Connect with us for collaborations, updates on our latest ventures, or to become a part of our ever-growing Jaji’s family.

Description:
Belleza Pura is opgericht door Lisa Rood, zij biedt u keuzen uit tal verschillende behandelingen, van gezichtsbehandelingen tot totale lichaamsmassages.
Net zoals je elke dag je tanden poetst en je haren wast, heeft je huid ook die verzorging nodig. Zo houd je niet alleen de huid in een goede conditie, maar voorkom je ook huidproblemen en vertraag je het verouderingsproces. Een combinatie van goede begeleiding en het gebruik van de beste producten is hierbij van groot belang.

O trabalho de nossos empreendedores é fundamental para inspirar as pessoas e promover o equilíbrio, a autossuficiência e o bem-estar social, tão necessários nos dias atuais.

A Aloha chega ao mercado brasileiro com um modelo de negócio que é uma excelente opção para gerar renda de forma rápida e com baixo investimento.

Faça parte do nosso time de empreendedores!

 0% parabens, phthalates, petrochemical oils, paraffin, silicones, alcoholic fragrances, PEG, SLS, SLES, GMO .

Name: LUXUM BEAUTY
Description:
Passionate luxury perfumes & beauty – we wholeheartedly pursue this passion. With our years of experience, we rethink everything we have learned in completely new ways. Therefore, it is not an option for us to say: “It's always been like this, that's why we do it.”

Our range of services for expressive brands is just as diverse as the brand world itself is. We rely on individual solutions and develop targeted distribution strategies with a suitable brand environment. Related to individual turnovers, we calculate appropriate marketing budgets for each brand.

We offer you the latest market news, detailed information about product placements and realistic, meaningful evaluations for continuous market observations. As a cooperation partner, we work in tandem with brands in order to establish long-term and successful launches.

Name: Mind The Trash
Description:
A ideia do projecto começou em 2016 em Londres e existiu apenas enquanto conta de Instagram onde publicámos opções e dicas para um estilo de vida mais sustentável. Ao fim de um ano, a 5 de Julho de 2017 Mind The Trash Consulting Lda nasceu em Lisboa, Portugal.
Criada por uma portuguesa e um Dinamarquês, a Mind The Trash é uma loja on-line portuguesa de venda de produtos orgânicos e sustentáveis, permitindo que soluções mais sustentáveis e ecológicas cheguem com maior facilidade a qualquer lugar de Portugal.
Foi a primeira loja online Desperdício Zero a surgir em Portugal, não só pelos produtos que vendemos mas pelo funcionamento interno da empresa. O nosso site tem um blog associado onde são publicadas recomendações, lançados temas para discussão acerca do lixo que produzimos, e são divulgados produtos alternativos de maneira a reduzir o lixo do nosso dia a dia e viver de forma mais minimalista e saudável.
Convidamo-lo a visitar o nosso site e blog aqui: www.mindthetrash.pt

Name: Comercial Chileno Británica
Description:
Somos una empresa que nace hace más de 20 años que tiene como objetivo representar marcas internacionales de gran prestigio, entregando excelencia comercial, de marketing, logística y de punto de venta aplicando modernas herramientas tecnológicas y un software especializado en cada una de sus áreas.

Hoy en día somos representantes exclusivos de marcas como Just For Men, Hask, Vagisil, Natracare, Alpecin, Breathe Right, Faith in Nature, Kativa y otras.

Contamos con una gran Cobertura Logística y de Recursos Humanos que nos permiten estar presentes en todo el país y canales como grandes tiendas, supermercados, farmacias y perfumerías.

Contamos con nuestra filial Comercial Peruano Británica que opera en Perú hace más de 11 años entregando a nuestro representados los mismos servicios y excelencia de atención al mercado.

Name: Chemco Corp
Description:
Chemco Corp is a well-known global manufacture of professional hair, skin and nail care products distributed in over 45 countries worldwide. Chemco was founded by Eitelberg Montarroyos, an Analytical Chemist and current CEO. It is an one stop shopping for its clients with capability of developing product design, concept, manufacturing and packaging providing all customers the opportunity to succeed with ease.   

At Chemco we are committed to providing high quality products and service. We believe investing in extensive research and development to ensure innovative formulas, packaging solutions that are carefully tested to produce best results. 
Chemco in-house salon brands are used and recommended by top professionals in the finest hair and nail salons throughout the world. Chemco core of its business is also contract manufacturing. Our products are found on the shelves of major department stores such as CVS, Sephora, Bath and Body Beyond and major Professional Salons.

Today, Chemco’s 120,000sq/ft state of the art manufacturing facility has a staff of 200, conducting business in10 languages across 5 continents.

Name: Vasanti Cosmetics
Description:
Vasanti Cosmetics offers a line of high performance skin care and makeup dedicated to making beauty feel good. Our story began when four women, three siblings and one childhood friend (all sisters by any measure) were inspired by the simple question “why doesn’t make-up look good on me?” For us (and we found there were many like us) products that would enhance our natural beauty while feeling comfortable and weightless on our skin just didn’t exist yet. When beauty feels good it's inclusive, it's cruelty free, and it doesn't weigh you down!

Today, the brand has grown one woman at a time, by inviting all to share in the belief that you are most beautiful when you are most comfortable, and that comfort comes from products dedicated to helping you be your best at all times. 

Because at its core, the gift of sisterhood is seeing yourself through the eyes of those that love you.

Name: Paramount Cosmetics, Inc.
Description: As a third generation, family owned company, our legacy of providing innovation, quality, and unrivaled service has sustained Paramount’s position as Beauty’s leading resource in Contract Manufacturing.  Whether matching an existing formulation or relying on our expertise to develop on your behalf, we take special care in understanding your vision and strive to make it your reality.

Name: DOSE OF COLORS, INC.
Description: Dose of Colors is a social-cosmetic brand designed by makeup artist Anna Petrosian. We believe in diversity, design, and innovation. We link artistry and creativity to versatility; evoke originality, openness to the world, and inclusion for all with our cruelty-free cosmetics.

Name: Laboratoire Du-Var
Description: Cosmetic lab and contract manufacturer located on Montreal's South Shore, Du-Var Lab delivers creative, innovative and flawless execution of cosmetic and natural health products.  Our team has the knowledge and expertise to bring concepts to reality for a wide range of products from mid to high-end brand cosmetics and skin care.

Name: Xpert Beauty
Description:
Xpert Beauty is a chain of professional cosmetics concept stores in Romania, with only 3 years on the market, but already a regional player in the field.

We have 13 stores in Romania, 1 in Bulgaria, and 1 online store in each country,  a turnover that is increasing year to year, thanks to an amazing team of around 80 fun and energetic people. 


Our mission is to make beauty accessible to all of you, by offering unforgettable beauty experiences through exclusive, professional, and high-end products from more than 60 international brands. Among these brands, we can mention Moroccanoil, Joico, Wella Professional, Maria Nila, Sexy Hair, L’Oreal Professionnel, Kerastase, Tigi, Kryolan, Ardell, Academie, Babor, Guinot, Mary Cohr, CND, Gelish, OPI, Gehwol, Wet Brush, Parlux.

Exclusively in our portfolio, customers can find Maria Nila, a vegan haircare brand, animal-friendly, climate-friendly, and color-protecting haircare produced in Sweden. 


For more inspiring info about your everyday beauty ritual, we invite you on our blog: https://www.xpertbeauty.ro/blog, or you can shop your favorite brands here: https://www.xpertbeauty.ro.

Name: ZYMOPHAR BIOTECH
Description:
ZYMOPHAR BIOTECH, est une Société d’exportation et production des produits cosmétique bio Naturel, avec des installations d'usines et de laboratoire de recherche situés à Agadir au centre du Maroc.
ZYMOPHAR BIOTECH offre une gamme complète de produits cosmétiques et des services de fabrication des soins personnels pour répondre aux besoins spécifiques des clients individuels.
De l’Ancien Egypte pour les gens de la société moderne ont depuis longtemps fasciné par les cosmétiques.
La technologie a parcouru un long chemin de l'expertise et de solides connaissances de base des produits cosmétique, des preuves et des résultats d'approbation du marché.
En plus des normes de qualité des formules, ZYMOPHAR propose des formulations personnalisées ainsi que des services correspondants.

Name: N.N.Fems Group
Description:
N. N. FEMS INDUSTRIES LIMITED is a wholly indigenous company incorporated in 1992 to cater for the beauty needs of men and women in Africa. Our presence spans across West, Central, and South African markets.

Starting with the Apple hair care range at inception, we’ve expanded our portfolio to encompass beauty, personal care, home care, and baby care. Our diverse products aim to satisfy daily needs and align seamlessly with lifestyles, ensuring customer satisfaction.

The Company’s foundation is laid on the strong philosophy of giving the best quality to the consumer. Our formulations have the finest ingredients that meet and exceed standards. In our effort to propagate ‘Green Nigeria’ and strongly support the cause for our planet to remain beautiful we follow the norms and stay eco-friendly. 

Our modern manufacturing facility and stringent quality control measures have consistently been maintained to ensure good quality, safe, and effective formulations that continuously cater to the ever-growing market demands, while we fulfill our customer needs.

Our product range - Aviv Hair Extension, Ozone Cosmetics, Elan, Scrubb, Afrobest, and Apple Cosmetics are winners in their categories. Our skincare range for instance is experiencing unprecedented growth in the cosmetic market a key result of our technical collaboration with US cosmetics formulation experts.

At NNFEMS, our mission is simple yet profound – it is to make everyone to look and feel extraordinary. We strive to achieve this mission by providing affordable brands that go beyond the surface, empowering Africans to make choices that enhance their lives and the lives of their families.

Name: Arran Aromatics
Description:
Arran Aromatics operating as ARRAN Sense of Scotland, create luxury bath, body and home fragrance products that are all designed, formulated and produced on the Isle of Arran, Scotland. 

Our rugged yet beautiful Island provides the scents, colours and botanical inspiration for each of our collections. 

Since opening our factory and first shop at Home Farm Arran in 1989, we’ve expanded a little and you can now find us in locations around the world. 

Our products have always stayed true to our island heritage and aim to deliver a positive effect on your body and mind.

Name: ZM COSMETICS GROUP
Description:
Zhong Meng Group(ZM) was established in 2016 and located in Dalian city Liaoning province which is a main lashes industry areas of China. ZM Group focus on eyelashes production and design with more than 1000 styles lashes including 3D mink eyelashes, 3D silk eyelashes, regular mink eyelashes, 5d lashes, 6d lashes, eyelash extensions etc. 
    Also we have our own warehouse in USA which can provide fast delivery lashes and good after sale service. Our young design team can provide you OEM and ODM service for your own brand package. So far we have  under production which can help our customers grow up faster.
    We hope we can help our customers build their own brand lashes dream and win win for long relationship business. We(ZM) will keep striving for excellent quality and service with reasonable price in order to develop with customers together. 

Everyone deserve to shine
ZM builds your dream

Name: Sóbrancelhas
Description: A SÓBRANCELHAS está entre as grandes redes de franquia no setor de saúde, beleza e bem-estar. Foi destaque destaque como Empresa Referência Nacional Melhores do Ano, pela Agência Nacional de Cultura, Empreendedorismo e Comunicação; Prêmio Quality Brasil; Prêmio Empresa Brasileira do ano 2015; entre outros. A primeira unidade foi lançada em 2013 na cidade de Taubaté (SP) e a marca inovou o mercado de quiosques, sendo pioneira nos serviços voltados para o olhar e beleza do rosto nesse formato. Hoje a marca Sóbrancelhas tem cerca de 200 lojas.

Name: Cetes Cosmetics AG
Description:
At Cetes Cosmetics we are passionate about creating beauty products and solutions tailored for your needs. We are a full-service provider with leading-edge product development, formulation and manufacturing solutions, backed by more than 50 years of experience. We follow a conscious approach to product development where every step of the value chain matters, where the goal is to develop high performing products with proven efficacy, that are kind to our skin and our planet.

Cetes Cosmetics offers external clients both contract manufacturing possibilities as well as full service private label. To the private label customer we can offer more than 1000 ready formulation bases, many with clinical and consumer tested claims, ready to be customized according to your brief.

Name: Kstars Cosmetics
Description:
The world is full of brands, but this is not what women want, this is not what women need.
Women need a companion for a change. An up-close and personal complement that fits in a purse and goes perfectly with an ardent smile.
KStars whispers glamorously into the trendsetting world inspired by the Oriental divas and legacies, like an artist to a white canvas: an abstract vision seeing the light, a masterpiece taking shape and the final touches of a star-like signature.
Exquisite in its finishes, urban and bold yet sophisticated and flattering...
Being one of the top of mind brands for the biggest makeup artists in the region, while surprisingly competing with timeless rivals with legacy was not a coincidence. It came after years and years contoured with expertise smudged by research.

It was just like yesterday when our quest for the most natural and glamorous of looks right from the heart of the mesmerizing orient had to form the classiest of foundations for the sake of a woman-empowering establishment.

K, for Key to the ultimate better version of you.
Our flawless highlight? The simple fact that we strictly produce in the biggest houses of France, Italy, Spain, Germany, Canada and the U.S. while getting inspired by the aura of our Oriental muses.

K Stars was naturally overlined by the mastery forming its wide scope to reach every woman out there, not just the initial base of professionals it bloomed with. This is how dense and how intimate our path has been, for just a few years now, overtaking the massive majority of TV shows, sitcoms, movies and more, being the preferred brand of personas in the hands that give them all their gleam.
The company is heading in the near future towards another expansion in the Middle East, Europe, Australia, Canada and the United States; as well as towards an increase in seminars and training sessions to reinforce the company’s reputation for excellence and quality.

Name: COSMETOFOOD ORGANICS
Description:
Vision- To be the most loved authentic, certified organic cosmetics brand for women by 2025.

Mission- To provide authentic, certified organic cosmetics for women to support them to enhance their authentic inner beauty and self confidence by using our products as catalysts. 
Promise- We promise authentic organic skin nutrition.
Guarantee- Most of our ingredients are certified by top organic certification bodies of the world like Ecocert, Cosmos, BDIH, Cosmebio etc. 

Cosmetofood delivers tasteable organic, vegan and skin friendly cosmetics that are made from ECOCERT/COSMOS Certified natural ingredients. 

Cosmetofood is a result of  marvelous blending of organic ingredients with powerful formulation of modern science that gives the best recipe for making your skin texture flawless without any side effects. 

Dermatologically tested and approved, Cosmetofood is the future of beauty products as it delivers the goodness of nature that makes your skin a very happy skin.

Name: #bonheur
Description:
#bonheur est une marque de soin in & out 

Née en France, elle prône une nouvelle vision de la beauté en l’associant au bien-être holistique. 

#bonheur propose un rituel holistique en 3 temps pour une action IN & OUT et place les probiotiques au coeur de son offre pour booster les défenses immunitaires du microbiote et du microbiome cutané. 

01. Expertise IN : soins probiotiques & nutricosmétiques pour renforcer la santé et la beauté de la peau 

02. Expertise OUT : soins du visage riches en probiotiques pour renforcer l’immunité et la beauté de la peau. 

03. Expertise AROMACHOLOGIE : soins à respirer pour renforcer l’équilibre psycho-émotionnel.


" Être heureuse et se sentir bien dans sa peau est le premier critère de beauté ! " - #bonheur

Name: Natucharm Cosméticos
Description: A Natu Charm é uma empresa nacional, instalada estratégicamente em Aparecida de Goiânia - GO, região central do Brasil. Fundada em dezembro de 1994, nascia em solo fértil, regada com as bençãos de Deus e com a aceitação do consumidor brasileiro. A Natu Charm cresceu movida pela ousadia de fazer o novo, de fazer bem feito. Sempre acreditando na força do trabalho sério, buscando viabilizar seus sonhos e atender as expectativas dos seus clientes.

Name: NOBLE ISLE
Description:
Noble Isle is a fine fragrance, bath & body brand, inspired by the rich, cultural heritage of the British Isles.  The collection is natural, vegan friendly, cruelty-free and made in the UK using extracts from celebrated producers around the British Isles including; Rhubarb from Yorkshire, Samphire from Ireland, Barley from Scotland, and Beetroot from Wales.

Noble Isle products are made in the UK from natural extracts sourced from local celebrated producers from around the British Isles. Our products are free from sodium lauryl sulfate and parabens, as well as being vegan, cruelty-free and environmentally friendly. We are an environmentally aware and ethically conscious company. All of our packaging is recyclable, we minimise waste wherever possible and we keep our carbon footprint to a minimum. We are keeping abreast of the changes in packaging and are ready to adapt as soon as possible. We offer 5 litre refills on our gels to help reduce waste where possible.

Since our launch in 2012, we have built strong, synergistic relationships with multiple luxury companies such as, Virgin Atlantic, Harrods, Liberty, Fortnum & Mason and The Savoy just to name a few. If you would like to get in touch feel free to drop us a message.

Name: VOTARY
Description:
Transform your skin.  Powerful, plant-based natural skincare.

Founded by Arabella Preston and Charlotte Semler.  VOTARY has a cult following among beauty insiders who love how VOTARY natural face oils make their skin look and feel.  

Stocked exclusively by Liberty in London, Space NK and other premium beauty retailers.

Working as a make-up artist to high-profile clients, Votary co-founder, Arabella Preston, used only oils to prep skin and in her own skincare routine. As her passion for oils grew, her kitchen table swiftly turned into a make-shift apothecary as she experimented with the different effects oils could have on the skin and the myriad ways essential oils affected mood. She soon noticed the “shoulder-drop” effect on clients. Two minutes spent massaging a beautiful oil into their skin would relax and calm and, just as importantly, result in glowing, healthy skin.

Arabella’s friend and former employer Charlotte Semler was one such devotee and was able to visualise a future for VOTARY beyond the kitchen table.  When Charlotte came on board a U.K.- based family oil business was appointed to produce the formulas on a larger scale and a design agency in New York City the branding. VOTARY is the perfect fusion of all these visions: Natural. Luxe. Beautiful.

Name: Elikya Beauty
Description:
Fondée en 2007 par deux sœurs, Rachel et Sabrina Bandundi, ELIKYA BEAUTY est la première marque de cosmétiques conçus avec des actifs d’origines 100%naturels dédiée à une clientèle Cosmopolite. 
Les produits sont conçus pour répondre aux besoins de toutes les Femmes du monde, voulant consommer des cosmétiques sains et respectueux de l’environnement. Les produits sont uniquement composés d’actifs naturels Vegan et végétaux. Une partie des ingrédients provient du commerce équitable, ce qui fait d’ELIKYA BEAUTY une marque engagée.

Founded in 2007 by two sisters, Rachel and Sabrina Bandundi, ELIKYA BEAUTY is the first cosmetic brand designed with 100% natural ingredients dedicated to a Cosmopolitan clientele.
The products are designed to meet the needs of all women around the world, wanting to consume healthy and environmentally friendly cosmetics. The products are only composed of natural Vegan and plant active ingredients. Some of the ingredients come from fair trade, which makes ELIKYA BEAUTY a committed brand.

Name: Marika Cares
Description:
სახის მოვლის პრემიუმ ხარისხის საშუალებები ქალბატონრბისთვის . 100% ბიო და მაალხარისხიანი პროდუქტებით დამზადებული საცხები ინოვაციური ფორმულით კონცენტრირებულია იმაზე რომ კვებოს დაატენიანოს და აქტიურად ებრძოლოს ნაოჭებს.  

დაიცვას დაბინძურებული გარემოს მავნე ზემოქმედებისგან.

Name: Linco Care
Description:
A British manufacturer specialising in sun care, hair removal and personal care products.  Established since 1979 with its head office and production facilities located in Manchester, England.

Linco Care offers high quality innovative products in accordance with European and International industrial standards. Linco Care also provides a complete bespoke one-stop solution for private label and contract manufacturing.

Name: Cosmetri by Registrar Corp
Description:
Cosmetri by Registrar Corp provides cosmetics and personal care companies with solutions that are designed to streamline your operations, bring your products to market faster, reduce costs, and ensure compliance with ever-changing regulations.

Cosmetri software has been tried and tested for over a decade by hundreds of leading cosmetics companies around the world. 

We offer two specialized software applications tailored specifically for cosmetics and personal care businesses: Product Manager and Cosmetri GMP.

PRODUCT MANAGER
Product Manager is the complete solution for managing every stage of your product’s lifecycle, trusted by industry professionals to handle:

R&D / Formulation
Compliance
Testing / QA
Packaging
Costing
PLM
Manufacturing

COSMETRI GMP
Cosmetri GMP is a comprehensive, turnkey software built for ISO 22716 GMP compliance. With fully configurable features, it’s optimized for both tablets and PCs, making it easy to manage all aspects of GMP, including:

Full compliance with ISO 22716
Customizable workflows
Integrated e-document management
Automated email notifications and change logs
Quick deployment

Join the many industry leaders who rely on Cosmetri to innovate faster, cut costs, and maintain compliance.

Read more at cosmetri.com

Download our brochure here:
https://www.cosmetri.com/docs/Cosmetri_GmbH_brochure_2019_web.pdf

Name: Laboratorios Arrayanes
Description:
Desde 1967, nuestra misión en Laboratorios Arrayanes es el desarrollo y fabricación de productos cosméticos y de higiene personal. Nos dedicamos a atender los mercados argentinos de Venta Directa y Marcas Blancas, proveyendo siempre la más alta calidad de productos y el servicio más personalizado a nuestros clientes. Con una producción totalmente automatizada, lideramos el mercado local.

Nuestro compromiso con los clientes, el respeto por el medio ambiente y el aprecio por los trabajadores son parte de nuestros valores, que están presentes en cada momento que encaramos un trabajo, dentro de un ámbito amistoso de exigencia profesional.

Nos esforzamos día a día para dar respuestas a las necesidades de nuestros clientes, a quienes nos debemos y respetamos, adecuándonos a sus necesidades y cumpliendo al máximo con los requerimientos de calidad.

Name: Senso Kozmetik
Description:
Senso Kozmetik, limon kolonyası üreticisi olarak 1970 yılında İstanbul’da kuruldu. 1992 yılında limon kolonyasına ilave olarak kakao yağı, ütüsu, aseton gibi farklı ürün çeşitleriyle kozmetik pazarına girdi. Ardından Çavuşbaşı’ndaki ikinci üretim yerini açtı. 2015 yılında Düzce’nin Taşköprü Köyü’nde yer alan 8 bin metrekarelik yeni fabrikasına taşınarak Türkiye’nin en yüksek tonajlı kolonya fabrikasını kurdu. 2017 yılında Marmara Limon Kolonyası’na yeni bir marka daha ekledi. Erkek kişisel bakım ürünleri ve kolonya çeşitleri yer alan Marmara Barber markası ile üretim hacmini büyüttü.

Senso Kozmetik; Marmara Kolonya, Marmara Barber, Marmados ve Kutup Yıldızı markalarını üretiyor.

Geniş üretim kapasitesiyle hem kendi markalarını hem de fason üretimlerinde Türkiye’de önde gelen kuruluşlardan bir olarak çalışmalarına devam etmektedir.

Name: Top Line Europa
Description:
Top Line Europa – Excellence in Professional Beauty

With almost 30 years of experience, Top Line Europa is the leading importer and distributor of premium professional beauty products, equipment, furniture, and accessories for luxury hair and beauty salons in Romania.

Our portfolio includes globally renowned brands across all beauty categories, ensuring innovation, performance, and excellence for industry professionals:

Name: LUNA MAGIC
Description:
LUNA MAGIC is an indie beauty & lifestyle brand owned by Shaira Frias. By combining her passions for beauty and lifestyle, she created a vibrant brand that celebrates her love for her multicultural heritage, Latin culture and music—in living color.

Luna Magic was founded in Los Angeles with a mission to introduce high-performance cosmetics, bold flavor, diversity, inclusivity and vibrancy to the beauty industry. We're inspired by the rich cultures and music of the Caribbean & Latin America, the hustle and bustle of NYC and glamour of Los Angeles. Luna Magic is a women-led and Afro-Latina owned company. Welcome to our world.

Name: CosmeticsBridge.com
Description:
CosmeticsBridge is the first cosmetics media that completely focuses on removing trade barriers by providing solid and insightful cosmetics regulatory updates and solutions, marketing trends, data, and eCommerce advice. Most importantly, we would like to build a community that cosmetics professionals can find each other to communicate and achieve the goals with us.

We will strive to be real and reliable for our users and always will be enthusiastic to serve.

Name: JEVAN
Description:
JEVAN empower natural beauty &  self-love by creating  real natural products needed by all women for their confidence to GIVE A LIFE to their Skin and Hair.

Taking the power of your natural beauty back into your own hands is our ultimate aim!

Name: Persano Group
Description: Persano is a cosmetic and health care company which develops and produces a wide range of products for international companies. We have more than 80 years of experience within the industry and today our expertise and technologies make us a key player on the Scandinavian market.

Name: Zo'Nanos
Description:
Zo'Nanos is a line of natural beauty products that looks to revive the secrets and insights of our elders. 

Each product is lovingly made by my Nano or under her strict supervision in order to cultivate wellness & grooming using our own traditions.

The warmth of your grandmother, the age old family secret and your hair's best friend.

With a commitment towards using natural ingredients, Zo'Nanos takes the beautiful insights and todkay of our Nani's and Dadi's and brings them to the 21st century.

Name: Copeli Cosméticos
Description:
A Copeli Cosméticos e Perfumes é uma fábrica de cosméticos que atua no desenvolvimento e na fabricação de produtos higiene pessoal, perfumaria, cremes, loções e cosméticos em geral. Fundada em 1996, possui planta própria com 3000 m² de área construída localizada na cidade de Cotia, São Paulo. 

A equipe técnica da Copeli é experiente e capacitada, o que possibilita o desenvolvimento de uma ampla gama de produtos.

A Copeli oferece aos seus clientes um caráter inovador na concepção de projetos e no desenvolvimento de produtos novos.

Name: Institute BCN Esthetics
Description:
At Institute BCN we are experts in mesotherapy. We provide physicians and health and beauty professionals throughout the world with the widest range of mesoceuticals on the market, and the equipment necessary to apply the most advanced needle free mesotherapy treatments.

We offer efficient, safe and scientifically proven cosmetic solutions, the result of years of continued research and development. Non-invasive treatments which are painless, with no side effects and offering immediate results which allow us to provide effective and customised solutions for cosmetic problems of both the face and body, such as ageing skin, localised fat, skin spots, hair loss, flaccid skin, cellulite, stretch marks, acne or scars.

From our beginnings, Institute BCN has had a clear international vocation. Thanks to a wide distribution network spread throughout the world, our brand currently has a presence in more than 60 countries on five continents.

En Institute BCN somos expertos en mesoterapia. Proporcionamos a médicos y profesionales del sector estético de todo el mundo la gama más amplia de mesoceuticals del mercado y los equipos necesarios para aplicar los tratamientos más avanzados de mesoterapia.

Nuestros mesoceuticals proporcionan soluciones eficaces, seguras y científicamente probadas, fruto de años de investigación y desarrollo continuo. Tratamientos no invasivos, indoloros, sin efectos secundarios y con resultados inmediatos que permiten corregir eficazmente y de forma 100% personalizada estetopatías faciales y corporales como el envejecimiento cutáneo, la grasa localizada, las manchas de origen melánico, la caída del cabello, la flacidez de la piel, la celulitis, las estrías, las cicatrices derivadas de acné, etc. 

Desde nuestros comienzos, en Institute BCN tenemos una clara vocación internacional. Gracias a una amplia red de distribuidores en todo el mundo, nuestra marca está presente en más de 60 países de los cinco continentes.

Name: Winner Manufacturing
Description: Winner Manufacturing is a Perfume manufacturing company who are into Perfumes, Personal Care Products,Cosmetics, Hair Care Products, Body Cream and Lotions under the brand name Aris Cosmetics. With hands onexperience of 25 years working for Revlon, USA, Mr. Fred has designed all the products and fragrances to the customers need.

Name: MOIRA Cosmetics

MOIRA (www.moirabeauty.com) represents the always-evolving woman. Contemporary, innovative, products offer exceptional quality and deliver professional results while still emphasizing simplicity. Let MOIRA help you achieve the right look for your personality and awaken the confidence within. Be the self-assured woman that inspires others to initiate positive life changes and take control of their own destiny.

At MOIRA, the globe is our beautysphere. We continuously search the world to discover new ingredients and techniques that can enhance every woman’s individual, natural beauty. Women emerge more confident, more radiant, and more ready to create their destiny.

Build Your Confidence.

Take Control of Your Beautiful Destiny.

help@moirabeauty.com

Name: Novel Tissues Pvt Ltd.,
Description:
Novel Tissues Pvt. Ltd., established in 2003, is one of India’s leading manufacturers of baby wipes and hygiene products. With over two decades of expertise, we have built a strong presence across offline retail and leading e-commerce platforms like Meesho, Flipkart, and Amazon, where our wipes consistently rank among the best-sellers.

Our portfolio includes a wide range of products designed to ensure safety, quality, and convenience for families:

Baby Wipes (99% Pure Water, Aloe Vera & Chamomile, Goat Milk)

Facial & Refreshing Wipes

Hygiene & Multi-purpose Wipes

With a reputation for operational excellence, innovation, and reliability, Novel Tissues also partners with leading national and international brands as an OEM and private-label manufacturer.

Name: ELIDOSE
Description:
Spécialiste des solutions de conditionnement en emballage souple, ELIDOSE produit chaque année près de 750 millions de sachets contenant principalement des produits cosmétiques tels que des soins, du maquillage, du parfum et des produits capillaires.

Notre expertise s’appuie sur une maîtrise technique de pointe, certifiée et en perpétuelle évolution, qui nous permet d’offrir une sécurité optimale dans le conditionnement des formules sensibles.

Nouveaux produits, nouvelles formules, nouveaux usages… Parce que la cosmétique innove en permanence, nous avons mis l’innovation au cœur de notre démarche. 

Activement engagés dans une démarche de développement durable, nous accompagnons les marques en proposant des matériaux et des formats toujours plus innovants et écoconçus.

Name: TT Cosmetici
Description:
TTC, a new reality in the cosmetic industry.

R&D lab, NPD, sales team and marketing are all involved in the mission of formulating, creating and producing beautiful makeup powders. 
Fresh air and new opportunities. 
This is what TTC is aiming to represent in the beauty industry. Core of excellence of the group, TTC is investing energies and time to create a portfolio of products that talk about quality and innovation. 
More than 2.200 formula codes created in only 2 years.

Working everyday for a true upgrade of the traditional powders for eyes, face and body. The products that we are offering are changing the rules in the beauty industry.

For more info write us to: ttc-info@kdc-one.com

Name: Al Hafez Trade & Distribution
Description:
Who we're  ?

Al-Hafez Company for Trade And Distribution Established in 1996, specialized in the import, trade and distribute cosmetics, based on its over 28 years of experience in the cosmetics filed. 
Al-Hafez is a distributor for major international companies and exclusive importer of many brands. 
Al Hafez serves various sectors of customers through our branches and distribution network providing comprehensive coverage at the level of the Arabic Republic of Egypt.
Al Hafez aims through its branches in Egypt to improve sales service we are the first company show all the cosmetics products in a hyper show which save more time for our customer’s to see all the categories of any product beside each other’s

Name: Microblading LA Studio and Academy
Description:
At Microblading LA, we are passionate about the art of microblading. Our artists have been trained by the best in the world and are committing to creating beautiful, microbladed eyebrows that look totally natural. Founded by 2016 World of Microblading champion Lindsey Ta, Microblading LA is the premiere studio in the Los Angeles area for microblading and microblading training. The work of our artists has been featured on Good Morning America, Bustle, Pop Sugar, US Weekly, Bravo TV, Teen Vogue, and more. Celebrities like Bella Thorne and Youtube star Ashley Marie have proudly featured our work on social media and we're proud to have them as clients!

Our academy features certified trainers such as founder Lindsey Ta, as well as permanent makeup artists from around the world, like Rebecca Chung of Princessbrows in Hong Kong, teaching their techniques exclusively here at Microblading LA. Our classes are available in Espanol and Vietnamese. In 2017, we'll train hundreds of students--the next generation of microblading artists!

Our work transforms women's lives. Two hours with us can change your life. Imagine waking up perfect, smudge-free eyebrows every morning. This is the story we see and hear everyday at Microblading LA!

Name: Skogen Cosmetics
Isabella Grace Cosmetics
Description:
At Isabella Grace Cosmetics, we want to bring beauty and grace to your skincare and beauty routine.

Julie worked in the cosmetics industry for more than 20 years while raising her family. After being retired for a few years, Julie wanted to get back to what she enjoyed doing while supporting causes that were close to her heart. It was important that all products benefited the skin. Understanding that not every ingredient labeled “natural” is good for the skin and not everything labeled synthetic is bad, we formulated our first handcrafted lipstick collection. We believe that beauty is never perfected, and creating it is very personal to us. We are constantly evolving, developing, and testing out new products with good-for-you ingredients that are 100% cruelty-free.

While thinking of a name for the company the only name that felt right was Julie’s only granddaughter, Isabella Grace. We also call her Bella which means beautiful, and we want everyone to feel beautiful know matter what. Lipstick that has great ingredients and looks great on you can make all the difference on how you feel.

Giving back is also important, this is why we donate profits to charity.

Name: Forever Makeup Trading LLC
Description:
Who we are

Daily Life Forever52 is one of the most renowned cosmetic brands that have evolved over the years to make the fashion world easily accessible to all the gorgeous women all over the planet Earth.

Our story

During early 90’s a young chemist planted a seed in the heart of Paris, hoping that one day its branches will not only bloom with flowers of success but it will also bear and give the fruits of confidence and beauty.
Since then, there is no looking back. Indulging in a confluence of latest and most advanced technology, creativity, inspiration and dedication, we have successfully developed a high range of fashion and make-up products that can fulfil all the make-up needs and requirements of women.
With the initial introduction of our products in Germany, our brand today is the fastest selling brands in Europe and worldwide with its branches spread across all the continents, sharing and giving the gift of beauty and joy.

Our Mission and Vision

At Daily Life Forever52, we strive to formulate better ideas and bring about a revolution that makes make-up not just a tool of beautification but also an element that infuses a new energy and confidence in every soul that comes in contact with our products. We always aim to come up with such revolutionizing products that can help you in becoming everything you want to be, reflecting your true potential and at the same time keep your skin healthy naturally.
With a focus to make all make-up products from the professional world easily available and accessible to common women around the world, we put our best efforts in manufacturing the best ever cosmetics to cater all make-up requirements and fulfil all purposes. We want to constantly evolve and include the latest fashion cycles and trends, effectively manage distribution networks for better investments, synergize with industry’s key players for increased business and develop rewarding customer relationships and give our customers the best cosmetic choices.

Name: Beaucience India Private Limited
Description:
Beaucience is a contract and private label manufacturer focused on transforming beauty and skincare product ideas into market-ready realities. We work with brands that value scientific rigour, manufacturing discipline, and long-term product performance over short-term trends.

We operate as a turnkey private label partner, supporting brands across the full product journey. From concept and custom formulation to scale-ready manufacturing, our approach is built on clarity at every stage. We believe exceptional products are the result of sound formulation logic, ingredient compatibility, stability, packaging behaviour, and repeatable processes designed to hold at commercial scale.

Our formulation philosophy blends scientifically proven methods with naturally effective ingredients. Every product is developed with performance, safety, and scalability in mind. We focus on building formulations that not only test well in development but also remain consistent across batches, climates, and extended shelf life.

Beaucience brings deep expertise across skincare, body care, specialty hair care, OTC, and professional-use formulations. Our teams work closely with brand owners to develop cost-effective, high-quality products without compromising on quality standards or regulatory readiness. Manufacturing decisions are made with both technical and commercial realities in view, ensuring products are viable for long-term growth in competitive markets.

As part of India’s evolving beauty and personal care manufacturing ecosystem, we are committed to building world-class products for global markets. Our role goes beyond manufacturing output. We partner with brands to reduce risk, improve consistency, and create products designed to survive scale and success.

At Beaucience, science leads every decision, process defines quality, and execution determines longevity. We work with brands that are serious about building produ

Name: Alpeor
Description:
NATURE HOLDS THE SECRET OF YOUTH, OUR SCIENCE REVEALS IT TO RENEW YOUR SKIN.

We draw our inspiration from nature at the heart of a secret garden,  where our beauty formulas come into being. With sincerity and respect, we do our utmost to develop effective high quality skincare that makes us proud.

Name: GOLD COSMETIC
Description:
GOLD COSMETIC is a specialized laboratory based in Morocco/Casablanca, focusing on the manufacturing and formulation of natural cosmetic and personal care products.

With a strong international expansion, increasing revenue, and a growing number of satisfied clients, GOLD COSMETIC holds a prominent position in the market for natural cosmetic and personal care products. Leveraging extensive market experience and the creativity of its research team, GOLD COSMETIC offers exclusive and innovative products.

GOLD COSMETIC's commitment to excellence is demonstrated through meticulous selection of the finest raw materials, delicately harvested from Moroccan soil and other regions worldwide. Ingredient origin is central to the manufacturing process, promoting the use of natural or organic components.

We hold several certifications:
•	ISO 22716 GMP
•	HALAL COSMETIC
•	NATRUE (MOROCCAN SPA) CCPB
•	ECOCERT
•	USDA

Our expertise extends to a wide range of skincare, haircare, body care, and home fragrance products, catering to diverse needs such as hydration, brightening, anti-aging, skin and hair protection, hair loss prevention, pain relief, and much more. 

GOLD COSMETIC has developed several brands such as Jardin d'Oléane, Honeymoon, Moroccan Spa (NATRUE certified), Oleotherapy, and Terre d'Oléane (CPNP), some of which are deeply influenced by the rich Moroccan culture, drawing inspiration from stories, rituals, and local ingredients. Our products successfully embody the harmonious blend of tradition and modernity!

As a white-label manufacturer, we offer a turnkey collaboration, from the conception of your cosmetic products to their launch in the market. You will have the opportunity to choose from a variety of formulas to create unique products under your own brand!

Name: Segara Naturals
Description:
Vision & Mission

To be a trusted natural skincare company, delivering high-quality, innovative, and practical products with Indonesian ingredients for Earth-loving customers, empowering women and inspiring stakeholders to appreciate nature’s beauty.

Our Story

The idea for Segara Naturals started as our founder traveled Indonesia in 2014-2017. She was shocked to see heavily littered beaches and swathes of bald patches of forest even in remote areas. A large part of this trash is personal care products – shampoo sachets, soap packaging, small travel bottles, etc., something she knew she had contributed.

This inspired her to become part of the solution for sustainable lifestyle. Hence, Segara Naturals was born and officially launched in January 2018, providing natural, eco-friendly, yet practical personal care products for travelers and those on the go.

Segara means “ocean” in Indonesian, reflecting our love for the Indonesian waters and its people. Our proud commitment is to produce high quality products that are good for the skin and good for nature, so everyone can enjoy the outdoors and grow to love nature as we have.

Description:

The former engineer dreamed of a skincare line that performed consistently as she moved from place to place, and from season to season. Using the demanding environment of Jackson Hole as her laboratory, Crothers led the development of a carefully formulated line that combines the laser precision of science with an indulgent experience, enabling skin to look and feel its best in any setting.

MODERN, LUXURIOUS, TRANSFORMATIONAL

CIRCCELL products work to keep the skin beautiful from deep within, even as environmental factors shift. Our collection includes a full regimen of daily rituals and treatments particularly sensitive to the skincare concerns that result from extreme environments, whether it be urban pollution, extreme temperatures, UV exposure or frequent travel, and for anyone who demands as much of their products as they do of themselves. Each hardworking yet elegant formula is designed to meet the needs of today’s skincare connoisseur.  To meet the needs of today’s hyper-mobile woman, we insist ouproducts:
•	Travel well
•	Multi-task
•	Are formulated based on performance
•	Deliver the best of many technologies


PIONEERING PERFORMANCE

CIRCCELL is dedicated to the creation of innovative luxury skincare that transforms the skin. Our products harness potent anti-aging ingredients and actives, known to deliver results through performance driven formulations. The resulting, targeted skincare collection provides a sensual experience with a synergistic array of the world’s most high-performing ingredients. What’s more, our products are free from fragrances, parabens and harsh chemicals, and are never tested on animals.

Name: Moi Forest
Description:
Moi Forest has its roots in an ancient forest that takes care of biodiversity and our planet’s habitability. The forest offers shelter and a bounty of trees, berries and mushrooms, but above all, forms the core of a living and breathing ecosystem. It took a small bunch of Finnish researchers intrigued by the power of the forest and a few women with a background in natural cosmetics and wellbeing, and an idea began to take shape: maybe it really is possible to create a cosmetic product with beneficial effects for the whole body! 

Combining organic ingredients with magical forest dust results in superior benefits especially for sensitive skin. The starting point for all of the products is to create a synergistic whole that boosts the skin while causing minimum disturbance to nature. Daily exposure to the forest is a natural way to strengthen the skin’s microbiome. In urban environments, the skin’s immune system is robbed of this natural boost.

Forest soils are proven to contain microbes that are beneficial for human skin and wellbeing. Exposure to these prevents and treats lifestyle-related diseases that are increasingly prevalent in the western world.

Moi Forest skin care products are Cosmos Organic certified by Ecocert Greenlife and make the healing properties of forest bathing a part of daily life in the city. Let the forest take care of you!

Description:
Le nom LÉTIKA vient du sanskrit et signifie « jeune pousse ». Notre gamme de soins de beauté est inspirée de l’Ayurveda et nos produits sont élaborés avec des ingrédients de la plus grande pureté issus en majorité de cueillettes de plantes sauvages et de cultures biologiques situées principalement en Inde, berceau de l’Ayurveda.

Avec la collaboration de cosmétologues et de botanistes, LÉTIKA souhaite faire le lien entre les petits producteurs de l’Inde et ceux de nos régions en France dans des produits ultra-concentrés en actifs botaniques, qui grâce aux principes de l’Ayurveda, sont destinés à tous ceux qui souhaitent retrouver les fondamentaux de leur beauté !

La nature comme seul principe actif.

Description:

Sporting over 40 shades of foundations and 20 shades of concealers and loose powders it is one of few professional brands to cater equally to African, American, Asian, Caucasian and Hispanic skin tones.

International award winning brand. 

Only the very best for your skin with pure and miraculous skin-care products, combining 100% natural ingredients in order to offer you a maximum protection and a natural skin-care. Suitable for sensitive, dry & problem skin. All products are dermatological tested and vegan & halal certified.

We are green beauty engineers, designing powerful natural skincare that delivers real results without a drop of synthetic chemicals! 
Send: 100% natural, vegan and nontoxic in our entire skincare line. This is the essence of clean beauty, with the high standards of green beauty.

The results? Illuminating, age-defying benefits for your skin, even for eczema, psoriasis, acne, dry skin, during chemotherapy …

It all starts with living your “real” SELF and taking good care of yourself!

Our products abound of guaranteed ecological secure vitamin-bombs & organic body boosters of superior quality. RESSOURCE YOURSELF WITH “SELF”!

Initially it was getting it manufactured through leading companies from different countries of the world including Turkey, China and Pakistan as well. Now MABLAY BEAUTY (Pvt.) Ltd as manufacturing company set up its own state of the art manufacturing facility in industrial state Faisalabad Pakistan. This unit runs under instructions and technical guidelines of our sister concern, an Australian organization named Mablay International PTY LTD. This organization helps us to manufacture the high quality, result oriented, attractive packaged products. This company guides us about active ingredients, type of packaging, technology, research and innovation to provide groundbreaking, high-quality products for women, and men. Vince is very strong in retail market but also focusing on online market and delivering the products all over the world to its loyal consumers.

Description:
Salon de Beauté è il punto di riferimento per chi vuole il meglio per la propria bellezza e il proprio benessere.

A supporto di un’idea di bellezza made-to-measure, nel 2019 viene lanciata Sense by EGC, la linea professionale Body, Skin & Hair utilizzata in salone e nei principali centri del lusso italiano.

Due sedi nel cuore di Milano, nei saloni di Duomo (Victor Hugo 4) e City Life (Viale Boezio 20), e diverse firme in franchising con il nome di Concept by Salon de Beauté.

Name: UZDROVISCO
Description:
GOODNESS by NATURE is a brand new, fast-growing Polish cosmetic company that created three, amazing, unique natural product lines. It’s a revolution on Polish and European cosmetic market! Natural cosmetics created from selective plant extracts with scientifically proven effectiveness. Prepared on the base of standardized plant extracts, similar to herbal medicine.

EVERY JAR CONTAINS:  
Wonderfully nurturing, naturally effective formula. Light, modern, fast- absorbing, not aggravating to the skin. Wonderful smell! Matt finish after application guarantees lasting and natural make-up effect. 

ATTENTION TO QUALITY AND SAFETY:
-	We create in respect to nature and mankind using pro-ecological solutions
-	We keep the highest production standards 
-	Nature’s wealth shown in formulas – up to 99% of natural components!
-	Cosmetics created in line with latest ISO 16128 norm about natural cosmetics and materials of natural origin.

What’s different about us?
•	Highest doses of standardized extracts (prepared in the similar way as herbal medicine, with known doses of active substance in the extract) and other plant-based active ingredients, for maximal effect.
•	Innovation –we are the first ones in Poland and Europe to bring on those unique extracts that actively work to improve skin’s condition 
•	Our product has the best quality in a reasonable prize
We are looking for new distribution channels in Poland, Europe and all over the world. In Poland our customers are: beauty salons, drugstores, concept stores like herb shops, eco shops etc. If you are interested in high quality natural product, it’s us you’re looking for. 

Contact us!
E-mail: biuro@uzdrovisco.com
Phone: 886076935

Name: fjör
Description:
At fjör, we empower you to achieve your healthiest, most radiant skin by focusing on microbiome diversity. 

Our Hydrolytic Enzyme technology works with your skin’s natural ecosystem, helping to strengthen the barrier and boost vitality. By nurturing the beneficial microorganisms on your skin, our formulations give you visible results with less effort. 

With fjör, you’re in control—simplifying your routine while enhancing the health and glow of your skin, so you can feel confident every day.

Name: Aromika
Description:
Kvepalai, namų kvapai, muilai, sausi kvapai, kišeniniai kvepaliukai, vonios druskos, purškiami namų kvepalai, patalpų kvėpinimas – visa tai ir dar daugiau kuria 2004-ųjų kovo 18 d. veiklą pradėjusios įmonės „Aromika“ meistrai.

Antrą veiklos dešimtį skaičiuojanti bendrovė yra bene didžiausia lietuviškų kvapų gamintoja, savo produkciją pristatanti ir į Ispanijos, Latvijos, Baltarusijos, Ukrainos, Rusijos, Didžiosios Britanijos rinkas.

Kasmet UAB „Aromika“ gimsta bent keli nauji produktai, o pastarieji metai kompanijai buvo ypač kūrybingi – buvo sukurta ne tik daugiau nei 20 naujovių, bet ir tris kartus išaugo darbuotojų skaičius bei įmonės apyvarta.

Itin vertinama UAB „Aromika“ patalpų kvėpinimo paslauga. Įmonės klientai yra viešbutis „Kempinsky“, „Impuls“ sporto klubų tinklas, „Eglė +“ sanatorija, „Krasta auto“, „Aprangos“ grupė ir kt.

Name: Routine Cosmetics
Description:
Routine is here to help you find the perfect skin routine. 



Routine was founded in 2022 with a simple mission: to help you have a skin-cycling routine by simplifying the complexities of skincare. We believe that skincare doesn't have to be complicated and that every woman deserves a simple, affordable, quality skincare routine.



Our products are made with integrity and quality in mind, and we're committed to transparency and affordability. We believe that taking care of your skin should be a part of your everyday life, and our goal is to make that as easy as possible. Every person deserves to feel confident in their skin, and we're committed to helping our customers achieve that goal.

Name: Miniface Beauty
Description: Our clinically-tested beauty devices combine science-based treatments with a spa luxury experience, in the comfort of your own home! Get your glow on with Miniface Beauty and feel the inspiration from taking your skincare to the next level.

Name: Aviva Labs
Description:
Aviva Labs, Inc. started in 2003 as a spinoff of a successful biotech company, and the three founders have two medical degrees and a science degree between them.  Aviva Labs recognized the lack of health-focused sunless tanning, and thus created the world’s mildest, hypoallergenic sunless tanning products that are oil-free, fragrance-free, alcohol-free and erythrulose-free made with the highest quality, premium grade DHA (dihydroxyacetone).

The staff at Aviva Labs has extensive education and experience in the beauty, biochemistry, health, and esthetics fields.  They offer an on-site and online sunless tanning academy dedicated to teaching beauty professionals not only proper technique but business-building and marketing to insure the profitability of their sunless tanning services.  Information on the academy is available at www.avivalabs.com 

Aviva Labs’ products have been selected for use at the Sundance Film Festival, the Emmy Awards, the Academy Awards, and won Skin, Inc. Magazine's Best of the Best award two years in a row.  From its production facility in Boston's suburbs, Aviva Labs distributes their products to over 110 countries worldwide.  

Learn more at http://facebook.com/avivalabs or visit the company's corporate website at http://avivalabs.com

Name: LALICIOUS
Description:
Hi, we’re LALICIOUS
From the start, we’ve believed people deserve more from their body care. We’ve believed in the power of natural ingredients to nourish your skin, and the power of crafted fragrances to uplift your mood. And we’ve always believed that a relaxing, peaceful moment caring for your body and mind is time very well spent. In this hectic world of ours, a fantastic body care experience can do more than serve a purpose–– it can make your day.

LALICIOUS products are always formulated without:
Parabens | Mineral Oil | Phthalates | Gluten | Paraffin | Petroleum | Sodium Laureth Sulfate Triclosan | GMO derived Soy | Propylene Glycol | Synthetic colors | Animal Testing


LALICIOUS products are:
Made with Recyclable Packaging | Fair Trade | Made in the U.S.A | 99% Vegan | 100% Mindful

Name: Kiara Sky Professional Nails
Description:
When naming this company after their firstborn daughter, the two talented and passionate nail artists who started Kiara Sky Nails knew that making this brand a success was the only way to go! Born and raised in sunny California, Kiara Sky’s mission is to provide you with quality products that allow you to unleash your inner artist, express yourself creatively, and share your unique style with the world. You call the shots and that’s the way we like it.

We’re not afraid to think outside the box, and we are here to prove that fabulous professional nail products can be fun, exciting, and uncomplicated!

Sure, you might have to break a rule or two but daring to be different is what sets you apart from the rest and empowers you to achieve your wildest dreams! - Just make sure not to break a nail while doing it!

Name: Quetzal Química
Description:
Somos Quetzal Química, una empresa familiar iniciada a fines del año 2002 dedicada a la importación y distribución de especialidades para la industria cosmética y farmacéutica. Además cuenta con un servicio técnico formado por profesionales, siempre a disposición del cliente y con foco en la incorporación de innovadores productos y nuevos desarrollos.

La materia prima con la que trabajamos es excelencia del mercado europeo, asiático y norteamericano, elaboradas por reconocidas empresas a nivel nacional e internacional.

Por otra parte participamos en ferias y concursos del sector en todo el mundo, tanto como esponsors, expositores o como asistentes para estar al tanto de todas las novedades, así como también realizamos publicaciones en importantes revistas dirigidas a laboratorios cosméticos y farmacéuticos.  Además tenemos el honor de ser socios cooperadores de la Asociación Argentina de Químicos Cosméticos.

Para nosotros, mantener un óptimo nivel de Know-How es muy importante, por eso asistimos a cursos de capacitación, tanto en el país como en el exterior, para poner a disposición de quienes nos eligen,  las novedades del mundo farmacéutico y cosmético. Para dar a conocer los beneficios de la implementación de nuestros productos en la industria damos cátedras en distintos organismos, tanto privados como estatales (U.B.A), lo que nos llena de orgullo dada la responsabilidad de informar a colegas y a futuros profesionales, acercando información de relevancia para el sector.

Name: Dalon Cosmetics
Description:
A cosmetic products industry founded in 1998 based in Athens, Greece .With the contribution of the research and development (RnD) department we have created more than 500 different cosmetic products for hair care, face care and body care. With the use of high quality raw materials and the constant research of new ingredients we provide top quollity inovative cosmetic products.
Our cosmetic lines, dalon and dainty, are placed in beauty shops, pharmacy stores and supermarkets. We also produce private label products for more than 100 companies in Greece and abroad. We participate in cosmetic shows in Greece and worldwide. Today we export our products to more than 10 countries.

Description:

Name: BOOM! Beauty
Description: BOOM! Beauty is dedicated to redefining beauty standards and empowering women of all ages to embrace their true selves. We believe in transcending age limits in beauty, ensuring every woman feels confident and radiant. Our mission is to offer easy-to-use, organic skincare and cosmetics for mature skin that highlight and celebrate each woman's unique features, fostering self-acceptance and a positive body image. We aim to inspire joy and fun at every age, creating a community where women feel empowered, celebrated, and motivated to defy societal expectations and embrace their individuality.
