Name: Essentia Puglia
Description:
Essentia is the essence of Puglia, one of the most ancient and enchanting Italian regions of the Mediterranean. Here you can experience a fusion of nature, emotions and perfumes.

Essentia Puglia is an organic and natural cosmetic brand providing the natural beneficial essences and active principles directly from nature to care about beauty without harmful artificial chemicals and anti-aging skincare, body and hair using Extra Virgin Olive Oil and Vintage Grapes from Puglia's ancient olive trees and the native grape vines of Alto Salento and Valle d’Itria.

The Essentia Puglia collection including also perfumes, home fragrances and is entirely created in Puglia. The productive cycle composition of Essentia Puglia products follows the 'zero kilometer' concept of getting essences hence, they are locally extracted always respecting the environment. As a conservationist brand Essentia Puglia supports a policy of no testing on animals.

Name: CANGZHOU GREEN COSMETIC BRUSH CO.,LTD
Description:
GREEN BRUSH is the leader in the Design & Manufacturing of top quality makeup brushes.
We produce Private Label brushes for premium cosmetics brands who care about quality, innovation, vegan and sustainability.

Since day one, we have been committed to quality without compromise, passionate innovation and trusted collaboration.

Our mission is to help our customers improve their products competitiveness and brand values with premium makeup brushes that transform the daily use of cosmetics into a luxurious consumer experience.

Name: Quthero
Description:
Quthero is a privately held company advancing regenerative therapies based on its proprietary Q-peptide technology for applications in dermatology and cardiology. Q-peptide is a synthetic, bioactive, peptide sequence derived from Angiopoietin-1, with documented regenerative and anti-inflammatory properties. 

Q-peptide platform enables versatile applications in areas where cell survival, anti-inflammatory effects, and regenerative support are critical. Quthero’s pipeline focuses on applications of post-aesthetic procedures, wound healing and regeneration, and cardiovascular health.

Name: 001 Skincare
Description:
001 Skincare London is a luxury British brand, its hybrid skincare lines merge cutting-edge bio-technology with natural and organic ingredients using innovative Asian formulation techniques in a performance driven formula designed to "return skin to a state of natural equilibrium", counterbalancing the excesses to which we expose ourselves daily.  

Based on modern Asian principles, the highly active formulas provide an actual treatment to the skin thanks to their superlative powerhouse of refined, potent and decadent ingredients sourced from around the world. The hybrid products are designed to be mixed and used all over, the sensory aromas and textures creating indulgent and pleasurable skincare that your skin will love you for.

Clinic based in Marylebone - Harley Street

Best Independent Skin Clinic by Women's Health, Best Treatment by Financial Times & Best Wellness Practitioner by Country & Townhouse 

Our Clinic Therapists are trained by Ada herself, they share Ada's vision to strengthen your skin and internal systems, aim to deliver not only immediate skin results but develop lasting holistic improvements across skin, body and mind. All treatments feature Ada's world famous microSculpt protocol combined with the unique Sky & Earth Meridian Stimulation & Release Method to truly align your skin and wellbeing.

Name: CBD Care Garden
Description:
CBD Care Garden recognizes the universal excitement and wondrous benefits found within CBD rich hemp extracts. It is our vision that we continue to be the pioneers and leaders in developing luxury, plant pure, CBD oil infused skin care products. “We believe healthy skin is your birthright.” It is with this perspective we are confident in the plant-forces present within our product line.

In the formulas signature to CBD Care Gardens product line, we sought after the following criteria:
● 80% Organic Ingredients
● Efficacious Skin Care blends
● Modern Ingredient Selection & Blend Uniqueness
● Only Natural and Nature based Preservatives (100% Natural)
● Curated Rich Plant Extracts & Nutrient Dense (Non diluted formulas)
● Luxury Quality
● Anti-Aging and Pro-Skin Compounds

Name: Saphira
Description:
Who is Saphira?

Saphira a female founder and CEO, has a mission to empower, heal and give back by way of beauty. Saphira is a salon professional healing hair care line infused with 26 minerals. 


The Saphira philosophy believes that each person has her/his own unique “minerals” or beautiful qualities. Just as the minerals revitalize, moisturize and heal, Saphira encourages each person to find the “minerals” from within and to make positive contributions to our families, community and to the world.

Giving Back

Saphira is dedicated to giving back and to support a variety of charities whose goal is to provide both healing and empowerment to children at risk.

Why Minerals Are Important?

Minerals play a crucial role in our daily bodily functioning and in our scalp and hair. A deficiency of essential minerals make us vulnerable for premature hair loss and unnecessary breakage and damage of hair follicle development.

Name: Lakeland Cosmetics
Description:
Based on the edge of the Lake District National Park, Lakeland Cosmetics has been producing high quality cosmetic brands since its origin in 2008. 

With a vast range of cosmetics that vary from personal care to men's care and pet care products, the family-run business has gone from strength to strength after seeing production quadrupled in the last five years. Today, following a further surge in demand, it has established itself among the leading manufacturers of the cosmetic industry, catering to large export markets and stockists such as Superdrug, Rossmann and B&M. 

All products are made in our West Cumbrian factory, with water sourced directly from the Lake District and other ingredients from within the UK. 

Since the launch of the brand over a decade ago, it’s founding principles have remained at the heart of the company. We never test on animals and when we can, ensure all our formulas are vegan. We are wholly committed to providing effective and high-quality cosmetics and use our scientific knowledge to continuously develop our ranges to be the best they can be.

Name: PARFUM D'EMPIRE
Description:
Parfums de conquête…

Conquête amoureuse, conquête spirituelle, conquête de soi… le parfum doit être conquête, le parfum doit être exploration.

Pour parvenir à cette conquête, Parfum d’Empire renoue avec le sens originel du parfum, de tous temps et dans toutes les cultures : l’érotisme et le sacré.

Parfum d’Empire, la puissance des matières premières les plus nobles poussée à l’excès.

Jusqu’où aller trop loin ?

Marc-Antoine Corticchiato a choisi une parfumerie physique, intrépide, baroque.

Sa singularité ? Il est à la fois créateur nez, maître de sa Maison, souverain en son labo, docteur en chimie des plantes odorantes. Toutes choses qui lui offrent une vraie autonomie artistique.
La liberté ne se donne pas, elle se conquiert !

Parfum d’Empire se reconnaît par ses débordements de matières et, paradoxalement, par cet équilibre propre au Grand goût français.
Style radical et personnel : c’est cela qui touche.

Une prise de position face au puritanisme des jus chétifs et normatifs.
Ca résonne, ça lèche, ça invite, ça pénètre….

L’empire des sens.

Name: One Day Bio Organic & Vegan Skincare
Description:
One Day Bio is an organic beauty and vegan brand inspired by the unspoiled nature, honest farming, and quality of life in the Loire Valley of France.

Our line of high-performance beauty and skin care products will make you look good and feel even better! For, all One Day Bio products are created from the purest natural ingredients from France and are certified organic, cruelty-free, vegan, and fairtrade (ECOCERT, Cosmebio, FSC, Vegan, etc.) 

Every day, our team of dedicated professionals develops amazing new beauty formulas, looks for the best ingredients, and devises the smartest production and packaging to ensure that you look your best, while no bee or tree in the field or rabbit in the lab gets harmed in the process.

Our motto is “C’est bon pour ma nature.” Which is French for: It’s good for my nature, it brings out the best in me. In this spirit, One Day Bio supports numerous organizations dedicated to health, education, and the environment.

『One Day Bio 每日有機』為所有追求健康美麗的佳人，提供平易近人的有機享受。One Day Bio 的保養品來自西法的羅亞爾河流域被譽為「法國的花園」。以高品質有機保養品為訴求，用行動追求身、心、靈、地的平衡，獲得歐盟法國有機認證 COSMOS ORGANIC，英國素食者 Vegan 認證，美國動物保護 PETA會員，德國森林友善 FSC 標章，保障了我們的消費者。「It’s good for my nature」( 法語 : C’est bon pour ma nature ) 的品牌座右銘，代表「為心所選，唯美饗宴」，希望大家以新的面貌活出自己，也同時為地球生命盡一分力。One Day Bio 希望每個人在使用時，能夠充分享受品質、品味、有機、愉快等喜悅，也謝謝每一位消費者的熱愛，以行動肯定與支持，每日有機。

Description:

Name: Absolute Aromas Ltd
Description:
In 1994 David Tomlinson founded Absolute Aromas. His vision was for a centre of excellence where therapists and consumers alike could buy with confidence. The keyword for the range would be quality.

Now Absolute Aromas is now one of the leading forces in aromatherapy within the UK and has a worldwide reputation for quality of product and service. Our products are exported and retailed all over the world and the diversity and outward looking nature of our business is more than a little responsible for our buoyancy in the current economic uncertainty.

We have an unparalleled range of over 140 essential oils and a wide selection of carrier oils and base products. We also stock a selection of pre blended oils and massage blends, floral waters, bath salts, electric diffusers and aromatherapy accessories, which allow the full benefits of aromatherapy to be enjoyed by all.

Each essential oil is ethically sourced from established producers in the best country of origin for that particular oil, we have long standing relationships with trusted suppliers, both in the UK and overseas. Every batch of oil is subjected to rigorous testing at our in-house Lab, by our experienced and qualified essential oils chemist, using methods such as gas chromatography to ensure that the quality is never compromised.

Nearly 25 years on, we at Absolute Aromas pride ourselves on the quality of the service we offer our customers. Orders are turned around within the shortest possible time, secure in the knowledge that we are providing our customers with an unrivalled quality of product. 

Absolute Aromas is certified by The Soil Association as a supplier of organic products. The Soil Association is the UK's largest and longest standing organic certification body. We are also members of The Aromatherapy Trade Council, a UK trade association for the specialist aromatherapy essential oil trade, representing the interests of manufacturers and suppliers of essential oils and aromatherapy products.

Guided by the commitment to deliver excellence, its core principle revolves around providing professional clients with an optimal combination of quality, competitive pricing, and unparalleled customer service, resulting in obtaining a leading position within the Greek Market.

Name: Doctor Mi medical skincare
Description:
Doctor Mi medical skincare wurde 2018 von Dr. Miriam Rehbein gegründet und steht für hochwirksame, dermatologisch entwickelte Hautpflegeprodukte, die höchsten wissenschaftlichen Standards entsprechen und frei von irritierenden Inhaltsstoffen sind.

Eine zentrale Innovation des Unternehmens ist die TECMi!-Technologie: Durch eine präzise Verkapselung werden aktive Wirkstoffe wie Retinol gezielt in die tieferen Hautschichten transportiert. Diese fortschrittliche Methode steigert die Bioverfügbarkeit, maximiert die Wirksamkeit und reduziert zugleich potenzielle Hautirritationen,  die durch nicht-verkapseltes Retinol entstehen können. Dadurch garantiert Doctor Mi medical skincare effektive und hautschonende Lösungen für eine Vielzahl von Hautbedürfnissen.

Dr. Miriam Rehbein, Dermatologin und Gründerin von Doctor Mi medical skincare, vermittelt mit Leidenschaft ihr Wissen und ihre Erfahrung in der Hautpflege, um ihre Kunden zu Experten für ihre eigene Hautgesundheit zu machen. Durch praxisorientierte Beratung und maßgeschneiderte Hautpflegeempfehlungen befähigt sie ihre Kunden, informierte Entscheidungen zu treffen und ihre Hautbedürfnisse optimal zu adressieren. Ihr Ziel ist es, nicht nur hochwertige Produkte anzubieten, sondern auch das Verständnis für individuelle Hautpflegebedürfnisse zu fördern und langfristig gesunde, strahlende Haut zu unterstützen.

Die Produkte von Doctor Mi medical skincare vereinen modernste Forschungsergebnisse mit der umfassenden dermatologischen Expertise von Dr. Miriam Rehbein und bieten kompromisslose Qualität, Sicherheit und Wirksamkeit.

Name: LESSEAU
Description:
Samen strijden we voor een wereld zonder plastic afval! Hoe? Vloeibare zeep wordt noodzakelijk verpakt in plastic wegwerpflessen en één flesje bevat tot wel 95% water. Dit heeft een enorme impact op het milieu. Het vervoeren van water zorgt namelijk voor veel volume en kilogrammen en de plastic flesjes voor restafval. Lesseau wil dit veranderen! Door haar plasticvrije, natuurlijke, hygiënische blokzeep en bijhorende zeepdispensers heeft Lesseau al  talloze bedrijven ondersteunt bij het reduceren van hun ecologisch voetafdruk. Daarnaast reduceert de automatische blokzeep dispenser arbeidsintensiviteit. Benieuwd hoe u ook kunt besparen? Volg onze pagina, of lees meer op onze website. 

Trots lid van de Plastic Soup Foundation en trotse winnaar van de CSU Innovatie award, Red Dot award en de IF-Design award 2022.

Name: Super Smelly
Description:
Super Smelly is the brainchild of Dipali Mathur Dayal, Founder and CEO, herself a mother to a growing tween. When she realised there was a dearth of safe products in the marketplace for her daughter, she took it upon herself to create something exclusively for this much-neglected age group – the one between babyhood and adulthood - which has its own unique needs. The need to look good, to smell good and to make the right choice for their bodies.
  
All product formulations are developed keeping this age group in mind. What is more, they have been clinically and dermatologically tested for safety and certified ‘Toxin-Free’ and ‘Made Safe’ by Safe Cosmetics Australia. Most of the products are also certified ‘Vegan’ and none of them have been tested on animals.

The brand sets out to boost confidence among teens and tweens about their body image and individuality, during their formative years when they are learning to think for themselves. It aims to bring about a revolution through products that support their own sense of independence and intelligence. 

Super Smelly uses vibrant colours and fun illustrations that the target group can connect with. The name itself yells out quirky, witty and self-assured. In a nutshell, Super Smelly is fun, playful, adventurous, edgy, fearless, dependable and exciting!

Moreover, the brand gives parents the choice they never had. To never have to choose between safe and effective for their kids.

Super Smelly is a premium and responsible skincare brand for the next generation, naturally derived and 100% toxin-free personal care products for teenagers and tweens. And we take our no-toxin business very seriously.

Name: SQIN Ø (SQIN ZERO)
Description:
SQIN Ø means a SKIN with Ø additives, Ø preservatives, Ø synthetic fragrances... Ø nasties!

We produce 100% (and we really mean 100%!) natural skincare products with 100% active premium ingredients that deliver outstanding results, surpassing that of over-the-counter products that are so often full of nasty chemicals.

Our skinimalist approach means our skincare products are kept as simple as possible to give powerful, active ingredients a chance to take full advantage of the absorption capacity of our skin. This maximizes efficiency and avoids you having to pay for ingredients that bring no benefits to your skin, like for example water.

Our artisanal and small batches are handmade in Switzerland allowing for sustainable production practices. We also use fully recyclable and reusable packaging, starting with our recycled bamboo jars and all the way to the soya ink we use on our wrapping paper. In addition, we have a re-use program where we partner up with our customers to create a more sustainable lifestyle.

We are on a mission to help consumers make better, healthier, and more informed decisions about what they put on the largest organ in our bodies, our skin. For this, we provide full transparency on the ingredients we use (and a long list of the ones we REFUSE to use available on our website) in every single one of our products. No asterisks, no small print with hidden ingredients.

100% natural premium skincare products, that deliver outstanding results with absolute transparency on ingredients and a sustainable approach to packaging and production to help people make better choices about what goes on their skin- that's who we are, what we do, and why we do it!

Name: Numee Beauty

HEY!

Numee is born with the ambition to connect the concepts of well-being, sustainability and beauty, thus responding to the growing demand for cosmetic products that are respectful to the skin and the environment, as well as effective and affordable.

Our products are formulated in-house by our R&D team and manufactured in our own production plant in Valencia, Spain.

Numee follows a Conscious Beauty philosophy and hence, all our formulas are vegan, cruelty-free and we make an effort to make sustainable choices for our packaging.

We put the spotlight on what our formulas include rather than on what they don’t.
Our focus is on creating well-curated formulations combining the best of what nature and science can offer. Our products provide real results, catering the needs of all skin types at an affordable point price.

It's also worth mentioning that Numee products are aesthetically pleasing! Perfect for your social media feed.

We have different skin product ranges to cover all your needs:

Name: Poplawska Group
Description:
We are one of the market leaders with over 25 years of experience, combining the production of cosmetics, beauty devices, dietary supplements, and disposable accessories with innovative solutions for private label brands.

With our own laboratories and modern infrastructure, we support the growth of both established companies and emerging brands entering the market.

Under our umbrella, brands such as Clarena, Rubica, and Clarena Naturalis are thriving. Beyond beauty, we are actively engaged in sports and social initiatives – from the Popławska Team and Clarena Sports Club to a foundation dedicated to supporting single mothers.

Our mission? To understand and respond to the needs of clients worldwide. We create unique trends in cosmetology across the European market, focusing on inner beauty while enhancing outer beauty.

Our strength lies in diversity – we combine science, business, and passion to deliver solutions that build our partners’ competitive advantage.

Name: Noxidoxi
Description:
Notre objectif est de disparaître, car cela voudrait dire que le monde a enfin changé ! Que les consciences les plus avides se sont réveillées. Que la planète est enfin le bien de tous. Protégée. Chérie. À la hauteur de ce qu’elle nous donne.

La pollution est là! Vous le lisez tous les jours dans les journaux, vous la voyez sur le capot de votre voiture, vous la voyez sur vos cheveux sales et graissés, sur votre coton ou votre serviette le soir en nettoyant votre peau. Santé, bien-être, beauté. Le triptyque qui va nous faire avancer. 

Avec une innovation positive. Celle qui pense les produits comme des actifs et bienfaisants. Sans détruire. Juste construire. Un avenir meilleur, un sourire quotidien, une peau plus belle, un teint lumineux. Pour des lendemains plus verts, plus sains.  

Cela fait désormais 6 ans que NOXIDOXI travaille à créer une gamme spécifique aux peaux agressées par la pollution. Brevet, actifs, usages : tout est analysé en ce sens. Avec des dizaines d’entretiens avec le corps médical. Nous sommes parvenus à développer la 1ère gamme cosmétique 100% antipollution au monde : courte, ciblée, efficace, dédiée, aux effets scientifiquement prouvés et visibles ! Pour aller encore plus loin dans sa durabilité, NOXIDOXI a décidé de faire peau neuve sur ses packagings et sa distribution. Verre, aluminium, absence d’étui, distribution directe, refonte de gamme en s’imposant des critères environnementaux. Chaque jour, nous réfléchissons à nous améliorer.

Vos besoins et vos préoccupations certains disent qu’ils les entendent. Nous, on les écoute ! On s’en nourrit. Méticuleusement. Ils sont précieux pour faire que notre gamme devienne encore un peu plus la vôtre.

Aujourd’hui nous souhaitons donner plus de sens à la cosmétique. Une cosmétique du progrès. Un progrès audacieusement positif. Sincère et affirmé face à un monde qui n’a plus de plan B.

Il est temps de de changer. Nous avons déjà commencé.

La cosmétique a un sens.

NOXIDOXI

Name: Cosmétique Thermes Marins de Saint-Malo

For over 55 years, three generations of the Raulic family have built, brick by brick, a group recognized in the world of Hospitality, Thalassotherapy and Spa.

Name: MARIA ÅKERBERG
Description: We are a family owned business and Sweden’s leading professional brand within organic skincare. We believe in skincare that nourishes deep within the skin for natural, lasting results. It is a philosophy that anchors our brand promise and we call it Deepskin Organics. Benefits
- Reduce wrinkles for a fresh, younger look
- Decrease visible pores for even skin texture 
- Diminish acne scars for a clearer and healthier complexion
-Repair sun damage

At Maquibeauty we don't just sell beauty products, we create experiences. We are where the passion for cosmetics merges with innovation, always offering you the latest trends. Name: Nrsen Trading
Description:
Rooted at the intersection of new and traditional retail practices, Nrsen creates a dynamic space where world- class brands can truly shine in Saudi Arabia. 

We work with a collection of carefully selected brands that paves new and innovative way to skincare. We are looking at science- based brands that use the finest ingredients, effective formulations, and are recommended by dermatologists. We champion emerging trendsetters, storytellers and icons- to- be, working with them to navigate and thrive in the Middle East’s largest market, the Saudi market.

Since 1999, Nrsen has continued to deliver on its promise to be the strategic partner of choice representing valued brands to the Saudi consumer. Our unique capabilities that go beyond being a traditional wholesaler or distributer of products earned us the trust of esteemed brands now more than ever, when the line separating modern and tradition retail is blurred and potentially becoming obsolete. 

With our diverse network of employees and offices in Riyadh, Jeddah, Dubai, Cairo and Seuol, Nrsen has built a holistic ecosystem of operational, financial, technological and marketing expertise. Our experienced team of buyers, marketers, pharmacists and operation professionals is dedicated to identifying, managing and communicating the unique stories and values our partnering brands wish to get across as new entrants to the market. And with our deep relations with retailors across KSA we establish comprehensive distribution channels, featuring our selections in major ecommerce platforms, leading pharmacy chains and local distributers as well. Our core capability is to provide end-to-end support throughout the market entry process.

Name: CLEF Beauty
Description:
CLEF is Clean and Effective. We believe that beauty should be stress-free and straightforward, so our products are safe, user-friendly, and most befitting of hot tropical weather - as products of a Malaysian brand should be!

How each product is born: our R&D team conducts surveys with at least 300 potential customers to identify the significant pain points and gaps in the market. Then, we perfect the formula in the lab until we achieve fast, safe, and long-lasting results.

Thus, we developed our breakthrough products: the 9-in-1 Copper Peptide Mask, the Hydrating Cleansing Gel, and CLEF’s newest Radiant Gold Essence, a fast-absorbing collagen booster.

Since then, we have expanded our retail channels to Shopee and major retailer SASA Malaysia. Now, we strive to create better solutions to address the diverse concerns of our growing customer base.

Priding ourselves in our flat hierarchy and lean working culture, we foster an openly collaborative environment, welcoming ideas from anyone. In this fast-evolving team, everyone is constantly growing and thriving, making every day an exciting day here at CLEF.

Name: STATE OF MIND | ÉTAT D'ÉSPRIT | Perfumes
Description: STATE OF MIND is a French brand of Artistic Fragrances matching with Perfumed Teas and Coffees. Made in France and Represented in 40 countries, STATE OF MIND combines the Art of Perfumery with the subtle and timeless rituals of the Tea Ceremony.

Name: Neos 1911 Niche & Luxury Perfumery
Description:
Profumerie e centri di estetica, concessionarie dei marchi più prestigiosi ed esclusivi. Oltre ad un vasto assortimento di profumeria artistica e prodotti di alta selettività, Alla Violetta si pone come realtà strategica tra la nicchia ed il commerciale. Con un occhio rivolto alla sempre crescente clientela giovanile ed alle ultime tendenze in campo cosmetico, make-up ed accessori moda.
I nostri centri di estetica si avvalgono dell'esperienza e della competenza delle nostre professioniste, proponendo trattamenti in cabina con le migliori Maison della cosmesi internazionale, unitamente a trattamenti effettuati grazie alle ultime novità tecnologiche nel campo dermo cosmetico, anti invecchiamento, adiposità localizzate.
Brand List
Acqua Di Parma, Adler, Balenciaga, Borrelli, Bruno Acampora, Bulgari, Burberry, Camomilla, Carita, Cartier, Chanel, Chloè, Christian Dior, Clinique, Clive Christian, Comme Des Garcons, Costume National, Creed, Dolce & Gabbana, Elie Saab, Estee Lauder, Etat Libre d'Orange, Etro, Etro Accessori, Hermes, Il Nero Profumi, Ineke, Issey Miyake, Jacomo Paris, Jean Paul Gaultier, Jeanne Piaubert, Jeu de Garcons, John Galliano, Juliette Has A Gun, La Prairie, Lab Series, LBF, Les Art, Les Nereides, Lorenzo Villoresi, Marc Jacobs, Marinella, Montale, Narciso Rodriguez, Nouba, OPI, Parfum d'Orsay, Patrizia Pepe, Perricone MD, Prada, Robert Piguet, Santa Maria Novella, Sisley, Sodini Bijoux, Stemcell, Stendhal, Thierry Mugler, Tom Ford, Zibermann

Name: Hellenica SA
Description: Beauty products specialist since 1964.

Name: MONPURE
Description:
A healthy scalp not only supports the production of healthy hair but also contributes towards the hair’s natural growth and retention. Traditional brands fail to recognise this interdependent relationship between the hair and scalp. Hence conventional haircare brands focus on treating the hair itself with little attention paid to the crucial role the scalp plays as an incubatory environment for the pre-emergent hair.

Crafted by leading scientists, beauty experts and dermatologists, MONPURE believe the scalp should be at the heart of any hair regime, which is why our products were created to treat both scalp and hair. Our products deliver fundamental benefits for better hair growth, as well as improving the quality of the scalp and hair itself, for boosted health, strength and shine. 

MONPURE - THE CLEAN FOUNDATION FOR HEALTHY HAIR

Name: Inglot Cosméticos
Description:
Potencia lo que te hace único. En INGLOT creamos cosméticos al alcance de todxs y para todxs.  El maquillaje es tu campo de juego y tú pones las reglas: Diviértete mezclando colores y crea productos tan únicos como tú.


Nuestra marca nació hace más de 25 años en laboratorios cosméticos, por eso nuestros ingredientes son respetuosos con la piel y buscan, no solo maquillarla, si no también cuidarla. Motivo por el cual nos encanta innovar con texturas y fórmulas cada vez más respetuosas con el medioambiente. No probamos ningún producto ni componente en animales, estamos presentes en las listas de PETA como una marca libre de crueldad animal y aproximadamente el 60% de nuestro surtido son productos veganos. También disponemos del certificado Halal.


Estamos presentes en todo el mundo: 90 países en más de 950 ubicaciones, desde Oxford Street y Times Square en Nueva York hasta Las Vegas.

Hemos trabajado con famosos diseñadores y marcas de moda de todo el mundo, como Kenzo, Coach y Badgley Mischka. Durante muchos años, también hemos estado cooperando con musicales en Broadway de Nueva York y contando con embajadores de marca tan reputados como Jennifer Lopez, con quien creamos una colección limitada de cosméticos.


Pero todo esto no sería posible sin la confianza que todxs nuestros clientes ponen en nosotros y que siguen enamorándose de nuestros bestsellers como el exclusivo Duraline o las paletas de sombras customizables Freedom System.

Name: Essential Oils Care
Description: Take care of your skin better with Essential Oils Care. Essential Oils Care delivers all the information about different essential oils in the market today. Brand and product reviews are also published within the page which makes choosing the right oil for your skin and hair type a lot easier.

Name: celestetic.
Description:
Celestetic is a Belgian company specialized in professional cosmetics, dermocosmetics, and advanced aesthetic technologies.

We design and develop innovative devices, skincare products, and treatment protocols that deliver visible, long-lasting, and safe results for beauty professionals and medical experts.

Based in Brussels, Celestetic combines scientific expertise, technological innovation, and clean beauty formulations to provide a holistic approach to skin health and beauty.

All our products and devices are developed by scientists, dermatologically tested, and meet the highest quality standards.

Our mission: to empower professionals with cutting-edge tools that reveal the natural beauty of every skin.

Active in 25+ countries across the globe, Celestetic is recognized for its commitment to transparency, performance, and safety.

Name: BCR | Bio Component Research
Description:
Bio Component Research creates and supplies specialty natural actives to the personal care industry.  BCR products are scientifically designed for skin compatibility, and maximum efficacy. BCR believes in actives that impart change and improve skin condition. Flexibility and quick response for quality customer support makes BCR more than a supplier, but an integral part of your formulation team.
Responsibly Sourced | Clean & Sustainable Processes | Eco-Conscious | Non-GMO | Vegan

Name: Maniko Nails
Description:
Wir von Maniko stehen für eine Innovation in der Nagellack Industrie. Mit unseren veganen und tierversuchsfreien UV Gel Strips bieten wir eine revolutionäre und langanhaltende Maniküre für mindestens 21 Tage.

Angetrieben von unseren Grundprinzipien bildet das Team den Kern von Maniko. Durch die Synergie von Innovation, Leidenschaft und Kreativität streben wir gemeinsam danach, unsere Vision zu verwirklichen und die Nagellack Industrie zu revolutionieren. Wir legen besonderen Wert auf Transparenz und Offenheit, da wir an eine aufrichtige und respektvolle Kommunikation glauben.

Warum Maniko? 

Weil wir auf Prinzipien wie Transparenz, Wertschätzung, Teamgeist, Vertrauen, Respekt, faktenbasierte Entscheidungsfindung und Flexibilität setzen. Bei uns findest du nicht nur einen Job, sondern ein inspirierendes Umfeld, in dem deine Leistung geschätzt wird. Du wirst Teil eines engagierten Teams, in dem du die Freiheit hast, innovative Lösungen zu entwickeln. Entscheide dich für Maniko und werde Teil einer Kultur, die den Weg zum Erfolg ebnet.

Maniko - Weil unsere Werte unsere Kultur prägen und unseren Erfolg antreiben.

Name: Murad UK
Description:
Welcome to Murad - at the forefront of the Third Spa Revolution!

The UK Spa industry is evolving and growing at breakneck pace and the challenge is keeping pace with customer demand.

When Spa became popular in the UK around 25 years ago, there were as little as 15 Spas offering a limited range of treatments.

As their popularity grew, the treatments on offer became more ornate, offering massages, hot stones, candles, rose petals and more candles.  After a few years customers realised that they were searching for MORE…  MORE scientific research, MORE effective treatments and MORE immediate and dramatic results.

In response to this increased demand the Third Spa Revolution has arrived.  Customers are demanding technical treatments, specialist ingredients and instant, noticeable results.

We are Murad, the market leader at the forefront of this exciting evolution, offering an array of highly technical, cosmeceutical treatments to treat every skin priority!



Get in touch!
Telephone: 0844 472 7050
Email: info@murad.co.uk
Twitter: @MuradUK
Facebook: www.facebook.com/MuradUK
Website: www.murad.co.uk

Name: Suki Skincare
Description:
THE SUKI STORY

Suki Skincare started in a kitchen to create skincare solutions strong enough to treat skin problems but safe for those with highly sensitive skin. We continue that work by collaborating with dermatologists, scientists and countless others to ensure we’re innovating with the latest in clean technology. We are committed to providing 100% clean & scientifically advanced skincare solutions for people with all skin types.                                          

Our Purpose: Provide Strong, Safe, Sustainable Skincare Solutions, 100% Clean 100% Effective, 100% For The Planet.                                                                                               

Philosophy: Know Your Beauty is about full transparency. Know what is in your products, going on and in your body.  Most importantly know and own your beauty!


WE VALUE                   

Efficacy: Clinically Proven Strong Safe Solutions with high levels of concentration that actively stimulate and work to balance skin’s natural functions.

Safety: Products safe enough for sensitive skin.

Nature & Science: Harmoniously working together to provide innovative & progressive ways of elevating the pureness of nature to its most advanced state.

Responsibility: Ethical and moral obligation to our customers and the planet to uphold safe sustainable practices.

Name: Beauty Call
Description:
Beauty Call is a select team of professional, mobile hair and makeup artists across the UK.

We operate via our franchisees who look after their local postcode areas.

If you are a professionally trained hair and makeup artist then you can either work for us as a freelancer or franchisee.

Please take a look at our online application form: 
http://www.beautycall.co.uk/hair-and-make-up-artist-job-opportunities.php

Name: Society of Cosmetic Scientists Nigeria NiCosNG
Description: A professional community for chemists,scientists, engineers and entrepreneurs to promote and encourage education, research and sustainable growth of the African cosmetics and personal care market worldwide

Name: YVES ROCHER ROMANIA
Description:
Cu un model de business unic, Yves Rocher este o Marcă singulară, ce a ales să stăpânească fiecare etapă a operațiunilor sale: agricultură biologică, cercetare botanică și științifică asupra plantelor, dezvoltarea de ingrediente active inovatoare, formule, furnizare de materii prime, fabricare, realizare ambalaje, transport și distribuție în întreaga lume. Această trăsătura specifică îi permite Mărcii să reducă impactul asupra mediului înconjurător și să propună tuturor femeilor produse de calitate la prețuri accesibile. Un brand care, din loialitate, a decis să-și concentreze majoritatea activităților în localitatea La Gacilly, deoarece este locul de naștere al fondatorului său.

Cercetarea Cosmétique Végétale
Raritate în domeniul cosmeticii naturale, Marca Yves Rocher are propriul său departament de cercetare. Un centru de cercetare este dedicat în mod special inovației Cosmétique Végétale. 20 de echipe multidisciplinare lucrează împreună pentru a descoperi, a izola și a formula cele mai eficiente ingrediente și texturi bazate pe plante, pentru frumusețea femeilor. 
Marcă înregistrată de Yves Rocher în Franța.

A Unique Business Model Yves Rocher is a one-of-a-kind Brand that has chosen to master every aspect of its operations: organic agriculture, botanical and scientific research on plants, innovative active ingredients development, formulas, raw materials supplying, manufacturing, packaging, shipping and distribution around the world. A Brand that, out of loyalty, decided to focus most of its activities at La Gacilly, for it is its history and its founder’s birthplace.

Research in Botanical Beauty 
Rarity in green cosmetic, Yves Rocher has its own research department. A Research Center is specifically dedicated to Botanical Beauty Care innovation. 20 multidisciplinary teams are working together to discover, isolate and formulate the most efficient ingredients and textures based on plants for women beauty care.

Name: RULOS CHILE SPA
Description: Creemos en las cosas simples y transparentes, y por esto nuestra búsqueda de marcas es especial. No nos limitamos a marcas convencionales, vamos más allá y elegimos marcas que compartan nuestra filosofía, marcas definidas por su calidad y la ética de sus creadores, marcas auténticas y originales, marcas hechas con cariño, marcas inspiradoras
Location: Gran Santiago, Región Metropolitana de Santiago

Name: Cosmopolitan Cosmetics Inc.
Description:
Cosmopolitan Cosmetics, Inc. is a premier wholesale supplier and distributor of an extensive selection of over 1000 famous perfume and cosmetic brands.  We consider each and every customer a partner with the common goal of growing lucrative businesses.  Our world class team at Cosmopolitan will go the extra mile to ensure reliable, secure, and timely shipment of the products you need.

Founded in 1975 carrying 25 fragrance lines, and growing exponentially over our 40+ years in business, we now stock over 1000 of the top fragrance and cosmetic brands in the world.  Our keen attention to superb customer service, accessibility, and constant improvements in warehouse processing and technology, has allowed us to become a preeminent force in the wholesale distribution business within the fragrance and beauty industry. 

Headquartered in New York City, our spacious warehouses in the Tri-state region give us direct access to the largest import and export lanes for perfumes and beauty products in the world.  Cosmopolitan’s state-of-the-art warehousing facilities allow our certified shipping team to safely, efficiently and securely ship worldwide.

Name: Disguise Cosmetics
Description: Disguise Cosmetics is an indie Indian makeup brand, co-founded by 3 scientists - Shivangi Shah, Desiree Pereira and Lakshay Mohindroo. With years of experience in cosmetics and personal care, Disguise was created based on the perception of how the beauty industry should work in today's world. The brand strives to bring products of the highest quality that are vegan, specially curated for the Indian skin and created with science and nature. All the products are 100% cruelty and paraben-free. Oh, did we mention we're also PETA approved? That's right, we make sure we take a stand on every front, including packaging - we're on our way to be 100% recyclable on all fronts. We are staunch believers in cruelty-free makeup and all our processes and formulations are designed keeping this philosophy in mind.

Name: Layla Cosmetics
Description:
Storia, Dedizione, Colore e Amore sono gli ingredienti essenziali e genuini per poter descrivere Layla in poche parole.
Una ricetta storica che negli anni ha accompagnato i trend cosmetici, a volte anticipandoli, per dare alle donne italiane emozioni colorate.
Società fondata nell’anno 1936 quando il Comm. Emanuele Rossetti portò dopo un lungo soggiorno in America la produzione dello smalto in Italia.
Tanto lavoro, tanta voglia, per raggiungere in pochi anni un successo inaspettato.

Layla, leader nella produzione dello smalto semipermanente, è oggi presente sul mercato con più di 2500 referenze prodotte artigianalmente nei suoi laboratori Milanesi ed è riconosciuta da milioni di clienti fidelizzati per la cura del suo prodotto. Distribuita in più di 3.500 prestigiosi punti vendita retail e professionali, Layla ha anche un flagship store in Via Larga 2 a Milano, un vero e proprio head quarter della bellezza, ed uno shop online che presenta in anteprima le novità del brand e l’intero range delle proposte.

Name: Boyfriend
Description:
Boyfriend is a lifestyle brand that produces perfumes, candles and pulse point oils. Founded in 2010 and personally financed by actress Kate Walsh, the brand’s signature scent quickly became a top seller at Sephora and HSN. In 2015, as the demands of owning a retail beauty brand became too much for Walsh to handle independently, she put Boyfriend on pause. Due to the level of inquiries from fans requesting that Walsh bring back the original fragrance, the hiatus was short lived. 

In 2017, Walsh partnered up with Digital Media Management to re-launch the Boyfriend brand - this time selling direct to consumer. This new approach of selling directly to the Boyfriend audience allows for more control over testing new products and truly building a demand-based business, while also exploring wholesale partnerships from other product vendors.

The growing catalogue of Boyfriend products are designed to stimulate the senses and to encourage a life of indulgence. Boyfriend's core belief is that YOU are the center of your own universe and you shouldn’t wait for anyone’s permission to make yourself your top priority. You don't need a boyfriend, this is the only one you need.

Name: Bioline Jatò | Certified B Corp |
Description:
An Italian company that supports Skin Therapists’ daily work with safe and effective skincare products and the unique Bioline Jatò System Method: synergy of functional massages and professional treatments for a customized result-driven wellness experience.  Developed from a school for aestheticians, we offer an educational plan in compliance with the ISO9001 certified Quality System. Since 1979 we are present in more than 40 countries worldwide, in the best beauty institutes and SPAs only.

Bio Line S.R.L.
Società Benefit

Name: LAB SERIES Skincare for Men
Description:
HIGH TECH. HIGH PERFORMANCE. SKINCARE FOR MEN. ONLY. 

LAB SERIES Skincare for Men was first introduced by The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. in 1987.  Since then, the brand’s elite team of scientists, researchers and skincare specialists use modern technology, advanced ingredients and the latest research on men’s physiological and lifestyle needs to develop products with proven results specifically targeting men’s skincare concerns.

LAB SERIES Skincare for Men is available in 30 countries and sold in department and specialty stores worldwide

To explore our current job openings with LAB SERIES or our parent company The Estee Lauder Companies Inc. click the link below:

http://elcompanies.jobs

Name: Justin Beauty
Description:
Güney Kore çıkışlı kozmetik ve cilt bakım markaları ya da kısaca K-Beauty; doğal içeriklerle geliştirdikleri üstün formülleri ve vadettiklerini yerine getiren eşsiz ürünleriyle kusursuzluğun sembolü. Bu büyük başarı uzun süre Kore’de saklı kalamazdı, K-Beauty kısa sürede tüm dünyada hayranlıkla izlenen öncü konumuna geldi. Asya’dan sonra Amerika ve Avrupa da K-Beauty ile tanıştı ve K-Beauty’e yıldırım aşkıyla tutuldu. Her ne kadar Kore cilt bakım rutini ve kullanılan özelleşmiş ürünler başlangıçta batılı kullanıcılara yabancı gelse de, Kore’nin güzellik sırlarını ve şaşırtıcı etkilerini deneyimlemek büyük bir keyfe dönüşüyor. Artık sadece Asya’da değil tüm dünyada milyonlarca takipçi, K-Beauty markalarını ve ürünlerini kullanıyor ve vazgeçilmez buluyor.

Türkiye’de de son yıllarda K-Beauty’e karşı yoğun bir ilgi bulunmakta. Tüm bu ilgiye rağmen ne yazık ki Türkiye’de K-Beauty’e ulaşmak pek de kolay değil. Justin Beauty olarak hem K-Beauty takipçilerinin hasretine son vermek hem de K-Beauty’i geniş kitlelere tanıtarak onlara yepyeni (ve çok eğlenceli) bir dünyanın kapılarını aralamak misyonuyla yola çıktık. Çok yoğun bir çabanın ve uzun uğraşların sonunda Justin Beauty doğdu ve sizlerle buluştu. Bir mağazadan çok daha fazlası olan Justin Beauty, tüm K-Beauty severlerin bir araya gelebileceği bir platform olarak tasarlandı. K-Beauty’e dair tüm gelişmeler, yararlı rehberler, bilgilendirici içerikler, blog yazıları; kısaca K-Beauty’e dair her şeyi Justin Beauty’de bulabilir ve Justin Beauty’i diğer K-Beauty severlerle buluşma noktanız olarak düşünebilirsiniz.

Sizler için sadece en iyi markaların en iyi ürünlerini seçiyor ve seçkimizi sizlerin görüş ve önerileri doğrultusunda her geçen gün geliştirmeye gayret ediyoruz. Justin Beauty’de bulunan tüm marka ve ürünler Kore menşeilidir ve sadece yetkili distribütörlerden ithal edilmiştir. Marka ve ürünlerimize dair detaylı bilgileri sayfalarımızda bulabilirsiniz.

Name: Carter Beauty Cosmetics by Marissa Carter
Description: Carter Beauty by Marissa Carter is a Peta-Approved member of Beauty Without Bunnies. We are completely cruelty-free and we do not test our products on animals, nor do we have animal testing conducted on our behalf or by anyone else. Certain products may contain beeswax which is derived from the animal but no animals are harmed in the production and testing of our products.

Name: BEAUTYLAB - ELISAVET DARAVELI S.A.
Description:
BEAUTYLAB is a Greek company, located in Athens that was founded in 2002 aspiring to cover the needs for high quality services on New Product Development in the cosmetics market. 
The activity of Beautylab today encompasses three main fields:                                                                                                             
1.	Services provider for third parties, undertaking projects for new cosmetic product development (R&D, NPD, regulatory), including formulation, laboratory testing, EU legislation, compilation of cosmetics product information file, cosmetic product notification, pilot production-upscaling as well as customized full service final cosmetic product. 
2.     Producer of white label cosmetics.
2.	Supplier of Packaging material for cosmetic products, as agent and distributor for the Greek, Cypriot and recently Balkan countries market, from reliable European and multinational  firms such as Aptar Villingen, Neopac, Rebhan, Premi, Verve, which prominence of high quality and design products that  fulfill  the market demands.  
Beautylab’s competitive advantage is that we offer complete solutions in affordable cost, in a concept of one stop shop, adapted to the market needs, based on our long experience, expertise and excellent market contacts.  The synergy of our activities create an integrated proposal.

Name: HIVADO
Description:
HIVADO is a modern Indian men’s grooming brand built for the uncompromising man. We craft high-performance products across hair care, body care, skincare, and grooming essentials — with formulations that blend science-backed ingredients and clean, effective design.

Rooted in honesty and clarity, we reject fluff and fads. Instead, we create grooming tools that work — fast, hard, and clean — for men who take their self-care seriously but don’t want to spend hours decoding it.

From our best-selling Thick & Full Shampoo, engineered to lift limp, thinning hair, to clarifying body washes and sunscreens built for Indian skin and weather, HIVADO is on a mission to redefine how Indian men care for themselves — one product that delivers, at a time.

Whether it’s your morning ritual or a night-out reset, HIVADO fits into your day — no gimmicks, just results.

Name: The Perfume Factory
Description:
THE PERFUME FACTORY, is an ambitious project, headed by Mohammed Rashid Al Matwi aiming to create and sell new Made in Qatar perfumes in the world. We produce wide range of quality fragrances. The perfumes we will make
are thoughtfully designed with high attention to detail and uniqueness. The perfume factory will offer an exceptional turnkey product experience to customer with passion to develop a brand, driven by entrepreneur spirit and inspire for high quality standards.

Name: Misencil
Description:
Since its creation in 2006, Misencil has become a true leader in the beauty industry and the ultimate reference in eyelash extensions. It is in the suburbs of Montreal, in a town named Terrebonne, that the couple Ingrid Gagné and Jean-Jacques Benguigui, both fashion and beauty enthusiasts, created Misencil. The brand rapidly caught on, and in no time salons as well as cosmeticians all around the globe joined the Misencil network, with today over 15,000 dealers worldwide.

“Day after day, year after year, Misencil continues to strive on innovation and constantly sets higher standards in the industry by offering unique products that fortify lashes as well as innovative application techniques.”

Misencil offers a wide variety of lashes and application types based on the shape of the face and desired effect, in addition to a full range of cosmetic products formulated specifically for lashes and eye area, professional application products and delicate jewels like glitter and Swarovski crystals for a totally glamorous look!

Name: Végétalement Provence
Description:
Végétalement Provence est une marque de soins botaniques spécialisés dans la science du cheveu et de la peau.
Grâce à une « botanique augmentée » chaque produit agit sur une problématique ciblée et personnalisée.
Tout cela avec la touche d’émotion olfactive qui ré-enchante chaque journée !

Végétalement Provence.
Soins botaniques.
Science du cheveu et de la peau.

Name: Suave Fragrance
Description:
Em 26 de novembro de 1990 nasce a Suave Fragrance. Uma empresa 100% nacional, trazendo um novo conceito em qualidade, responsabilidade e comprometimento com o consumidor. Preocupada em oferecer os melhores e mais adequados produtos as diferentes necessidade dos consumidores brasileiros, a Suave Fragrance surgiu oferecendo o que há de melhor em produtos cosméticos, seguindo uma linha de alta qualidade. Devido a uma trajetória de comprometimento, sucesso e crescimento profissional oferecido pela empresa, trazemos como resultado a credibilidade e qualidade em toda nossa linha de produtos, que atinge consumidores de todos os estados do País.

A Suave Fragrance nasceu da ideia de fabricar e  distribuir cosméticos em uma região que até então não tinha histórico de empresas nessa área. Começou de forma empírica, em um pequeno galpão, e hoje atende todo o Brasil. A geração de emprego cresce a cada ano. Atualmente, gera em todo o território nacional em torno de 50.000 empregos  indiretos, através da equipe de revendedores (tendo um grande crescimento e fácil aceitação principalmente na região norte e nordeste).

Outros pilares sustentam a empresa que se mantém firme em um mercado instável. Entre eles pode-se citar o respeito pelo ser humano, a valorização do capital intelectual, a parceria com distribuidores e fornecedores. A qualidade dos produtos junto a transparência oferecida pela empresa, trás a sua equipe de colaboradores a segurança e o suporte necessário para que junto a empresa seja alcançado o crescimento profissional e pessoal de cada membro de nossa equipe.

Name: Bind Pharma
Description:
Bind Pharma, our goal is to become an international ploneer in the field of personel care and cosmetics by developing quality, innovative products in line with consumer needs.

Bind Pharma, with its employees, suppliers, business partners, customers and the community, strives to promote economic growth and the environmental change.

In addition to our technological production facilities, Bind Pharma, which draws attention with its detailed R & D studies and it’s expert staff overseeing product development,

produces products that comply with, ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 18001, ISO 22716 GMP, CE ( Medical Devices) and Halal quality standards.

We are a leading aerosol product manufacturer and we have a wide range of quality products such as Hair Care Products,Hair Shampoos(serums), Skin Cares etc. all of our products include patented brands or private labels in various forms that are sold in 5 Continents and 17 Countries in many international markets.

We continue our investments in export markets and in Turkey and many of our brands offer guaranteed satisfaction to our customers

Name: Elate Beauty
Description:
Elate stands for conscious beauty.
What do we mean by Conscious beauty? Intentional, purposeful, ritual. For many of us, putting on makeup is an automatic act, a routine. At Elate Cosmetics, we believe everyday routine becomes ritual when the action is more meaningful than the outcome. We believe true beauty is in the ritual itself. The small measures of self-care we afford ourselves daily are the seeds of self-love we plant to grow more confident, more powerful and more beautiful then we could ever imagine. Elate is at the heart of the conscious beauty movement. We believe that no animal or person should ever should ever be harmed to create our products. The opposite of kindness is not cruelty, it's inattention; and we are paying attention. To the companies we partner with, the ingredients we choose and the way our products are marketed. Always with kindness. Never with fear or shame. Know that you are a beautiful delightful being, and Elate is merely here to support your journey to a more intentional lifestyle, and conscious beauty bag.

Name: Tarko Kozmetik
Description:
Established in 1946, Tarko Cosmetics Company is the oldest Cosmetics & personal care company in Turkey which is registered to Istanbul Chamber of Commerce. 
With own brands and several exclusive distributorships, Tarko is operating over 15 countries and exporting to 30 countries.

In 2021, Tarko has acquired a Bath Sponge and SPA factory. With over 20 million capacity, our company is now producing bath sponges in various designs and also SPA items from textile plants.

Name: Lottie London
Description:
As part of the home of innovative and disruptive beauty and skincare, Brand Agency London, Lottie London was founded by Charlotte Knight in 2015.

Lottie London is paving the way as a vegan, cruelty free, trend-driven, and affordable beauty brand . As we continue to grow, as do our goals, community and collaborative repertoire; working on collaborations with Laila Loves , Imogination, Gossip Girl, My Little Pony , Chaun Legend  and The Vampire Diaries. We’ve also seen many of our products go viral on the beloved gen-z app TikTok, including our stamp liner and superfake mascara which alone has amassed over 5 million views on TikTok 

We are also partners with Ecologi to pave the way for a more environmentally conscious future and to become an environmentally positive workforce. In doing so, have pledged to plant over 1,800 trees since partnering with Ecologi as of 25th October 2022. . We’ve also launched several campaigns which have bettered society including our Blood for Beauty Campaign in which the Lottie Squad donated blood to receive the entire Vampire Diaries “Love Sucks” collection, this campaign brought the importance of blood donation to the forefront and was personally recognised with thanks by the NHS. We’ve also partnered with LGBTQIA+ charity Kaleidoscope Trust and the Spread A Smile charity which supports families with whose children are facing treatment in hospital. 

You can find Lottie London across the globe,

You can find Lottie London across the globe…
UK | ASOS, lookfantastic, feelunique/Sephora 
US and Canada | Walmart, Ulta, Riley Rose 
Mexico | Liverpool 
EU | Douglas , OVS  Olet Kaunis 
Turkey | Watsons
South Africa | Edgars, Foschnini, Superbalist, ARC 
and our official UK & US online stores and Lottie app.

Name: Kosmetiikka- ja hygieniateollisuus ry, the Finnish Cosmetic and Hygiene Industry Association
Description:
The Finnish Cosmetic and Hygiene Industry Association (Kosmetiikka- ja hygieniateollisuus ry) is a trade association representing the interests of companies manufacturing and distributing cosmetic and personal care products, detergents and cleaning products for consumers and institutional & industrial use. 

The main mission of the association is to create a favorable operational environment for the member companies by following the legislative issues and contributing to their preparation and by following the developments of the industry both in Finland and on the European level.

The association is a member of Cosmetics Europe and the International Association for Soaps, Detergents and Maintenance Products (A.I.S.E.). 

The association has 57 member companies and its membership represents approximately 80 per cent of the total domestic sales of the above mentioned product categories.

Name: Più Beauty Company
Description: We Deliver Beauty

Name: Professional Beauty Solutions (PBS)
Description:
PBS empowers salons to optimise performance, product and profits with a positive influence. PBS is Australia’s most respected and trusted distributor of professional beauty brands – servicing over 3000 businesses across Australia.

But we are more than just your distributor. From advanced cosmeceutical skincare, results-driven technology and aesthetic devices to mineral makeup, sunless tanning, and spa and body treatments, PBS are proud to exclusively provide partners with a complete 360° solution to skin health from the inside, out. 

Whether you’re a business owner or a brand, you’re more than an account to us, you’re part of the family and we are committed to celebrating every success with you, alongside supporting you through any hardship. PBS are taking skin health to new heights and we want to take you with us…

So, if you’re ready to take your business or career to the next level, don’t hesitate to get in touch today.

Name: RF Cosmetici
Description:
Rf Cosmetici is specialised in R&D and dermocosmetic product third-party formulation and manufacturing. We are far more than a simple production lab: we are an integrated provider of services for the cosmetic industry, from the design of a new line of dermocosmetic products to consultancy on sectoral legislation. Our work in the areas of R&D, selection of raw materials and attention to new market trends make us the ideal partner for those who wish to focus on the premium and luxury market segments. Our product formulas not contain parabens, paraffin, petrolates or allergens. Our labs have top-quality complexes, specific anti-aging substances derived from the chemical combination of peptides, which can be combined into customised textures to develop exclusive and original bodycare products.

Molto più di un laboratorio di produzione. RF Cosmetici è un polo specializzato in Ricerca e Sviluppo, formulazione e produzione in conto terzi di prodotti dermocosmetici che copre tutti gli aspetti relativi alla progettazione di una linea: dal concept alla consulenza legislativa. La ricerca, l’innovazione, la scelta delle materie prime e l’attenzione alle tendenze del mercato, ci rendono partner ideali per i segmenti premium e luxury. I nostri formulati sono privi di parabeni, isotiazolinoni, paraffina, petrolati e allergeni. Combiniamo e veicoliamo sofisticati complessi di altissima qualità con texture personalizzate per ottenere formulazioni originali ed esclusive.

Name: TIBOLLI, Synergy of Trioxxy. BE DIFFERENT BE YOU!
Description:
CEO and founder Van Tibolli. From the start Van has been an innovator in “the science of hair.” His concept is very simple; develop and create the best products in the professional hair industry. Tibolli's advanced hair care products are based heavily on science to deliver beautiful, healthy and manageable hair. Tibolli continuously invests in research and development to advance the science of creating beautiful hair.

Tibolli as well as its aftercare products and styling tools are used and recommended by top hair professionals in the finest salons throughout the world. The hair care line includes 12 products that work together to nourish even the most damaged hair, revealing smooth, sleek results. All products can be used independently to boost the hair’s strength and manageability, or to increase the benefits of the salon treatment.

Name: OCOA - Curly Hair Care
Description:
We are Cory and Nicol Varona, Hermanas redefining how curly hair products are created to help women love their curls and themselves.

Our mission is to honor curly women in their real, most raw, authentic self to help them transform their life and claim the confidence in their natural beauty. 

Our formulations perform beyond synthetics with high quality, safe and effective ingredients. Our products work. Our 5-star reviews are proof. We are showing first, second generation and immigrant women (like us) that we’re worth it.

#curls #curlyhair #cleanbeauty #latinaowned

Name: SunewMed+
Description:
SUNEW MED + is currently one of the fastest developing cosmetic companies in Poland. Our products have won prestigious market awards such as Beauty Market Pearls, Innovation of the Year LNE, Consumer Hit, Beauty Forum Awards. Just to name a few.
The SUNEW MED + formula is developed from carefully selected ingredients, creating a high quality product with proven effetiveness. The effect of our cosmetics is immediate. We are convinced that each and every one of us is beautiful and thanks to our cosmetics also our skin can be perfect.

SUNEW MED + jest obecnie jedną z najdynamiczniej rozwijających się firm kosmetycznych w Polsce. Od 15 lat na rynku kosmetyków profesjonalnych i od ponad 2 lat odnosimy ogromne sukcesy sprzedażowe w największych polskich i międzynarodowych sieciach aptecznych. Nasze produkty zdobywają prestiżowe nagrody rynku kosmetycznego, takie jak:  Innowacja Roku LNE, Hit Konsumenta, Perły Rynku Kosmetycznego, Beauty Forum Awards.
Marka SUNEW MED + to starannie wyselekcjonowane formuły produktów  oraz design. To także jakość, ale przede wszystkim skuteczność. Efekt działania naszych kosmetyków jest natychmiastowy. Jesteśmy przekonane, że każda z nas jest piękna, a dzięki naszym kosmetykom nasza skóra może być idealna.

Name: Madina
Description:
THE ORIGINS

The legendary Milanese Madina brand was founded in 1993 with the mission to create new ways of experiencing make-up through cutting edge products and unique innovations.

THE NEW MADINA

2014. Reiventing Madina.

Refined, unconventional, transparent.

Customer service is a fundamental value.

Name: Immer Organic

Immer Organic provides Human Centered Organic Hair treatment that improve the appearance and feel of your hair in a natural way.

Our professionals put forth their extensive study in order to develop products for the treatment of hair. Name: Whip Hand Cosmetics
Description:
Whip Hand Cosmetics celebrates the depth and diversity of today’s modern, independent woman with luxury, hand-crafted, premium professional makeup artist-quality cosmetics and face and body products made in the USA, by women for women. The company’s edgy film-noir and vintage pulp fiction-inspired marketing and advertising features both professional models and “everyday women” who exemplify the Whip Hand philosophy of confidence, strength, independence, intelligence and personal style.

Founded by professional makeup artist Riese Lauriat, Whip Hand Cosmetics grew out of Riese’s ongoing obsession with developing a line of premium-quality cosmetics for her own professional use on models, brides and her clients. 

Fascinated by the burgeoning artisan and homemade makeup industry, Riese decided to skip sourcing production of her cosmetics line to the usual large, overseas private label cosmetics manufacturers and instead develop her line using smaller, upstart producers based in the United States.  The “in-sourcing” of Whip Hand Cosmetics rewards the ingenuity and hustle of these smaller producers (most owned by women,) while allowing them to grow and create jobs and opportunity in their local economies.

Name: PT CEDEFINDO
Description: We are one of the world-leading companies in Indonesia specializing in the beauty manufacturing service. It has been a pleasure that we have served our valuable clients from many credible multinational companies to top local celebrity brands since it was built in 1981. Thanks to our experienced R&D team for formulating more than 5,000 best quality products. We truly understand your needs so as providing you flexible OEM/ ODM services for your product development. Our commitment is to bring unlimited innovation and happiness for our customers. Grow with us, we go beyond them.

Name: Trimex Pty Ltd
Description:
Founded in 1973, the Trimex/Filatex group works mainly in the personal care and para-pharmacy industries. Trimex holds the reputation as the dominant marketer, distributor and manager for the domestic, export and duty free markets for prestige cosmetics, fragrances, beauty products and fashion accessories.

With its Head Office in Sydney and fully structured offices and direct representation in each Australian state, the Trimex network spans the South Pacific region encompassing Australia, New Zealand, Fiji and various Pacific Islands.

As an importer, distributor and regional representative, Trimex employs over 600 staff nationally in marketing, administration, logistics, production, training and sales. Included in the above is a national team of consultants that covers the department stores, specialised outlets and duty free structures. This team of professionals help to drive its partner brands and businesses.

In addition, the investment of Clarins to form a joint venture with the Trimex group has added the weight of a multi-national leader to the partnership.

Trimex represents many multi-national group portfolios on a long-term basis including Clarins, Puig Group and Euroitalia. Trimex has also represented groups such as J&J and P&G for long term periods.

Name: Mineral Fusion Natural Brands
Description:
OUR STORY:
Mineral Fusion began as a mineral cosmetics brand in 2007 and has since grown to become the #1 cosmetic brand at natural retailers like Whole Foods and Sprouts. 

The brand is centered around providing clean cosmetics products that don’t compromise on the quality, reliability, exceptional wear, and confidence-boosting performance that consumers associate with conventional beauty products.

Every product is formulated with skin-nourishing botanicals that are free from harmful ingredients.

We are dedicated to making cosmetics, skin care, body care, hair care, and nail care healthy and confidence-boosting.


OUR GOAL:
Making Beauty Healthy. 

We believe beauty shouldn’t compromise our health, nor harm the environment.
What we put on our body is just as important as what we put in it. 

Mineral Fusion is the clean beauty brand for achieving the looks you want without compromising on the performance you know and love. We prove that makeup free from harmful chemicals is just as effective, confidence-boosting, and vibrant while being better for you and the planet.


OUR FORMULAS:
A beautiful look starts with healthy, radiant skin.

Our products are a fusion of beauty and skin care. All our products are formulated to deliver a better skin experience through lightweight minerals, skin-nourishing botanicals, age-defying antioxidants, rich mineral pigments, and skin-soothing formulas.  

Minerals deliver natural SPF protection, help prevent the signs of aging, and protect the skin from environmental aggressors, while skin-nourishing botanicals moisturize, brighten, and sooth.  

Our formulas focus on correcting flaws, not just covering them up.

Name: Beau Domaine
Description:
Experience the benefits of Beau Domaine's line of anti-aging products, which have been scientifically proven to be effective and are developed through the combination of expert knowledge and the passion of the individuals behind the brand.
Our formulas are crafted with care, using a minimum of 96% natural ingredients and adhering to vegan principles.
What sets us apart is our commitment to inclusivity – our cosmetics are gender-neutral, designed to cater to a diverse range of preferences and needs.
Like a fine wine, our cosmetics are the result of serious and thoughtful consideration.

Name: ARgENTUM
Description:
Founded in 2012 in London after Joy Isaacs woke from a dream with a clear vision to use the power of silver in skincare, ARgENTUM’s journey began. Our mission? To nourish your skin with exquisite potions, lotions and fragrances backed by science.

Beauty travels far below the first layer of your skin, but the surface is an excellent place to start. Created using the finest ingredients from natural origins, our skincare collection invites you to take a moment to connect with yourself ~ to fall in love with the person in the mirror and find beauty in balance. Combining our award-winning patented formula with the psychology of beauty is where the journey began, and it’s where you’ll discover ARgENTUM today after introducing our collection of alcohol-free archetype fragrances that are kind to your skin and hair.

By embracing your lives and the energies you attract, you can aspire for that beautiful centre space ~ a place where opposites align and become one. Let your intuition guide you.

Name: Yatsen Group 逸仙集团
Description:
逸仙电商成立于 2016年，是一家中国本土孵化并且高速成长的多品牌美妆公司。 我们以中国美的引领者为使命，致力于成为新科技时代的健康美丽探索者。2020年11月，逸仙电商正式在纽约证券交易所挂牌上市，并作为年轻的中国美妆上市公司继续前行。
       通过自主孵化和外延式并购，逸仙电商现拥有多个国内外优质的彩妆及护肤品牌，包括Perfect Diary 完美日记、Little Ondine 小奥汀、Pink Bear 皮可熊、Galénic 法国科兰黎、DR.WU 达尔肤（中国大陆业务）、EVE LOM 伊芙珑和EANTiM 壹安态。
       逸仙电商不断挖掘创新潜力，提升研发能力，努力打造超越消费者期待的产品，致力于为消费者探索美的旅程提供更多产品选择及更加优质和创新的美妆体验。我们在中国上海、中国广州、法国图卢兹拥有自主研发中心，同时通过”逸仙科技之路“战略布局，整合全球领先的研发资源。目前逸仙电商已和海内外多家知名机构建立深度合作， 比如中科院分子纳米结构与纳米技术重点实验室、国家纳米药物工程技术研究中心、上海瑞金医院和中山大学等。截至2024年6月底，逸仙集团在全球范围内申请专利231项，其中包含申请发明专利73项，授权发明专利61项。
       Yatsen Holding Limited (NYSE: YSG) is a leading China-based beauty group with the mission of creating an exciting new journey of beauty discovery for consumers around the world. Founded in 2016, the Company has launched and acquired numerous color cosmetics and skincare brands including Perfect Diary, Little Ondine, Pink Bear, Galénic, DR.WU (its mainland China business), Eve Lom and EANTiM. The Company’s flagship brand, Perfect Diary, is one of the leading color cosmetics brands in China in terms of retail sales value. The Company primarily reaches and engages with customers directly both online and offline, with expansive presence across all major e-commerce, social and content platforms in China.

Name: RICA
Description:
Rica is an Italian cosmetic company operating in the Haircare and Bodycare industry.

Rica was established in 1994 on the eastern coast of Sicily by Puglisi family. 
Present in more than 60 countries worldwide, Rica is now an international company competing in a vast range of markets.

Our mission is creating Natural treatments that enhance the beauty of body and mind. We embrace the vast, natural resources of Sicily and its volcano Mt. Etna, and use local Renewable elements with outstanding properties.

We manufacture Responsibly, leaving a smaller footprint on the earth by the use of environmentally-friendly manufacturing practices, and the reduction of energy use throughout our factory and offices. 

We strive to be flexible, to respond quickly to shifting market demands, and provide immediate response to customer requests while maintaining our global view.

Rica is Passion, passion for Our products, our work, our markets, our People. 
Rica’s people strive to embody that passion in all that they do. We continue doing things with our hands and with our hearts, putting care into everything we do.

Name: Sanitas Skincare
Description:
We believe good skin health is the result of more than topical products – it's a lifestyle. Our mission is to employ a strategy of progressive science, research and education to continuously strengthen the skin through topical, nutritional and holistic strategies.

We strive to lead through innovation and to maintain the highest standards for the ingredients we use in our products. We work every day to earn and maintain the loyalty and respect of our staff, our customers, our community and the world we live in through conscious environmental practices, uncompromised quality control and the highest level of customer care.

All of our products are formulated and manufactured at our facility in Boulder County, Colorado so that we can control every aspect of the quality – from the moment the product is conceived until it touches your skin.

Name: MDSolarSciences
Description:
MDSolarSciences was founded on the belief that wearing sunscreen every day is a step towards a brighter and healthier future.

So, we’ve taken clean ingredients to the next level with a safe, gentle SPF skincare collection that fits seamlessly into any daily skincare routine.

Our formulas are made with the highest quality natural ingredients and uniquely designed for all skin tones and types. The best part?  Every single one of our formulas feels truly amazing to wear: silky-smooth, ultra-luxe yet incredibly lightweight.  

Ingredients matter. All of our formulas are, and always have been, paraben-free, cruelty-free, oil-free, fragrance-free and reef-safe. None of our formulas contain any harmful chemicals such as oxybenzone or octinoxate and we follow the strictest standards set by the Environmental Working Group (EWG.)

Name: SIMONE MAHLER
Description:
La Maison SIMONE MAHLER offre un héritage riche de plus de 75 ans d’expertise cosmétique au service de la santé de la peau. Un savoir-faire français proposant des formules innovantes à l’efficacité prouvée, associées à des protocoles de soins professionnels spécifiques.

Exclusivement présente en Maisons de Beauté, la marque continue son développement avec aujourd’hui une implantation dans plus de 120 points de vente en France et dans plusieurs pays dans le monde.

Name: Amantikir Origem Natural
Description:
Amantikir, da junção amana (chuva) + tykyra (gota), tem sua origem no tupi e significa gota d’água na língua nativa que também batiza o berço de nossa empresa, a Serra da Mantiqueira (mohn-thy-kyiri, ou Serra que chora). Esse é um local de importância imensurável para os estados de Minas Gerais, São Paulo e Rio de Janeiro em virtude das riquezas naturais que essa região privilegiado nos fornece, em especial a enorme quantidade de rios que nascem e correm por este fabuloso maciço.

Da Serra da Mantiqueira, cidade de São Lourenço, Sul de Minas Gerais, a AMANTIKIR Origem Natural busca inspiração no contato com a natureza e na abundante fonte de riquezas nutritivas oferecidas por ela. Nossa satisfação é proporcionar a você – que valoriza a boa saúde e a beleza autêntica – qualidade de vida e bem estar pleno, mantendo total harmonia com o meio ambiente.

Nossos produtos são cuidadosamente produzidos com os melhores ingredientes de origem natural para sua saúde, nutrição e beleza, além de não realizarmos testes de nenhuma natureza em animais. Utilizamos como matéria prima óleos essenciais e vegetais 100% puros, insumos rastreados, orgânicos e certificados, como o mel silvestre e o Própolis Verde do Alecrim do Campo.

Atuamos com o compromisso e a visão de fomentar o desenvolvimento de pequenos produtores da região, construindo uma cadeia de Arranjo Produtivo Local pautada, acima de tudo, na responsabilidade social e ambiental. Entendemos que só assim é possível proporcionar aos nossos clientes produtos seguros e alinhados a um novo paradigma, no qual prevalece o consumo consciente e todos seus benefícios.

Name: Tecnocosmesi S.p.A.
Description:
Founded in 1979 - TECNOCOSMESI is the world leading manufacturer of exclusive and high-end COLOR COSMETICS and SKIN CARE PRODUCTS. 
 R&D laboratories, Strategic & Creative Marketing and Customer Service work together to satisfy every kind of demand in terms of new TRENDS and FORMULATIONS coming from the GLOBAL cosmetic market. 
 The PRODUCTION NETWORK enables us to manage flexibly our production capability using mainly baked, atomization and extrusion technologies, in order to satisfy whatever demand in terms of product quality and quantity. 
Tecnocosmesi has been found compliant with the GMP Requirements of ISO 22716 - VERSION 2007.
Our SUSTAINABLE growth concerns with EQUIPMENTS AND TECHNOLOGIES, continuous investments in RESEARCH and certifications - such as the FDA - using energy coming mostly from RENEWABLE SOURCES: further efforts towards whole environmental sustainability have brought Tecnocosmesi to achieve – in 2016 – the ISO 14001 CERTIFICATION.

As part of its corporate social responsibility policy Tecnocosmesi is fully committed and actively involved in promoting and pursuing an environmental friendly approach, consisting of both a correct and responsible usage of resources and a sustainable waste management. Each element of the production cycle is assessed according to its impact, in order to develop make-up products responsibly and consciously while being environmental friendly and respectful. 

http://www.tecnocosmesi.com/

Name: COCOSOLIS
Description:
Over many years, we gained experience in a wide range of areas, including art, design, photography, marketing, management and law. We learned to appreciate the professionalism in our lives, but we never stopped having fun.

Our passion brought us together and motivated us to seek love and truth. Our attitude to the surrounding world started to change, as did our way of thinking, and even our way of eating.

One morning, with the rising sun, we realized we were ready to create COCOSOLIS, driven by the wish to create something new and different, healthy and beautiful, evoking excitement and emotion, with uncompromising quality and purity, yet with a responsibility to people and nature. We make our products in the same way we would for ourselves and our loved ones.

Our products

We believe we should develop only genuinely healthy, organic and completely natural products. We choose to live in truth and love and to share this with the world, to provide a positive experience for everybody.

We have succeeded in creating a natural product, with care and attention to every single detail. We double-check the natural origins of each ingredient; all our raw and essential oils are certified organic and are sourced from internationally approved companies.

…Just days after starting, we succeeded to make many of our clients happy and realised that each one of them had become a special friend of ours. Well, be careful what you wish for, because sometimes your wish becomes your reality! The road ahead is exciting, but it also brings responsibilities.

Never forget to do the best you are capable of for everyone! We strive for continuous improvement, seeking what is good and healthy for nature, for people and for all creatures.

It has been a long journey, but also an exciting and stimulating one, which we have willingly taken together, at each other’s side, and which we now hope to share with you.
