Name: Manetain Store
Description:
Manetain was founded in 2018 with a mission to make high-quality, CG-approved haircare products and accessories. What started with just heat caps and satin/silk haircare accessories, over the next few years, grew into a one-stop haircare shop with the launch of India’s trio cleanser system and a multipurpose conditioner.

2023 saw the maximum growth as the brand started the year with an appearance on Shark Tank India and ended it with the launch of 4 new stylers and 2 deep treatment masks, truly embodying the spirit of providing anything and everything you might need on your journey to embracing your curly, wavy, and naturally gorgeous hair. 

Born out of the curly community, in the last 5 years Manetain has garnered the love and support of more than 2 lakh+ curlies and wavies across India and the world, while staying true to its core ethos of helping people embrace and “maintain” their natural hair and as an extension of that celebrate the beauty of authenticity and uniqueness. In August 2024, Manetain reinvented itself to better reflect its journey and better tell its story: that of a brand that was ready to claim its space as a premium, affordable luxury haircare brand.

Manetain is redefining the haircare space with innovative products and strong customer traction. As we continue to expand, we are currently raising seed capital to fuel growth, innovation, and market expansion.

Name: Ozone Ayurvedics - India
Description: Ozone Ayurvedics is a Consumer Healthcare organization with expertise in Skincare. This company was established in the year 2000 with well-planned diversification into Herbal and Ayurvedics products and a vision to make use of the holistic approach of the ancient science of Ayurveda. Ozone Ayurvedics is an Ayurvedic Pharmaceutical Company operating under the aegis of Ozone Group of Companies. The company has played a major role in reviving and popularizing Ayurvedic medicine in India. Ozone Group has manufacturing plants in Bahadurgarh, Haryana, Baddi, Himachal Pradesh and Guwahati, Assam. The company has introduced modern methods of standardization and quality control of herbal preparations. The Ozone Ayurvedics Research Laboratories at Bahadurgarh, Haryana conducts pharmacological studies on herbs with the help of the modern research tools, old formulations are revived and made more potent and new drugs are researched. With a score of OTC and Herbal Medicinal products, Ozone Ayurveda has grown into an institution devoted to provide health to all through innovation and development of Ayurvedic Principles of Medicine. One of the strong players in FMCG industry, Ozone Auurvedics’ has created the Age-related Skin Care category in the country and has establish a prime niche for itself, and despite the entry of new players in the field, it continues to be a very strong player in this category. Every stage of production of Ozone Ayurvedics’ products is characterized by an uncompromising adherence to stringent quality control measures- right from the selection of raw materials down to the finished products. A key quality measure lies in the Company’s in-house Organic Herbal Farm. Ozone Ayurvedics’ Organic Actives enriched products line includes Moisturizing Creams, Face Washes, Face Scrubs, Serums, Face Masks, Face Packs, Sun-Screens and Soaps. An Ozone Ayurvedics’ product was awarded distinction of being the Most Trusted among the Top 10 Skin Care Brands!

Fake Bake At Home is a unique and well established scheme that allows clients and their guests to have a Fake Bake tan in the comfort of their own homes. 

At Fake Bake we believe in being inventive and pro-active to meet the needs of our customers, and we are committed to producing a range which is paraben-free. We continue to garner positive coverage reviews in the beauty press for our self-tanning and skincare porducts.

Name: Olival Cosmetics
Description:
From home manufacture more than 30 years ago to modern production facility we have today, Olival managed to stay one of the most recognizable Croatian natural cosmetics company, and the first one with NATRUE certificate in the region. All of our products, more than 190 of them, are made with knowledge, expertise and experience, according to EU regulations, following traditional recipes and new market trends. Our products are available on 30+ markets and e-commerce platforms like Notino and www.olival.hr 

In 1994 the founder of Olival, mr. pharm. Vlasta Pojatina started a small galenic production on the ground floor of the family house. Guided by traditional pharmaceutical formulations and inspired by the richness of natural ingredients, she started making original cosmetic products.

Today, we produce our cosmetics guided by the same passion and love. Product concepts, formulation process and production of Olival cosmetics take place in Croatia, in our modern production facility in the western part of Zagreb.

Over the course of 30 years, we have always strived to give back a portion of our profits to the community. Among other initiatives, we launched the Foundation "Your Knowledge = Our Future," through which we provided scholarships to support the education of young pharmaceutical and chemical technicians. We also turned our attention to one of the most "invisible" groups in society—homeless people—by ensuring regular hygiene over two years. In 2024, together with our partners dm drogerie markt Croatia and BIPA Croatia, we launched the FOREVER YOUNG Tour across neighborhoods in the capital of Croatia, organizing free consultations with a dermatologist and a nutritionist, along with socializing with our team. We also organized the first "pop-up counseling center" for rosacea in Croatia,where we provided dermatological exams, nutrition and mental health checkups and skincare routines.

Name: Diamond Cosmetics
Description:
At Diamond Cosmetics, we believe that every nail deserves to shine. For over two decades, we've been dedicated to supplying large chain domestic and global stores with premium quality nail implements that elevate your nail care routine to new heights. 

Our journey began with a passion for beauty and a commitment to innovation. Since inception, we've continuously strived to bring you the latest advancements in nail care technology, ensuring that our products deliver unparalleled performance and durability. 

Whether you're a professional nail technician or a DIY enthusiast, our extensive range of files and tools cater to all your needs. From classic emery boards to professional grade nail clippers, each product is meticulously crafted to deliver flawless results every time. 

At Diamond Cosmetics, we stay ahead of the curve by embracing new trends. Our skilled in-house graphic design team can seamlessly integrate your logo and brand onto any of our products. We take pride in our attention to detail, ensuring that every nail abrasive and tool we offer is crafted with precision and care.

Name: Nain Lab
Description:
NAIN LAB is a young and dynamic laboratory for stability testing and innovative formulation development centre for cosmetics and personal care products. 

NAIN LAB provides one stop solution for your stability testing and consultancy in cosmetics and personal care industry. We provide customized solutions for product development, improvement and implementation of our formulation at your site. 

NAIN LAB is focusing exclusively in high quality and cost-effective Stability testing methodology yet compliance with national and international standards.  Today the Industry is moving at a tremendous pace and every now and then we have new products hitting the market, but still our belief is on the saying that we study in our childhood that “slow and steady win the race”. Stability testing is a slow pace testing process and yet one of the most important step for launching the product with 100% confidence. We at NAIN LAB with proper understanding of raw materials and ample experience in formulation can understand and guide you with accurate testing methodology of your end product thereby decreasing testing time and helping you stay well ahead of your schedule. 

With involvement of skilled and experienced people working in the organization we are able to crack and develop formulation to once need. Our state of art laboratory with latest equipment can assist your company in reformulating existing on-market product. 
Training: To make students job-ready, NAIN LAB conducts workshops on different types of formulation making students confidence and well adapted to the industry from day one. The students will learn in-depth about the industry right from the categories of raw materials used, practical formulation of different types of products.

emi Products:

emi delivers a complete collection of products to ensure that your salon can satisfy the different tastes of your customers.

Name: DermaFocus UK
Description:
Regenerative aesthetics is what we’re all about here at DermaFocus. Known as ‘The Home of Polynucleotides HPT’, we exclusively distribute and train medical professionals to use a range of products designed to transform skin from within.

These include the Plinest range, winner of the 'Best New Product' in the UK at the Aesthetics Awards 2024, as well as the UK’s first polynucleotide and hyaluronic acid combination product, Newest. We run regular training days for each of the products, led by renowned aesthetic practitioners, who will ensure you are equipped with all the skills and knowledge you need to offer the most effective polynucleotide treatments to your patients. 

Purasomes is the latest innovation in our portfolio, combining 20 billion exosomes in their purest form, along with 20 of the most potent growth factors, to help reset cellular activity, regenerating aged or damaged cells, to significantly boost the quality of skin and hair.

All of our products are rigorously tested and backed up by scientific evidence, so you can trust that they will support you in delivering the best solutions to your patients. 

DermaFocus is passionate about enhancing the quality of aesthetic education in the UK, so you can also expect the very best training on all of our courses.

At PBS we don’t just have accounts, we have world-class brands and partners in business.

Our VISION: To enrich lives through the power of skin health

Vanitas Inc, established in 1988, is an industry leader in contract manufacturing of uniquely formulated hair, skin, and body care products. With over three decades of experience, we specialize in custom formulation and production of personal care items, offering solutions for both small and large-scale manufacturing needs.

Our filling capabilities, across over 20 production lines, include bottles, jars, airless, and tubes. Additionally, Vanitas offers hot pour and alcohol-based fragrance-filling capabilities.

Name: Vice Reversa
Description:
The first anti-aging MicroMask brand. Our revolutionary at-home treatments fill the gap between traditional skincare and invasive salon treatments – with zero recovery time.

Each MicroMask is covered with dissolvable MicroCrystal tips which easily bypass the top layer of dead skin cells and deliver rejuvenating skincare actives exactly where needed – deeper than anything else on the market. Once applied, the MicroCrystals dissolve in around 2 hours – ensuring the entire dose of serum reaches exactly where it is needed to have the biggest impact on skin renewal and rejuvenation. Easy to use and painless with visible results improve over time.

Description:

Name: Tropical Naturals Limited
Description:
Heritage/History
Black soap, which translates to ‘Oṣe Dudu’ in Yoruba (the predominant language in Western Nigeria), is an age-old, handmade traditional soap which consists of pure natural ingredients and herbs from the tropical rain forest and savannah regions.

Camwood (baphia nitida), which translates to ‘Igi Osun’ in Yoruba, is a tropical hardwood rich in saponnins, polyphenols terpenes and more. It has been used for exfoliation for centuries by West Africans; primarily for sensitive baby skin.

A combination of these two names forms Dudu-Osun; our flagship soap brand which was established in 1995 under Cosmos Chemicals Limited (now Tropical Naturals Limited) Nigeria.

The evolution of Tropical Naturals occurred organically over a twenty-year period. Starting out with a manually-operated small-scale plant in 1995, the firm’s flagship brand, Dudu-Osun, has grown to receive global recognition with sales in over fifty countries.

Name: Florida Chapter of the Society of Cosmetic Chemists (FLSCC)

Name: IONIQ Skincare
Description:
Introducing IONIQ Skincare: combining spray art with cosmetics for effortless skintech.
At IONIQ Skincare, we're rewriting the skincare narrative, using sophisticated magnetic spraying technology that intertwines the realms of spray art and cosmetics to redefine how you care for your skin. Founded as a corporate start-up within the WAGNER Group, a leader in surface coating, we've harnessed advanced German spraying technologies to pioneer a system of "Magnetic Attraction". 
By uniting the magnetic technological aspect with the emotion of attraction, our intelligent technology simplifies and improves the application of skincare through a truly touchless breakthrough. This synergy of innovation and sentiment creates a transformative experience, where skincare becomes not just a routine, but a symphony of elegance and efficacy.

Our technology, rooted in the attraction between skin and fluid, isn't just science; it's poetry. The liquid is ionized within the sprayer, before being drawn through Magnetic Attraction to the oppositely polarized skin. This attraction is so strong, the droplets engage in a wrap-around effect, spreading evenly for complete and fool-proof coverage.
The mission now? To transform the skincare market by sharing our developments with the world. As the only brand that uses magnetic spraying technology to apply skincare, we want IONIQ Skincare to find a place in every bathroom. Our goal isn't just skin-deep; we're here to replace conventional aerosols with a sustainable spray and cosmetics innovation. 
Today, a dedicated team of creators, lateral thinkers, and storytellers, are on a mission to combat sunburn and nurture your skin. We've cultivated a mindset that craves innovation and champions action. We're not just about intentions; we're about delivering on them.

MI-RÊ "bel avenir" en coréen est née en 2015 d'un coup de foudre entre deux femmes travaillant dans le secteur de la cosmétique depuis toujours. 

Originaires de deux continents différents où la beauté a des ressources et des rituels différents, Elizabeth Trémosa, parisienne d’adoption, rencontre Miseong Kim, coréenne, et trouve en elle une sœur d’âme, tant sur le plan professionnel que personnel. 

Immédiatement elles décident de s’associer, et font le constat qu’en mettant leurs aspirations et leurs connaissances en commun, elles peuvent donner naissances à des produits de beauté hybride : du maquillage soin. 

CURE MAKE UP : 100% MAKEUP 100% SOIN

Leur souhait étant de simplifier les gestes de beauté du quotidien, et de concevoir ainsi une marque sur mesure pour les working women, véritables héroïnes des temps modernes.

Elizabeth et Miseong offrent ainsi aux femmes de tous horizons, des produits hybrides à la technologie de pointe et simples d’utilisation. Elles n’hésitent pas à créer des nouveaux gestes de beauté avec des produits malins pensés pour faciliter l’existence tout en optimisant l’efficacité. 

Les deux créatrices développent la marque en Corée pour bénéficier des techniques les plus pointues mariant ainsi cette efficacité aux codes de beauté à l’européenne et en particulier parisienne.

« Et si la perfection avait un nom… »

Name: Spa Deia e Renata
Description:
O SPA Deia e Renata

Para o spa Deia e Renata cada mulher tem um cabelo, um momento e consequentemente um tratamento específico para ela. Nossa marca é sustentada em seis principais pilares: cuidado é ter atenção especial tanto com os aspectos emocionais quanto na saúde dos cabelos de nossas clientes; a nossa história e a história do nosso tratamento é antiga e de sucesso, passada de mãe para filha; nossa marca é a inovação e incorporamos isso em nossa forma de agir, comunicar e se relacionar; acreditamos que somente a continuidade gera resultados expressivos e que nosso tratamento é único, exclusivo e por isso personalizado para cada pessoa.

O segredo para nós é entender que cada mulher é tão única e especial quanto o céu que as envolve. E que como o céu, podem ser diferentes e ter distintas necessidades a cada dia – e até mesmo no passar dele, em suas mudanças de temperamento e luminosidade. Olhar para o céu com atenção e carinho é capaz de relevar suas nuances e diferenças, e nenhum céu é igual a outro. É com essa atenção e com esse mesmo olhar que devemos marcar cada pessoa que passa pelo nosso salão.

Description:

www.uniqapeacosmetics.it

Name: DÉCAAR
Description:
DÉCAAR is a vibrant cosmeceutical brand that counts and draws on the vast experience of some of the most renowned benchmark cosmeceutical formulators and business development professionals in the industry. We all share one common belief: the foundation of beauty is found in healthy skin. 

We are focused on challenging the status quo of the cosmetic skincare market and leading by example. We are committed to creating and delivering innovative, unique, safe and highly effective skincare products and treatments, all with dermatologically proven results, that target the most specific skin types and concerns of our clients.

Name: BIOTECNIK S.A.S. / L´AVANTE PARIS
Description:
Biotecnik S.A.S es una compañía de consumo masivo enfocada en cuidado personal, cosméticos, maquillaje y medicamentos OTC. Gracias a nuestra pasión en estos sectores y nuestro compromiso en el desarrollo de marcas al alcance de la mayoría de la población del país.

Biotecnik ha logrado crear un portafolio de marcas que actualmente transcienden en el mercado colombiano con un excelente posicionamiento.

En cuidado personal, cosméticos y maquillaje contamos con nuestra marca L'AVANTE PARIS, marca líder en el segmento dermocosmético ofreciendo productos de alta calidad desarrollados con las últimas innovaciones del mundo y con la asistencia de Laboratorios Sederma (Paris, Francia).

Name: Oxygen Botanicals
Description: Oxygen is a key ingredient for life, the most abundant element on Earth, where we derive our energy from, and the basis for achieving beautiful, healthy-looking skin - both inside and out. It's critical to all normal functions of the body's tissues - including, but not limited to, the appearance of the skin. As we age, the amount of oxygen stored in our skin tissues diminishes. As a result, we use oxygen in all our products as a delivery method at Oxygen Botanicals, coupled with botanical extracts and complexes that have been scientifically proven to leave the skin feeling healthy and looking beautiful. Replenishing oxygen lost over time helps reverse the signs of aging and helps to maintain and regain the natural beauty of our skin.

Name: Dermophisiologique S.r.l. Società Benefit
Description:
E’ un’azienda italiana, da oltre 40 anni specializzata nella ricerca dermatologica e scientifica per la creazione di prodotti cosmetici e metodologie di trattamento professionali legate alla fisiologia cutanea. Dal 2015 l'azienda è certificata B Corp e nel 2016 ha confermato il proprio impegno etico, ambientale e sociale anche attraverso la trasformazione dello statuto giuridico in Società Benefit. Dal 2000 le formule dei prodotti Dermophisiologique sono prive di oli minerali, derivati del petrolio, coloranti di sintesi, parabeni aggiunti e alcool. Tutti i prodotti a risciacquo hanno formule certificate biodegradabili secondo norma OECD301F e per i packaging vengono scelti materiali riciclabili oltre a imballi 0% plastica in carta FSC completamente riciclata e stampe con colori a base di acqua.
Dove acquistare? Nei Centri Estetici e su https://shop.dermophisiologique.it

Name: Face Halo
Description:
Face Halo is the game-changing makeup remover that works using water only!
 
Non-toxic and reusable, each Face Halo replaces up to 500 single-use makeup wipes. Simply wet the Face Halo and gently wipe to remove makeup, skincare or face masks, or use alone to cleanse the skin. 

Face Halo’s revolutionary HaloTech fibres reach deep into pores to trap and remove makeup for a deep clean and gentle exfoliation. 100 times finer than human hair, the HaloTech fibres hold onto makeup and impurities to ensure nothing goes back onto the skin. It is the perfect tool for even the most sensitive skin types.
 
 
Face Halo has fast become the go-to makeup remover in the makeup kits of celebrities, bloggers and professional makeup artists alike, with fans such as Naomi Watts and Chloe Morello.
 
The award-winning Face Halo collection has grown to include Face Halo Original, Face Halo PRO, Face Halo BODY and a range of Accessories.
 
With a mission to change the way the world removes makeup, Face Halo leads the way in sustainable beauty. Face Halo is committed to providing innovative solutions that are better for your skin and kinder to the environment. Face Halo is proudly PETA vegan and cruelty-free certified.

D’Arcy’s consortium of industry-leading chemists strive to attain perfection in formulation and product efficacy. A passion for the finest ingredients sourced throughout the globe, handcraftsmanship, and state of the art technology guarantee that the D’Arcy develops the finest cosmeceuticals and over-the-counter drugs available.

Name: Physio Natura brand by PDT Laboratori Cosmetici
Description:
Physio Natura è un brand creato dalla PDT Cosmetici, azienda produttrice di cosmetici propri e conto terzi. 

I prodotti PHYSIO Natura, nati dalla grande passione per la cosmetica naturale, rappresentano una giusta fusione di principi attivi di origine naturale con preziosi ingredienti, che donano alla pelle bellezza e splendore.

Tutte le fasi di produzione avvengono all’interno di PDT Cosmetici, proprietaria del brand PHYSIO Natura, garantendo così il massimo risultato in termini economici e di tempo. 

L’azienda investe nella ricerca di materie prime di alto livello, nella praticità di utilizzo e nella eco-sostenibilità delle confezioni ( il confezionamento in tubi permette un risparmio del 70% di plastica), per offrire il miglior rapporto qualità / prezzo. 

PHYSIO Natura significa seguire ancora metodologie di lavoro semplici, trasversali e dai risultati tangibili, nel pieno rispetto dell’equilibrio e dell’armonia della pelle avendo a disposizione una linea viso e corpo completa di relativi protocolli di trattamento.

Name: LUXURY PARTNER GROUP
Description: Luxury Partner Group,  regroupe plusieurs sociétés spécialisées dans le conseil, le recrutement, la formation et la mise à disposition de conseillères ambassadrices  pour les marques de luxe en prestation de service ou en intérim. L'expérience acquise pendant près de 20 ans dans le développement de marques de parfumerie, nous a permis d'appréhender les besoins du marché du luxe qui est en forte mutation.  Notre objectif est d'imposer l'excellence dans toutes les missions qui nous sont confiées lors de nos interventions en points de vente. La satisfaction du consommateur,  reste la première priorité pour Luxury Partner Group. Néanmoins, nous souhaitons élever le niveau de service global en apportant des solutions et des outils efficaces, rentables et pérennes aux grandes marques qui nous font l’honneur de leur confiance.

Name: Apnée Paris
Description:
Apnée est la première marque française spécialiste du collagène à boire.
Synthétisé naturellement par le corps humain, le collagène est LA protéine responsable de la fermeté et de la structure de notre peau. Mais à partir de 30 ans environ, notre taux de collagène diminue, phénomène qui s’accélère avec le temps. Résultat ? La peau s’affine, perd en élasticité et les rides s’installent. Les cheveux perdent en vitalité.
La science nous a démontré qu’une supplémentation quotidienne en collagène et autres actifs stars permettait non seulement de compenser cette perte naturelle mais également de booster notre production naturelle de collagène. 
Apnée s’est ainsi inspiré de la science pour créer des formules à déguster, savamment élaborées dans notre laboratoire du sud de la France, qui combinent la fine fleur des actifs naturels anti-âge pour une peau repulpée qui retrouve fermeté et éclat.

Name: NicoleP Cosmetics
Description:
Nicole P Cosmetics è un'azienda di cosmetici all'avanguardia fondata nel 2020 dall'influencer padovana Nicole Pallado. Il marchio si distingue per l'innovazione nel mondo della bellezza, l'attenzione ai dettagli e alla qualità, e l'impegno a promuovere la forza femminile in tutte le sue forme.
Il motto è "Pussy Power"! Nicole P Cosmetics crede fermamente che tutte le donne siano forti e potenti, e che debbano sentirsi libere di esprimere la propria bellezza e personalità in modo autentico. Per questo, nel 2020 ha lanciato il suo primo prodotto, l’iconico mascara PUS*Y POWER. 
La linea di rossetti "After Sex" celebra l'unicità di tutte le donne, ispirandosi alle donne iconiche da cui i rossetti prendono i loro nomi.
Tutti i prodotti sono realizzati con ingredienti di alta qualità e sono progettati per valorizzare la bellezza di ogni donna.
Unisciti a Nicole P Cosmetics in questa avventura dedicata alla bellezza e all'empowerment femminile. Segui il brand su LinkedIn per rimanere aggiornato sulle ultime tendenze, prodotti e iniziative speciali.
Sii audace, sii te stessa, sii Nicole P!

Name: Unavida Cosmetics
Description:
Unavida es una marca de filosofía #slowbeauty

Desde nuestro laboratorio propio creamos cosmética que combina el bienestar de la piel, la mente y el cuerpo. Tenemos un espíritu indie, soñador, creativo; pero también, una mente científica. Nos encanta la evidencia, la innovación, el conocimiento de la piel y los mecanismos bioquímicos. Cuando se combinan estas dos cualidades, resulta algo diferenciador: que se aplica todo el conocimiento, el esfuerzo y la tecnología en intentar alcanzar el bienestar, el equilibrio, el mindfulness… y en definitiva, en disfrutar de la vida. 

Somos una startup española nacida en 2021. Apostamos por la formación, la atención personalizada y sobre todo mostramos una trasparencia y honestidad radical en todo lo que hacemos. 

Formulamos nuestros productos busando un equilibrio entre el mayor porcentaje de ingredientes de origen natural posibles, innovación, eficacia, sostenibilidad y sensorialidad. Además, nuestros envases y embalajes son reciclados, reciclables y compostables, contribuyendo así al cuidado del planeta. Igualmente, sabemos que somos parte de una sociedad a la que queremos cuidar y apoyar. Por ello, apoyamos el trabajo de artesanos y personas con discapacidad colaborando con ellos de forma activa.

¿Quieres conocernos mejor? Puedes visitarnos en nuestro laboratorio ubicado en el Parque Tecnológico Qube de Tres Cantos (Madrid), en nuestro centro logístico en Zaratán (Valladolid) o en unavidacosmetics.com
 
Cuídate, sólo tenemos unavida. 

#cosmética #slowbeauty #unavidacosmetics

Name: PhiAcademy GmbH
Description:
Branko Babic is widely known as the Beauty Innovator and the Brow and Skin care Expert. Over the years he has achieved iconic status in the beauty industry for his unique way of shaping the eyebrows. Branko founded company PhiAcademy d.o.o. in 2011 and has developed his own specific technique of shaping eyebrows and named them PhiBrows. 
PhiAcademy creates beauty through golden proportions (Phi 1.618). We see the perfection in golden proportion between two extremes. With respect to modern lifestyle, our studies are designed in such a way to save precious time and provide maximum surveillance and maximum available information at the same time. We know that you can learn everything if the material is divided into small portions that are taught separately.
Since 2014 PhiAcademy has evolved ultimate beauty skills, like Permanent make up, lashes extensions named PhiLashes and other like PhiContour, PhiHair, PhiLings, PhiRemoval, PhiNesse, PhiScalp. (see our website)
Since 2016 PhiAcademy organizes once a year three-day event in Belgrade, called Master Class. Masterclass is one of the leading international events in the beauty industry and the main professional platform for all innovations in the industry. It gathers thousands of visitors from all around the world, including beauty professionals, new aspiring artists, and beauty enthusiasts.

Name: AQUA Laboratorio Cosmético
Description:
Combinando la admiración y el amor por la belleza y la naturaleza, nace la compañía de investigación, formulación y fabricación de productos cosméticos y cuidado personal,  LABORATORIO  AQUA.

Cada ingrediente que incluimos en nuestras formulas tiene como meta básica renovar el ser  interior y elevar su espíritu, a través de la transformación de los elementos con la creación de nuestros productos. LABORATORIO AQUA presenta un amplio portafolio de productos  para las personas y las empresas que aprecian la alta calidad.

Ofrecemos a todos nuestros clientes la alternativa de desarrollar nuevos productos y/o homologar los existentes bajo un modelo colaborativo de Maquila, asignación de macas exclusivas y/o comercialización de nuestras marcas propias.

Nuestro equipo de trabajo cuenta con amplia trayectoria en el sector	cosmético,	años de experiencia que	nos permiten asegurar la calidad en los	proyectos que  emprendemos.

Cuidamos cada detalle de nuestra cadena de suministro, desde la selección de nuestros proveedores y materias  primas buscando calidad en producto y competitividad en  costo, hasta la entrega final a nuestros clientes.

Contamos con instalaciones que nos permiten ofrecer a nuestros clientes alta competitividad, eficiencia y calidad. Le apostamos a la inversión y a la constante renovación tecnológica.

Name: Farmagan
Description:
Since the foundation of the company in 1935 and its consolidation in the market with Bulbocapillina, Farmagan has always wanted to specifically study the health and the beauty of hair and scalp.
Developed in the modern research & development laboratories of Farmagan, all our products are dermatologically and microbiologically tested, with results that confirm their performance and tolerability.
The use in the production processo of cutting-edge machinery and technology guarantees quality and safety, according to the most updated international regulations.
Our Values
The People: Since always the priority of the company is the people that build it up and that are merited to transmit its values and create a strong bond with its main interlocutors. A serious and efficient working environment inside the company has allowed Farmagan during the years to overcome continuous challenges, also in international markets.

The Quality: It’s the result of the creative and formulative effort of our cutting-edge Research Laboratories, and it represents the distinction and the pride of Farmagan.

The Research: An avant- garde Research Laboratory, formed by a team of pure researchers in charge of the product formulation and the quality control, collaborating with the most important universities of the world.

The Production: A direct supervision of the whole production chain: Farmagan controls, manages and guarantees the quality of its own products, from the research of each single raw material used to the final packaging of the product ready for its commercialisation on the market.

Name: Voduz

Name: The Cosmetic Chemist LLC
Description: The Cosmetic Chemist is a dynamic online resource dedicated to providing current and historical topics of interest to personal care scientists in both industrial and academic forums. The material published by The Cosmetic Chemist is contributed by highly recognized scientists, and is of interest to a wide audience, ranging from those working in dermatological research to formulators of finished products. Much of the content also draws from research in areas such as materials and colloid science, as well as optics, demonstrating the application of work in these areas to challenges facing the cosmetic chemist. The Cosmetic Chemist strives to be a central resource in cosmetic chemistry, publishing innovative articles and multimedia resources in an accurate and concise manner that is entertaining to our readers. The Cosmetic Chemist also aspires to instill social awareness about cosmetic science and technology.

Name: Wakeup Cosmetics Milano
Description:
Wakeup Cosmetics Milano è un beauty brand nato a Milano da un’ispirazione artistica: dare la possibilità a tutte le donne di portare alla luce la loro unicità e bellezza attraverso l’uso di prodotti cosmetici esteticamente belli ma anche funzionali. 
Da questa visione è nata la linea di make-up, skincare e accessori Wakeup Cosmetics Milano, prodotti di qualità eccellente, realizzati in Italia e concepiti per rappresentare al meglio la personalità del brand: energia, vitalità, luce, purezza e colore. 
L’idea che ogni volto possa diventare un capolavoro grazie a una concezione innovativa del make-up è il leit motiv che accompagna qualsiasi creazione del brand. Wakeup Cosmetics Milano non è solo un nuovo marchio di cosmetici, ma rappresenta anche una nuova filosofia di make-up: esaltare la bellezza di ogni persona attraverso un’esperienza unica, accessibile e curata nei minimi dettagli. 
I punti vendita Wakeup Cosmetics Milano sono uno dei risultati di questa Mission: un’atmosfera sofisticata e sorprendente in uno spazio avvolgente, dove gli ospiti possono sentirsi a loro agio, grazie anche a Beauty Advisor preparati e sempre pronti a offrire consigli e suggerimenti personalizzati. 
Il brand vanta oggi due flagship store in Italia, entrambi a Milano, nelle centralissime Via Torino e Corso Buenos Aires e uno shop online. Inoltre, attraverso partnership con importanti catene retail del canale selettivo, i prodotti Wakeup Cosmetics sono disponibili in decine di punti vendita in Italia e Spagna.
La gamma Wakeup Cosmetics Milano è ampia e varia: una palette di prodotti e di texture a un prezzo competitivo, al fine di coniugare qualità e accessibilità. 
Wakeup Cosmetics Milano si rivolge alle donne di tutte le età e stili di vita: eleganti, curiose, ma anche audaci e dinamiche, che hanno voglia di sperimentare e sperimentarsi in assoluta libertà.

Name: Grupo SHT de Cosméticos
Description:
Somos uma empresa de terceirização de cosméticos em geral formada por uma equipe com Know-How de mais de 25 anos na área, oferecendo soluções com o mais elevado nível de qualidade para os segmentos capilares, faciais, corporais, higiene pessoal, entre outros projetos desenvolvidos sob medida de maneira ágil e eficiente.

Com uma visão inovadora e sustentável, estamos sempre nos aprofundando em pesquisas e relacionamentos com nossos fornecedores, buscando soluções onde podemos oferecer produtos diferenciados de maneira consciente e com redução de impactos ambientais.

Contamos com equipamentos de alta tecnologia para atender pequenas e médias empresas do ramo! Com um rigoroso controle de qualidade em todas as etapas do processo, analisamos de perto todo o processo de fabricação de cada produto, desde matéria-prima, embalagens até o produto finalizado.

Aqui no Grupo SHT de Cosméticos oferecemos um suporte completo durante todo o processo de regulamentação junto à ANVISA, garantindo aos nossos clientes produtos de alta qualidade e eficácia comprovada.

Name: Organic to Green, Inc.
Description:
OUR STORY

Organic to Green, is an award-winning luxury, artisan beauty and lifestyle company founded in Los Angeles, CA, specifically in Santa Monica in 2009 when we launched our first artisan collection into L.A.'s beloved retailer, Fred Segal.

Organic To Green was created because this concept did not yet exist, beauty products mindful of body and planet. This was a passionate advocacy for better beauty products, created over ten years ago by founder, Rianna Loving, before safer ingredients, greener packaging, and indie brands became mainstream.

Our beauty products now bridge into lifestyle with our private wellness spas in Los Angeles and coming soon to NY and Italy.

Organic to Green's original collection of handcrafted organic formulas were packaged in donated wine and beer bottles through our very own community based program, ReUseGlassBottles. Our trademark ReUseCycle helps us spread awareness of conscious packaging and inspire others to do the same in their communities.

Artisanal, organic products handcrafted with conscientious ingredients and conscientious packaging, (back then we used only glass bottles that were donated, sanitized and sterilized for reuse). 

Today, and over decade in this industry, we are still advocates and now look at the bigger picture and its broader impact. 

We strive to evolve as a healthy brand as the tools we use evolve in our industry - from stability in our ingredients (from health, ecological and ethical).

Name: Dadvance Agarwood Solutions Sdn. Bhd.
Description:
Dadvance Agarwood Solutions is one of the leaders in Malaysia’s agarwood biotech field specializing in the agarwood resin development and formation, exporting finest agarwood raw materials from Grade A+ agarwood oil, agarwood chip, powder, and hydrosol liquid. Our products went through a strict selection process according to international fragrance and flavor industry standards backed up by consistent investment in quality improvement and laboratory reports. 

Our Vision is to become one of the agarwood global players that incorporates full Agriculture 4.0 that promotes a sustainable cultivated agarwood ecosystem and to provide continuous and exceptional services and products to our customers while maintaining a steady output of agarwood raw materials. 

Our agarwood oil is highly favored by perfume and flavorist companies due to its high compound of sesquiterpenes and sesquiterpenoids – the two main major compounds to make up the smell of woody smell in agarwood. Our agarwood oil maintains both compounds reading in the range of 85% - 95% to make it Grade A+ agarwood oil while ensuring it is FREE from phthalates contaminations. 

Sustainability and Quality Assurance! 

 Our range of agarwood products: 
  Premium Agarwood oil 
  Agarwood powder 
  Agarwood hydrosol 
  Agarwood chips

visit our website and DM us for to become our partner.

Name: Cosmetics 27
Description:

As a pharmacist, Michèle Evrard grew a passion for formulation, pharmacology and toxicology. All three are key domains in making a good, sage and effective remedy. Her expertise in formulation technology provide highly potent formulas that are « bio-mimetical », in total affinity with the skin structure, and combine the best active ingredients to unique product sensoriality and experience.

The comprehensive face care line is powered by Centella Asiatica, the longevity signature ingredient and an ancestral ayurvedic medicine plant. 
The Baume 27 bio-stimulating intensive repair balm, is the brand founding and cult product, an originally patented formula, for its skin repairing and regenerating properties steeming from the proprietary Cica MA2tm Complex. 

Discover more at www.cosmetics27.com

Name: gülsha
Description:
gülsha’s story starts with Rosa Damascena, the precious type of rose which was widely used several decades for beauty and wellness.
 
As one of the oldest leading rose oil producers in Türkiye, gülsha has been providing rose oil and rose absolute to top cosmetic companies in France since 1965. gülsha skincare is a combination of this experience with French skincare expert’s knowledge; a natural, effective and pleasant skincare regimen containing Turkish Rosa Damascena rose oil and rosewater to enhance wellbeing and timeless beauty. gülsha embodies the farm to face concept with full control over crop, harvest, distillation and production for complete traceability. gülsha’s 3 step skincare series consists of 15 products that are between 95% natural origin to 100% natural. All gülsha products are clinically tested by foreign authorized third party laboratories that enable compliance with EU/USA/China regulations.
In Türkiye, gülsha is sold in the more than 350 selective pharmacies, all Sephora stores, department stores such as Beymen, all airport duty free stores and used - sold in 5 star spa hotels namely Fairmont Hotel, Raffles Hotel and Six Senses Hotels. gülsha exports to more than 1000 sales points in Hong Kong, China, Taiwan, Korea and USA; presenting in Tmall,  Mannings, Macy’s, Revolve, Flip and Amazon.

Name: GLOWBIOTICS
Description:
*Topical Probiotic Skincare Solutions*

GLOWBIOTICS skincare exists to bridge a deeper connection between you, your skin and your health for profoundly beautiful results. Think of your skin and body as one miraculous system that works together to protect your health and preserve your natural beauty. Skin is your second largest immune organ and often becomes problematic due to the negative effects of unhealthy lifestyle choices, hormone imbalance, prolonged stress, chronic health issues and age. As the pioneer of probiotic skincare, GLOWBIOTICS has created an entire range of unique skincare formulas and complexes that specifically address and improve an array of skin concerns and conditions. GLOWBIOTICS works synergistically with the skin to give results-driven performance and efficacy, all while respecting skin integrity. Our formulas harness the power of probiotics, working together with targeted bioactives to support younger-looking skin while bypassing injury. Similar to internal probiotics, studies show that topical probiotics can help rebalance the skin and re-awaken youthful processes within the body that slow with age.

With scientifically validated clinical testing, GLOWBIOTICS products are infused with rejuvenating probiotics, prebiotics, strengthening botanicals and proprietary delivery systems. The science behind our probiotic formulations is proven to quickly restore balance, youth and radiance and give all skin types the ability to glow from the inside out.

Description:

Established in 2004. the company first started-off as a 1st generation fashion online.com in South Korea then launched its makeup brand 3CE in 2009 to complete the Nanda girl’s look.  

Living up to the motto “creative makeup”, the brand always strives to present new, trendy looks inspired by fashion and beyond. With unmatched sensitivity in color, 3CE is leading and pioneering color trends in Asia, today highly recognized by consumers for the unique shade range of earthy tones. 3CE also opened up a new era of cosmetics packaging with its iconic shade matched packs and continuously providing consumers with exciting creative collections. 3CE innovates and never follows.

Name: VKE-Kosmetikverband
Description: Der VKE-Kosmetikverband wurde 1952 gegründet und nimmt die gemeinsamen Berufs- und Fachinteressen der Distributeure bzw. Hersteller überwiegend selektiv vertriebener Duft- bzw. Kosmetikprodukte in Deutschland wahr. Bei seiner Arbeit geht es dem VKE als Industriefachverband vor allem darum, das Eigenverständnis der Depotkosmetik innerhalb eines klaren ordnungspolitischen Rahmens zu stärken und auf allen politischen und wirtschaftlichen Ebenen zu manifestieren. Der Verband ist kompetenter Ansprechpartner bei der Gestaltung der Beziehungen Industrie/Handel und in Fragen rund um die Themen Konsumentenverhalten, Marktdaten- und Studien, Branchentrends und -entwicklungen. Zudem betreibt der VKE umfassende Branchen-PR und koordiniert die Arbeit der Fragrance Foundation Deutschland. Mitglieder des VKE sind heute über 60 deutsche Vertriebstöchter ausländischer Stammhäuser bzw. inländische Kosmetikproduzenten, die über 250, zum Teil weltbekannte Marken und einen Umsatz von über 2,3 Mrd. € repräsentieren.

Name: Bobbi Brown
Description:
Bobbi Brown first arrived on the beauty scene in 1991 with the launch of Bobbi Brown Essentials, 10 brown-based lipstick shades created to fill a void in the market of simple, flattering and wearable makeup.  Bobbi's unique approach to cosmetics was a long-awaited gift for women who wanted a more natural look, and therefore caught the attention of cosmetics empire of The Estée Lauder Companies, which acquired Bobbi Brown Cosmetics in 1995. Today, Bobbi Brown Cosmetics is a global brand, having expanded beyond lipstick to a full range of color cosmetics, fragrance and skincare. With a presence in more than 1000 doors in 60 countries and 28 free-standing stores, Bobbi Brown Cosmetics is coveted by world renowned makeup artists, celebrities and style makers for effortless yet beautiful makeup.  Bobbi Brown retains creative control of the brand as CCO and remains one of the world's most celebrated makeup artists.

Find our Indonesia stores: http://bit.ly/counterbbid

Name: TAN-LUXE
Description:
21st century tanning is here. And its amazing...

TAN-LUXE takes a 'next generation' approach to self- tanning, making Tailor-made, glowing skin a reality. Working in synergy with your existing body and skincare regime, each TAN-LUXE product is packed full of skin boosting ingredients and our unique, naturally derived tanning actives.TAN-LUXE delivers effortless glowing skin with No Streaks, No Smells, No Drama. 

Over 5 years in development our brand was born from the desire to create products that would turn the ‘one size fits all’ thinking of traditional self tan on its head and make us and our friends look and feel amazing.  So we set about making our own concise edit of products, in our own labs, that would deliver the ultimate, golden glow we’d been searching for (oh AND feel super luxe on the skin!)..

We believe incredible, happy, glowing skin is the ultimate accessory and it needs to be flawless and #filterfree.  Our products are game changers and are trialled and tested and tested again by real people. If we don’t love, need and obsess over our newest formulation then we don’t do it. Its that simple. 

In short, we’ve taken the drama and uncertainty out of self tan and created a line that dials up body confidence and super charges your inner glow. We’re hell bent on changing the perception of self tan, one streak-free face and body at a time. Because everyone should experience the confidence and power of looking the very best version of themselves.  

And we understand that a great tan alone won’t change the world but positive vibes can. And that’s what we deliver.

Name: Mr. Smith
Description:
Mr. Smith is dedicated to style, substance and simplicity: style above all else, substance of ingredients – simplicity by design.

Our vision is to create exceptional, Australian made hair care products, meticulously crafted from a selection of Australian botanicals and essential oils. Innovative use of organic passionflower, kakadu plum and frankincense, combined with rose geranium, macadamia oil and açaí berry, has led to a range of products that are engineered for performance utilising only premium ingredients.

Distinguished by a refined luxury, each product has been scientifically designed and tested to deliver on this performance. Hydrating, lightweight and organically nourishing, the Mr. Smith collection provides maximum results, while retaining the hair’s natural fluidity and shine.

Mr. Smith’s creative team work at the cutting edge of international editorial shoots and runway shows. Working closely with our development chemists, all Mr. Smith products are conceived and refined to meet the needs of stylists working in this space. This editorial influence defines our education programs for stylists and salons alike. 

Mr. Smith believes that what we leave out is just important as what we leave in. That’s why we’re committed to creating products that do not contain sulfates or parabens; why we’ve never tested on animals and why all of our products have been PETA-Certified.

Style. Substance. Mr. Smith.

Name: Mara Kozmetik
Description:
HAKKIMIZDA

Mara Giriş

Mara marka adını kadınlardan aldı. Pek çok dilde ‘kadın’ anlamına gelen Mara; farklı coğrafyalarda yaşayan kadınların kültürel özelliklerinin çeşitliliğini, zenginlik olarak ruhuna kattı.

Her ayrı ürün grubunda, farklı dinamik ve çeşitlilikten beslenerek yaratıcı, inovatif, yaşamı kolaylaştıran ürün serileri üretmek Mara’nın tutkusunun kaynağı oldu.

 Biraz daha Mara

Dinamik, yaratıcı, yaşam enerjisi yüksek, kendisiyle bağlantıda olan, otantik kimliğini keşfetmiş kadınlardan ilham aldı. Her renk onun içindeki başka bir kadının ifadesidir. Yenilikten ve hiç bitmeyen çocuksu merakından, yaşamın sonsuz ruhundan beslenir. O yaşamın dokunuşlarıyla dans ederken hisseder varoluşunu. Coşkusuyla harekete geçirir, büyüler. Biricikliği ile özel ve eşsiz olduğunun farkındadır. Kalbi ve duyguları hayatının merkezidir. Her şeyi içinde bütünlerken ışığını yayar ve parlar.

 Vizyon ve Misyonumuz

Kurulduğu 2010 yılından bu yana, fark yaratan ürünler ile müşteri deneyimlerine öncülük etmeyi ilkemiz edindik. Bu yenilikçi deneyimleri tüm dünya kadınları ile paylaşmak en büyük hayalimiz ve bunun için tutkuyla üretmeye devam ediyoruz.

Name: AIDECO - Associazione Italiana Dermatologia e Cosmetologia
Description:
AIDECO, Associazione Italiana Dermatologia e Cosmetologia, nasce nel 2007 allo scopo di offrire un punto d’incontro e di riferimento per tutti quegli specialisti che operano a vario titolo nella dermo-cosmetologia moderna, dai dermatologi ai cosmetologi, ai medici, ai chimici, ai tossicologi, ai farmacisti, con l’obiettivo primario di migliorare la qualità di vita dell’individuo.

L’Associazione, indipendente e con sede in Roma, ha natura scientifica in ambito dermo-cosmetologico e, tra i suoi scopi primari, contempla la corretta divulgazione della materia. 

Da 15 anni, AIDECO si adopera per sostenere e applicare la corretta divulgazione di qualunque argomento relativo alla dermo-cosmetologia e ai prodotti della salute in generale, compresi quindi i temi concernenti i prodotti cosmetici, sia a livello di opinione pubblica che a livello professionale. E lo fa attraverso molteplici attività, tra cui l’organizzazione di congressi, corsi, convegni e seminari, pubblicazioni scientifiche su organi di stampa e sul proprio sito istituzionale www.aideco.org, rinnovato ed in continuo aggiornamento.

AIDECO è apolitica e volontaria opera e agisce in contatto con altre associazioni e società scientifiche di Dermatologia e Cosmetologia, in modo da favorirne l’incontro e gli scambi. AIDECO inoltre, tra i suoi primari scopi statutari, contribuisce alla corretta divulgazione dei risultati della ricerca dermo-cosmetologica, soprattutto nei confronti dell’opinione pubblica e per la tutela dei diritti dei consumatori

Name: pHformula
Description:
Dermatological Skin Resurfacing — Where science meets art.  

At pHformula, we’re proud to do more than develop pharma-cosmeceutical innovations — we empower professionals to transform lives through skin.  

For over 15 years, we’ve redefined skin resurfacing with a professional-only dermatological system that bridges the gap between advanced skincare and medical aesthetics.  

Our vertically integrated, end-to-end approach gives us full oversight of every stage — from formulation and manufacturing to packaging and quality assurance — so we can consistently deliver safe, effective, and exceptional skin health solutions. 

But our true passion?  
Education — especially in the art of skin resurfacing.  

That’s why we founded the pHformula ART CLUB in Barcelona — a vibrant hub where hundreds of skin specialists from around the world come each year to learn, grow, and connect. It's more than training — it’s a global movement of knowledge, artistry, and shared purpose.  

Founded by Petru van Zyl, we proudly work side by side with dermatologists, skin specialists, and aesthetic experts in over 65 countries, offering pharmaceutical-grade formulations backed by decades of scientific and medical experience.  

So whether you're just beginning your journey or looking to elevate your skincare clinic, we’re here to innovate, educate, and empower the professionals behind the results.  

Because skin health is not just our expertise — it's our purpose.

Starting life as an insatiable one-woman band, Emma has been passionate about reducing the number of chemicals and synthetics people unknowingly rub into their skin every day. Through its ranges, Little Soap Company was on a mission to create genuine cruelty-free, vegan, natural soap accessible to all.

Our aim now is to make this pure, natural soap the norm, not the niche.

Originally started at the kitchen table, years later we now supply carefully chosen supermarkets and boutique shops both locally and nationally. Our valued customers include boutique hotels and guest houses, who passionately believe in and appreciate the exceptional quality of our British made products. Many value us as a local producer but we also serve national requirements bringing to bear the same award winning quality and ethical standards. Little Soap Company now proudly sits on the shelves of Waitrose, Ocado, Sainsbury's, Boots and Tesco just to name a few!

We are passionate about producing the highest quality products while also being aware of our imprint on the environment; we ensure all of our packaging is recycled, recyclable and biodegradable, so you can lather up the eco-friendly way.

Name: IMMORTAL GROUP
Description:
PT. Immortal Cosmedika Indonesia didirikan tanggal 27 Desember 1999. Kami melakukan penilaian segmentasi pasar dan memposisikan diri khusus dalam bisnis ‘medical cosmetic’. Pada tahun 2004 operasional penuh dijalankan, dan pada tahun 2008 dimilikinya pabrik dengan standar internasional dan bersertifikasi cGMP. Dengan pencapaian tersebut, kami menjamin kualitas keamanan dan kebersihan dari produk kami yang telah diakui tidak hanya oleh negara-negara ASEAN, tetapi juga negara di luar ASEAN.

Karena konsistensi dari kualitas produk kami, permintaan klien pun semakin bertambah, terutama para dermatologis yang menginginkan kosmetik yang juga berfungsi untuk ‘treatment’. Kami menyadari bahwa banyak permasalahan kulit tidak dapat diatasi hanya dengan produk cosmeceutical, oleh karena itu kami mendirikan PT. Immortal Pharmaceutical Laboratories yang juga sudah berstandar cGMP.
juga sudah berstandar cGMP.

GOOD MANUFACTUREING PRACTICES
“Current Good Manufacturing Practices” atau “cGMP” adalah panduan praktek industri yang berhubungan dengan makanan, kosmetik, produk pharmaceutical dan alat medis. Panduan ini bertujuan untuk meningkatkan kualitas dan efisiensi, dan untuk keamanan customer yang menggunakan atau mengkonsumsi produk tersebut, serta untuk keselamatan di tempat kerja.

Hal-hal yang termasuk dalam kontrol cGMP adalah faktor fisik (gedung, mesin, alat, transportasi, prasarana, dll), faktor kebersihan pekerja dan faktor kontrol operasional termasuk training dan evaluasi implementasi cGMP secara berkala.

Fasilitas Immortal dengan sertifikasi cGMP:
• Sistem HVAC (Heating Ventilating Air Conditioning) yang mengendalikan temperatur, kelembaban, sirkulasi udara dan partikel kecil yang sesuai dengan standar WHO.
• Water treatment system dengan Double step RO ( Reverse Osmosis ) dan metode EDI ( Electro deionization) yang sesuai dengan USP 29 yang menghasilkan air yang ultra-purified (pharmaceutical grade).

Description: Arctic Fox color is made of Southern California, USA with non-GMO, plant-based proteins, zero harsh chemicals (drying alcohols, PPDs, etc.) and it is 100% vegan and cruelty-free. All proformulated with rejuvenating and conditioning ingredient. Arctic Fox donates 15% of its profits to charitable causes that help save animals from harm and neglect.

Name: UNIFROM
Description: Unifrom is a fragrance house built out of the Swedish high-rises, innovating how we interact with perfume. The creations are conceptualized in Stockholm, developed in Paris, and made in Grasse.

Name: LeSoie Cosmetics
Description:
LeSoie comes from the heart of Europe – the Kingdom of Belgium. All our products are manufactured in a small town, close to the French, Walloon and Flemish borders. We use only natural ingredients – our cosmetics aren’t tested on animals and are safe for the environment. Our soaps – Mon Savon – are all made entirely by hand, as we are dedicated to keeping manufacturing as close to traditional, natural methods.

Our values have roots in the late 19th / early 20th century Art Nouveau artistic movement, which brought natural world back as an inspiration for arts and crafts. Just like 100 years ago, our products are not only safe and good for the body, but are beautifully designed and functional. We go beyond being environmentally friendly – LeSoie brings a multisensual experience to the bathroom.

Visit our site to discover more...

Name: Viana Cosmetics
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn of Viana.

VIANA is the leading local brand in the color cosmetic market of Sri Lanka.
Euro Cosmetics (Pvt) Ltd., the proud owner of VIANA brand – was established in June 2010 as a sister company of Saweena Group, which owns a cosmetic retail chain based in Colombo.
VIANA product range presently consists of several product groups, ranging from Color Cosmetics, Skin Care and make-up products to cosmetic tools & accessories. Combining international cosmetic and careful attention to your needs, we at Viana, strive to take care of you from head to toe.

VIANA color cosmetic products are exclusively produced for the VIANA brand
using the latest technology by foreign manufactures who supply to the leading
brands in the international beauty care market.

VIANA Skin Care products are produced by Euro Cosmetic Manufacturers (PVT) Ltd
another sister company of Saweena Group, which has an ultra modern
Manufacturing Plant with well equipped quality controlling laboratories manned by
qualified scientists.

VIANA Cosmetic Tools – VIANA’s latest introduction to the Sri Lankan market - put
forward to provide the opportunity to customers to get the best value of cosmetic
applications by way of using proper cosmetic tools with the required quality,
precision & safety. VIANA offers over 60 cosmetic tools which are manufactured
under 100% cruelty free basis.

All Viana products have been approved by the CDDA, Ministry of Health Sri Lanka and adhere to the highest international GMP Standards in safety and quality.

We love to hear your thoughts and answer your questions. Come share your Viana experience with us!

Name: Ikrish Healthcare Pvt. Ltd
Description:
krish Healthcare is more than just a company. It's an innovation that will change your way of life. This was an initiative by an entrepreneur whose main aim was to fulfil the need for efficient and high-quality products in FMCG sector of consumer market.
Gradually company has decided to foray into FMCG (Fast Moving Consumer Goods) sector focusing into Personal Care Division (PCD). In country like India, people of all category of Income level needs affordability of Quality & branded Products for Personal hygiene, Sanitization & better care of bodily manifestation. Realizing same, Company has decided to manufacture & sale Personal Care Products under indigenous brand “Ikrish”
Where products are Developed, Manufactured under stringent quality norms in state of the art facility & sold at a price where a commoner can afford these products & feel pride about Brand & Quality. Our mission is to serve society aiming “WELLNESS FOR ALL” by offering them Indian Products at Indian Prices for Indian People.

Name: SNOW
Description:
Simple. Safe. Effective. 

With a commitment to innovation, effectiveness, and accessibility, we are revolutionizing the oral care experience. We are built on a foundation of scientific research and collaboration with dental professionals, ensuring that our products deliver exceptional results while prioritizing safety, oral health and easy use. Say goodbye to sensitive teeth, messy gels, overcomplicated kits that require a degree in rocket science; and hello to the future of oral care.

Name: Boost Global LLC
Description: Boost Global Your destination of "never seen before" beauty care and personal care products! وجهتك لتسوق منتجات تجميل وعناية شخصية لم يسبق لها مثيل www.boostgl.com

Name: Gerard's Cosmetic Culture
Description:
PORTIAMO AVANTI LA CULTURA DELLA COSMESI. DAL 1970.

Da oltre 50 anni attingiamo dall’ecosistema gli elementi fondanti per una cosmetica funzionale modulare, fatta di formulazioni specifiche e risultati immediati. 
Ricerchiamo e creiamo formule sempre più innovative per rispondere alle esigenze di benessere e bellezza contemporanee. Soddisfiamo i bisogni dei consumatori e dei professionisti dell’estetica, grazie a un'ampia gamma di prodotti e trattamenti per la cura del viso e del corpo.
Crediamo fermamente nel valore della cultura e lo applichiamo anche fuori dai laboratori: proponiamo ai partner percorsi di crescita professionali per incrementare le loro capacità tecniche, manuali e gestionali.

Nati in Franciacorta, diffondiamo i valori del Made in Italy nel mondo, distribuendo i nostri prodotti in oltre 35 nazioni, presso i migliori Istituti Estetici, Centri Benessere e Spa.
Lavoriamo ogni giorno per eccellere. Assumiamo persone altrettanto ambiziose.


SINCE 1970, WE HAVE BEEN TAKING FORWARD THE CULTURE OF COSMETICS. 

For more than 50 years, we have been using the ecosystem as a source for basic elements with the goal of creating functional and modular cosmetics that feature specific formulas and immediate results.
We research, study and develop more and more innovative formulas to meet the contemporary beauty and wellness needs.
We satisfy the needs of the end users as well as those of the beauty professionals thanks to our wide range of products and treatments for the care of face and body.
We firmly believe in culture as a value and we employ it even outside our laboratories: we offer partners professional paths of development to increase their technical, manual and managerial skills.

Born in Franciacorta, we spread the Made in Italy values all over the world by distributing our products in more than 35 countries, at the finest Beauty Institutes, Wellness Centres and Spas. 
We work every day to stand out. We hire equally ambitious people.

Name: Lafi Cosméticos
Description: Desde 1993 a Lafi Cosméticos vem inovando no mercado da beleza. Com foco na formação e qualificação de profissionais, possui 2 academias especializadas e equipe altamente qualificada. Atendimento próximo do cliente e logística de excelência. Atuando nos estados de São Paulo, Paraná, Santa Catarina e Rio Grande do Sul. Distribuidora autorizada das consagradas marcas do Grupo Alfaparf: Alfaparf Milano e Yellow.

Name: Laboratorios Cero
Description:
Bienvenidos a Cero
70 años de protección y bienestar
Solo tú que lo conoces desde Cero; sabes el cuidado, el bienestar y la protección que debes poner en él, por eso en Laboratorios Cero desarrollamos productos dermatológicamente probados para el cuidado del bebé y de mamá; porque sabemos que nadie lo conoce como tú.
Comencemos desde Cero!

Name: Lights Lacquer
Description:
Lights Lacquer is a cruelty-free, vegan & 7-free lacquer company, founded by beauty youtuber Kathleenlights in November of 2019. Lights Lacquer brings nostalgia, timelessness and unique, luxury colour curation to create quality nail polish that is long-lasting and easy to apply.
Based in Miami, FL Kathleen and the rest of our eclectic team draws inspiration from reminiscent elements around them, the latest nail trends and nostalgic references -- making each collection more special than the one before. Our goal is helping lacquer ladies & lads to express their life through colour.

Name: Olivia Garden Europe
Description:
You want to develop and grow – individually and together with your colleagues and the company? Then come join an enthusiastic team that strives every day to make a difference in the hairdressing world! 

Olivia Garden is empowering hairdressers around the world in their creativity with professionalhair tools. We strive to be a customer centric business that always has the interest of the professional in the salon at heart. We can tell you with pride that we often hear from hairdressers we talk to, that we gave them their favourite tool in their hands.

Like we put the hairdresser in the centre of our business, we put the people in the team in the centre of our company culture.

We would love to meet you, to tell you more about it and to be able to apply to YOU to join us! 
Check out our open roles here on LinkedIn - or send an E-Mail to careers@oliviagarden.eu !

Looking forward to meet you!

Name: Bocaré Tech Genomic
Description:
BOCARÉ TECH GENOMIC es una marca de alta cosmética que nace con el objetivo de crear soluciones avanzadas para todas las necesidades de la piel.
Bocaré aúna ciencia y tecnología con un único propósito: abrir nuevos caminos para el rejuvenecimiento, ayudando a nuestros genes a mejorar el aspecto de la piel y, así, mantenerla en su mejor versión.
Nuestra misión es apoyar a las esteticistas a desarrollarse en el sector del cuidado de la piel y, al mismo tiempo, procurar beneficiar a todos, creando conexiones con la ciencia a través de la investigación y plasmando está en fórmulas cosméticas exclusivas y eficaces que contribuyan a reinventar el cuidado profesional, con un enfoque centrado en la satisfacción del cliente.

VALORES:
• Innovación: la investigación avanzada constituye la base de las formulaciones científicas de BOCARÉ.
• Calidad: la fabricación de los productos BOCARÉ está sujeta a los más estrictos requisitos de calidad vigentes en la industria cosmética.
• Compromiso con el cliente: valoramos a nuestros clientes y nos esforzamos por proporcionarles un servicio excepcional, a través de la atención al detalle, la transparencia y la empatía.
• Sostenibilidad: nos preocupamos por el medio ambiente y nos esforzamos por ser una marca responsable y sostenible, mediante el uso de ingredientes naturales y técnicas de producción respetuosas con el planeta y las personas.

Name: Normactive
Description: Normactive develops and manufactures plant-derived cosmetic active ingredients whose activity have been scientifically proved through in-vitro and clinical studies.

Name: Almanati
Description: Almanati é uma marca brasileira de cosméticos 100% naturais e feitos com alta concentração de ingredientes orgânicos e biodinâmicos, que tem como propósito a valorização de toda a cadeia produtiva e o respeito pelas pessoas e o meio ambiente.  Através de cada produto, queremos revelar histórias, que vão desde o agricultor e a importância da terra e da biodiversidade para a vida, até pesquisa e a criação, usando a ciência e a tecnologia a favor da beleza saudável.

Name: PharmexCare
Description:
PharmexCare is the Pharmex Group. cosmetics division created in 2018 with headquarters in Madrid.

Pharmex Group Holding SA was founded in June 2015 with the establishment of Pharmex Advanced Laboratories SL whose factory in Almodovar del Rio (Cordoba), has a large facility of 65,000m² and 25,000m² of manufacturing area, which allows Pharmex to produce and supply our products worldwide.

PharmexCare is the group's solid commitment to leading the cosmetics market through the quality, innovation, and technology used in the development of its products, as well as its holistic approach to beauty.

PharmexCare focuses on innovation and the development of new cosmetic brands, which aim to meet the trends and needs of beauty consumers worldwide. We focus our efforts on developing and implementing different strategies aimed at different targets, regions, cultures and ages that will help us achieve our goals.

Description:
Des soins naturels 2-en-1 aux extraits de lin BIO

Name: Dreamron
Description:
Dreamron is a regional brand headquartered in Sri Lanka with own world class manufacturing facility under GMP Cosmetic, ISO and European standards.

Dreamorn was established with the collaboration of a Japanese counterpart, Kindai Kagaku Lanka (Pvt) Ltd. Has been fully owned by Sri Lankan Management for the past 15 years. It is our global philosophy that company grows, equals the benefit to society Through our services. A stance that has earned us a formidable reputation as a manufacturer of high-end cosmetics, while Strengthening our network reach both internationally and locally.

 Kindai Kagaku Lanka (Pvt) Ltd is specialized in manufacturing, OEM and Private labeling of all types of Cosmetic Products and Next Manufacuring plant which is Harumi Holdings manufacturing 80% of Perosnl and Home Care products of Uniliver Sri  Lanka. 

Our expert team of highly trained and talented personnel, continuously strive to improve each formula and labor towards the discovery of new breakthroughs. With constant focus on research & development, the lab prioritizes the production of optimum quality yet environmentally friendly cosmetics, that meet every desired consumer expectation. In order to maintain consistency, each product is analyzed chemically, microbiologically and physically before it reaches the consumer.

Name: Syntivia
Description:
Syntivia is a research laboratory that creates and develops active compounds for dermatology and cosmetics in partnership with its customers. 

Our experts use the latest chemistry and extraction tools and techniques to create effective active compounds. We develop our own skin models and use the latest cellular/molecular biology and imaging techniques to build solid scientific dossiers demonstrating product efficacy.

Syntivia est Laboratoire de rechercher qui créé et développe en partenariat avec ses clients des composés actifs pour la dermatologie et la cosmétique.

Nos experts mettent en œuvre les derniers outils et techniques de chimie et d’extraction pour créer des composés actifs efficaces. Nous développons nos modèles de peau et utilisons les dernières techniques de biologie cellulaire/moléculaire ainsi que d’imageries pour construire des dossiers scientifiques solides démontrant l’efficacité des produits.

Name: Relax Saboaria
Description:
A Relax surgiu com o propósito de criar meios para o consumo ético e sustentável de cosméticos revitalizadores. A empresa é moderna e nasceu com a missão de colocar diante dos brasileiros produtos feitos à mão de qualidade e integrados com a natureza.

Como diferenciais estratégicos, apostamos em nossos valores e no talento e criatividade dos colaboradores para gerar soluções sustentáveis e que contribuam para o desenvolvimento econômico do país de forma ética, com respeito às pessoas e ao meio ambiente.

A premissa de não realizarmos testes em animais e a adaptação da formulação de nossos produtos para torná-los naturais e veganos são apenas algumas das várias medidas que adotamos para assegurar práticas de fabricação realmente sustentáveis. A Relax tem qualidade atestada pelos consumidores mais exigentes, é 100% cruelty-free e genuinamente brasileira, justificando assim a preferência de norte ao sul do país.

Entre, relaxe e sinta-se à vontade. Seja bem-vinde ao Clube Relax!

Name: Temple Spa
Description: Bringing beautiful spa products to you to try in your own home on a one to one basis or with a group of your friends for a relaxing and fun pampered experience.

Name: NAIL TECH
Description:
The MANICURE App is an on-demand Beauty App with more than 200k unique active users, that is empowering more than 3500 beauty professionals.

In a Beauty Salon, beauty professionals have to meet a strict schedule, and they only receive a commission based on the number of services they perform. In contrast, with our app, they work whenever they choose and for as long as they want.

Also, 75% of these women are from single parents, and with our app, they earn 3 times as much as in a beauty salon every month.

The MANICURE App is making a big social impact!

We have partnerships with many businesses so the beauty professionals can have access to bank credits, discounts on beauty supplies and motorcycles for their transportation. Also as we are growing at exponential rates, more business opportunities are being made.

We will be the beauty online market place

Name: George Northwood
Description: George Northwood is a company based out of United Kingdom.

Name: Fuschia
Description:
Fuschia is a vegan, cruelty-free skincare brand born out of a passion for conscious beauty and natural wellness. Founded in 2013 under the umbrella of Vkare Bio Sciences Pvt. Ltd., Fuschia offers handcrafted, chemical-free skincare products made with ethically sourced, plant-based ingredients.

From nutrient-rich serums and face creams to gentle soaps and bath essentials, each product is thoughtfully formulated to care for your skin without compromising your values. Our commitment to sustainability is reflected in everything we do — from our eco-friendly packaging to our small-batch production approach.

Backed by a team of doctors and skincare experts, Fuschia bridges the gap between nature and science to deliver effective, honest skincare for all skin types. Whether you’re embracing a clean beauty lifestyle or looking to treat your skin with kindness, Fuschia is your trusted companion in this journey. 
 Vegan
 Cruelty-Free
 No Parabens, SLS, Phthalates or Mineral Oils
 Eco-Conscious & Handcrafted

Explore the full range at www.myfuschia.com and join us in celebrating skincare that’s as mindful as it is effective.

#VeganSkincare #CleanBeauty #HandmadeSkincare #FuschiaSkincare #MyFuschia

Name: Plume Science
Description:
Plume is the developer of a patented plant-based composition that supports hair growth without any of the side effects associated with conventional approaches like Minoxidil or Bimataprost. Our continuous commitment to research & development, clinical testing, and doctor led collaborations ensures that our products lead the industry in both performance and safety.

At Plume, our mission is to deliver beauty without sacrifice – to look our most beautiful and feel our absolute best without compromising our health. We believe in creating beauty that will stand the test of time.

Delivering amazing lashes and beautiful brows across the globe since 2016.

Name: Bossy Cosmetics Inc.
Description:
We ignite confidence in ambitious working women through high-quality, beautifully packaged cruelty-free cosmetics and topical content.

We are reimagining the way beauty partners with working women, join the journey today.

Name: Hipertin Group
Description: HIPERTIN, S.A. manufacturer of high-quality cosmetic products headquartered in Barcelona for more than 75 years (ISO, GMP & EMAS).  With a growing international presence, we are selecting clients and exclusive importers for our divisions: AKYTANIA Facial, body & natural hair cosmetics; HIPERTIN Hair coloring & haircare; KEYRA Hair Coloring & haircare; HILAB Manufacturing of private label hair, facial and body care products.

Name: Relax Cosméticos Naturais
Description:
A Relax surgiu com o propósito de criar meios para o consumo ético e sustentável de cosméticos revitalizadores. A empresa é moderna e nasceu com a missão de colocar diante dos brasileiros produtos feitos à mão de qualidade e integrados com a natureza.
