Name: farfalla
Description: Am Anfang von Farfalla stand die Vision von vier Jugendfreunden, die ihre Faszination für natürliche Pflanzendüfte in die tägliche Arbeit integrieren und andere Menschen mit deren Kraft begeistern wollten. 1985 eröffneten sie in Zürich den ersten Duftladen der Schweiz. Farfalla entwickelte sich vom „Geheimtipp” zu einem wichtigen Anbieter biologischer Produkte höchster Qualität: naturreiner ätherischer Öle und zertifizierter Naturkosmetik. Gemäss aromatherapeutischem Wissensschatz spielen ätherische Öle eine Hauptrolle im Duftsortiment und als Wirkstoff in der eigenen, zertifizierten Naturkosmetik. Ökologisches, menschliches und konsequentes Handeln ist die Essenz der Firmenphilosophie.

Name: Shampora
Description:
Shampora creates tailor-made products that completely match the customer needs. 
Thanks to a super-skilled team of experts, a breakthrough technology and an easy-to-use website is now possible to have tailored advices, to create and buy the perfect shampoo and conditioner. 
On the customer side, Shampora provides a complete hair profile that can be updated anytime the clients hair changes or when they needs different cosmetics or healing results. Purchases will be more accurate in order to avoid waste of money in wrong products and finally have an amazing haircare experience.
So the aim of Shampora is to free users from the task of research among hundreds of products in the endless shelves of a supermarket and from the suspect of bias advices given by hairdressers.
Both a thin natural curly head and a thin blonde curly head would like to have softness as result, but the way to achieve this goal is completely different. Shampora experts have managed hundreds of different kinds of hair, that's why the consultation technology is so accurate. 
This user-centric experience makes Shampora's customers happy and satisfied with the results of their new shampoo and conditioner.

Name: Palladio Beauty Group
Description:
Palladio is the force behind your favorite makeup looks; 
Depth of shades, luxurious textures, innovative new products, and every trend you want to try – all made cruelty-free, without parabens and at an affordable price!

Our Values: 

• All-Inclusive Philosophy - Every shade, every age. Palladio’s mission is to offer depth of shades and products that allow our customers to personalize their own beauty experience everyday.

• Transparent Brand Integrity - We pride ourselves in delivering the highest quality products around the world. Palladio respects all customers and feel they deserve to know where products are sourced, and what ingredients are in their makeup.

• Relentless Innovation - We never settle in striving for the best beauty products, botanical infused ingredients and most current color trends. Constant evolution and innovation is key!

• Adaptable  -  We stay agile and ready to shift our approach based on the ever changing needs of our customers. At Palladio, we are continually pushing and being adaptable allows us to constantly be ready for the future. 

Don't Be Anti Social ... Follow us @PalladioBeauty 

https://www.facebook.com/PalladioBeautyGroup
https://www.instagram.com/palladiobeauty/
https://twitter.com/PalladioBeauty
https://www.youtube.com/user/palladiobeauty

Find your shade on:
https://www.palladiobeauty.com/

The Palladio Beauty Group was founded in 1985 by industry veterans and is headquartered in Hollywood, Florida. Palladio Beauty is the leading professional-exclusive value make-up brand in the USA and is sold in 47 countries across the World. Our unique ability to deliver high quality products, rapid innovation and exceptional customer service, all at a value pricepoint, is the foundation of our company's success.

Name: Rebel Nature Cosmetics Laboratory
Description: Rebel Nature is a personal care laboratory and contract manufacturer focused on the natural organic segment. Our broad range of equipment and expertise allows us to manufacture an extensive assortment of personal care products, including haircare, skincare, hygiene and household products. We work exclusively with natural ingredients and go out of our way to only use high-quality, ethically sourced raw materials.

Name: Cosmo Beauty Brand House GmbH (NEONAIL, NEO MAKE UP, MYLAQ, STAYLAC)
Description:
We are Cosmo Beauty Brand House, a sister company of the global and award-winning enterprise Cosmo Group, created in Poland in 2006. We are home to international leading brands in the nail and make-up categories such as NEONAIL, NEO MAKE UP, MYLAQ and Staylac.

We offer our customers innovative, high-quality and affordable products that empower and help them achieve a unique and bold style. Our products are sold worldwide via a strategic omnichannel distribution with preferred partners at retailers, drugstores, perfumeries, wholesalers, and beauty salons whether it be in-store or online.

We have our international and state-of-the art office in the center of Berlin with a diverse team of dedicated, passionate and talented people from all over the world. They shape the future of our company, continuously working on exciting and new projects, with an outstanding hybrid working model, allowing everyone a better work-life balance.

We are Cosmo Beauty Brand House, destination of international, fast growing and award-winning brands.

Name: Lipoid Kosmetik AG
Description:
Welcome to Lipoid Kosmetik, the leading manufacturer of high-quality actives, botanicals and supplier of phospholipid products for the cosmetic and personal care industry. As a pioneer in these fields, we have gained an outstanding reputation in the global cosmetic industry for more than 50 years. This long-standing expertise, in combination with the exceptional quality of our portfolio, enables our customers to develop innovative, functional, and natural cosmetic products meeting the highest standards.

We make beauty natural.

Name: IRCOS Laboratoires
Description:
Nous sommes les leaders dans l'innovation et la recherche, basée sur la valorisation des plantes naturels. Nous développons et fabriquons des produits innovants, soucieux de l’environnement et de votre bien être.  
Ircos est le fruit d’un engagement fort, celui de Khalid Bitar, Dr en Pharmacie et de son équipe pour développer un modèle novateur de production et d’excellence cosmétique.  
IRCOS Laboratoires, est un laboratoire Marocain spécialisé dans la conception et la fabrication de produits cosmétiques, dispositifs médicaux et complément alimentaire.

Name: It Works! Marketing International
Description: Founded in 2001, It Works! is a beauty, nutrition and lifestyle company, named for the excited reaction people have when trying our products — It Works! Our products are sold globally through a network of Independent Distributors who work as One Team with One Mission — to change lives! Together, the It Works! family is looking great, getting out of debt, having fun, and giving back to the community.

Name: Radical Cosmetics || Contract Manufacturing + Private Label Division (USA-Based)
Description:
Where Great Products Are Made 

Since 2003, Radical Cosmetics has been a leading provider of color cosmetics and skin care contract manufacturing, development and packaging solutions.  As a family owned and operated company we take the time to get to know our customers and their specific needs. Radical offers cosmetic contract manufacturing services worldwide.  We are recognized as one of the premier cosmetic contract manufacturers of pressed powders in the U.S. and are a bulk cosmetic supplier of a variety of other cosmetic and beauty products as well. We incorporate the best of science and nature through our use of natural and organic ingredients, state-of-the-art technology and advanced scientific formulations.

PRIVATE LABEL 
Our private label division offers a complete range of high quality beauty products for make-up artists, salons, spas, estheticians, or anyone who wants to start their own line. Private label products require a low minimum initial order, while offering a wide range of private label beauty products allowing you to start your own line very quickly and with relatively low investment. All orders only require a minimum order of $150 with a minimum of 3 pieces/color. We sell finished goods, however packaging and bulk can be sold seperately. Send us an email for more information regarding ingredient lists and pricing!

COSMETICS MANUFACTURING
Radical offers cosmetic contract manufacturing services worldwide.  We are recognized as one of the premier cosmetic contract manufacturers of pressed powders in the U.S. and are a bulk cosmetic supplier of a variety of other cosmetic and beauty products as well. We incorporate the best of science and nature through our use of natural and organic ingredients, state-of-the-art technology and advanced scientific formulations.

CONTACT
Give us a call at 772-882-4511 
Our Customer Service Team is available from Mon-Fri 9am-5pm. 

Thank you for your interest and we look forward to hearing from you!

Name: Seacret
Description:
The ancients were very confident in the beneficial qualities of the minerals and salts found in the Dead Sea, and today we know that their instincts were right, especially with regard to skincare and cosmetics. The Dead Sea’s low-altitude and landlocked position allow for intensely concentrated supplies of salts and minerals, which cannot be found anywhere else in the world. Their pure qualities naturally protect and improve the condition of the skin. With technology and high production standards, Seacret manufactures products that provide all the benefits the skin needs.
Seacret was born in Israel. Founded in 2005, the idea that was at the same time simple and revolutionary - spreading the ancient, some say mystical qualities of the Dead Sea. 
We build our products on the committed belief that these products should replicate the purity of their source materials. This dedication to purity goes well beyond the renowned purity one in the products themselves because we're also insistent on the importance of close, enduring relationships with our customers. Another vital aspect of our ethical vision is the company’s strict refusal to allow animals to be used in the testing of products.
The skincare solutions we offer encompass the widest possible range of integrated products, including toners and cleansing milks, facial washes, body lotions, nail-care products and mud shampoos. The basic details about each product are available on www.seacretspa.com. Along with the essential facts, this indispensable resource offers shrewd advice, insights into how to use products for maximum effect, and highly engaging details of the active ingredients at work in each product. Right across the catalogue, effective solutions to day-to-day problems can readily be found. So, whether you want complementary assistance for skin that has been damaged, a way to try and help you combat the harmful effects of air pollution or simply harmoniously revitalise yourself, Seacret has what you need.

Name: Pasteur Cosmiatria
Description:
Fundada em 1981, a Pasteur Cosmiatria é referência nacional na terceirização de dermocosméticos. Atuando em pesquisa, desenvolvimento e produção de cosméticos de excelente performance, nosso compromisso é oferecer as melhores soluções aos nossos clientes.

Estamos localizados em Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, onde contamos com instalações, equipamentos e processos dos mais elevados padrões. Nossa completa estrutura engloba áreas diversas, geridas por um competente time de profissionais.

Temos como política a superação das expectativas de nossos clientes com soluções simples, criativas, eficientes e efetivas, aperfeiçoando-as continuamente. Buscamos fortemente erradicar desperdícios, contribuindo com a preservação dos recursos existentes em nosso planeta. 

Para mais informações, entre em contato conosco!
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Cocoa Brown Tan by Marissa Carter
Description:
Cocoa Brown Tan is the worlds first 1 Hour Tan and has gained cult-status internationally among celebrities and beauty editors, from the pages of Teen Vogue to the Oscars red carpet. 

Cocoa Brown Tan products are sold in almost 15,000 stores around the world, from the UK to Scandinavia, North America, Russia, Australia and Europe.  

Cocoa Brown Tan launched in 2012 by CEO and Founder, Marissa Carter. Marissa Carter is an award-winning businesswoman who has spent many years studying and working in the beauty industry. Marissa Carter developed the worlds first 1 Hour Tan in 2012 and it has since revolutionized the self-tanning process. 

Cocoa Brown Tan consists of a wardrobe of different products and is available in over 20 countries. Marissa Carter's mission as a creator is to provide products that are innovative, affordable, beautiful on your dressing table and most importantly make you feel like you can take on the world whilst wearing them. 

Cocoa Brown Tan is Ireland's #1, UK's #3 and Sweden's #1 best-selling tan.

Name: Glint Cosmetics Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Glint Cosmetics | White Label | Private Label | Cosmetics Manufacturer | End-to-end Exporter | 40+ Years Experience | Presence in 55+ Countries | 3500+ Products | 500+ Happy Customers

Guided by founder Shri B. M. Chopra, whose vision emphasizes research, technology, and ethical business practices, Glint Cosmetics has built a global reputation as a trusted private label and third-party manufacturing partner for skincare, baby care, bath, and personal care products.

Established in 2004 and headquartered in Mumbai, India, we proudly export to over 55 countries across the Middle East, Southeast Asia, North America, Western Europe, and Latin America. Our manufacturing is fully certified with GMP, ISO, FDA, and Halal standards — ensuring quality, safety, and global compliance in every batch.

Whether you are a startup looking for small-batch private label skincare or a global brand seeking large-scale white label solutions, Glint provides flexible manufacturing, certified processes, and seamless export support. Our in-house R&D, formulation, packaging, regulatory, and quality control teams ensure consistency and innovation from concept to final delivery.

At Glint, we combine science, sustainability, and creativity to deliver effective, safe, and eco-conscious beauty products. Every formulation undergoes rigorous testing for purity, stability, and compliance with international regulations. We also tailor region-specific formulations, bespoke packaging, and market-adapted solutions for brands worldwide.

Our mission is simple - to bring your dream to life, at the speed of your thought. Glint Cosmetics empowers beauty and personal care brands globally with ethical, high-quality, and sustainable manufacturing solutions.

Name: Harper Hygienics S.A.
Description: Harper Hygienics, a manufacturer of popular cosmetics and personal hygiene products, is a market leader in Poland attracting more and more clients abroad. The main production is focused on cotton products (cotton pads and buds) and wet wipes (baby, make up removal, intimate hygiene, refreshing and household) under own brands Cleanic, Kindii and Presto, as also Private Labels.  High quality standards and accurate service level put the company as one of the top suppliers in International Chains. In 2014 Harper Hygienics has become a manufacturer of a non-woven material called Arvell for wet wipes production. Thanks to state-of-art technology Harper Hygienics is the first company in the world which offer wet wipes in innovative material.

Name: FAV 105 Fragrances
Description: Batizada com as iniciais de seu fundador, Francisco Antonio Volpe, a FAV105 Fragrances foi fundada em abril de 1996, com a missão de ser distribuidora exclusiva Firmenich e com o objetivo de oferecer atendimento personalizado e diferenciado às pequenas, médias e grandes indústrias, atendendo as regiões Centro-Oeste, Sudeste e Sul. A FAV 105 conta com a certificação ISO 9001:2008 e a nova versão ISO 9001:2015, conquistada junto a uma qualificada equipe de funcionários e representantes.

Name: Labo Cos
Description:
LABO COS est un laboratoire cosmétique situé en Ile-de-France et spécialisé dans la conception et la fabrication de produits cosmétiques Made in France.

LABO COS produit tous vos cosmétiques en Private Label (Marque Blanche) pour vos offrir des produits d’excellence.

Habituellement réservé aux géants de l’industrie des cosmétiques, LABO COS met à disposition son savoir-faire en cosmétologie et vous permet de créer votre gamme de produits simplement.

Avec une vaste gamme de fournisseurs du monde entier à portée de main, il est essentiel de choisir le bon partenaire pour développer votre entreprise.

Nous avons une richesse de connaissances et d’expertise pour vous aider à lancer votre marque ou à développer votre marché sortant.

Nous travaillons avec de petites et grandes entreprises et sommes des fournisseurs clés de certaines marques bien connues sur le marché. De même, nous fournissons de nombreux instituts de beauté et distributeurs indépendants, avec des quantités de commande minimales faibles.

Si besoin, notre équipe d’experts intervient pour adapter la formulation choisie à des critères précis.

Si vous n’avez pas les ressources en interne pour développer de A à Z vos produits cosmétiques (fabrication, conditionnement et packaging …), Labo Cos est la solution idéale pour une production de manière rapide, simple, et flexible dans le respect des normes.

Name: Naturally Safe Cosmetics Australia Pty Ltd
Description:
Naturally Safe Cosmetics Australia Pty Ltd is an online retailer of natural and organic skincare, cosmetics, mineral makeup & personal care products, including hair care, deodorant and organic toothpaste. We believe in "giving nature a chance" and are committed to providing you with safe, chemical free alternatives to mainstream brands as well as protecting the environment.

Unlike many of today's well-known brands, our brands are primarily made of natural ingredients - without petrochemicals, synthetic fragrances or other nasty chemicals.  All products are cruelty free, of course.

Naturally Safe Cosmetics has actively sought out a range of ethical cosmetic and personal care companies that have formulated safe and effective products that have chosen to use natural ingredients over synthetics.

Brands stocked by Naturally Safe Cosmetics are transparent, freely disclosing all of the ingredients used in their products, and strictly following compliance rules that guarantee their organic status - this brings peace of mind for you, our customer.

In 2016, Naturally Safe Cosmetics Australia Pty Ltd joined forces with another fabulous online organic beauty store - Natural Glow Organic Beauty. Our range now features even more natural, ethical brands and is bigger and better than ever!

Name: CENTRI DI BELLEZZA YVES ROCHER ITALIA Y.R.A.M. S.R.L.
Description: VENDITA AL DETTAGLIO PRODOTTI NATURALI E COSMETICA L IMPORTAZIONE, L ESPORTAZIONE, LA FABBRICAZIONE, LA DISTRIBUZIONE ALL INGROSSO E AL DETTAGLIO DI PRODOTTI COSMETICI, DI PROFUMERIA E DI BELLEZZA IN GENERE, DI PRODOTTI DI BIGIOTTERIA, OGGETTI PREZIOSI, PRODOTTI TESSILI, ACCESSORI DI ABBIGLIAMENTO, CASALINGHI, ELETTRO

Name: Bodyminute
Description:
Depuis 20 ans, BODY MINUTE révolutionne le monde de la beauté en offrant non seulement une nouvelle approche de l’accès à l’esthétique, des prix accessibles à toutes sans aucune contrainte horaire, mais aussi en repensant le modèle économique des instituts de beauté dits « traditionnels » .

En innovant toujours avec un modèle original, BODY MINUTE poursuit sa croissance et le développement de sa marque en proposant une offre de services et de produits de plus en plus complète.

BODY MINUTE est un réseau de 500 instituts de beauté, exclusivement féminins. Instituts de beauté « modernes » alliant procédés performants, bien-être et résultats, le tout, sans RDV. C’est un concept qui répond aux attentes des femmes actives, attractives et urbaines dans un souci constant de recherche de qualité et de bien-être. Nos instituts sont accessibles au plus grand nombre de femmes grâce à un abonnement et à des tarifs abonnées (épilations, soins du visage, du corps, relaxation, manucure, minceur).

Pour nos 20 ans, nous sommes fiers d’annoncer que BODY’minute est l’enseigne à proposer, à toutes les femmes, la plus importante offre de bien-être en France. A travers nos 500 instituts et nos 2500 cabines de soins, les françaises plébiscitent nos massages et nous positionnent désormais comme le N°1 sur leurs désirs de Bien-Être.

Objectif: faire découvrir les soins esthétiques en cabine et des produits experts
fabriqués en Suisse au plus grand nombre de femmes possible pour leur plus grand plaisir !

Name: Ink Brows & Beauty
Description:
Ink Brows and Beauty was founded on the principles of professionalism, creativity, and client satisfaction. Our vision is to be the leading destination for brow, lash, and nail services in Saudi Arabia, offering cutting-edge treatments that enhance natural beauty while maintaining the highest standards of quality and care. We’re committed to staying at the forefront of industry trends, continually adopting new techniques and products to provide the best possible results for clients.

Looking for an opportunity to grow and excel in your career? Join our team! 

 careers@inkbeauty.net

Name: Active Minerals
Description:
Brazilian active minerals company. Supplying solutions for cosmetic and pharmaceutical companies.
COSMOS, ECOCERT & For Life Certified.

Name: Fun Cosmetics
Description:
SUCCESS STORY
Founded in 2006, we are a 100% Portuguese company, based in Sintra, which distributes exclusively cosmetics, perfumery and accessories brands, leaders in the international market and with certified quality. Fun Cosmetics is PME Líder for the 10th consecutive year, which is a reflection of an entrepreneurial, resilient and management strategy.

INTERNATIONAL RENOWN BRANDS
We offer a wide range of international brands that meet the needs of an target that is attentive to trends and that values the quality-price ratio, such as Catrice, essence, Real Techniques, Ecotools, GLOV, Schaebens, Hask and many more. The innovative, dynamic and sophisticated presentation of the brands is a differentiating factor, which allows us to attract new customers to the point of sale, thus increasing sales. Nowadays, we are present in different market segments and at various points of sale in the country.

PARTNERS  
We believe that success is achieved through a partnership relationship with our suppliers and customers. Therefore, we have a specialized team that works, according to the needs of each stakeholder and all its aspects.

Name: Beauty Group London
Description:
Beauty Group London specialise in the creation, marketing and sales of signature fragrances and beauty products. From concept development to production, we deliver true identity for all our brands.

We are known for creativity, quality and ability to capture the essence of each brand in the products and campaigns we create, manufacture and distribute worldwide.

We partner with some of the beauty industry’s best known global retailers and distributors to expose our brands to a global audience.

LICENSING
Beauty Group London work closely with every brand in our portfolio to deliver iconic fragrance and beauty products.

From conception and development through to launch our design team work with brands to deliver products that expertly capture the personality and positioning of each brand in our portfolio.

DESIGN & DEVELOPMENT
We take a fully integrated approach with our license partners. From product to packaging through to execution of global campaigns, design and development is at the core of everything we do.

A winning combination of creative designers, technical experts and manufacturing partners worldwide help realise our products and bring them to a global market.

DISTRIBUTION & MARKETING
Beauty Group London has established relationships with retailers in over 30 countries globally to build strategically and establish brands for long term growth.

Our marketing team execute effective global launch plans that drive awareness and retail sales on a global and local level. We work with established agencies and industry experts in beauty and fragrance PR to drive brand awareness through multi-channel communication strategies.

Name: Natura US
Description:
We are the largest Brazilian multinational in the cosmetics industry and a company committed   to generating positive impact in the social, economic and environmental areas. Natura US is the recently launched operation in United States.
Our story began in 1969, we had two passions: cosmetics and relationships. After nearly 50 years, we expanded our relationship network by expanding our reach to  1.7  million  beauty  consultants,  our  own  stores, e-commerce and other channels inside and outside Brazil. Natura was the first publicly listed company to become a B Corp, in 2014.
Now we take another step in the international expansion of the Natura brand, so that more and  more  people  around  the  world  grow  used  to  self-care,  creating  more  care  for  others  and  the  planet,  certain  that  these  relationships have the power to create more beauty in the world. 
With Avon, Aesop and The Body Shop, we now form a group of cosmetic brands with purpose - Natura & Co: Natura &Co is a global cosmetics group comprising three iconic brands (Natura,  Avon, The Body Shop and Aesop) aligned behind the purpose of nurturing a better way of living and doing business through beauty and relationships. We are present in 73 countries across all continents. We comprise more than 18,000 co-workers committed to be the best beauty group for the world.

Name: Private Label Beauty & Wellness
Description:
WHAT WE OFFER:
*Custom formulations
*We will work one-on-one with you to help figure out your perfect cosmetic formulation.

Our expert product formulation team will help determine what ingredients are best for your needs, including natural and organic ingredients.

Existing formulations- Choose from a wide stock of thoroughly tested and refined pre-existing formulations.

We are able to add custom and/or additional ingredients to these formulations.

Research & Development + Analytical Lab
*We research the latest and greatest cosmetic ingredients so that we can formulate the perfect product for you.
*To ensure the product is at a standard of the utmost quality. We never test on animals 
*Packaging & Design Consultation
*Choose from our existing stock of containers, or we can help determine where to source custom containers that best represent your brand.

Consult with our in-house designer on quality label design that is compliant with regulations.

Name: Salon Commodities
Description:
SALON COMMODITIES IS A BOUTIQUE MANUFACTURER OF PERSONAL CARE PRODUCTS. 

WE STRIVE TO DESIGN, DEVELOP, AND DISTRIBUTE INNOVATIVE PRODUCTS THAT ARE UNIQUE IN VALUE AND DIVERGENT FROM THE STATUS QUO.

WE BELIEVE THAT AN ANTI-DISCIPLINARIAN PHILOSOPHY IS REQUIRED TO HELP SOLVE SOME OF THE BIGGEST PROBLEMS FACING THE PERSONAL CARE INDUSTRY TODAY.

OUR GOAL IS TO UTILIZE AND DELIVER DISRUPTIVE TECHNOLOGIES TO THE MARKETPLACE, WITH THE HOPE OF ULTIMATELY BETTERING THE WORLD WE LIVE IN TODAY.

Name: LANA Bio Cosmetics
Description: LANA Bio Cosmetics is a family run business specialising in the production and sale of skin care, body care, hair care, baby care and perfumery products for the African consumer.

Name: Pierre Cardin Cosmetics
Description: Since the day it was founded, Pierre Cardin Cosmetic managed to be one of the pioneer organizations of the sector, exhibiting an upward trend with its quality production principle. With the official license of French Pierre Cardin Paris, Pierre Cardin Cosmetic is a hundred percent Turkish funded company that produces and sells cosmetic products such as nail polish, lipstick, mascara, eye shadow, blush, foundation and eye and lip liners and personal care products such as face, body and hair products. For the make-up and personal care products that are within Pierre Cardin Cosmetic’s product range, Pierre Cardin Cosmetic has an annual production capacity of 405 tons of semi-products and 69.300.00 units of filling in a 6.000 m2 indoor space located in Istanbul. Our products are produced in accordance with quality management systems in hygienic conditions and environments, using latest technology and automation with fully automatic machines untouched by human hands. Before presenting the results of the R&D process, which is conducted by our team of experienced specialists, with the instructions of the EU Pierre Cardin Cosmetic tests our products in our own Quality Control Instrumental Laboratory - externally accredited laboratories, puts them through dermatological tests and has Product Information documents of each product that is up for sale. Offering a wide range of products to the end consumer within the cosmetics market, as Pierre Cardin Cosmetic we took our success in exportation to beyond our borders by managing the production and sales to many countries spread over many regions from our headquarters based in Istanbul-Turkey. Combining our expertise and experience with technological investments, Pierre Cardin Cosmetic is moving forward on our journey in the world of cosmetics and beauty by showing constant development.

Name: PARIS
Description:
PARIS, um conjunto de fragrâncias únicas e irresistíveis, fruto das mais selecionadas essências. Perfumes, desodorizantes em spray e roll- on, gel de banho e creme de corpo, aromas cosmopolitas e intemporais, que o transportam para um mundo de novas sensações e descobertas. Para ele e para ela, porque a beleza não escolhe sexo e todos merecemos o melhor. Criados em exclusivo pela equipa de especialistas da Beautycom, para que cada aroma seja único e irrepetível, como a beleza deve ser.
e-mail: info@paris-bc.com

Name: Autumn Harp
Description:
Autumn Harp is a specialized R&D and Manufacturing partner in the cosmetics and skincare industry located just outside of Burlington, Vermont. We are experts at innovating cutting edge technology and texture formulations, certified organic and natural formulations, water-based technology and color cosmetics.

The Autumn Harp journey began when two naturalists pedaling their remedy herbs and salves around the New England countryside broke down in their van. They setup shop and sold their brand (Un-Petroleum) to focus exclusively on private label manufacturing while diversifying the product mix. Today we reside in Essex Junction where we have a staff of over 250 people and a state-of-the-art campus that has a total of over 225,000 square feet. 

Autumn Harp supplies products that sell in over 60 countries around the world, across all categories including OTC and SPF. Our expertise is rooted in anhydrous manufacturing excellence, but quickly extends across a myriad of new formats, including emulsions.

Name: Viseart
Description:
FROM PARIS TO LOS ANGELES

Born in 2000 in Paris, Viseart is a professional makeup brand based on superb texture, pigment-rich products fusing natural ingredients and innovative technology. Sourcing its inspiration in the Parisian lifestyle, Viseart quickly conquers a demanding clientele of makeup artists in Paris. From movie sets to national TV programs, Viseart makes a name for itself in the professional makeup area  and starts to export internationally. 

Viseart swiflty developed a stellar reputation among makeup artists in Hollywood and New York for its textures and pigmentation that simultaneously allow for the best precision, result, comfort and meet the needs of the makeup artists as well as of every woman for effective, reliable, comfortable and easy to use makeup. 

Spotted by Sephora in 2014 and sold by renown makeup resellers online, Viseart opens a new chapter in its history by becoming a high-quality professional makeup brand accessible to all.

Working alongside makeup artists is essential for us : Viseart exclusive formulas are all developed in our own laboratory and workshop following tests and feedbacks collected from our partnered MUA. This is how we create our own unique sensorial experience with superb pigmentation and easy-to-use creamy textures.


MAKEUP AS AN ACCESSORY

With a range of 38 palettes with multiple color variations, textures and finish, we strive to offer customers’ the ability to express themselves through makeup and to use it as an accessory to complete their look. We conceive our products as high fashion accessories following our French vision of classicism and exactness, open to innovation and always in style. 


LESS IS MORE

The secret of Viseart lasting beauty resides in its complex yet straightforward formulations : a few yet high quality ingredients for fewer allergies and reactive reactions. Viseart is your best beauty ally.

Name: Kallos Cosmetics
Description: In addition to hair and body care products of professional standards, our company also manufactures and distributes fine cosmetics articles.

Name: 伽蓝（集团）股份有限公司 JALA GROUP CO.
Description:
关于我们

伽蓝（集团）股份有限公司创立于上海，十年来，公司以“汇聚全球力量、打造中国品牌”的经营策略，与法美德日等国在科技、创意、设计等领域居于全球领先的企业合作，先后创立了美素、自然堂、植物智慧、医婷四个个性鲜明的品牌。

伽蓝本着将东方生活艺术和价值观的精髓传遍世界为使命，为消费者提供爱不释手的、富有艺术感染力的产品和服务，帮助消费者实现更加美好快乐的生活！

为达成使命，伽蓝及其伙伴在秉持诚实、正直、信任、进取心、主人翁精神这五个基本价值观的同时，共同坚守“合作共赢、快乐共享”的核心价值观，以此作为企业可持续发展的内在动力。

为此，伽蓝鼓励员工之间、部门之间及与外部客户、社会组织、学校、媒体之间建立真诚友好、互为促进、长期依存的伙伴关系，实现共赢。伽蓝鼓励与伙伴分享并对采纳别人的建议和方法取得的成绩感到自豪！

伽蓝坚信，只要员工、客户与利益相关人都能建立起共同的价值观，就能成就高尚的使命，实现可持续发展的、具备稳定成长性和盈利能力的、富有社会责任感的世界级化妆品企业的愿景。


企业社会责任

伽蓝集团的创始人、董事长郑春影认为：“企业的首要责任就是致力为员工提供安全舒适的环境、提供稳定的工作、提供平等的发展机会、提供行业领先的薪资福利待遇。成为一家能为员工提供机会、为客户带来发展、为消费者创造价值、为社会做出贡献的企业。”

在发展业务的同时，伽蓝矢志造福人类的公益事业，致力传统文化的保护、传承与创新，发展教育，消除赤贫，保护环境可持续发展。

JALA Group was founded in Shanghai in 2001. Upholding the business strategy of "Aggregating Worldwide Resources to Build Chinese Brands", JALA has consecutively created four distinct brands -- MAYSU,CHANDO, BOTANICAL WISDOM and insea, in cooperation with world-leading companies in technology, innovation, design, etc. from countries like France, America, Germany and Japan over the past decade. 
Today, there is a national vast distribution network of more than 25,090 retail outlets established in 31 provinces, autonomous regions, and municipalities directly under the Central Government, covering all major cities, counties and over 10,000 towns across China. Brand counters are seen in department stores, KA marketplaces, supermarkets, cosmetics stores and pharmacies. JALA has more than 7,600 directly employed staff in Shanghai & Beijing Branches and its manufacturing base, and over 100,000 practitioners in its distribution network. The Group has become an industry leader with its stable growth in both domestic market share and brand performance.

Name: Bristol Parts
Description:
Bristol Parts atua há mais de 50 anos no mercado de componentes de embalagens de cosméticos. 
A empresa conta com uma equipe técnica especializada, maquinário com tecnologia adequada e ferramentaria própria, reunindo condições para desenvolver desde a concepção do projeto até a fabricação final do produto com rapidez, flexibilidade e garantia de sigilo.
A empresa oferece componentes de alumínio anodizado e possuem cores e acabamentos diferenciados, onde garantem qualidade superior.

Name: Huk
Description:
Established in 2012, Huk is a trusted name in the industry, known for its brand Huk Natural. The company specializes in manufacturing and supplying premium-quality Face Packs, Scrubs, and a wide array of Skin Care Cosmetics, Facial Kits, Hair Care Shampoos, and Bath Body Care products. Renowned for their long shelf life, excellent cleansing properties, effectiveness, and pure composition, these products are highly sought after in the market. Packaged in high-grade materials, the product range includes Gold Bleach Cream, Gold Face Pack, Gold Massage Cream, Gold Face Scrub, Mini Gold Facial Kit, Fruit Facial Kit, Papaya Facial Kit, Henna Shampoo, Amla Shikakai Shampoo with Reetha, and Natural Neem Patti Soap. All products are formulated with herbal and approved ingredients to ensure they are gentle and safe on the skin.

Huk maintains high standards in product quality by testing each item in a well-equipped, hygienic laboratory. This process ensures that the products meet diverse skin types and needs. The company’s state-of-the-art production facilities and a team of skilled professionals are key contributors to its success.

Under the visionary leadership of Hukam Singh (Director), Huk has gained a strong foothold in the industry. His relentless drive for excellence has motivated the company to consistently meet its goals and expand its market reach.

Name: Stillman Company (Pvt) Limited
Description:
Stillman Company is a leading beauty care company. Our main goal is providing safe and effective products to people who demand excellence in beauty.

More than 120 years ago in a little town of Illinois the first ever Stillman skin cream was placed– which would later become one of the best skincare products! Since then, we’ve grown from one little town to hundreds, and expanded into several countries worldwide. Go back in time, and experience 120 years of great stories, defining moments in skincare, and breakthroughs that have changed beauty as we know it today!

Name: Glint Cosmetics Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
About Us

With the new opportunities and liberalization, a drastic change in the economy was witnessed. Availing the opportunities and facing challenges, we, Glint started our operations in 2005 in Navi-Mumbai. We started initially as a contract manufacturer and gradually succeeded to become a renowned manufacturer & exporter of cosmetics items like Baby Skin Care Products, Skin Whitening Cream, Body Scrub, Body Lotion, Face Wash, Face Scrub, Face & Body Cream, Hair Care range of products and much more.

Our organization was started by Mr. B.M. Chopra a technocrat who was passionate for research and development. He acquired skills and knowledge while working with various large Indian as well as multinational companies. With his efforts, Glint has become a preferred choice for many exporters across destination. We help customers to develop products from a raw concept to the final launch of the product. We can develop a comprehensive brand of products ranging from gels, creams, shampoos and lotions to face packs hair relaxers, pomade, hair food, and anti-ageing creams. Our capability in developing over three hundred products and exporting to various destinations like Middle East, Africa and Europe is the evident our knowledge and experience and our determination to better serve our clients and end users.

With efforts and dedication, Glint as become a professionally managed organization with modern production facilities. We will continue to grow and focus to being a reputed manufacturer for various large companies in India while conducting our cosmetic products promotions nationally as well as internationally.

Name: Neo by Nature
Description:
Parce que les produits d'hygiène sont la première étape de notre routine de soin, ils se doivent d'être irréprochables et réellement efficaces. 


Chez Neo by Nature, nous transformons nos produits d'hygiène en soins rechargeables, aux actifs naturellement surpuissants.

Name: Beauty Design Awards
Description:
Beauty Design Awards celebrates the best of design in the beauty industry. 2025 is our fifth year running the award. The award is founded and lead by beauty industry market research specialist Jennifer Carlsson.

This award does not just take packaging design into account, we judge the products on everything from presentation to formulation.

Name: TAAJ Paris
Description:
Soins cosmétiques à base d'Eau de Source de l'Himalaya. TAAJ développe pour vous les premiers soins du corps et soins du visage nés de l'Ayurveda, médecine naturelle ancestrale.

Après 10 années passées dans le monde de la finance, le stress et la pression permanente amènent Stéphane Lévy. à se remettre en question et à aspirer à plus d’équilibre. Ces besoins d’évasion et de spiritualité le mènent alors en Inde. Sur place il succombe à la culture incroyablement riche de ce pays et fait la découverte de la Science Ayurvédique. C’est dans le Kerala (région du sud ouest de l’Inde) qu’il rencontre le docteur Bhimtal, médecin indien spécialiste de l’Ayurveda et que celui-ci l’initie à cette philosophie de vie équilibrante et source de bien-être. De là est venue l’idée de proposer aux femmes du monde entier une ligne de soins cosmétiques haut de gammes issue de la Science Ayurvédique.

C’est ainsi que naît TAAJ…

Name: PT Aroma Prima Livindo
Description:
PT Aroma prima livindo is a fast growing consumer product mainly focusing in Perfumery and beauty product manufacturing Morris perfume, Ginza Beauty, Aletia, Eversense Perfume and Xchange homme.

We strive for excellence in making the best local product from Indonesia. With experience for more than 20 years in the industry, we believe that we can become the leading perfume and beauty product.

We have export our products to more than 20 countries all over the world and has more than 100.000 outlets all across Indonesia.

Name: RANCÉ & C srl
Description:
RANCÉ  is a Maison de Parfumeurs priding one of the major legacies in the world, raised thanks to the passion and savoir-faire of the Rancé family, today at the seventh generation. Since 1795, it has been creating fragrances of timeless excellence that have conquered men and women all over the world.
Napoleon Bonaparte himself chose Rancé as the official supplier to the French imperial court.
From the hills of Grasse to the international stage of Milan, Rancé embodies French elegance and Italian craftsmanship in its soul. This unique and inimitable combination has allowed our Maison to meet the diverse needs of people over the centuries, engaging with the changing tides of time and fashion, while blending tradition and innovation in every single perfume. A profound legacy now entrusted to Dr. Giovanni Rancé, who, with constancy, creativity, and dedication, continues to uphold his family's cultural and artistic heritage.

Our passion for innovation and commitment to quality has led us to become a trusted name in the consumer market industry. Our products are loved by customers worldwide, and we source only the finest ingredients while using advanced manufacturing techniques to ensure the highest standards of quality .
At SADAGROUP holding, we are dedicated to sustainability and minimizing our carbon footprint in all aspects of our business. We use eco-friendly packaging materials to make a positive impact on the environment.
With over 20 years of experience, we have expanded our reach to more than 45 international markets. Our goal is to help our customers discover their beauty potential by providing them with the best products and customer service possible.

Name: Rigano Laboratories S.r.l.
Description:
Founded as his independent R&D Laboratory and Consultancy Centre in 1986 by Dr Luigi Rigano. Starting from 2015 as Rigano Laboratories S.r.l. we are a research center, dedicated to the cosmetic sector, counting on more than 40 years of industrial experience plus the energy and innovative spirit of young people.

The cosmetic field is continuously researching new, performing products and raw materials. We prepare tailor-made cosmetic formulations in the fields of skin-care, sunscreens, toiletries and make-up products. We can suggest the industry which raw materials, in their portfolio, are more promising for cosmetic applications, considering their chemical structure, their physical and sensorial properties, their solvent effect and stability. We also assist our client in the assembling all necessary documents for the commercialization of finished cosmetic product. We can provide assistance in batch scaling-up, trouble shooting and production methods simplification and optimisation. 

In addition, in our laboratory we also assess the following activities:

• Research and development activity for innovative formulations in the medical device field.
• Training for researchers, laboratory and production personnel, Dermatologists and Chemists.
• Coaching applied to the cosmetic field for technicians and sale agents.
• Production plants layout.
• Interactive or traditional presentations of new raw materials or finished products;
• Preparation of technical and scientific articles for magazines;
• Analysis – we have a net of more than 15 specialized Laboratories

For any enquiry or further information, please contact us
Rigano Laboratories S.r.l.
www.thecosmetologist.com

First and foremost, I Am Proud is here to empower. We're building a community that celebrates uniqueness and champions being proud of the skin you're in. Furthermore, we've partnered with Ecologi to champion an environmentally conscious future, pledging to become an environmentally positive entity.  Since our collaboration with Ecologi in 2022, we've committed to planting over 1,800 trees

Name: KIRMIZIGÜL KOZMETİK
Description:
Kırmızıgül Kozmetik kalitenin değişilmez bir değer olduğunu kurulduğu günden bu yana benimsemiş , bilgi ve birikimi,yaratıcı ve uzman kadrosuyla , yenilikçi ve profesyonel  bir hizmet anlayışında Türk kozmetik piyasasında yer edinmeyi  başarmıştır.

Uzmanlığı olan parfüm alanında bugün, lider firmaların arasında yer almaktadır. Bununla birlikte üretimleri  Türkiye’de gerçekleştirilen zengin ürün yelpazesi ve güçlü ekonomik yapısı sayesinde dünyanın dört bir yanına ihracat yapmaktadır .

Tüketicisine en kaliteli ürünü sunmak hedefinde olan Kırmızıgül Kozmetik, prensiplerine bağlı, insan sağlığı ve doğaya saygılı, teknoloji ve yeniliklere açık olup dünya trendlerini yakından takip etmektedir. AR-GE ve Kalite Kontrol Labratuarları ile üretimin her aşamasında uygulanan titiz çalışmalarla,kalitesini tartışılmaz düzeylere ulaştırmayı hedef edinmiştir.

2004 yılından beri İstanbul İkitelli Organize Sanayi Bölgesinde üretim faaliyetinde olan Kırmızıgül Kozmetik 2012 yılı itibariyle tüm ürünleri Tekirdağ-Veliköy Organize Sanayi Bölgesi faaliyete geçen  16.000m2 alana sahip  ISO9001,14001,18001 ve GMP standartlarında üretim  yapan tesislerinde gerçekleştirmektedir.

Vizyonumuz
Vazgeçilmez global kozmetik markalar yaratarak ülkemizin ve çalışanlarımızın başarılarıyla gurur duyacağı bir aile olmaktır.

Misyonumuz
Kırmızıgül Kozmetik markalarının yurtiçinde ve yurtdışında en yüksek bilinirlik seviyesine ulaşması; rekabetçi konumunu sürekli arttırarak en üst seviyelere ulaşmasıdır.

Since 2016, we've grown over 200% annually and reached 300 billion KRW in revenue, becoming one of Korea’s top indie brands. We've hit key milestones in major channels like Olive Young, Naver, and Coupang, and globally we rank 1st in categories on Amazon, Qoo10, Wildberries, and Shopee.

We're expanding worldwide, focused on providing the best customer experiences.

[Why d'Alba?]
#1 Success DNA
• Distinctive product R&D capability - led to many category #1 products both domestically and internationally based on a premium vegan brand recognition
• Extensive sales network - #1 ranked expertise throughout most of major channels such as Olive Young, Naver, Kakao, Coupang, Homeshopping, etc

#2 Global Potential
• Rapid growth - across more than 20 countries without significant dependency in specific countries
• Company wide strong support - via manpower & budget for aggressive growth for prominent markets

#3 Healthy Financial Structure
• Expected sales of about 300 billion KRW in 2024 - with stable profit structure
• IPO - in progress for 1H 2025

#4 Competitive Benefits
• Quarterly incentives for exceeding profit targets - 20 consecutive quarters of incentive payments
• Industry top- level Employee welfare benefits

We’re looking for passionate individuals to help shape the premium beauty lifestyle globally. As a young, fast-growing company, we maintain a dynamic startup culture. Our goal is to make d'Alba a top global premium vegan brand. If you’re excited to grow your career with us, we’d love to connect! 

 d'Alba Global Official Recruitment Page : https://dalba.career.greetinghr.com/en/dalbaglobal

Name: Lili Margo
Description:
Founded in 2017, Lili Margo joins the vanguard of French cosmetic companies with a focus on natural and expert skincare solutions. Our inception was driven by Gérard Mouradian's vision to craft a line of products that are as pioneering in their ecological design as they are in their innovative approach to the diverse skincare challenges faced by women at all stages of life, suitable for every skin type.

Lili Margo stands at the forefront of the beauty industry's new era, blending the essence of 'Lili'—synonymous with natural beauty—and 'Margo'—the embodiment of expertise. Our skincare treatments are composed of an average of 95% natural ingredients and are entirely researched, developed, and produced in France, honoring the highest cosmetic industry standards.

Our commitment to performance, quality, and the esteemed French savoir-faire has propelled Lili Margo's growth, enabling us to cast a global footprint. Today, Lili Margo is recognized and distributed in 20 countries, a testament to our brand's international allure and the trust we've cultivated with our discerning clientele.

Join us in celebrating beauty that's not only skin-deep but rooted in the richness of nature and the precision of French craftsmanship.

#LiliMargo #FrenchCosmetics #NaturalSkincare #Innovation #GlobalBeauty #Craftsmanship #MadeInFrance

Name: Herome Cosmetics B.V.
Description:
For over 40 years(!),
Herome has been a market and industry leader in hand and nail care for over 40 years now. While on holiday in England, the founder, Margreet van Roemburg, discovered how to treat and properly look after her weak nails. Following her discovery, she was so excited that she decided to further develop her revolutionary product and bring it to The Netherlands. She has now succeeded in becoming the market leader of natural nail care in the Netherlands and various other countries.

Herome’s success
Our approach works. Our customers can trust us. We only sell high-quality products that speak for themselves. Herôme first focused solely on hand and nail care. However, the company soon saw other opportunities for the essential care of feet and eyes. We believe in thorough research and the fulfillment of delivering on what you promise with your products.

Our products
Herome Cosmetics is one of the only independent Dutch cosmetics manufacturers. This means that Herome Cosmetics develops, manufactures, distributes, and sells all of its own products at home and abroad. Our products find their way to consumers through wholesalers, drug stores, perfumeries, beauty salons, and Online stores.

Description:

We deliver excellent service to all our retail partners worldwide and are proud to work with many of the leading players, such as House of Fraser, SEPHORA (EU and USA, CANADA), Debenhams, Marionnaud and many more.

Our salon range offers luxurious tinted and untinted spraytans in three shades and we are thrilled to work to world's leading spas to promote an intelligent, easy and a beautiful way to tan and care for skin.

Name: Groupe CCA
Description:
Vous créez les produits, nous les testons !

Depuis 40 ans, CCA est un groupe indépendant de laboratoires dédiés à la sécurité, à l'efficacité et au contrôle qualité de vos produits cosmétiques.
- Microbiologie, évaluation de la sécurité et de la toxicologie, de la stabilité de vos produits, analyses et contrôles, Expertise projet -

Cosmepar aide ses clients depuis le brief formule jusqu'à la mise sur le marché du produit, et sa vie après, en fournissant information et conseil, en veillant aux certifications et à la conformité des standards européens et internationaux...

Nos trois laboratoires sont certifiés ISO 9001 V.2015. 
COSMEBAC est accrédité selon la norme ISO 17025 (accréditation Cofrac Essais, n°1-7046, portée disponible sur
www.cofrac.fr)
Notre objectif principal : tester vos produits et vous accompagner dans vos efforts de développement.

Cosmepar apporte les conseils scientifiques et réglementaires essentiels à la réussite de vos projets.

Nos 3 laboratoires spécialisés :
- COSMEPAR teste l’innocuité, l’acceptabilité et l’efficacité de vos produits cosmétiques.
- COSMEBAC s’assure de la stabilité et de la sécurité microbiologique de vos produits.
- ANALYTEC vérifie stabilité, compatibilité, caractérisation chimique et physico-chimique de vos produits.

Name: Marilou
Description:
Marilou Bio est une marque française de cosmétiques bio créée en 2010.

Nous travaillons des ingrédients de base issus des meilleures ressources, en collaboration avec des industriels Français - usines aux normes ISO 9001 et GMP, le plus haut degré de qualité - pour développer des gammes de qualité. Les produits répondent à la pharmacopée européenne (ils sont fabriqués en France) et ont été certifiés par le label ECOCERT. Marilou Bio adhère à la charte COSMEBIO.

Marilou Bio s’amuse avec la nature : des packagings simples, modernes et pétillants, des textures de qualité douces et agréables pour vous faire rayonner au saut du lit, car les parfums naturels et les huiles essentielles utilisés dans les produits Marilou Bio ont aussi des vertus aromathérapeutiques : ils vous font sentir bon et ils vous font sentir bien !

Les produits Marilou Bio sont vendus dans les magasins bio (Biocoop, Mademoiselle Bio et magasins indépendants) et en pharmacie. 

A ce jour, plus de 30 pays à l’international font confiance au savoir-faire et à la qualité de nos produits. 

Marilou Bio veut démocratiser les produits bio, souvent perçus comme trop chers ou réservés à une élite. Notre but est de rendre la cosmétique bio accessible à toutes les femmes, avec la promesse d’un prix juste.

Name: L'ATELIER PARFUM
Description:
L’ATELIER PARFUM IS A NEW FRENCH, ECO-FRIENDLY HAUTE PARFUMERIE  BRAND WITH AN APPROACH THAT STRIVES TO:

•	Make High Perfumery ACCESSIBLE
•	Put  EMOTION at the heart of inspiration
•	And say NO to COMPROMISE

Standing out from the rest of the market, L’ATELIER PARFUM is a brand with a unique personality and proposition. It aspires to return to the essence of perfumery, and restore the noble status of fragrance.

 CREATIVITY, EMOTIONS, IMPERTINENCE.

At L’ATELIER PARFUM, this is how we create, communicate, inspire and present ourselves. 

In order to sublimate everyone’s uniqueness, we call upon renowned perfumers, whose only constraint is to not have one. Full of inspiration and audacious, they reinvent the rules of the game to create ever more surprising fragrances. With a long-lasting effect and a heady trail, our fragrances have that little je ne sais quoi that makes all the difference. 

Haute Parfumerie? Yes, but with respect and goodwill.

We respect nature in its entirety and that is why we carefully select natural ingredients of the highest quality from France and around the world. With this idea in mind, our essences come from an ethical and responsible supply, and our formulas contain up to 90% ingredients of natural origin and are 100% Vegan.

We favor local sourcing, in France and in Europe, in order to limit our carbon footprint. We limit the use of plastic as much as possible, choosing natural materials, such as wood for our cap or biodegradable cellophane.
Our glass bottles, made in France and Germany, are entirely recyclable, and our cardboard cases are made from FSC-certified paper from eco-managed forests. 

The result? Fragrances like nowhere else, from design to manufacturing!

Name: Nubiance
Description:
Nubiance is a French dermocosmetic brand based in Paris, dedicated to caring for phototypes III to VI. We create high-performance skincare, clinically tested and formulated without compromise, to meet the real needs of melanin-rich skin.

Rooted in science and driven by inclusivity, Nubiance offers a responsible and expert approach to skin health — trusted by pharmacists and customers across more than 25 countries.

Name: Leven Cosmetics
Description: Leven offers hi-tech manufacturing facilities that are GMP certified. Our main goal is to ensure that the OEM, ODM cosmetics we deliver respect the highest quality standards and consistently meet our customers’ expectations.

Name: Belshop Perfumaria e Cosmética

Name: L'Occitane Türkiye
Description:
1976 yılında kurulan L'OCCITANE, dünya çapında tanınan doğal bir güzellik markasıdır. Güney Fransa'daki Provence şehrinden ve geleneklerinden ilham alınarak üretilen ürünleri, doğaya saygının ve sürekli araştırmanın bir sonucudur.

Doğal, otantik ve etkili parfüm, cilt ve vücut  bakım ürünleri tasarlayan L’Occitane dünyada ve Türkiye'de; vazgeçilmez markalar arasında yerini almasının nedeni sadece doğal içerikler kullanıyor olması değil, aynı zamanda kalıcı güzelliğin sırlarını esansiyel yağlarda bulması. 

L’Occitane’ın hikayesi, bundan tam 49 yıl önce markanın kurucusu Olivier Baussan’a Provence’ta kendisine bir çiftçi tarafından hediye edilen damıtma makinesi ile başladı. Baussan'ın geleneksel yöntemlerle elde ettiği esansiyel yağları, ürettiği sabun ve kremlerde kullanmasıyla başlayan bu serüven, dünyaya doğal güzellikler getirmeye ve büyümeye devam ediyor. 

Bugün tüm dünyada 2500’ün üzerinde satış noktası, Türkiye’de ise online dahil 40 mağaza ile markanın sevenlerini büyüleyici Provence atmosferinden esinlenmiş ve her biri birbirinden özel hikayeleri olan ürünleriyle mağazalarında buluşturmasıyla devam ediyor.

L'Occitane kuruluşundan bu yana 6 değeri benimsemiştir. Bunlar; Üreticiye Destek, Biyoçeşitliliğe Saygı, Sıfır Atık, Kadınların Güçlenmesine Destek, Engellenebilir Körlükle Mücadele ve Ustalığa Saygı.

Name: INAVIVE Lab
Description:
Laboratoire spécialisé en sous-traitance cosmétique

En Juillet 2017, Didier Guérin reprend l’entreprise, lui donne un nouveau souffle et change son nom, en Septembre 2019, ainsi nait INAVIVE Lab. Cette renaissance enrichie le savoir-faire initial en Skincare et Make up, de nouvelles compétences techniques et de nouvelles valeurs dont l’ECO responsabilité : Solaires certifiés BIO et conventionnels, produits capillaires naturels techniques et de coloration.

Name: Yenzah Cosméticos
Description:
Yenzah é cosmético e tecnologia caminhando de mãos dadas para transformar o mundo com soluções de beleza diárias, fáceis e acessíveis para todos. Para gente cada fio importa! 
 
Somos constituídos de gente empreendedora que quer deixar o seu legado. Aqui, acreditamos que com tecnologia, conhecimento e garra de realizar, é possível construir e transformar o mundo. Somos incansáveis na busca da melhor solução de beleza. 
 
Postura de dono, entusiasmo e evolução obsessiva são o nosso lema! Na Yenzah somos fãs de pessoas, suas diversidades e necessidades específicas: oferecemos soluções para todos – cada um é único. 
 
Sabemos que os desafios para quem quer transformar o mundo são intensos e diários, mas nosso propósito é claro: ser a maior referência em cabelo do mundo! 
 
Oferecemos a paixão de um artesão e a profundidade de um cientista em cada fórmula desenvolvida. Entendemos cada produto como uma obra de arte e seguimos à risca os nossos ideais: 
 
- Não testamos em animais. Somos adeptos da bandeira cruelty free 
- Nossos produtos são na sua maioria veganos 
- Usamos alta tecnologia nas fórmulas e ativos 
- Usamos com responsabilidade a biodiversidade brasileira e mundial 
- Focamos em excelentes resultados observados na primeira lavagem 
 
É por isso que o significado da marca Yenzah é FAZER, REALIZAR e CONSTRUIR. Uma homenagem à mulher moderna, que faz acontecer e busca harmonia em todos os aspectos da vida: desenvolvimento pessoal, trabalho, família, relacionamentos e bem estar. Nosso nome, que deriva de um dialeto zulu, inspira a todos nós, diariamente, a realizar sempre o melhor para você.

Name: Global Beauty Secrets
Description: Global Beauty Secrets is a celebration of the collective wisdom of women across the world. The brand infuses latest scientific knowledge to beauty rituals from the kitchens and courtyards of women with different cultural legacies.

Name: New Look Cosmetics, Inc.
Description:
New Look Cosmetics (NLC) is a full-service cosmetics and skincare contract manufacturer. We were founded in 2005 in Chatsworth, California, USA with an emphasis on building strong customer relationships, providing superior R&D services, and producing a high-quality product.

Since inception, we have greatly expanded our capabilities and product offerings while remaining family-owned.

Our team has a passion for helping brands strategically develop and manufacture innovative products tailored to their specific audience. All of the products we produce are cruelty-free and made with love in Chatsworth, CA.

When you partner with us, our team becomes an extension of your team. If you are searching for a contract manufacturer that offers a customized and client-focused approach, we would love to speak with you to see how we can help!

Name: Armazém Peter Paiva
Description:
Foi aos 21 anos que Peter Paiva começou a se dedicar a Saboaria Artesanal e a criação de cosméticos criativos, quando ousou transformar uma simples barra de sabonete em algo inovador. Nos dias de hoje, essa paixão é ainda maior e diferente de muitos artistas, pois assim como tem grande sucesso em sua arte e produções, insiste em passar tudo isso a seus mais de 60.000 mil alunos em todo o mundo.
E é assim que a Peter Paiva Exclusividades Artesanais segue seu trabalho sob o comando de Peter. São mais de 100 colaboradores, mais de 140 parceiros de abastecimento, 3 armazéns no estado de São Paulo, 4 pontos de venda e uma loja virtual com mais de 4 mil itens a venda.
Além de um portal institucional com todas as informações possíveis para a inspiração do público: receitas, rótulos gratuitos disponíveis para download, informações gerais, além da SOAP PÉDIA, com a definição de mais de 270 termos do mundo da saboaria.
 
Peter Paiva não é só um artesão, uma marca, uma empresa... é uma ideia e inspiração. 
E para que tudo aconteça e reflita como o esperado, do início ao fim, os 8 departamentos (Marketing, Financeiro, Administrativo, Recebimento, Expedição, Compra, Fiscal e Segurança), trabalham em conjunto, para garantir toda a atenção e entrega de excelência, que são leis para Peter Paiva.
 
Um sonho realizado e solidificado em uma empresa que cria ideias, produz conteúdo, inova na produção dos sabonetes artesanais e cosméticos criativos, varejista de matéria-prima exclusiva, escola criativa e o primeiro passo para a mudança de vida e realização dos sonhos a cada caixa enviada e a cada foto compartilhada.

Name: Les Eaux Primordiales
Description:
En 2015, Arnaud Poulain crée Les Eaux Primordiales avec la conviction qu'un parfum est le plus beau moyen d'exprimer au monde sa singularité. Basée dans les Hauts de France, sur ses terres d'origine, la Manufacture des Eaux Primordiales abrite un savoir-faire artisanal où chaque étape, de la conception du parfum à la mise en flacon, est animée par la même exigence: offrir des expériences olfactives inoubliables. 

--

Arnaud Poulain created Les Eaux Primordiales in 2015 with the conviction a perfume is the most beautiful way of expressing a person’s uniqueness. Based in Northern France, Les Eaux Primordiales Manufacture is home to traditional craftsmanship and expertise. From the creation of the perfume to the bottling, every step of production is driven by the same uncompromising requirement of delivering an unforgettable olfactory experience.

Name: Stratia Skincare
Description:
We are an obsessively researched skincare brand that uses only the most effective and essential ingredients. We make skincare that works.

Driven by boundless scientific curiosity to figure out how skin works and what skincare products actually do, our founder Alli Reed obsessively read dermatology journals. Inspired by a particular study about ceramides, cholesterol, and fatty acids, she decided to start formulating her own skincare and blogged about her findings.

Her initial idea was simple: to create a gentle and effective moisturizer based on this study that worked with the skin to replenish and reinforce it on a biological level. No fragrance, no fillers, just a formula that truly worked.

After a lot of trial and error, Alli perfected the formula for her moisturizer. She shared this initial formulation on her blog and even shipped leftovers from her personal batches to readers who wanted to try it. After some more research and development, this eventually came to be known as Stratia’s best seller, Liquid Gold.

Fast forward to today, Alli is still researching and testing out new product ideas and is committed to Stratia’s mission of creating simple and effective skincare products.

Want to know more about ingredients or formulation? Please reach out to info@stratiaskin.com.

Name: Valetudo
Description:
Valetudo è HUB d'eccellenza per i brand di dermocosmetica. Da oltre 40 anni siamo l’azienda italiana di riferimento per la formulazione di prodotti dermocosmetici di fiducia grazie a un circolo virtuoso tra ricerca, produzione e distribuzione che costituisce la nostra unicità: il Dermocosmetic Hub. Coltiviamo la salute della pelle, dalla materia prima al prodotto finale, fornendo un servizio completo alle private label ed esprimendo il nostro massimo potenziale attraverso i brand proprietari che ci rappresentano.
-
Valetudo is excellence HUB for dermocosmetics brands. For over 40 years, we have been the Italian company of reference for the formulation of trusted dermocosmetics products, thanks to a virtuous cycle of research, production, and distribution that constitutes our uniqueness: the Dermocosmetic Hub. We nurture skin health from raw materials to the final product, providing a comprehensive service to private labels and expressing our full potential through the proprietary brands that represent us.

Name: Oficialderma
Description:
OficialDerma: O cuidado que trata de verdade. 

Fazemos parte do Grupo OficialFarma - com as marcas OficialFarma, OficialNutri, OficialDerma -, nascido em 2009 com a missão de inspirar as pessoas a encontrarem sua melhor versão através da saúde, beleza e bem-estar.

Nossa filosofia é o cuidado integrado IN & OUT, pois acreditamos que a beleza real reflete a saúde de dentro para fora. Combinamos o melhor de dois mundos:

OUT (Cuidado Tópico): Com a OficialDerma, oferecemos cosméticos e dermocosméticos de alta performance, com fórmulas que entregam benefícios reais e visíveis. Nossas soluções são pensadas para a rotina do consumidor e para profissionais de estética que buscam o mais alto padrão de qualidade.

IN (Cuidado de Dentro para Fora): Com a OficialNutri, potencializamos os resultados com nutracêuticos avançados. Nosso destaque é o Regepepty, uma fórmula exclusiva de peptídeos bioativos que estimulam o colágeno com tecnologia alemã, que atua diretamente na regeneração celular da pele, unhas e cabelos.

Essa sinergia é a nossa assinatura: um cuidado 360º que inspira confiança e entrega resultados duradouros.

 Seja nosso parceiro
Estamos em franca expansão e buscamos distribuidores e parceiros comerciais que queiram crescer conosco, levando mais saúde e autoestima para todo o Brasil. Vamos conversar!

Name: St Future International Ltd
Description:
St Future International, One-stop supply chain provider.

Founded in 1990, rooted in Hong Kong, St.Future international is active in the fields of manufacturing, trading, supply chain managing, covering product range of beauty & fashion accessories such as: Makeup brush/ Makeup Sponge/ Facial cleansing tools/ Personal care product/ Cosmetic bag/ False eyelash/ False nail/ Bath product/ Led mirror/ Manicure & pedicure tools/ Beauty Metal Vanity case, etc..

Name: Afrocenchix
Description:
Afrocenchix offers a range of ethical natural products for curly, multi-textured hair. We work closely with scientists to formulate our products which are are handmade in the UK using locally sourced, plant-based and naturally derived ingredients as well organic, fair-trade shea butter from Ghana. 

Our award winning small business never uses artificial fragrances as we believe pure essential oils are so much better and our customers love the natural scent of our products. 

At Afrocenchix we believe that upholding our principles enables us to deliver the best for our natural hair community through:

- simple, effective products;
- fun, educational events;
- and an informative and easy to use website.

In our products you will find ingredients that deliver maximum benefit to you, nothing more, nothing less. We believe in constantly striving to bring you the best and value your feedback which helps us do this.

We believe the little things in life should be simple, because it’s the little things in life that make a big difference.

Name: Naked Sundays SPF
Description:
Meet Naked Sundays: The SPF-Beauty Brand Redefining Sunscreen

Naked Sundays is an award-winning SPF-beauty brand created to change the way the world wears sunscreen. Founded by Samantha Brett, a former television journalist and bestselling author, Naked Sundays is on a mission to make serious sun protection fun, wearable, and part of every beauty routine, with the mission of lowering global rates of skin cancer amongst the next generation. 

Born under the harsh Australian sun, Naked Sundays combines scientific innovation, skin-loving ingredients, and makeup-level finishes to create world-first SPF50 products that look as good as they protect.

From SPF-infused glow creams to invisible face mists, every formula is designed to be vegan, cruelty-free, and dermatologist-tested, delivering high-performance protection that fits seamlessly into modern life.

With a global cult following and retail presence across the USA, UK, Australia, and beyond, Naked Sundays has become a leader in SPF innovation, winning multiple beauty and skincare awards for its groundbreaking SPF-makeup hybrids.

The brand’s purpose goes beyond beauty - Naked Sundays proudly supports skin cancer prevention and awareness charities, promoting education, early detection, and everyday SPF use.

Guided by its founding philosophy; Serious SPF. Fun Application. - Naked Sundays continues to lead the global SPF movement, inspiring millions to make sun protection not just a skincare step, but a lifestyle.

 For more information, visit nakedsundays.com and follow @naked_sundays.

Name: Resibo
Description:
Resibo to manifest piękna i odwagi. Nasza historia zaczęła się od odważnych wyborów i pasji. Od początku wierzyliśmy, że piękno to znacznie więcej niż tylko powierzchowne odbicie w lustrze. To wyraz naszej wewnętrznej mocy i pewności siebie. W naszym działaniu kierujemy się wartościami, które są fundamentem naszej marki: odwaga, zaufanie, skuteczność i innowacyjność.
W naszych produktach łączymy moc natury z najnowszymi osiągnięciami technologii.
Nasza pasja i doświadczenie sprawiają, że skutecznie upraszczamy pielęgnację, dostarczając produkty, które zmieniają podejście do piękna. 
Wprowadzamy Cię w świat pielęgnacji i naszych produktów, aby Twoje wewnętrzne i zewnętrzne piękno mogło rozkwitnąć, z odwagą i pewnością siebie. Nasze produkty są tak stworzone, aby skutecznie wpisywały się w Twoje potrzeby i styl życia. 
Zyskujemy zaufanie naszych klientek, mówiąc im prawdę, nawet jeśli czasem brzmi to odmiennie od powszechnych przekonań o kosmetykach.
Zapraszamy Cię do odkrycia własnego, naturalnego piękna. Razem z Resibo. 
You make beauty. We care.

Description: At MooTanRoo we are building a national brand.
