Name: Reynaldi Cosmetica
Description:
Da oltre 20 anni siamo un'azienda famigliare leader in Italia nella produzione di cosmetici conto terzi. Ciò che ci contraddistingue è il servizio completo che offriamo ai nostri clienti e l'expertise della nostra fondatrice, la Dottoressa Reynaldi, prima laureata in Italia in cosmesi naturale. Il nostro stabilimento, dove sviluppiamo 40 nuove formule cosmetiche al mese, è situato a Pianezza (TO). Produciamo su formulazioni del cliente ma la nostra vera specialità è quella di creare il prodotto assistendo il cliente in tutte le fasi di realizzazione, risolvendo le problematiche di progettazione, produzione e confezionamento.
●●●
For over 20 years we have been a leading family company in Italy in the production of cosmetics for third parties. What distinguishes us is the complete service we offer to our customers and the expertise of our founder, Dr. Reynaldi, first graduate in Italy in natural cosmetics. Our factory, where we develop 40 new cosmetic formulas per month, is located in Pianezza (TO). We produce based on the customer's formulations but our real specialty is to create the product by assisting the customer in all phases of production, solving the problems of design, production and packaging.

Name: cosmeticsinMind
Description:
cosmeticsinMind: Ingeniería cosmética y cumplimiento legal a tu alcance

Somos un equipo con más de 30 años de experiencia en el desarrollo de productos cosméticos a medida. Acompañamos a marcas y empresas desde la idea inicial hasta el lanzamiento del producto al mercado.

Ofrecemos un servicio integral que incluye I+D, formulación, packaging, producción, logística y cumplimiento regulatorio Europeo. Nos especializamos en productos de cuidado facial y capilar, y en la normativa cosmética europea, aunque trabajamos con todo tipo de cosméticos gracias a nuestra red de partners.

Contamos con una segunda línea de negocio clave: nuestra plataforma digital de regulación cosmética, diseñada para facilitar el cumplimiento legal europeo a autónomos, pymes y grandes empresas. La plataforma permite:

•	Acceso centralizado a toda la normativa relevante
•	Búsqueda avanzada por fecha, organismo o tipo de documento
•	Más de 25 etiquetas temáticas: alérgenos, claims, filtros solares, nanomateriales, etc.
•	Información actualizada, con enlaces oficiales
•	Newsletter quincenal con novedades del sector

Ahorra tiempo, evita costes en asesoría legal y mantén a tu equipo informado de forma sencilla. 

Prueba gratuita de 1 mes, sin necesidad de añadir datos bancarios/tarjeta, disponible en: www.regulatory.cosmeticsinmind.com

Nuestros servicios especializados:

•	Creación y gestión de proyectos cosméticos
•	Implantación de la norma ISO 22716
•	Evaluación de productos por expertos
•	Asesoría técnica en formulación y packaging
•	Consultoría para cumplir el Reglamento (CE) Nº 1223/2009
•	Formación en ISO 22716 para equipos y empresas

Más de 70 empresas ya confían en nosotros. Somos expertos, flexibles y comprometidos con la excelencia en innovación y regulación.

Name: BAÏJA
Description: Chez BAÏJA, nous réinventons les soins rituels pour le corps et l’esprit, inspirés par la Méditerranée. Nos produits allient expertise et plaisir ultra sensoriel pour offrir une expérience unique, où chaque sens est éveillé. Grâce à des senteurs captivantes et des formules naturelles, nous proposons une nouvelle vision de la beauté : se sentir belle à l’intérieur comme à l’extérieur en s’accordant un moment pour soi, une dose de joie au quotidien. Made in France et conçus sans compromis, nos soins célèbrent l'harmonie entre plaisir, efficacité et respect de l’environnement.

Name: Youngblood Mineral Cosmetics
Description:
For Youngblood Mineral Cosmetics, clean beauty is not a trend – it’s been a way of life for more than 25 years. We pride ourselves on transparency, featuring a meticulously curated selection of formulas that provide radiant, healthier looking skin with every use. Each product is a testament to our ‘clean beauty’ commitment – to maintain exceptional quality and performance by combining plant-based actives with scientifically proven ingredients, free from harmful additives.

Our products have been vetted and endorsed by dermatologists, medical estheticians, and celebrity makeup artists, while maintaining a tribe of brand loyalists from across the globe. Youngblood creates cosmetic and skincare products that are formulated to uncover the natural radiant beauty in all skin types, including those with common skin concerns and sensitivities.

Name: Salon Success
Description:
Salon Success is the Distributor of Choice for the hair industry in the UK and
Ireland. We make it easy for hairdressers and barbers to succeed in
business and artistry.

Founded over 45 years ago, Salon Success started with the aim of raising
the standards in our industry so that hairdressers and barbers would become
better paid and more successful. We were also the first in the industry to
take sustainability seriously, recognising its importance long
before it was widely acknowledged. We now help you to help the planet
by championing eco-conscious brands.

Today, we’re proud to be part of the Sally Europe family, combining elite
buying power with our team of highly skilled business consultants to support
you. Our consultancy team are the best in the business and offer a 360
approach to support your salon with everything it will need to thrive and grow!

Name: Homm Bitkisel
Description:
Geçmiş tecrübelerimizle, geleceğe güvenle bakıyoruz.

Yıllardır, en güvenilir firmalar arasında bulunan ve satışa sunulan her üründe daima kaliteyi öncelik edinmiş olan Homm Bitkisel markamız; insan sağlığını ön planda tutan, geleceğe umutla bakan, ülke ekonomisine katkı sağlayan, tamamı yerli sermayeye sahip olan bir firmadır.

İnsan yaşamını daha sağlıklı kılmak için bitkisel ürün üretimi yapmakta ve bu ürünlerin geliştirilmesi konusunda çaba harcamaktadır. Saç ve cilt bakım hizmetlerinin en önemli unsurları olan kozmetikte; fayda ve maliyet esaslarını dikkate almaktadır. Gelen taleplere göre çeşitlilik artmakta ve her geçen gün onlarca farklı cilt ve saç sorununun çözümüne yardımcı ürünler; firmamız tarafından piyasaya sürülmektedir.

Başarı; önce kendimizden başlamakla gelir, sonra çevremize yayılır. Siz de bugün kendiniz için bir adım atın ve çevrenizdeki yüzlerce insana, başarı umudu olun. Süregelen başarı hikâyemizin bir parçası ve kendi hikâyenizin kahramanı olun.

Name: Camille Beauty
Description: Camille Beauty is a company that operates in the beauty & skincare industry. Started with the Camille Organic Wash Off Face Mask, now we have expanded our products to our very first Camille Body Scrub, Face Mist, and Body Lotion.

Name: Ivatherm
Description: Ivatherm is more than just a skincare brand; it’s a journey toward healthier, more radiant skin. Born in the heart of Romania, Ivatherm combines the ancient healing power of Herculane thermal water with cutting-edge dermatological science to create products that nurture and transform even the most sensitive skin. At Ivatherm, we believe that every person deserves to feel confident and comfortable in their own skin, and we are dedicated to helping you achieve that through our carefully crafted, nature-inspired formulations. Our passion for innovation and commitment to excellence drive us to constantly push the boundaries of skincare, ensuring that you experience not just better skin, but a renewed sense of self. Join us in celebrating your natural beauty, with the purity and strength that only Ivatherm can offer.

Name: BiE
Description:
The Power of Metamorphosis.
Backed by 50+Years of Research.
 Clean Skincare Products.
Result-Oriented Signature Routines.

BiE is a new line of expert luxe skincare, driven by passion to impart disciplined skin routines for all lifestyle needs. We believe in highly curated, efficacious and clean ingredients blended with scientific formulations. Our products are backed by 50 years of expertise and know-how of the global beauty world.

The brand is a brain-child of India’s former Miss India and supermodel, columnist and a global wellness leader—Queenie Singh, and India’s leading celebrity aesthetician, Dinyar Workingboxwalla.

We are a DPIIT registered start up.

Name: PHARMATECH Laboratoires
Description: Le laboratoire Pharmatech propose le développement des produits en full service. Les équipes du laboratoire Pharmatech sont à l’écoute et mettent leur expertise à disposition afin d’assurer l’accompagnement dans chaque étape du projet, ceci de la conception jusqu’à la mise sur le marché du produit. Le laboratoire Pharmatech propose aussi la promotion et la distribution des produits.

Name: Galerie de Beauté
Description:
Τα Galerie de Beauté είναι η αμιγώς ελληνική αλυσίδα καταστημάτων που, από το 1999, κάνει τον κόσμο πιο όμορφο. Με 44 καταστήματα και παρουσία στα μεγαλύτερα εμπορικά κέντρα όλης της Ελλάδας προσφέρει στις γυναίκες ό,τι χρειάζονται για να αισθάνονται όμορφα. Και οι γυναίκες την επιβραβεύουν, αναδεικνύοντάς την ως μία από τις ηγετικές εταιρίες καλλυντικών στην αγορά!

Ομορφιά, στην πράξη!
Στα Galerie de Beauté εμπνεόμαστε από τις δικές σας ανάγκες, για να σας προσφέρουμε αυτό ακριβώς που επιθυμείτε:
- Μια πλήρη γκάμα αγαπημένων, επώνυμων προϊόντων για να βρείτε αυτό που σας ταιριάζει.
- Πολύτιμες συμβουλές για την προσωπική σας περιποίηση από εξειδικευμένους συνεργάτες.
- Ενημέρωση για κάθε νέο, καινοτόμο προϊόν των πιο διάσημων οίκων, για να φροντίζετε τον εαυτό σας και να αναδεικνύετε την προσωπική σας ομορφιά.
- Μοναδικές προσφορές και υπέροχα δώρα όλο τον χρόνο, που κάνουν τη φροντίδα της ομορφιάς πιο προσιτή από ποτέ!

Επιπλέον, προκειμένου να ανταποκριθούμε ακόμη καλύτερα στην εμπιστοσύνη και την προτίμηση που δείχνετε στα καταστήματά μας, διοργανώνουμε γιορτές ομορφιάς -τα Festival de Beauté- με εξειδικευμένους συμβούλους ομορφιάς, μακιγιέρ και επαγγελματίες κομμωτές, αποκλειστικά για εσάς.

Δέσμευση Φροντίδας ΦΡΟΝΤΙΔΑΣ 
Κάθε μία από εσάς είναι μοναδική, γι’ αυτό, σε κάθε σας επίσκεψη στα Galerie de Beauté, φροντίζουμε να απολαμβάνετε ουσιαστική, προσωπική εξυπηρέτηση. Με αυτή την αρχή, δεσμευόμαστε να συνεχίσουμε να σας περιποιούμαστε, βελτιώνοντας συνεχώς τις υπηρεσίες μας και προσφέροντάς σας ακόμη περισσότερες επιλογές ομορφιάς. Για να είμαστε δίπλα σας, όποτε μας χρειάζεστε!

Name: O.F.I. S.p.A. - Officina Farmaceutica Italiana
Description:
Contract Development and Manufacturing of dermo-cosmetics, dietary supplements and medical devices.
Since 1946, with more than 75 years of experiences, OFI specializes in the Contract Development and Manufacturing of Dermo-Cosmetics, Nutraceuticals and Medical Device.
Liquid and solid forms with full range of packaging solutions in Full Service.
Highest standards: ISO certifications, Ohsas 18001, Halal, FDA, Kosher, GMP among others with a strong focus on sustainability. 
Worldwide Regulatory support

Bottega di LungaVita creates natural products by cleverly combining age-old traditions with scientific innovation 
Euronatural offers a wide range of dietary supplements for our daily well-being.
Kosmida is dedicated to the treatment of dermatological problems

Name: Nu World Beauty
Description: Nu World offers the latest in technological breakthroughs in the development of cosmetic, skin, and hair products.  They offer a full-service operation from product and brand development to complete packout, providing the clients with a competitive advantage in the beauty industry - a one-step shop for manufacturing needs.  The strength is in customizing programs to meet each client's specific goals and budget.  If customized solution is not necessary, the company also offers an entire library of products, formulas, textures, and shades.

Description:
A Herbal products company based in Indore, MP, India. Dealing in Skin Care, Personal Care, Hair Care and Baby Care Range. Main markets are Middle East, Africa, Singapore and now soft launching in India. We are mainly a modern trade based company dealing in marketing of products through BA and non-BA counters involving only A+ retail.

Name: Pharmilab
Description:
Pharmilab is a global consulting firm specializing in the cosmetics industry.

Its range of services ranges from the review of cosmetic formulations to compliance with international market requirements, marketing, and access to sales channels. By working with Pharmilab, our customers can centralize all their needs in one partner. This accelerates the growth of their brands and gives them total security during the internationalization process.


Why work with Pharmilab?

Pharmilab stands out from any other company on the market because of the cross-divisional nature of the services. We guarantee 100% of the needs of any cosmetic brand that wants to implement or grow its brand, not only in the European market, but in many other international markets.

Our customers see us more as a partner with the commitment, availability and experience to help their brands grow faster than as a simple supplier.

Pharmilab is an ISO 9001 certified company and a member of Cosmetics Consultants Europe.

Name: KOSÉ Corporation
Description: KOSÉ Corporation was founded in 1946 by Kozaburo Kobayashi with a vision and passion to provide people with dreams and hope during the post-war period.  Today, with over 6,600 employees, KOSÉ continues the legacy of its founder with a commitment to its customers of creating quality products that exceeded expectations. With research and innovation at its core, KOSÉ has over 800 registered patents and a portfolio of 36 brands that sell to multiple channels across Asia; including department stores, specialty stores, drug stores and direct.

Name: Swiss Beauty Cosmetics
Description: Swiss beauty is a fast growing cosmetics and skin care brand which is making a mark in the beauty industry with it's oh so glamourous makeup range at price and quality like never before! The companies vision stands for quality for each and every person who ever associated with us.

Name: Pink Mask Group
Description:
Our mission is to empower others to achieve their dreams by building brands that foster and inspire.

Pink Mask Group is a fast-growing house of brands company that's on a mission to inspire individuals around the world by building niche beauty global brands that empower and uplift. Our portfolio of companies is united by a shared commitment to creating exceptional products and experiences that resonate with consumers.

Name: Republic Cosmetics
Description:
Somos Republic Cosmetics, no sólo fabricamos cosméticos, creamos sueños. Tenemos la idea de cambiar el mundo con productos que rompan el estilo tradicional, olvidarnos de los cosméticos aburridos y poner todo el corazón en lo que hacemos.

https://republiccosmetics.com
https://republiccosmeticsusa.com

Name: Unboxed Research Pvt Ltd
Description: We are a bunch of people passionate about developing and formulating, truly clean formulations in Cosmetics. When we say clean cosmetics, it goes beyond just marketing claims and name sake.  Our brand Green And Beige is working constantly to make a difference by giving consumers a range of cosmetic products that they can use guilt free while keeping Mother Earth safe and clean. Clean for us is giving formulations that does not contain toxic elements for the soil or the aquatic life, being honest and transparent, only source ingredients from suppliers who practice sustainability and most of all our products are effective.

Name: We Make-up
Description:
We make-up is an Italian Cosmetics Digital Native Vertical Brand based in Milan, the heart of the Beauty Made in Italy.

We have been founded by some of the most important personalities in the beauty sector, with +50 years of experience in the cosmetics industry and a working portfolio comprising all the major beauty brands in the world. 

We Make-up has been created with the mission of making high-quality cosmetics accessible to everyone.
Thanks to a smart Business Model and a long-lasting expertise, We make-up is able to bring you top-quality products, with an exceptional customer's experience, innovative design and at a revolutionary price. 

How do we do this?

We source our products only from the best quality producers 
We cut all intermediaries
We sell only through our website. 

But We Make-up is much more than this...

We love colors, We trust quality, We care about the details, but especially We care about YOU, and that's, for us, the key to make the difference. 

Become part of the Beauty Revolution!

We Make-up and You?

Name: Absolution
Description:
Depuis 2009, Absolution propose une approche holistique de la beauté à tous pour qui Qualité, Efficacité, Honnêteté, Ecologie et Créativité ne sont pas des concepts marketing. Notre gamme de produits visage et corps, tous certifiés bio, combine la puissance des plantes médicinales à notre goût pour une formulation savante et créative de très grande qualité.

Retrouver la Beauté
L'objectif d'Absolution est à la fois tout simple et merveilleusement complexe : retrouver la Beauté ! Celle du monde qui nous entoure, celle du monde que l'on contient... celle qui se cache dans votre reflet le matin !
Les soins Absolution effacent les scories de nos vies d'urbains : chaque jour, ils offrent à notre peau un retour à sa beauté originelle en restaurant son écosystème naturel et en l'amenant à son état optimum. Elaborée à partir d’extraits végétaux certifiés bio ou sauvages, Absolution allie délicatesse des textures et des senteurs, simplicité d'utilisation et totale efficacité des formules.

Absolution c'est aussi une volonté : celle de transmettre une façon de voir le monde qui fait émerger la beauté partout où elle est. Partagez-la avec nous! #absolutioncosmetics #retrouverlabeauté

Name: Cosmoproject S.p.A.
Description:
Established in 1993, Cosmoproject is a leading, fullservice cosmetic and toiletries products manufacturer capable of managing every aspect of a project, from innovative formulation and design, production and packaging developments to delivery services.

Thanks to its state-of-the-arts leadership technology Cosmoproject has built a solid reputation for producing the best ‘Made in Italy’ skincare, beauty care, cosmetics and private label products. As one of the leading Italian company of the beauty industry, Cosmoproject strives to ensure an exclusive and personalized customer
experience throughout every aspect of the product line development.

Sustainability is part of the Company’s DNA. Cosmoproject supports a “green at-all-level “ best practice throughout the manufacturing process life cycle. Its commitment to a strategy of sustainable development complies to regulatory legislations and compliance in all countries worldwide.

A fundamental aspect of Cosmoproject’ s success is provided by the expertise of a highly skilled and reliable staff.
Its team of experts have full knowledge governance of chemical, packaging and manufacturing subjects and has a thorough understanding of the markets we serve to help the client seize opportunities, build brands, and most importantly grow their business.

Name: Fulser Kozmetik
Description: Fulser is established in 1995 in Turkey to introduce personal care products including shampoos, anti-aging creams, body shaping and treatment creams with natural ingredients to its consumers based on their needs. Our products range continuously expand in accordance with the ongoing innovations. All of the brands that we offer to our consumers; Tresan, Krauterhof and M.Asam are manufactured in Germany with high technology and quality.  Our master brand Tresan is one of oldest natural hair care brand in the market with it 23 years of history.  Our distribution channels provide to our consumers to have easy access to our products at  pharmacies, national and local market chains, cosmetics chains and much more all over of Turkey.

Name: LAKMÉ INSPIRED HAIRCARE
Description:
LAKMÉ is a company inspired by beauty.

Our mission is to inspire hairdressers all around the world by providing them with the best quality products and a cutting-edge technology in professional hair cosmetics. LAKMÉ is based in Barcelona; therefore the company is inspired by Mediterranean values such as nature, passion, health, innovation and design. 

LAKMÉ was founded in 1996 by the Carreras family, who has been historically associated with the world of hairdressing. Today, LAKMÉ is present in over 80 countries and both the brand and its products have achieved the recognition of professionals around the world. 

The product portfolio of LAKMÉ includes hair color, care and styling products, which are represented by our leading brands: Collage, Chroma, Gloss, K.blonde, K.Therapy, AURA, i.plex ,Teknia and K.Style.

Name: MASQMAI
Description:
MASQMAI was founded in December 2018 by the Italian model Alice Campello. Her ambition, passion and commitment made MASQMAI evolve and grow, becoming the strong beauty brand it is today. 

ABOUT US... 

*Clean beauty and Cruelty-Free
All our products are clean, free from parabens, mineral oils, phthalates, formaldehyde, SLS and sulphates. Our formulas are created and tested by us, on real people. At MASQMAI we never test on animals.

 
*Pure and effective ingredients in high concentration for maximum results
We are constantly looking for the purest and most effective ingredients to create powerful formulations that deliver excellent results. That is why, all our products are formulated with a high concentration of active ingredients. 


*The power of nature combined with science 
Our high performing formulas combine the power of nature and science to offer best in class beauty products with high efficacy.


Find more about us at www.masqmai.com
Shipping Worldwide!

Name: Souvie Cosméticos Orgânicos
Description:
MUITO PRAZER, EU SOU A SOUVIE

Nasce uma marca inspirada na vida.
Uma vida mais simples.
Sem desperdício.
Sem elementos agressivos ao ecossistema.
Em um lugar onde o importante é aquilo que de fato tem valor.
Onde a ética precede a estética.
Onde a inspiração é a natureza, com toda sua perfeição e beleza.
Beleza que protege.
Beleza que nutre.
Beleza que cuida dos seus frutos como quem cuida de um filho.
Porque a natureza também é mãe.
Souvie. Orgânica, como a sua beleza.

A natureza é protagonista na criação das nossas linhas de produtos. Nossos cosméticos se inspiram nos ciclos naturais da vida e respeitam as particularidades de cada momento, de cada fase do ser humano.

Possuímos cultivo orgânico próprio e, portanto, temos acesso e controle de toda a cadeia de produção. Ao cuidar bem do meio ambiente sem uso de agrotóxicos e adotando manejo sustentável do solo, asseguramos a qualidade de nossos ingredientes e respeito à vida, desde o seu início.

Para cada produto, nos baseamos na mesma inspiração: biomimetismo. Biomimética é uma área da ciência que estuda as estruturas biológicas e suas funções, procurando aprender e reproduzir as estratégias e soluções da própria natureza.

Cosméticos que cuidam da saúde da pele. Para isso dissemos “não” a muitos dos paradigmas do mercado. Não aos parabenos. Não às fragrâncias sintéticas. Não aos corantes e não aos testes com animais.

Name: Clean Skin Club
Description:
Clean Skin Club is a clean beauty brand that specializes in innovative facial hygiene products and exceptionally effective formulas, all with a holistic approach to skincare. We redefine the meaning of clean in the skincare industry by challenging its standard of common skincare solutions and raising the bar with our creations. Our products are heavily researched, creatively tested, and tirelessly perfected by our dedicated team of skin-thusiasts.

linktr.ee/cleanskinclub

Name: Indie Lee & Co.
Description:
Indie has always had a green thumb. Whether it was tending to her 800 sq. ft greenhouse or formulating plant- derived beauty products for her friends and family, it was in her DNA to believe that the best ingredients come from the earth. So, you can imagine her surprise when doctors diagnosed her with a life-threatening brain tumor that they believed could be environmentally derived.

It didn’t take long for a re-invigorated and healed Indie to embrace radical self-acceptance, a commitment to joy, and a never-ending pursuit for plant and people-first solutions. Then it happened, Indie created Indie.
Captivated by her resilient spirit and capacity to touch others through her mission, Indie enlisted the best of the best the industry had to offer. Partnering with world-class formulators and like-minded investors, Indie’s vision was made a reality. Her quest to source the earth’s finest ingredients fuels her line of high-performing, versatile, beauty products that lives up to the highest standards of clean and cruelty-free as seen with our numerous certifications, including COSMOS and Leaping Bunny.

Her commitment to bringing products grounded in nature, supported through science, and inspired by life to everyone is reinforced daily by her spirit and the support of those who believe wholeheartedly in her calling to infuse the beauty industry with authenticity and efficacy. Indie’s transformative mission transcends beauty; she has spoken at events such as SXSW and PopSugar Play/ Ground. She also serves on the FIDM Beauty Program’s Advisory Council and sits on the board of the American Autoimmune Related Diseases Association. It is Indie’s sincere hope that her awakening creates change and inspires others to live life passionately and with purpose.

Wholesale inquiries: wholesale@indielee.com
International wholesale inquiries:  international@indielee.com
Media & Influencer inquiries: indiepr@indielee.com
All other inquiries: info@indielee.com

Name: Cosmetics Inspiration & Creation
Description:
Cosmetics Inspiration & Creation is a #forecasting #trends and #consulting office specialized in #Beauty #innovations. Our mission is to bring inspiration seeds to the beauty industry. 
Our clients are international brands, suppliers or associations in the Beauty industry. We operate with clients from France, Belgium, Holland and USA. 
Our services are trends presentations, consulting and story telling.

Name: Zinati
Description:
In 2007, Zinati was established as a distribution & retail chains operating cosmetics and hair care products, in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. 
During these years, the company expanded and realized a lot of achievements through various activities in and outside of Saudi Arabia. These activities made the company one of the well known and reputed names in the business community, not only in Saudi Arabia, but also in the Arabian Gulf Region.

Name: BRIVAPLAST GROUP
Description:
Brivaplast Group, an Italian family-owned company with more than 55 years of experience in the production of cosmetic packaging, is one of the world leaders in offering application solutions for mascara, lipgloss, concealer, eyeliner and eyebrow.
Brivaplast Group has two production units, Italy (HQ) and China (Shanghai), and an office in the USA (California) to support all customers worldwide. 
In 2022, they acquired Metal Tech, an Italian company that makes metallization, UV and acrylic coatings on packaging for the cosmetics and food and beverage sectors.
Recognized on the market as a mascara leader, they are always able to offer innovative application solutions thanks to continuous investments and research into new products and technologies.
The company offers a wide range of fully customizable standard products, but also custom products, together with the expertise of a dedicated team of professionals (200 employees worldwide).

Name: BUXOM Cosmetics
Description: We believe in going big, being bold and feeling sexy - and that unapologetic attitude comes through in everything we do. Because here, sensuality is a strength. It's how we move through the world. Our larger-than-life, sensorial beauty stimulates your senses and amplifies what you love most about yourself, so you can feel even sexier in your skin. We live to fuel you with the confidence to go all-in, and be 100% yourself, 100% of the time.

Name: Madame Gie Cosmetics
Description:
Madame Gie by Gisella Anastasia. Kami bertujuan untuk memenuhi kebutuhan masyarakat akan kosmetik yang terjangkau dan aman bagi kesehatan.

Madame Gie adalah perusahaan yang bergerak di bidang cosmetics, skincare, dan body care. Berdiri di Indonesia sejak 2018, kini Madame Gie sudah mempunyai 7 official e-commerce stores, 8 pop-up store di Jakarta, dan 1 Pop-Up Store di Surabaya. 

IN REAL LIFE BEAUTY.

-

Madame Gie by Gisella Anastasia. We aim to meet people's needs for cosmetics that are affordable and safe for health.

Madame Gie is an Indonesian cosmetics, skincare, and body care company. Established in Indonesia since 2018, the company currently has 7 official e-commerce stores, 8 pop-up shops in Jakarta, and 1 Pop-Up shop in Surabaya.

Name: ARTDECO cosmetic GmbH
Description:
Die ARTDECO COSMETIC GROUP ist in der Kosmetikbranche eine der erfolgreichsten Unternehmensgruppen.

Die ARTDECO COSMETIC GROUP bietet mit ihren Marken komplette Sortimente in den Bereichen dekorativer Kosmetik, Pflege und professioneller Nagelpflege. Hierbei liegt der Schwerpunkt unverändert im Bereich der dekorativen Kosmetik und Nagelpflege. 

In diesem Segment ist die Marke ARTDECO uneingeschränkter Marktführer im Fachhandel. Auch die anderen Marken Make up Factory, ANNY und MALU WILZ der ARTDECO COSMETIC GROUP gehören zu den führenden Brands der jeweiligen Exklusiv-Kunden. 

Das Unternehmen wurde 1985 von Helmut Baurecht gegründet und ist unverändert in Familienbesitz. Seit 2012 ist Matthias Baurecht, Sohn des Firmengründers, an der ARTDECO COSMETIC GROUP beteiligt. Die Geschäftsleitung wird von Herrn Stefan Neumeyer und Frau Claudia Steinberger vervollständigt.  Derzeit sind in der Firmengruppe in Deutschland über 800 Mitarbeiter/innen im Innen- und Außendienst beschäftigt. Hinzu kommen Zweigniederlassungen in Frankreich und Italien. 

Selbstverständlich stehen unseren Kunden der  markeneigenen Online-Shop unter www.artdeco.de 24h am Tag zur Verfügung.

Unsere innovative  Unternehmensgruppe mit Firmensitz in Karlsfeld bei München vereint alle Unternehmensbereiche.  Kurze Wege für rasche Entscheidungen und effizientes Arbeiten sind der Schlüssel zu unserem Erfolg.

Name: Active Cosmetic
Description:
Empresa dedicada al mercado de la cosmética e higiene personal desde el año 1997.
Con más de 6.000 clientes en el mercado Argentino y con una expansión comercial a otros 15 paises.
La innovación y el desarrollo de nuevos productos es una constante en la empresa, teniendo en cuenta las necesidades de clientes y del mercado.

Name: Soin de Soi
Description:
Soin de Soi a été créé en 1999. Au départ avec la Maison Soin de Soi, un spa de 200m2 à Gradignan, un véritable havre de paix pour un retour à l'essentiel où nous prenons soin de vous. 
En 2015, nous avons créé notre propre laboratoire à Gradignan, où nous fabriquons artisanalement, nos cosmétiques frais 100% naturels et biologiques.
En Mars 2018, nous avons ouvert la Boutique Soin de Soi, une adresse au coeur de Bordeaux pour prendre soin de vous avec 2 cabines de soin.
Aujourd'hui Soin de Soi c'est 36 femmes qui prennent soin de vous, 3 adresses : Le laboratoire, le Spa et la Boutique, un site internet pour retrouver nos produits où que vous soyez en Europe.

Name: Felisha Cosmetics Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Felisha Cosmetics is a leading name in the world of color cosmetics and skincare, committed to celebrating the beauty within every individual. Proudly crafted with a blend of innovation and nature, our products are designed to enhance confidence while being gentle on your skin.

Our offerings include a wide range of high-quality color cosmetics and skincare essentials catering to diverse needs and preferences. From bold hues that inspire creativity to nourish skincare solutions, Felisha Cosmetics is your partner in looking and feeling your best.

Follow us to stay updated on our latest launches, expert tips, and stories that redefine beauty standards. Together, let’s create a world where everyone feels beautiful in their skin.

Name: MUD - Make-up designory Italia. Milano - Roma
Description:
ISTRUZIONE. ECCELLENZA. ARTE. BELLEZZA. CREATIVITA’. MUD

Tutto questo è MUD,  Make-Up Designory. Partendo da Los Angeles e New York, attraversando l’Europa, MUD è una delle più importanti realtà nel settore del make-up internazionale che apre a grande richiesta in Italia con MUD Studio Milano.

La mission di MUD è di fornire agli studenti una formazione altamente professionale che fonda la propria competenza sui set cinematografici di Hollywood, gli shooting fotografici ed i teatri più importanti al mondo.
Un’educazione tecnica e pratica impartita da istruttori internazionali che lavorano ed insegnano in tutto il mondo sotto il severo processo di certificazione della MUD. 

In primo luogo, MUD è una scuola internazionale con sedi e campus a New York, Los Angeles e in Europa.
Make-Up Designory è stata fondata nel 1997 a New York da truccatori professionisti che hanno condiviso l'obiettivo di portare l'eccellenza della formazione nel settore make-up.
Da oltre dieci anni, MUD forma i migliori make-up artist internazionali che, attraverso diplomi e certificati ufficiali MUD, operano anche grazie al network globale della scuola.
L’innovazione dei fondatori si basa su una proposta educativa professional-oriented, mettendo gli studenti in primo piano e istituendo una scuola specializzata che sostiene e soddisfa le molteplici esigenze dell’intero ambito make-up.
Tutti i corsi offerti nel programma di studi sono tenuti da esperti professionisti. MUD fornisce agli studenti competenze pratiche e concrete in un contesto accademico strutturato per massimizzare il processo di apprendimento. 

MUD Studio Milano - info@muditaly.com
School e Shop: Via soncino n. 1 - 20123 - Milano - 0236598968
www.makeupdesignory.it

Name: CHI Egypt
Description:
Systems Egypt, established in 2005, is the sole agent of CHI and BioSilk haircare lines in Egypt & Africa. Our product lines are dedicated to the professional market as well as end consumers.

CHI HAIRCARE is produced by Farouk Systems, Inc., a Houston-based company of hairdressers for hairdressers. We are known for manufacturing high-quality professional hair care products under the industry-leading brands: CHI & BioSilk. The company was founded in 1986 by Farouk Shami, a hairdresser whose mission is to provide the professional beauty industry with the most advanced American technology, with and for “Education, Environment and Innovation.”

Dr. Shami is the owner of 27 patents—creating the world’s first ammonia-free hair color. He was also the first to use silk proteins in the creation of the BioSilk Silk Therapy Line. In addition to his many innovations, Dr. Shami also invented the very first CHI Ceramic Hairstyling Iron. He is known for revolutionizing the hair industry with NASA technology while creating a safer and healthier work place and environment for both stylists and consumers.

Offering total hair solutions designed for every concern, CHI is keen on creating products suitable for everyone, which is why all of our products are sulfate, paraben, gluten & cruelty free. Additionally, all of our hair colors are free of harsh chemicals, such as ammonia and PPD. To add more to CHI’s safe ingredient list, all of our products range from 82% to 95% natural. Our hair treatment system, Enviro, is a much safer alternative to chemically-harsh treatments while simultaneously reducing up to 95% of frizz. Due to this innovative nature, many of our products are award-winners.

In Egypt, we give back to the community through our CHI Academy where we teach hairdressing techniques to those interested, providing opportunities for any individual to become certified hairdressers.  

Discover more on FaroukSystems CHI | BioSilk through our website, www.chibiosilkegypt.com.

Name: Miya Cosmetics

The success of Miya Cosmetics is based on an innovative strategy mix: 
1. Perfect match with global market trends and consumer needs; 
2. Superior quality of products confirmed with certificates, extended lab tests and thousands of consumer reviews and recommendations; 
3. Innovative marketing strategy aimed at building loyalty, engagement, brand experience and driving sales;  
4. Bestselling products that are efficient, easy to use, multifunctional, trendy, and not only desired by everyone but also at prices affordable for everyone. Just open, apply and you are ready to go! #ReadywithMiya #ImReady

We believe that even small companies like Miya can change the world for the better! We have been working on developing more ecological packaging for our products for a long time. Most of our products are already in package from recycled plastic, glass and sugar cane.

#WeAreReady

Name: Prima·Derm, S.L.
Description:
PRIMA·DERM was founded in 2008 by a world reference chemist, Dr. García Antón, recognized for developing the Argireline and SNAP, which are better known for being the first anti-wrinkle peptides to express a botox-like effect. For more than 15 years we have continued to share a deep commitment for skincare, offering dermocosmetic products based on science, and driven by innovation.

PRIMA·DERM is a pioneer in developing and controlling every process involved in the creation of our formulas. We are able to achieve this goal through research and analysis, as well as for understanding the needs of our patients, skin professionals and distributors.

From creating our own active ingredients that include peptides, growth factors and biotechnological extracts, to the development of proprietary novelty delivery systems in our in-house laboratory; allows us to introduce the highest concentrations of active ingredients and thus guaranteeing efficacy and results.

Singuladerm emerges as the main brand of Prima·Derm laboratories; the first advanced skincare brand expert in molecular and preventive cosmetics that transfers pharmaceutical science to dermocosmetics.

Gracias a nuestra firme apuesta por la investigación e innovación, nos hemos consolidado como una marca destacada y de referencia en el mundo de la cosmética 100% natural.

Cada uno de nuestros productos cosméticos está cuidadosamente formulado y fabricado en nuestros propios laboratorios con la máxima dedicación y esfuerzo, para garantizar su calidad y seguridad.

Actualmente contamos con una amplia gama de cosméticos 100% naturales y certificados para el cuidado facial, corporal y capilar. Todos ellos están certificados como naturales, cruelty-free, ecológicos y veganos por reconocidos organismos.

¿Qué nos hace únicos y especiales?
 La ciencia de lo natural.
 Nº1 en cosmética 100% natural.
 Laboratorios propios.
 Cosméticos con certificado natural, ecológico y vegano.

Pero, sin duda, nada de esto sería posible sin la dedicación y el compromiso del #teamarganour. Para nosotros, la satisfacción y el bienestar de nuestro talento en el puesto de trabajo es primordial. El trabajo en equipo, la comunicación y el desarrollo personal juegan un papel fundamental.

Name: Good Dye Young
Description:
Based in Nashville, TN Good Dye Young was created by Hayley Williams, lead singer of the Grammy Award winning band Paramore, and her longtime hair stylist and makeup artist, Brian O’Connor. Brian O’ Connor is a staple in the styling scene in the South’s entertainment capital, Nashville. His expertise in color and style has helped shape GDY’s products. Focused on quality ingredients and product performance, Brian sets a high standard for all of the brand’s offerings.

The two became best friends through years of creative collaboration and developed GDY as a hair color brand with a vision to create a community around self-expression, color and happiness about being who you are.

GDY is an extension of their shared passion to provide a brand that breaks down that wall of just being a company, and creating a community you can be a part of, empowered by tools that encourage your freedom of self-expression.

Name: Shanghai Jahwa United Co., Ltd
Description:
Shanghai Jahwa United Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as "Shanghai Jahwa") is one of the oldest Chinese daily-used chemicals companies. It was previously known as Hong Kong Kwong Sang Hong, which is established in 1898. It was listed on Shanghai Stock Exchange in 2001 over more than 100 years of development. Shanghai Jahwa has attached great importance to the construction of self-owned brands, with several domestic famous brands such as "Herborist", "Liushen", "Maxam", "GF" and "GIVING". 
Shanghai Jahwa has achieved widely recognized business performances. Its operating incomes have increased from RMB 1.67 billion in 2004 to RMB 5.335 billion in 2014, with a significant progress in its economic strength.
Shanghai Jahwa has placed a great deal of emphasis on the independent innovation. With the continuous increase of its annual investment in scientific research, the quantity of its R&D achievements and patent applications is on the top ranking in the domestic industry, and is has occupied the world leading position in the herbal personal care field.
Shanghai Jahwa has put a high priority on the quality management. It enjoys the largest production capacity in the same industry in China, covering cosmetics, personal care products and household care products. In the cosmetics industry, it was the first to pass the certification of quality management system ISO9001.
Shanghai Jahwa has always been at the forefront of the Chinese cosmetics industry from an international perspective. It is within our corporate value to be open and transparent, to adhere to an impartial incentive & punishment system, to drive innovation and customer satisfaction, to progress with integrity, and to help those in need. We are dedicated to creating value, giving back to our customers, employees, shareholders and the society, helping people usher in a life of grace, health and confidence, and developing into a great world’s leading enterprise.

Name: De Benguela
Description:
A De Benguela é a primeira loja do Brasil especializada em diferentes texturas de cabelo crespo natural para alongamentos e apliques. Trazemos produtos de qualidade e de difícil acesso no Brasil, contribuindo para o embelezamento e autoestima da mulher de cabelo crespo e cacheado.

Não trabalhamos apenas com cabelos, mas também com o resgate da autoestima, ajudando na nossa redescoberta e o auto amor da forma mais natural possível. Sempre buscando tornar mais acessíveis os produtos de qualidade que oferecemos.

Merecemos uma marca que nos ofereça opções reais, uma marca criada de nós para nós. Essa é a De Benguela.

MISSÃO
Fortalecer a autoestima mediante soluções e produtos inovadores, que ajudam a cuidar e realçar a beleza do cabelo natural em todas as suas texturas e formas.
Compromisso de ampliar o conceito de beleza.

VISÃO
Ser uma das principais referências no mercado de cabelo crespo e cacheado do Brasil e do mundo, alcançando cada vez mais público no âmbito online e presencial, graças à sua crescente autoridade no mercado da beleza.

VALORES
HONESTIDADE:  princípio básico norteador de nossas ações.
RESPEITO: à diversidade, às escolhas, à história, ao esforço.
INOVAÇÃO: como compromisso com os nossos clientes.
COERÊNCIA: ações condizentes com o nosso discurso.

Name: GEMOLOGY COSMETICS PARIS

She wanted to learn more about the effects of trace elements which are concentrated naturally at the heart of these minerals, where they are protected from outside pollution. Iron, Magnesium, Zinc or Chromium... It has been scientifically proven that these pure and powerful activators provide multiple benefits. Drawing on the skin-enhancing characteristics of natural minerals, Gemology beauty care offers carefully chosen, high quality activators. Radiance, moisturizing, firmness, glow, freshness: For each goal, Gemology has formulated the care your skin needs, the pampering your skin will truly appreciate. Your skin is precious, offer it the care it deserves. Today present in 28 countries in the world through a Spa, beauty salon and prestigious hotel network, the brand stands out as the leader of the mineral cosmetic.

Name: Laboratoires Bio Seasons
Description:
Depuis 2008, Laboratoires Bio Seasons est un acteur français majeur des cosmétiques certifiés bio, alliant naturalité, innovation et exigence qualité. Notre expertise couvre toute la chaîne : R&D–formulation, fabrication, packaging, qualité, marketing, et logistique, pour accompagner marques, distributeurs et projets MDD.

Notre promesse

Formules « extra-douces » avec ≥97 % d’ingrédients d’origine naturelle.

Double certification : ECOCERT & COSMOS Organic.

Production 100 % française, traçabilité et conformité réglementaire renforcées.

Agilité logistique : commandes prêtes sous 72 h en France, processus cadré et fiable.

Nos services clés

Marque blanche / MDD : accompagnement de A à Z (cahier des charges, formulation, tests, identité de gamme, packs, industrialisation, mise en marché).

Lancements rapides : large catalogue de formules existantes pour accélérer le time-to-market.

Façonnage : prise en charge production & conditionnement de vos propres formules, en respect strict de votre identité.

Partenariat distribution : offres compétitives, visibilité planning, support marketing et pilotage qualité.

Chiffres & capacités

Création : 2008 ; nouvel atelier R&D & production en 2023 pour augmenter les volumes et la robustesse qualité.

Export actif depuis 2011, maîtrise des exigences internationales.

Entrepôt >16 000 m² : disponibilité sécurisée, préparation et expédition réactives.

Capacité d’industrialisation scalable : montée en charge rapide selon vos plans commerciaux.

Pourquoi nous choisir ?

S’associer à Bio Seasons, c’est un partenariat fiable et engagé : conformité réglementaire, qualité “Made in France”, sourcing rigoureux, process industrialisés, et adaptation sur-mesure à vos ambitions — du lancement express au développement de gammes complètes.

Parlons de vos objectifs. Nous cadrons vos besoins, définissons la feuille de route et livrons une offre opérationnelle, prête à performer sur vos marchés.

Name: BIOCAP LABORATÓRIO
Description:
Para a Biocap, beleza é saúde e cuidado e, por isso, levamos tão a sério o que fazemos. Nossa dedicação começa desde a escolha das matérias-primas e de nossos fornecedores, e se estende por todo o processo, até a distribuição de nossos produtos. 

Nos preocupamos e nos empenhamos em ter canais diretos com nossos consumidores, colaboradores e representantes, estando sempre aberta a novos caminhos e oportunidades. A BIOCAP conta com laboratório de análises e desenvolvimento próprio, produção e envase automatizados (sem contato humano), garantindo assim qualidade e segurança. Todos os processos e procedimentos estão atualizados segundo as Boas Práticas de Fabricação e de Controle de Qualidade.

Os produtos também são submetidos a testes de segurança e eficácia, devidamente notificados e registrados junto à ANVISA. Os testes são supervisionados por uma equipe multidisciplinar, realizados somente in vitro (laboratoriais), por um grupo seleto de voluntários, com avaliação por meio de testes de uso e de segurança clínica.

Name: Aldo Coppola
Description: Aldo Coppola is a family business that was established in 1966, founded on the creative and artistic talent of Aldo Coppola, a true innovator in the world of hair. In 1986, the vision of his son, Aldo Coppola Jr., brought a new business philosophy, with the opening of direct Ateliers, the start of a franchise network, the creation of a freelancers’ agency, the inauguration of the Academy and the distribution of Aldo Coppola products. The heart of the brand are the Aldo Coppola Ateliers. The salons are located in Milan, Rome, Florence, Forte dei Marmi, Porto Cervo and Lugano. The Aldo Coppola chain of franchisees has more than 80 salons, named “Aldo Coppola by”, located mainly in Italy (55 salons), followed by Russia (18 salons), Qatar (3 salons), Kazakhstan and the UAE. The training of Aldo Coppola staff takes place at the Aldo Coppola Academy, a place where all the  techniques are developed and all the branded products are tested for use. While developing new hairstyling techniques, the brand also focuses on creating new products: Aldo Coppola and Shatush. The name Shatush was used for the first time in 1991 to describe a colouring technique that recreates the natural effect of hair lightened by the sun. The first Shatush product line was then launched in 2001, based on the idea of sustainable beauty, strong professional experience and certified, leading-edge cosmetics. In 2022, Shatush was also presented as a new franchise formula focusing on beauty innovation and design. Another brand is part of the family: Go Coppola. Founded in 2007, it is the pret-à-porter version of Aldo Coppola. The brand today has more than 40 franchising hair salons in Italy and 2 in Russia. All the communication, PR, events and out-of-salon services are handled by the Aldo Coppola Agency. Today Aldo Coppola is a benchmark brand in the world of beauty and fashion, collaborating with the best fashion brands, the most renowned international photographers and the most relevant magazines.

Name: Teeez Cosmetics
Description:
ART IS EVERYTHING

Beauty has no limits.
Teeez knows no boundaries.
Developed for true creators, awaken the artist within you.

CLEAN IS LIBERATING

Detox from the tox. Teeez fuses a fresh mix of good for you, good for nature, and good for life principles to bring clean beauty into the now and deep into the future.

SKINCARE IS LOVE

Your birthday suit’s beauty is timeless. Cherish it. Love it. Protect it. Every Teeez product is packed with skincare benefits to keep your beauty shining.

Teeez Cosmetics embraces beauty and all of its facets: diversity, self-expression and individuality. We fuse together the worlds of fashion and beauty, offering beauty enthusiasts an ever-changing experience; from an immersive store experience to eye-catching packaging and premium products.
 
We are seen as a pioneer in fast premium beauty delivering great storytelling. To our beauty community, our product isn’t just make-up, it’s an everyday fashion accessory that empowers their best self.
 
Avant la lettre Teeez is an Ethically Sound brand: Clean Make-Up, Vegan, No Nasty Ingredients, Cruelty Free, Paraben Free, Natural Ingredients and more. Make-up infused with skin care benefits. Superior ingredients measured against the highest standards of quality, made in Europe.
 
It is our mission to bring beauty experiences that are fresh, focused and fearless. For women that are willing to buy into premium beauty and experiences.

Name: Ivia Beaute
Description:
Ivia Beaute Pvt Ltd. is a venture from the house BHIMSAINI, a pioneer in the Kajal Industry. A leading manufacturer marketer of Ayurvedic Skincare, Healthcare & Eyecare products since 1950 servicing to Indian as well as International Markets. Initially, the company was known as Murari Bros. (I) Pvt. Ltd. 

We offer a wide range of Skin Care Products like Face Wash, Nourishing Cream, Sunscreen lotions, Face Packs, Bleach Crème, Hair remover Crème,  Under Eye Creams products and many more. These products are enriched with the goodness of Ayurveda, the age old Indian science based on active natural ingredients, blended with modern formulation & individual fragrances. At  Astaberry we believe Beauty is the purest feeling of the soul. Beauty arises when the soul is satisfied.

ASTABERRY products are sold across India & Internationally, with a presence in 250 towns & cities within India & more than 10 countries worldwide. They are regularly being exported to Nepal, UAE, Malaysia, Srilanka, USA, Italy, Australia, Mauritius, Jordan & Iraq for several years.

“Culmination of Ancient Indian Knowledge & Advanced International Expertise”

Name: Balmy
Description: Balmy, insan sağlığına ve kişisel bakıma hizmet eden doğal ya da sentetik malzemelerden oluşan farklı çeşitlerde banyo/masaj ürünleri üreterek iç piyasa ve dış piyasada satışa sunmaktadır.

Name: DERMASCOPE Magazine
Description: "The Encyclopedia of Aesthetics" started in 1972 as a newsletter for the Aesthetics International Association.  DERMASCOPE Magazine educates 30,000 readers each month in the professional skin care industry.  DERMASCOPE Magazine hosts four major skin care trade shows,(I.C.E.), in the US and the Professional Hair Removal Conference annually.  Press is complimentary to the industry.

Name: CURA COSMETICS GROUP
Description:
Cura Marketing ist ein Dienstleistungsunternehmen im Bereich der Kosmetik und beschäftigt sich mit der Entwicklung von Marken, Marketingkonzepten und Vermarktungsstrategien für Kosmetik.

Cura Marketing, mit Firmensitz in Innsbruck, beschäftigt 95 Mitarbeiter, agiert europaweit in 8 Ländern, setzt jährlich 45 Mio. € um und weist eine Exportquote von über 95% auf.

Erfahren Sie mehr unter: www.curacosmetic.com

Name: Swalis officiel
Description:
La SARL UNIVER COSMETIQUE

est une entreprise spécialisée dans le développement,  production et la commercialisation des produits cosmétiques, nous commercialisons une large gamme de produits de soins capillaires et corporels à travers notre marque phare SWALIS.

Au fil des années, nous sommes devenus parmi les acteurs majeurs dans le développement de l’industrie en Algérie. 

Un travail impeccable et des produits de hautes qualités nous ont permis de nous bâtir une solide réputation, nous travaillons corps et âmes  pour être à la hauteur de vos attentes

NOTRE MISSION

Notre mission principale est de vous offrir les meilleurs produits suivant votre budget. La Qualité reste un facteur essentiel pour asseoir durablement notre position, affirmer notre réputation & conquérir de nouveaux marchés. Les principaux objectifs de la politique qualité de LA SARL UNIVER COSMETIQUE tournent autour des axes suivants :

Répondre adéquatement aux exigences de nos clients
Améliorer notre productivité & la qualité des produits proposés
Assurer la polyvalence & améliorer nos compétences
Renforcer les relations de partenariat avec nos fournisseurs clients
Développer de nouveaux produits tout en protégeant la sécurité d’autrui notre environnement.
A fin d’atteindre ces objectifs, notre société revoit de manière permanente le processus de satisfaction de ses clients.

L’ensemble du personnel de LA SARL UNIVER COSMETIQUE doit donc se familiariser avec les différents principes inscrits dans notre système documentaire & les respecter

NOTRE PHILOSOPHIE  Votre écoute fait partie de notre ADN

NOS VALEURS Confiance, travail d’équipe, innovation, qualité, prix, Recherche & Développement et performances industrielles

Name: Floral Street
Description:
Floral Street. A brand built on the streets of London. A city where people are proud to be themselves, proud to represent their culture. This formed the axis for our collection of contemporary floral fragrances. Only these are no ordinary florals. 

Floral Street is about breaking with tradition. It’s about peeling back the curtain of the secret world of fragrance. It’s about ease, modernity and joy. About beauty that doesn't cost the Earth.

Because we care for our environment, we have created packaging with principles. Reusable, recyclable or compostable and all sustainably sourced.

Each of our fragrances are unique and tailored for different moods - whether you are feeling dreamy, focused or quirky. Who will you be today?

Name: Sundae Body
Description: A joyful twist on everyday body care rituals. Vegan, Cruelty-Free & Super Fun.

Name: Bade Natural
Description:
Bâde, tasavvuf edebiyatında "Aşk" manasında kullanılır. Bu nedenle Bâde Natural’i hayal ederken, doğadaki saf ve temiz aşktan esinlendik.

Bâde Natural, gökyüzü ile yeryüzü arasındaki saf ve temiz aşkın sonucu olan tohumlardan ve çiçeklerden elde edilen yağlar içerir. Bu tohumlar ve çiçekler portakal bahçeleri, yeşil otlaklar ve temiz gölleri olan kırsal alanlardan gelir. Aşkla toplanır ve aşkla size sunulur.

Huzurlu ve sakin bir ortamda sizin için tasarladığımız bu taze ürünleri, bizim kadar keyifle kullanmanızı dileriz.

Cildinize aşık olmak için, aşkla...

Name: Bubble T Cosmetics Ltd
Description: Tea-inspired bath & beauty products that look, smell & feel great. SLS, paraben & cruelty-free.

Name: Apres Nail
Description:
As the pioneer in soft gel nail extension technology, Aprés Nail is united by one common motif- creating standards and not trends. Our patented products are developed with one goal in mind: to break the habit of fast nail fashion and pave the way for compelling change in the professional nail industry.
We work alongside nail technicians to understand what the market and industry want and need. And we deliver with quality, consistency, and innovation.

Name: SHISEIDO GERMANY
Description:
- BEAUTY INNOVATIONS FOR A BETTER WORLD -

Die Shiseido Gruppe ist mit 120 internationalen Marken eins der top Kosmetik-Unternehmen weltweit. Neben Shiseido gehören unter anderem folgende Marken zu unserem Portfolio: NARS, Clé de Peau Beauté, Gallinée, Narciso Rodriguez, Zadig & Voltaire, Drunk Elephant, Serge Lutens und Issey Miyake.

Als globales Schönheitsunternehmen japanischen Ursprungs entwickeln wir nicht nur Kosmetik, sondern führen auch noch nie dagewesene Produkte ein und schaffen neue Werte, die darüber hinausgehen. Durch diese Aktivitäten realisieren wir "Schönheitsinnovationen", die zu neuen Lebensstilen für Verbraucher auf der ganzen Welt führen. 

Unsere Philosophie bildet sich aus unserer MISSION unserer DNA und unseren PRINZIPIEN: 

Unsere MISSION definiert unseren Zweck und unser Versprechen an die Menschen, die Gesellschaft und die Umwelt. Für jeden Shiseido Mitarbeiter in der ganzen Welt, ist unsere MISSION der "raison d'etre". 

Unsere DNA ist die eigentliche Essenz von Shiseido. Sie wird seit unserer Gründung im Jahr 1872 weitergegeben und ist bis heute - für jeden Mitarbeiter - der Kern von allem, was wir tun.

Unsere PRINZIPIEN dienen als Arbeitsprinzipien, die jeder Mitarbeiter von Shiseido befolgen muss. Diese acht Arbeitsprinzipien - bekannt als "TRUST 8" - beruhen auf der Idee, dass gegenseitiges Vertrauen der Schlüssel zum Erfolg in unserer MISSION ist.

Bereit für neue Herausforderungen? Werde ein Teil von Shiseido: https://corp.shiseido.com/en/careers/

Name: Summit Cosmetics Europe
Description:
Summit Cosmetics Europe is specialized in the distribution of raw materials for the Cosmetic Industry with an headquarter in Paris and sales offices in Germany.

Our expertise relies on the confidence of our partners, suppliers and customers which know the requirements of a profession where the performances need to remain sustainable.

Name: Groupe Guinot - Mary Cohr
Description:
Le Groupe Guinot - Mary Cohr s'est imposé comme expert mondial et leader en Institut de Beauté en France, en créant des méthodes de Soins à l'avant-garde de la technologie, pour révéler la Beauté de chaque femme.

Il est dirigé par Monsieur Jean-Daniel Mondin, Docteur en Pharmacie qui, par sa formation, a orienté et développé l'esprit de recherche de ses Laboratoires (site de Dammarie-lès-Lys en Seine-et-Marne).

Avec des méthodes de Soins à la pointe du progrès, il a gagné la confiance des professionnels de l'Esthétique et a su créer l'esprit Guinot - Mary Cohr qui a entraîné le succès de l'Entreprise, l'enthousiasme de ses collaborateurs et la confiance de ses Esthéticiennes.

Ses Soins de Beauté et Produits de Soins sont distribués dans plus de 17 000 instituts (dont 470 franchisés) à travers 75 pays dans le monde.

Name: Lancôme
Description: We are passionate. We are real. We are allies. We are #happinessactivists and we’re just getting started.

Name: HOK BEAUTY PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
HOK MAKEUP IS A PART OF KANVAR GROUP WHICH STARTED OUT BY NIKHIL BHATIA IN 2012 AS AN IMPORTER OF INTERNATIONAL SKINCARE AND BEAUTY BRANDS WHICH HAS BECOME A KEY PLAYER AND TOP 3 SUPPLIER IN THE MARKET. HOK BEAUTY PRIVATE LIMITED IS INCORPORATED ON 27th February 2017  SELLING HIGH-QUALITY INTERNATIONAL MAKEUP PRODUCTS AT GOOD PRICE.

EXCLUSIVE BRANDS  - MAKEUP REVOLUTION (LONDON), L.A GIRL (USA), WET N WILD (USA), L.A COLOURS ( USA), MILANI (USA), EVELINE (POLAND), LAMEL (POLAND) AND MANY MORE.
 
[ MORE ABOUT DIRECTOR ]
NIKHIL BHATIA HAS COMPLETED HIS MBA IN MARKETING FROM THE UNIVERSITY OF CENTRAL ENGLAND, UK, AND B.E IN CHEMICAL ENGINEERING FROM K.N MODI INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING INDIA. HE HAS ENRICHED EXPOSURE IN ALL THE ASPECTS OF BEAUTY, COSMETICS, AND MARKETING WHICH RESULTED IN THE LAUNCH OF HIS GROUP BEAUTY AND SKINCARE BRAND UNDER "KANVAR PROBIO PVT LTD."  WHICH OFFERS THE BEST NATURAL, VEGAN AND CRUETLY FREE INGREDIENTS.

Name: Egyptian Company For Cosmetics - ECC
Description:
The Egyptian Company for Cosmetics is a leading toll manufacturer that has been providing world-class services since 1981. With a focus on personal care, cosmetics, cosmeceutical markets, ECC uses proven formulas with the finest active ingredients to deliver exceptional solutions for its clients.

ECC's extensive experience in contract manufacturing makes it the go-to hub for all beauty care development needs, from concept to shelf and everything in between. The company has a proven track record of delivering high-quality products that meet the exact specifications of its clients.
Our commitment to excellence is reflected in its state-of-the-art facilities, which are equipped with cutting-edge technology and staffed by a team of experts who are dedicated to delivering exceptional solutions. The company's services include product development, manufacturing and packaging.

Name: HCT by kdc/one
Description:
HCT by kdc/one is your global partner in cutting-edge formulation and packaging innovation, offering seamless, end-to-end turnkey solutions that bring your vision to life faster than ever. Our integrated team of world-class experts in packaging, formulation, brushes, accessories, and devices is here to guide you through every step of the design and development journey—from initial concept to a flawless final product.

As a proud member of the kdc/one network, HCT benefits from the strength and expertise of a trusted global leader in beauty, personal care, and home care. With access to more than 25 manufacturing facilities, 26 R&D and innovation labs, and 15,000 talented team members across the Americas, Europe, and Asia, we deliver exceptional solutions on a global scale.

Welcome to HCT by kdc/one—where innovation meets beauty, and your next big idea becomes reality.

Name: KICKS
Description:
About KICKS
KICKS is a leading player on the beauty market in Sweden, Norway, and Finland, and is part of the Matas Group A/S. KICKS meet the Nordic beauty consumers on a daily basis and the objective is to continuously push the development within the category and stay ahead of the game to meet changing consumer demands. With innovation, personal service, strong product brands and a unique consumer experience, KICKS manifests its position as market leader. 

KICKS offers a holistic beauty concept with makeup, fragrances, skincare, and haircare. With professional beauty experts and a unique omnichannel model, KICKS provides personal services, guidance, and inspiration in addition to more than 25.000 products from over 300 brands. KICKS has 228 stores in Sweden, Norway and Finland and a localised e-commerce in each of these markets. 

KICKS has the largest customer club within beauty in the Nordic region with over 3.8 million members. The company also has a strong community “KICKS Beauty Talks”, for all beauty lovers where they can find inspiration and exchange experiences with like-minded.

Name: (MALIN+GOETZ)
Description: MALIN+GOETZ was founded in the chelsea neighborhood of new york city in 2004 by founders matthew malin + andrew goetz who set out to uncomplicate skincare. with limited shelf space in their small new york city apartment, they started the brand with 6 essential products that would work for all skin types, including their own. a cleanser + a moisturizer for the face, body + hair that leave even the most sensitive skin feeling healthy + balanced from head to toe. through the years, the brand has added a curated selection of targeted treatments to address specific concerns when your skin needs more.

Name: Natura Bissé
Description:
Natura Bissé is a luxury skincare company founded in Barcelona in 1979. It is now passionately managed by the second generation of the Fisas family.
 
Thanks to the expertise of skilled aestheticians, the brand understands that every skin has its own voice. The skincare line uses this belief to fuse pioneering technology with the most delicate human touch to develop products that adapt to the differing needs of every guest as well as transformative spa experiences that improve self-steem and increases the sense of well-being up to almost 70%. Proven by neuroscience.
 
The constant pursuit of excellence has led Natura Bissé to receive numerous awards including a four-peat recognition as the “World Best Spa Brand” at the 2018, 2019, 2020 and 2021 World Spa Awards.
 
To date, Natura Bissé continues to expand throughout the world in the most distinguished luxury retailers and best-in-class spas with presence in 40 countries and subsidiaries in Spain, United States, Mexico, United Kingdom and China.
 
True to its values of commitment, Natura Bissé is determined to satisfy today’s needs without compromising the future by balancing environmental care, social well-being, and economic growth. Since 2008, the brand collaborates with the Ricardo Fisas Natura Bissé Foundation to contribute to people’s wellbeing.

Name: Kopari Beauty
Description:
Clean. Vegan. Cruelty-Free. High-Performance Skin, Body & Sun Care.
Everybody should feel like paradise. That’s why our clean skin & body care products are made using nature’s best ingredients in the world, powered by proven actives, and backed by clinical results to give you glowing, nourished, protected skin, head-to-toe.

Name: Grupo Cottonbaby
Description:
A Higie-Plus Cottonbaby é uma empresa respeitada no Brasil e em diversos países pela sua qualidade, inovação e diversificação de produtos. 

Em todo território nacional, vem conquistando mais espaço nos PDVs, ganhando, não apenas a preferência do consumidor, mas também fãs da marca que se identificam com o seu propósito e a sua visão de mundo. 

Atuando no mercado desde 1993, seu avançado parque industrial permite produzir uma completa linha de produtos voltados para higiene pessoal, proteção, beleza e mais recentemente saneantes. 

Além disso, desenvolve produtos terceirizados para algumas das mais conceituadas empresas nacionais e multinacionais dos setores industriais, distribuidores e varejistas do país. 

Todo esse processo é balizado por um rígido padrão de qualidade que garante aos produtos fabricados pela Cottonbaby a máxima segurança, conforto e bem-estar aos consumidores.

Name: Infinity Clinic Pharma
Description:
Infinity Clinic Pharma is an active company focused on developing, manufacturing and commercializing skin & hair care products, includes dermo-cosmetics products for personal care, face, body & hair care.
Infinity Clinic Pharma was founded in 2005 as a scientific office for Egyptian company for cosmetics “ECC”.
Recently, Infinity Clinic Pharma developed a new business unit that focused on developing, manufacturing and commercializing all forms of nutraceuticals & multi vitamins products.

Name: LOOTAH Perfumes
Description:
Lootah Perfumes are one of the United Arab Emirates' finest perfumiers, offering a collection of premium oriental and French fragrances. We rely on premium international sources for our incense, fragrant oud, blended oils, and agarwood because these are the ingredients that set our perfume apart from the competition.

Tradition is important to Lootah Perfumes; our grandfather has now handed down his passion and knowledge through four generations of parfumiers. The perfume and incense knowledge that he shared have helped define the wooden warmth and floral essences throughout the modern Lootah range. The Eastern spices and natural forest scents were first introduced thanks to the expertise and dedication he shared with his family.

This care and tradition have led to Lootah becoming the UAE's leading contemporary perfumery, with a wide range of delightful perfumes and incenses along with exquisite fragrant oils and rich agarwood aromas.

Lootah brings Emirati fragrances to the world stage by offering the finest perfumes with premium ingredients. It draws deeply on tradition but also seeks to innovate and produce scents with wide international appeal. Thanks to prime retail locations in the UAE and Oman, and an ever-growing online presence, Lootah continues to appeal to those seeking both traditional and modern fragrances with a uniquely Emirati influence.

Name: COCUNAT | Clinical Cosmetics
Description:
Clinical Cosmetics. Skincare with aesthetic-medicine results. Winner of 30 international beauty awards.

Guided by science, we’re revolutionizing skincare by developing high-performance formulas that deliver aesthetic-medicine results — right at home.

Each formula is:
 Science-based: Backed by rigorous, independent clinical tests.
 Clean & 100% toxic-free: Respecting both your skin and the planet.

Born digital in Barcelona, COCUNAT now reaches customers worldwide, with a strong presence across Europe and the United States.

Name: International Consumer Products (Pvt.) Limited
Description:
International Consumer Products (Private) Limited is well renowned for its expertise in manufacturing and marketing of high quality personal care products, toiletries, cosmetics and consumer products. The company and its brands enjoy a remarkable reputation in Pakistan and neighbouring markets. ICPL is a leading consumer products manufacturer in Pakistan.



ICPL is now embarking on the journey to reach the next level of excellence by maintaining high standard of quality, meeting customer's expectations with continual improvement of ISO 9001:2015 by defining, communicating and monitoring of targets/objectives.

Name: Augustinus Bader
Description:
For every giant leap in technology, the human body remains our most remarkable machine: this belief has led Professor Augustinus Bader, one of the foremost scientists of his generation, to unlock the body's healing code. His breakthrough medical treatment activates and orchestrates the body's own stem cells to repair and regenerate.

From skincare to clinical practice to biotech research, all our advances are grounded in a belief that the body is its own best therapist.

Name: BH Cosmetics
Description:
BH Cosmetics is a cutting-edge leader in color cosmetics based in Los Angeles, with omni-channel distribution on our direct-to-consumer e-commerce sites and across key retailers such as ULTA, dm and Beauty Bay. 
What we’re about? High-quality, enticing products at affordable prices. Because we believe ALL makeup lovers should be able to express themselves with stunning looks. And all of our products - including our beloved shadow palettes, brush sets and so much more - are 100% cruelty-free: always have been and always will be.
Another plus? Over 90% of our catalog is vegan, with more extra-clean and sustainable options being created all the time. 
Our 70+ employees across the U.S. and Europe live by the motto “Be Heard, Be Curious, Be Seen” and aim to make a positive societal impact on our 1 million+ loyal customer base and 4 million+ global social community. 


Follow us on:
Instagram: http://instagram.com/bhcosmetics
Twitter: https://twitter.com/#!/bhcosmetics
Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/bhcosmetics
YouTube: http://www.youtube.com/user/BHCosmetics

Name: Cosmint
Description: Cosmint is a leader in the industry of cosmetics, both domestic and international. It is a manufacturer, but and above all a solution provider, which includes process development, innovative formulation and technologies, being all the time focused on the environment sustainability.

Name: Joico
Description:
Joico, a fast-growing company in the Professional Beauty industry, is a division of Henkel. 

Our Mission:
We eat, sleep and breathe beauty! We develop innovative, top performing products. We design artistic imagery that inspires creativity. We surround ourselves with the most gifted artists and educators in the industry. We are 100% committed to the advancement of the global salon community. Why? Because beauty isn’t our job—it’s our passion!

Name: John Paul Mitchell Systems
Description:
John Paul Mitchell Systems (JPMS) is a top manufacturer of high-quality hair care products and styling tools through several brands including Paul Mitchell, Awapuhi Wild Ginger, Tea Tree, Pro Tools, Neuro, MITCH and MVRCK, plus professional hair color from brands including The Demi and Color XG. 

JPMS was founded in 1980 by co-founders Paul Mitchell and John Paul DeJoria with more than 300 employees globally and Michaeline DeJoria as CEO. We were the first professional hair care company to take a stand against animal testing, and we continue our strong commitment to giving back by supporting a wide range of philanthropic causes both domestically and internationally. 

JPMS products can be purchased at professional salons, Paul Mitchell Schools and through authorized online retailers. Join our team!

Name: Bottega Verde
Description:
Bottega Verde nasce nel 1972 a Pienza (Siena) come piccola erboristeria. Mantenendo intatto l’attenzione per la natura e i suoi pincipi attivi, oggi il marchio Bottega Verde è diventato una grande catena composta da oltre 400 punti vendita, presenti in Italia e all’estero. 

La filosofia naturale che guida ogni scelta, il recupero di antiche formule tradizionali rielaborate alla luce delle più recenti scoperte scientifiche, la produzione interna all’azienda di tutti i prodotti di trattamento e l’alta qualità di cosmetici proposti ad un prezzo accessibile, sono alla base del successo di Bottega Verde. A contribuire a questo successo anche la capacità dell'azienda di essere presenti con i propri porodotti su più canali di vendita: vendita per corrispondenza, negozi, e-commerce e telemarketing sono in Bottega Verde perfettamente integrati. 

Con una media di oltre 100 novità lanciate ogni anno e circa 300 principi funzionali di origine naturale,Bottega Verde vanta una gamma ampia e articolata che comprende trattamenti per il viso, il corpo, il make-up, capelli, solari, uomo, integratori e una grande creatività nell’area delle confezioni regalo natalizie tanto da essere riconosciuta la numero1 in Italia nelle confezioni cosmetiche da regalo (fonte GFK Eurisko). 
L’azienda è leader nel numero di brevetti sviluppati e le formule, testate microbiologicamente e dermatologicamente,sono ipoallergeniche e adatte anche alle pelli più sensibili. 

Per il sesto anno consecutivo, nel 2013 Bottega Verde si è aggiudicata il premio “Retailer of the year” nella categoria Erboristeria mentre ha vinto il “Webshop Awards Italy 2013”, il premio dedicato al Miglior sito di e-commerce, sia a livello assoluto, sia nella Categoria Salute e Bellezza. Sempre nel 2013 è giunto per Bottega Verde il riconoscimento di “Marca italiana più scelta dalle donne per la cura della pelle”

*certificato da GfK Eurisko, il più importante istituto operante in Italia nelle ricerche sui consumatori.

Name: Weleda USA
Description: Since our founding in Switzerland nearly a century ago, we have believed in nature’s ability to help you feel healthy, balanced, and beautiful. Our products are thoughtfully crafted to harness the vitality of nature and work in harmony with your body’s own restorative abilities. But it’s about more than just looking and feeling good—it’s about doing good. We are committed to building fair-trade partnerships that honor the human spirit and respect the natural world. Our environmental consciousness goes beyond our sourcing to include every aspect of our company, products, and packaging. Our products are always free from parabens, phthalates, synthetic preservatives, and synthetic fragrances. We never test on animals.

Name: BEAUTYCOLOR COMPANY
Description:
A BEAUTYCOLOR Company, uma empresa com 30 anos de história e com DNA 100% brasileiro. Aqui, somos um time de mais de 400 funcionários, divididos em laboratório, pesquisa, fábrica, logística, marketing, varejo. Todos em ação, em busca de trazer soluções capazes de melhorar a vida das pessoas através da sua autoestima.
Com responsabilidade com o meio ambiente e animais, nossos produtos se dividem entre as marcas BEAUTYCOLOR e SOUL POWER: Coloração BEAUTYCOLOR, Soul Power, Puríssi, Vermelhos Infalíveis, Hollywood Blondes, Color Xplode, Color Inspire, E.lixir, Bela & Cor, Pó descolorante, LÚMIAN, Pó descolorante BELA & COR, Kit Desamarelador BEAUTYCOLOR, Esmaltes BEAUTYCOLOR e BEAUTYCOLOR MEN.

Nossa história é contada por conquistas e por inovação!

Name: Liz Earle Beauty Co. Limited
Description:
Our Great British beauty brand started life on the idyllic Isle of Wight back in 1995. Co-founders, Liz Earle and Kim Buckland, paired their beauty business know-how and a passion for botanical ingredients, natural health and wellbeing to create a multi award-winning beauty range – including our much-loved hero, Cleanse & Polish Hot Cloth Cleanser. 
Our world expanded in 2015, when we joined Walgreens Boots Alliance. With their full support of our founding philosophy and responsible practices, we are now able to reach more women across the globe, to help them achieve healthy-looking skin. While our founders Liz and Kim are no longer part of the business, we continue to uphold the principles they set out from day one.

Our ambition is to keep our 'living' company thriving while staying true to our values of exceptional customer service, a genuine love for confidence-boosting beauty and attention to detail – like sourcing the finest naturally active ingredients, known for their unique efficacy on skin. We strive to play fair, working closely with farmers from around the world, to ensure our botanicals are responsibly and ethically sourced. 

If you, like us, are passionate about all you do and like to be part of a winning team, then you could have what it takes to be part of our multi-channel business and we’d love to hear from you - please follow our No7 Beauty Company page for all updates and how you can join us.

Name: Pat McGrath Cosmetics
Description:
Pat McGrath Labs
Straight from the Lab – where unadulterated experimentation meets raw glamour. A rule-breaking playground for the world’s most influential and sought-after makeup artist, Pat McGrath, to introduce divinely disruptive discoveries. 
Cult products that define future trends; instant addictions for the bold and obsessed.
The only rule? Use Without Caution.

Name: ABC - Associação Brasileira de Cosmetologia
Description:
A Associação Brasileira de Cosmetologia (ABC) é uma entidade, fundada em abril de 1973, com objetivo de promover o desenvolvimento da cosmetologia. 
Formada por um grupo de profissionais das áreas de Farmácia e Química, ligados a universidades e empresas de produtos e matérias-primas para a indústria de higiene pessoal, cosméticos e perfumes, a ABC promove atividades tecnológicas, científicas e de regulamentação em prol do setor.
