A ABC é representante oficial do Brasil junto a IFSCC (International Federation of Societies of Cosmetic Chemists) - sociedade que congrega cerca de trinta e cinco entidades internacionais, além de representar o Brasil junto à comunidade internacional científica da Cosmetologia, participando e promovendo atividades para o aperfeiçoamento da integração mundial e troca de informações.

Name: iS CLINICAL
Description:
At Innovative Skincare, our team is dedicated to improving the physical and emotional well-being of people globally through the development of scientifically advanced, botanically based, and clinically proven skincare products. We employ the highest ethical standards in our quest to advance the science of skin health, innovating proprietary formulas that are effective for all ages, genders, and skin types. 
 
What sets Innovative Skincare apart is our commitment to offering superior products utilizing the most advanced technologies and ingredients. Our world-class team of experts includes renowned pharmacologists, geneticists, biologists, and physicians responsible for some of today’s most significant advances in the fields of skincare and age management medicine. iS Clinical products are rigorously tested and backed by independent clinical studies to document their quality and efficacy. 
 
Innovative Skincare has embraced clean beauty as a core pillar of our values since the company’s inception. We focus on making environmentally conscious choices at every step of the product lifecycle, from ingredients to packaging and shipping. Our products are always formulated using the most advanced technology featuring the most efficacious pure botanical ingredients available, and they are never tested on animals.
 
Our mission has always been to improve the physical and emotional well-being of people globally. We believe in giving back first and fuel this mission by supporting many charitable and philanthropic organizations that share this same vision of improving the well-being of all.

Name: SICAF Cosmétiques
Description:
Sicaf Cosmétiques is a french industry leader in cosmetics.
On 17.000 sqm of production units in 3 sites (Paris, Valréas, Carpentras), Sicaf covers 3 main areas of activities: 

Innovation and R&D
Manufacturing
Filling

Key numbers: 50 M€ turnover, 250 employees, 300 formulas created yearly, 2.100 tons of manufactured products, 21 millions produced units on 25 conditioning lines (small to very large batches).

+ Galenic forms : emulsions, makeups, gels, foaming products, sticks, powders, oils, balms
+ Specific know-how : micro-dosing (DuoMix Ecodis), hot fillings (sticks and balms), sealings, bi-phases products (liquid-liquid, liquid-powder)
+ Primary conditioning :  flasks, airless packaging, pots, tubes, glass vials
+ Secondary conditioning: labeling, cases, wedges, boxes, sleeving.

Sicaf, creative manufacturing

Name: Vita Derm Hipoalergênica
Description:
Há mais de 30 anos, a Vita Derm promove tratamentos seguros e eficazes, garantindo qualidade desde a formulação até a aplicação de produtos. Tudo o que é produzido pela empresa em tantos anos de dedicação ao cuidado, para proporcionar o bem que a beleza faz. #pele #cabelo

Produtos de última geração para pele e cabelo, investimentos em pesquisa e tecnologia e desenvolvimento profissional, são os alicerces de negócios da Vita Derm Hipoalergênica. 

Com mais de 270 produtos em nossas linhas capilares e estéticas, dispomos do mais completo modelo de franquia de beleza do país, atendendo com nosso portfólio a 350 cidades-chave em todo o Brasil e exterior.

Name: Conscious Chemist
Description:
We are an innovative clean beauty brand, offering functional & effective products that are not an alternative but a fundamental choice for today's aware and thoughtful consumer. By absorbing the best of both worlds, nature and the science we are creating a range of intelligent biocompatible skincare products. 

Our mission is to create products that are safe for every skin and the environment. We believe in truth over pseudo-science and always have an ear on what the beauty community likes, thinks and foresees to be the future. We treat self-care with utmost reverence and as not a means for indulgence. Functionality is at the core of our vision and products.

Name: Germaine de Capuccini
Description:
Spanish professional skincare company with 50 years of experience in expert skincare. 

We develop treatments to be applied and prescribed by aesthetics professionals with the most advanced cosmetic technology. A pioneer in implementing quality certifications, environmental commitment measures, work and family conciliation, etc. Germaine de Capuccini today is a dynamic company, as young as the day it was born, but with the maturity that comes with 50 years of experience. You will find the Germaine de Capuccini products in the best Beauty Centres, Spas, Day-Spas and Medical-Aesthetical Clinics in more than 80 countries around the world.

Name: Give Back Beauty
Description:
Give Back Beauty is a privately-owned global beauty group dedicated to the creation, manufacturing, marketing, and distribution of fashion and celebrity-driven beauty brands across tailored business models (including licensing, joint ventures, and global distribution) and multiple product categories (personal fragrances, home fragrances, skincare, makeup, haircare, and personal care). The name "Give Back Beauty" reflects the company's core philosophy of giving back to both people and the planet.

The Group is the exclusive worldwide licensee for perfumes and beauty products of brands such as Tommy Hilfiger, Chopard, Elie Saab, Zegna, Mercedes-Benz, Philipp Plein and Iceberg. Additionally, Give Back Beauty serves as a strategic partner and distributor for other leading beauty brands such as Dolce & Gabbana, Olaplex, and Billie Eilish. The Indie and Talent division within the Group acts as an incubator for celebrity-driven brands, such as Blake Brown by Blake Lively and Florence by Mills, by Millie Bobby Brown.

Operating in over 130 countries through retailers and direct-to-consumer channels and through 15 offices, GBB has become one of the fastest growing company in the perfume and beauty sector. Over the past four years, the group have achieved a eightfold increase in sales.

Name: Millanel Cosmetica
Description:
Somos una empresa Argentina dedicada a la fabricacion y comercializacion de productos cosmeticos. Nuestro canala principal de venta es a través de la venta directa. Contamos con laboratorio propio con capacidad productiva para fabricar nuestros productos como asi tambien lineas para terceros.
Tenemos corbertura a nivel nacional .

Name: magenta
Description:
Uma assinatura, uma box, um clube, uma experiência de beleza ultra ultra ultra personalizada. Todo mês, enviamos 5 produtos full-size perfeitos pra cada assinante! Assim, descomplicamos a rotina das pessoas que amam beleza, querem ter sempre novos cosméticos pra testar e nunca mais comprar algo que não dá match com o cabelo, a pele ou as preferências de make e fragrância delas.
Trabalhamos com nomes renomados do mercado, como Natura e L’Occitane au Brésil, e marcas menores e novas, que possuem propostas e produtos incríveis, como Flô Biocosméticos, Alva e Alchi. Todos os itens da nossa curadoria, sem exceção, são cruelty-free e de altíssima qualidade.
Somos as nerds da beleza porque conhecemos os melhores produtos e usamos tecnologia de ponta para classificá-los e cruzá-los com os perfis de beleza das nossas assinantes e chegar ao match perfeito do mês para cada magenter — nossa IA analisa mais de 250 bilhões (!!!) de combinações de produtos para encontrar o mix que vai compor cada box.
Sim, por aqui nenhuma box é igual a outra e assim tornamos a rotina de beleza de todas as pessoas que fazem parte do nosso clubinho muito mais fácil, completa e gostosa. Mas, na prática, somos muito mais que uma box de beleza.
Também somos sinônimo de: o melhor dia do mês, mimos de mulher adulta (e de homem também!), skincare às 4 da tarde, banhos premium em dias comuns, novas versões suas… a expectativa que você vai poder criar sem medo e a surpresa que você vai amar receber. Sem mesmice e sem decepção!

beleza pra testar e descobrir
match pra acertar sempre
borogodó pra ser e se divertir

Name: Magenta
Description:
A Box Magenta é um clube de assinatura de beleza personalizado feito para todas as pessoas apaixonadas por esse universo e que adoram tirar um tempinho para se cuidar.

Nossa missão é oferecer uma experiência completa e exclusiva para cada uma das assinantes, e nós fazemos isso a partir de uma curadoria mensal baseada na beleza e nas preferências individuais delas.

Name: COSRX
Description:
코스알엑스 채용 공식 페이지(COSRX Career): 
https://career.cosrx.com/

Since COSRX was founded in 2013, we have been curating skincare products that meet the individual needs of our customers and trends in each country.

By listening to our customers reviews and voices, we are able to learn why our customers chose COSRX, and that becomes a foundation when making our business decisions. In other words, we would like to say that the answer is within our customers. 

2013년 설립된 코스알엑스는 최소한의 진성분으로 자극은 줄이고 효성분의 밀도는 높은 제품을 제안하여 민감성 피부를 가진 소비자들이 안심하고 쓸 수 있는 제품을 선보이는 브랜드입니다.

이와 같이, 다양한 뷰티 제품을 연구∙생산∙판매하여 2021년 ‘7천만 불 수출의 탑’을 수상하는 등 빠르게 성장하고 있으며, 해외 40여 개국 수출을 통해 전체 매출의 80% 이상이 해외에서 발생하고 있는 글로벌 뷰티 브랜드입니다. 

 For the Past 10 Years,
- We have more than 4.5 million of customer reviews with 63 languages.
- We sell our products in 52 countries abroad.

 Regarding Our Global Best Sellers, 
- Snail Essence and Snail Cream have been ranked as the #1 best-selling facial serums and facial moisturizers on AMAZON US (as of 2022 Prime Early Access Sale).
- Acne Pimple Master Patch is sold every 25 seconds, sold more than 30 million units in total.
- Low pH Good Morning Gel Cleanser is sold every 30 seconds and has now sold more than 10 million units in total.

Name: BioNike - ICIM International
Description:
ICIM International - Azienda di estrazione farmaceutica fondata a Milano nel 1930 - ha identificato a partire dagli anni ‘60, sotto il brand BioNike, tutte le proprie linee dermocosmetiche per soggetti con pelle sensibile, allergica e reattiva, formulate per alleviare problematiche cutanee prevenendone la comparsa.

Le referenze BioNike sono altamente efficaci e rispondono alla “Filosofia dei Senza” - senza conservanti, senza profumo, senza glutine e nickel tested. Nickel, conservanti e profumo sono infatti sostanze indicate da numerosi studi dermatologici come principali responsabili delle allergie da contatto.

Il successo costante dei prodotti BioNike è dovuto anche al solido rapporto di fiducia che l’azienda ha saputo instaurare nel tempo con i medici specialisti - dermatologi, pediatri, allergologi - e con i farmacisti. BioNike li riconosce quali interlocutori privilegiati, in grado di recepire la potenzialità applicativa delle sue proposte amplificando il successo commerciale dei prodotti.

Name: Payot Brasil
Description: Há 72 anos no Brasil oferecendo uma linha completa em produtos para maquiagem, tratamento facial e capilar!

Name: Scitra
Description:
As member of the Albatha Home & Personal Care Group Scitra is driven by a desire to ‘improve the quality of life for our people, customers and society’. We’re committed to constant improvement with a relentless focus on developing premises, processes and people. In the way we operate, as well as our impact on the environment, we strive to meet the expectations of the most progressive global clients.

Quality:
Scitra’s vision is “To be the best choice provider of manufacturing services to our customers in the technologies we choose to operate”. This is a direction in which we’re already heading. Fully committed to international best practices, we have been ISO 9001:2000 certified for more than 15 years. All our plants are certified or undergoing certification for Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) – ISO 22716. We also have Saudi Arabian Standards Organization (SASO) certification.
To maintain our stringent standards, all plants are connected to our main laboratory where regular quality-related product checks are carried out.As support, all plants also have an onsite laboratory to manage immediate checks according to our own standards or the requirements of our customers.

People And Environment
The safety of our people and the environment are also top priorities. We have achieved OSHAS 18001 Certificate – the highest certification for Occupational Health and Safety, and are in the process of achieving ISO 14000 – effective Environmental Management System (EMS).

Additional Services
In addition to contract manufacturing, we provide a full range of packaging options onsite. These include promotional co-packaging as well as a multitude of special packaging options – from stickers to shrink-wrap – to help our clients’ brands perform better on the shelf.

Locations:
UAE: P. O. Box No. 23005, Sharjah United Arab Emirates, Sharjah , Sharjah 23005
Egypt: 21 Plot No. 1/A, 3rd Industrial Zone, 6th of October City,Giza,Egypt, Giza, 6th of October City 12566, Egypt

Name: Paradyes
Description:
Paradyes is India's first semi-permanent hair color brand. Our bright and vibrant dyes come in a range of 15 multi-faceted shades with a Vegan and Cruelty-free formulation.  
Curated for all hair types with a combination of ayurvedic and herbal infusions, it's your go-to product if you wish to add a unique layer of colors to your hair and get your dream transformation.
Hair coloring is a form of self-expression and we've successfully created a community of hair color enthusiasts. Our aim is to get more and more people to color their hair and express themselves freely without any hesitation.
We're striving to create a range of innovative products and be the one-stop solution for all your hair coloring and care needs! Shipping PAN India currently, the brand aims to go global in the future.

Name: Starface World
Laboratoire Science et Nature
Description:
Le Laboratoire Science et Nature est animé par la volonté de laisser notre Planète en bonne santé aux générations futures. Depuis l’origine, nous sommes reconnus pour notre savoir-faire sur le marché des cosmétiques et produits d’entretien biologiques. Notre expertise, « de la fleur au flacon », est le fruit du travail de nos équipes performantes conjugué à notre capacité industrielle.

Nos ambitions sont fortes :
o Développer des marques qui apportent du sens à la consommation
o Innover en proposant des produits éco-conçus
o Fédérer autour d’une approche globale qui va Au-delà du bio

Rejoindre le Laboratoire Science et Nature, c'est faire partie d'une aventure collective, tournée vers l'innovation, dans le respect de notre planète et de ses habitants.

Name: Rebul Holding
Description:
The name of the fragrance in Turkey since 1895.

Founded 130 years ago in Beyoğlu as Turkey's first pharmacy, Rebul has been creating special products and formulas in its own laboratories to meet the health and beauty needs of millions of customers in the most vibrant area of Istanbul ever since.

Name: Beautybox
Description:
A gente acredita que ver o lado bom da vida é uma escolha.

Por isso, não estamos aqui só pra vender cosméticos. 

A gente quer mais é espalhar beleza e otimismo por aí e deixar o mundo mais Beauty. Afinal, batom lindo e mimimi não deixam ninguém mais bonita, mas batom lindo e sorrisão na cara é um escândalo.   

Aqui você fica por dentro do mundo da beleza e de tudo que pode fazer bem não só pro seu cabelo e pra sua pele, mas também pro seu coração. 

Temos mais de 100 marcas nacionais e importadas, do esmalte ao perfume.

Vem se virar bonito com a gente?

Sinta-se em casa e venha se inspirar na The Beauty Box, quem sabe você não se reinventa cada dia um pouco mais.

Name: MADARA Cosmetics
Description:
Founded in 2006, MADARA Cosmetics is the largest beauty manufacturer in Latvia and one of the leading in Northern European countries, specialising in high-performance skincare, makeup and personal care products.
 
We are pushing the boundaries of natural skincare and challenging conventional beauty with serious R&D work, potent Northern ingredients, dermatologically proven effectiveness and no-compromise ethics.
 
All products are exclusively developed and manufactured at AS MADARA Cosmetics laboratories and production facility in Riga, Latvia, which is one of the most advanced beauty factories in Northern Europe. Both ingredients and final formulations are organic or natural certified according to the international ECOCERT/COSMOS standards. The company is a Certified B Corp.

Name: YUZI INDÚSTRIA
Description: Yuzi Indústria de Cosméticos

Name: Londontown, Inc.
Description: Londontown was created in 2012 as an innovative new nail care system based on a revamped family remedy that was handed down through the generations.  Using Britain's best kept secret, rapeseeed flower oil, infused with organic extracts, vitamins and minerals, our kur nail treatment system is a revolutionary regimen to create healthy, hydrated and strong nails.

Name: Kinetic Brands
Description: At Kinetic, the brands we build are anything but boring. We’re a full-stack beauty incubator powered by unconventional thinkers skilled at building unconventional brands for unconventional people. We own a disruptive portfolio of digital brands, each with its own distinct identity, innovative catalog of products, + passionate following. Through our full-stack infrastructure—including, in-house R+D, supply chain management, creative, marketing, + fulfillment—we’re able to quickly bring ideas to IRL, producing high-quality, first-to-market products that truly break through the noise.

Name: Pulpe de Vie
Description:
PULPE DE VIE C’EST…

...LE PIONNIER DE LA COSMÉTO GREEN & ÉTHIQUE 

Précurseur sur le marché du Bio, depuis 15 ans Pulpe de vie a bousculé les codes et réveillé l’univers de la « cosméto green », séduisant ainsi une clientèle de plus en plus soucieuse d’une consommation responsable. Pari réussi ! Fabriquer des soins bio en France avec des fournisseurs locaux qui soient à la fois efficaces, gourmands, respectueux de l’environnement & des peaux sensibles et à petits prix, C’EST POSSIBLE! 

...L’AMBASSADEUR DU SOLEIL PROVENÇAL & DU SAVOIR-FAIRE FRANÇAIS

 Installée au cœur de Marseille, Pulpe de vie est engagée dans le soutien de l’économie régionale provençale et du savoir-faire français. Les fruits & légumes Bio proviennent exclusivement de petits producteurs locaux (n’ayant pas accès à la grande distribution). De la formule au pack, chaque soin est entièrement fabriqué en France. 

...LE SUCCÈS D’UNE TPE QUI COMPTE DANS L’UNIVERS DU BIO ! 

Depuis mai 2016, cette TPE locale est rentrée dans la cours des grands avec un nouveau circuit de distribution en GMS, qui compte désormais plus de 600 points de vente. En 2020, l’année s'est finie en beauté avec un chiffre d’affaires de près de 2,5 millions d'euros ! 
Depuis, la marque est engagée dans une stratégie "Think Green" qui vise à réduire drastiquement son impact environnemental.

Name: Rebul Holding
Description:
The name of the fragrance in Turkey since 1895.

Founded 130 years ago in Beyoğlu as Turkey's first pharmacy, Rebul has been creating special products and formulas in its own laboratories to meet the health and beauty needs of millions of customers in the most vibrant area of Istanbul ever since.

Name: Cotril Spa
Description:
Cotril S.p.A. is an italian company specialized in the formulation, production and distribution of trichological cosmetic solutions aimed at the world of professional hairstyling, with a particular compentence in the coloring world.  

Thanks to the sophistication, quality and glamour of its products, in just few years the Cotril brand has established itself as one of the most loved iconic brands used in movie sets, in the most famous red carpet, in the show dressing rooms and in the fashion backstage. The key factor of this success was the ability to make everyone dream, hairdressers and customers, offering not only quality products but a whole imaginary linked to the world of glamour and luxury. 

Today it is not just fashion houses, celebrities and backstage professionals who ask for Cotril: today all the coolest hairstylists demand for Cotril for their salons. It is the result of a path characterized by strong investments in technology, machinery and know-how, culminating in a Department of Research & Development world-leading and in the constant increase of all key competences in the sector: design, production, packaging, formulation and fragrance. Thanks to this commitment, Cotril represents today an international excellence in the haircare. 

In recent years, moreover, thanks to the network of salons in franchising or affiliation, the world Cotril has expanded further. It is about different format, adaptable to all the realities of the landscape of hairstylist: from the formula Cotril Salons– which provides a furniture created ad hoc, refined and elegant – to the formula Cotril Center – a light and very convenient affiliation – what does not change is the goal: grow together, a guarantee that only Cotril can give.

Name: Beauty Bakerie Cosmetics Brand, Inc.
Description:
Sold in over 2,000 locations worldwide to include Ulta Beauty, Target, CVS, and more, Beauty Bakerie is a rapidly growing cosmetics firm with a strong social media presence. The firm has amassed more than 1M followers across all social channels with more than $14M in venture capital raised to date.

Beauty Bakerie was San Diego’s fastest-growing private company from 2015 - 2017. In 2019, the firm made Fortune 500 list for the fastest-growing private company coming in at 434. Headquartered out of San Diego, the company has a team of 25 employees and has been recognized by top tier publications to include Allure, Cosmopolitan, Essence, Huffington Post, Teen Vogue as a 2016 Beauty Game Changer, Elle, Byrdie, Nylon and Buzzfeed. In 2019, Glamour named Cashmere Nicole, "The New Age CEO" with a full feature. 

With its very own 501(c)3 the brand provides full support to orphaned children across Uganda, Indonesia and Tanzania.

Name: iLABS (Innovation Labs) Inc.
Description:
iLABS is the first global innovation company of its kind in the beauty industry to develop alliances with the most creative chemists and scientists from around the world and then introduce these innovations and ideas to beauty brands, eager for new and amazing formulas and products.

Whether you are an established brand looking for an edge over your competition, or an emerging brand looking for the next great innovation to put you on the map, it’s all about finding that hero product.

At the same time, there are talented chemists and formulators all over the world who specialize in creating amazing new formulas and textures for products from skin care, sunscreen, hair treatment, and OTC. Our in-house capabilities expand from project manager to full turnkey service for a start to finish approach to manufacturing. 

Until now there has been no venue for these innovators to share their amazing new products.

iLABS provides the world’s only global online platform connecting these innovation partners with beauty brands.

Located just 30 miles from Manhattan, iLABS serves as the global hub for innovation.

In a world where beauty brands are looking for that next game-changing product, there’s iLABS. Unlock innovation today with iLabs.

Name: Manucurist
Description:
“ We think local, we produce safe products and we try to be the most respectful for the planet. Good for women, clean to planet ! ”

Manucurist Paris is a French nail polish and nail care specialist, which offers its 19-year expertise both to beauty professionals and mainstream markets.

In 2015, Gaëlle Lebrat Personnaz took over the family business with passion. She wanted to create the perfect nail polish which combines color, quality, long lasting finish, shine with a clean formulation. This is how the life in colour green has begun. The Green line has been designed to be natural and respectful for our planet and our body.

This year marks a turning point for Manucurist : we have developed GREEN FLASH, the first and only green gel polish on the market ! A real innovation in the gel polish world !

Manucurist is above all a brand of passion and ethics. Green beauty is our key driver. We are fully committed to be as eco-responsible as possible while giving you the highest quality to express your unique femininity.

The green revolution is rocking, be part of it !

Name: JUNGLÜCK
Description:
WIR MACHEN AUTHENTISCHE KOSMETIK

JUNGLÜCK ist aus der Idee entstanden, natürliche, wirksame und vor allem verträgliche Kosmetik zu machen. Und zwar so transparent, dass jeder Mensch versteht, was auf und unter die Haut geht. Dieser Ansatz begleitet uns seit unserer Gründung im Jahr 2018.


Heute entwickeln wir unsere 100% veganen Produkte in unserem eigenen Labor bei München und machen damit über 600.000 Kundinnen und Kunden glücklich. Seit Sommer 2023 haben wir auch unseren ersten JUNGLÜCK Flagship Store mitten in München.

Mittlerweile haben wir über 70 Produkte im Sortiment für Gesicht, Körper und Haare, die jede Haut glücklich machen. Auch bei Hauterscheinungen wie Neurodermitis, Rosacea oder Perioraler Dermatitis. Dafür lassen wir alles Unnötige wie reizende Konservierungsstoffe, austrocknende Alkohole oder synthetische Füll- und Duftstoffe einfach weg. Was wir machen ist echt, nachvollziehbar und authentisch.

WIR WOLLEN, DASS DU WEISST, WAS DIR GUT TUT

Name: YUZI COSMETICS
Description: Yuzi Indústria de Cosméticos

Name: Sunnies Face
Description:
meet sunnies face
We’d like to introduce our dream project. It started by answering a frequently asked question—“what lipstick is she wearing?”

Creating new things and playing with color is what we do best at Sunnies Studios and we wanted to make that come alive with our makeup line. 

It’s everything we love about beauty that we think you’d love, too.

Name: Mademoiselle bio
Description:
Depuis 2006, Mademoiselle bio incarne la beauté engagée. Elle est l'enseigne de référence en cosmétique bio pour tous.

En boutiques-instituts comme sur le web, Mademoiselle bio est votre plus proche conseillère en beauté et bien-être bio.

Name: Parfums Caron
Description: It all started with an encounter. Ernest Daltroff met Félicie Wampouille. He was a perfumer. She was a stylist. From their alliance, Caron was born. They shared a taste for the unexpected. A curiosity about the spirit of the times. American cigarettes and women's emancipation? There was Tabac blond, created in 1919. Women conquering the skies? There was En Avion, created in 1932. Men are tired of Eaux de Cologne? There was, in 1934, Pour un Homme, an unprecedented blend of vanilla and lavender. New dualities. Iconic perfumes. A revolutionary spirit. The boldness that forged the legend of Caron. It's more alive today than ever.

Name: Laboratoires Novexpert
Description:
"Le savoir nous engage"
Osez rejoindre une société qui casse les codes de la cosmétique. 
Depuis 2008, Novexpert est une société audacieuse et dynamique qui propose des produits 100% naturels et efficaces. Oui, c'est possible !

Dès 2008, Cyrille Telinge, fondateur de Novexpert et son équipe de docteurs se sont affirmés comme les pionniers de la cosmétique CLEAN. Pourquoi ce choix ? Car nous sommes tous pollués par des molécules qui se retrouvent là où vous n’oseriez même pas l’imaginer… dans votre sang et même votre lait maternel ! C’est pourquoi la charte Novexpert exclue plus de 1600 ingrédients au sein de formules 100% d’origine naturelle, certifiées par des organismes indépendants. Cette exigence radicale n’est pas une opportunité de marché, mais le cœur de nos croyances.

Au sein de la société, le pouvoir est donné aux chercheurs. Avez-vous entendu parler du sérum le plus concentré en acide hyaluronique au monde ? D’un soin à l’actif breveté qui réveille votre « gène de la jeunesse »? Ce sont des prouesses de formulation réalisées par nos docteurs, mais pour connaître tous les secrets, il faut faire partie de l’aventure Novexpert…
Tout cela relève de notre savoir-faire. Mais nous mettons un point d’honneur à faire savoir. Plus que des faiseurs de beauté, nous souhaitons être des passeurs de savoir. A travers notre communication nous dévoilons donc à nos clients, les coulisses de la science, indépendante et étonnante.
Êtes-vous convaincu ? Peut-être pas encore à 110% car nous avons oublié ce dernier point : chez Novexpert tout est made in France. Nos produits sont conçus, assemblés et conditionnés en France dans nos 2 centres R&D, notre laboratoire microbiologique et notre usine aux standards pharmaceutiques. 

Vous avez été captivé par cette (petite) présentation ? Vous vous reconnaissez dans nos valeurs ?
Contactez-nous ! Un profil motivé et passionné qui ne coche pas forcément toutes les cases aura toujours ses chances chez Novexpert.

Name: UrbanGabru
Description: We know women’s  Fashion and Grooming has always been given importance while men’s Fashion & Grooming has never been that focused in India. There was always a negative stereotype about men who wanted to be more fashionable and groom themselves. We always wanted to launch a group to unite and build a community of men who are interested in being Fashionable and groom themselves so that we could share knowledge about Men’s fashion , Style and grooming. But We also had a big vision to make a Brand for men which is focused on Men’s Lifestyle. At last We launched UrbanGabru to focus on Men and unite the urban men who style themselves like an Alpha male, stay stylish and look attractive.

Name: PUPA Milano
Description:
Pupa Milano is an Italian leading brand in the cosmetics industry. Launched by Micys Company in 1975, Pupa Milano redefined the rules of Cosmetics market with never seen products and unconventional communication, becoming a world icon of Made in Italy style and creativity. Present in over 70 countries worldwide, Pupa Milano offers a wide range of products entirely designed in Italy: makeup, skincare, toiletries and beauty kits.

Red is the color of its soul: red like passion, joy of life and natural sensuality; red like the energy to create every day new forms of expression. Colors, textures and sensorial experience in continuous evolution: Pupa Milano products reach top quality and appeal thanks to scientific research, cutting-edge technologies and innovation.

Name: BIELENDA Group S.A.
Description:
Jesteśmy jedną z najsilniejszych i najpopularniejszych polskich marek kosmetycznych. Od 30 lat tworzymy kosmetyki do pielęgnacji twarzy, ciała i włosów, które w naturalny sposób podkreślają piękno i urodę kobiet w Polsce i na świecie.

Naszym głównym źródłem inspiracji pozostaje natura. Mamy do niej ogromny szacunek, wciąż z wielką pasją odkrywamy dobroczynne właściwości roślin, czerpiemy z ich niezwykłej witalności, co w połączeniu z najnowszymi osiągnięciami technologii pozwala nam oferować kosmetyki o najwyższych parametrach jakości i bezpieczeństwa, łączące w sobie skuteczność i przyjemność stosowania.

Nasza siedziba mieści się w Krakowie. To właśnie tutaj, od momentu założenia firmy, powstają nasze kosmetyki – od konceptu produktowego rozwijanego w Dziale Marketingu, przez opracowanie autorskich receptur we własnym profesjonalnym Laboratorium Badawczym, po produkcję realizowaną  w nowoczesnym kompleksie produkcyjnym. 

Systematyczne doskonalenie i wychodzenie naprzeciw oczekiwaniom rynku owocuje stałym wzrostem i szybko powiększającym się gronem zadowolonych Klientów. Jesteśmy dumni, że potrafimy wyprzedzać trendy rodzimego rynku kosmetycznego, a nasze produkty cieszą się uznaniem zarówno Klientów jak i kosmetologów.

Name: Srichand United Dispensary Co.,Ltd.
Description:
Srichand United Dispensary Co., Ltd. was established in 1948
Our company was build on very simple belief which are to make the best things for the people at the most affordable price which makes “Srichand” still in the Thai cosmetic industry for over 70 years and listed as one with the longest history in Thailand.
Srichand Translucent Powder is our most famous product among Thai and foreigner. With an extremely fine and silky powder that has unique quality in oil-control benefits that makes Srichand Translucent Powder become a best selling translucent powder in Thailand in 2015.
In 2017, we continued to expand the product line to be more variety and set a new goal to become Thai and the worlds most loved cosmetic brand.

Name: Instituto Beleza Natural
Description:
Beleza Natural é a maior rede brasileira especializada no desenvolvimento de produtos de alta qualidade e no tratamento de cabelos crespos e ondulados. Tudo isso para valorizar a beleza verdadeira da mulher brasileira.

São 33 Institutos e 11 Quiosques distribuídos no Rio de Janeiro, Espírito Santo, Bahia, São Paulo e Minas Gerais, uma fábrica de cosméticos, a Cor Brasil, e cinco Centros de Desenvolvimento Técnico, onde todos os  nossos profissionais são treinados e formados. Em 23 anos, a empresa, que se encontra em franca expansão e preenche uma lacuna de mercado, já que cerca de 70% dos brasileiros possuem cabelos crespos em diferentes níveis.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: B.O.B Bars Over Bottles
Description:
❍❒ B.O.B. eleva a barra.

⋯⋯⋯

Oioi, eu sou a B.O.B! 
Cheguei aqui pra trazer pra você uma rotina completa de cuidados em barras, ao invés de garrafas. 

Quero mostrar que é possível, sim, dizer adeus aos cosméticos líquidos. E faço isso sem consumir de forma desnecessária os nossos recursos naturais, sem poluir o Planeta com mais plástico e sem complicar o seu dia a dia. Afinal, você não precisa abrir mão do que mais importa pra ter o cuidado que você merece.

Tenho uma barrinha pra cada momento do seu dia, com fórmulas multifuncionais pra todos os tipos de cabelo, de pele e de sorriso. Sua rotina fica minimalista, sua nécessaire bem levinha e seu banheiro muito mais cool!

Aqui é assim: cada escolha eleva a barra! Vem comigo?

Name: Yepoda
Description:
Korean effectiveness meets sustainable solutions: our mindfully produced skincare products are made with love in Korea. Yepoda’s mission is to bring you the best natural and active ingredients without ever compromising on quality or sustainability.

We are a young skincare start-up launched in spring 2020, and proudly recognised as one of LinkedIn's Top Startups 2025 in Germany.

Would you like to join us? Check our website!

Name: Cerescos
Description:
Cerescos SAS, compañía Colombiana líder en el sector consumo masivo, dedicada a la Producción, distribución y ventas de productos cosméticos. Con nuestras marcas Masglo y Admiss, hemos consolidado nuestra compañía como una empresa líder en la industria, expandiendo nuestro organización a Perú y España con presencia de nuestro portafolio en más de 17 países. 

Creemos firmemente en la dedicación y compromiso de nuestros colaboradores. Juntos, aportamos hacia el desarrollo y crecimiento económico de nuestro país, disminuyendo brechas sociales, contribuyendo en la equidad de género y construyendo espacios de  capacitación y desarrollo para formar a cientos de profesionales en el campo de la belleza y cuidado de manos y pies. Vamos por más!

Name: Neal's Yard Remedies
Description: At Neal's Yard Remedies, we're driven by the passionate belief that health and beauty should be more natural, less synthetic. This passion, and our firm belief that it's down to all of us to protect our precious planet, is at the heart of everything we do.

Name: International Cosmetics & Perfumes, Inc.
Description:
International Cosmetics & Perfumes, Inc. (ICP) is the exclusive marketer and distributor of luxury fragrance brands in North America. The company’s current prestigious portfolio includes The House of Creed.

ICP's vision is to inspire it's clients through beauty innovations and the narrative of luxury.

As an inherently multicultural company, we are dedicated to a diverse and inclusive workplace.  It’s at the heart of who we are.
 
ICP is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All applicants are considered for employment without attention to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, veteran or disability status.

Name: as i am
Description:
As I Am features a wonderful collection of products formulated with nature’s finest organic ingredients. 

Designed to nurture and style the texture that’s naturally yours, As I Am has quickly grown into a favorite of naturalistas worldwide. 

Launched in 2010, As I Am can be found in Target, Walgreens, Sally Beauty Supply, CVS, and Walmart locations nationwide.

Name: Beautyblender
Description:
Rea Ann Silva’s experience spans a 20-year journey as one of the most sought-after Hollywood makeup artists in the industry. As the creative force behind beautyblender, she single-handedly changed the beauty game. 
 
The beautyblender concept came to Rea Ann while she was the Department Head of one of the first TV shows shot in hi-definition. Rea Ann handled the constant touch-ups with her hand-cut, edgeless sponges to mimic the seamless look of airbrushing. Soon, every celebrity that sat in Rea Ann’s chair wanted their own hand-cut sponge; thus creating the original edgeless sponge. Beautyblender quickly became the secret on set that had every pro talking.
 
Today, the category-creator holds countless beauty awards and is beloved by both makeup aficionados and newbies as the go-to tool for achieving a perfectly blended complexion. As Beautyblender expands, we continue to innovate easy-to-use products that require minimal efforts yet offer maximum results.

Name: Society of Cosmetic Chemists HQ
Description:
Society of Cosmetic Chemists is a non-profit organization based in the United States.
Dedicated to the advancement of cosmetic science, the Society strives to increase and disseminate scientific information through meetings and publications. By promoting research in cosmetic science and industry, and by setting high ethical, professional and educational standards, we reach our goal of improving the qualifications of cosmetic scientists. Our mission is to further the interests and recognition of cosmetic scientists while maintaining the confidence of the public in the cosmetic and toiletries industry.

The first Chapter of the Society was formed in 1948 and was known as the Chicago Chapter. The Society now has a total of 19 chapters across the country and Canada. Chapters serve as the lifeblood of the Society and are run by dedicated volunteers who give of their time and expertise. Most Chapters conduct monthly meetings and hold educational seminars for members in their area. A few chapters have supplier exhibits and social events. Almost all 19 chapters publish their own newsletters. Membership numbers in Chapters vary from 35 members in our smallest chapter to 1400 in our largest chapter. No matter how large or small, all Chapters work for the goals of the Society which is the advancement of cosmetic science.

For a complete list of  our 19 Chapters, please visit www.scconline.org/scc-chapters/

Name: Indeed Laboratories
Description:
We didn’t start with a product. We started with a need.

Indeed Labs is a cutting-edge Canadian based skincare company committed to designing quality skin products that target our consumers' needs. 

Launched with one product in 2011, Nanoblur was an industry first-ever skin blurring cream. A real woman’s wish-list inspiring product, that quickly found a place on beauty editors’ must-have list, is the formula we were founded on and still follow today. The press, awards and accolades our products garner tell us it’s working. We’re driven by results!

Blending cutting-edge science with the highest quality, globally-sourced ingredients optimally formulated for efficacy, every product in our line-up came from an “I” and “need.” One real woman simply wanting great, healthy looking skin. A simple, quality, targeted, result-driven solution at an affordable price is how we fulfilled it. Yesterday and today. It’s your beauty. Whatever your standard of it. It’s our duty to innovate stand-out products that action it, empower it and let you live it. So whatever you’re searching for in skincare, we’re creating it.  In a box, with your need’s solution inside is where can find it.  Get the skin you seek. -Indeed.

Name: PHISALIA PRODUTOS DE BELEZA
Description:
Há mais de 50 anos, a Phisalia nasceu com um sonho: cuidar da infância com carinho.
Desde então, seguimos próximos das famílias brasileiras, criando produtos que transformam a rotina em momentos de afeto e presença.

Nosso portfólio reúne marcas que cresceram junto com diferentes gerações: Trá Lá Lá, Lukinha e Physalis. Cada uma delas carrega valores de qualidade, segurança e inovação, sempre respeitando as necessidades de cada fase da infância.

Nosso compromisso vai além do mercado. Atuamos em projetos sociais e culturais que fortalecem a educação e a infância, investimos continuamente em sustentabilidade e responsabilidade social.

Na Phisalia, tradição e inovação caminham juntas para garantir que cada geração cresça cercada de cuidado e confiança.

Aqui, se cuida com carinho.

Name: Saigu Cosmetics
Description: Unimos lo mejor de la naturaleza y de la ciencia para ofrecerte una cosmética natural, fácil de aplicar y cómoda de llevar que llena de vitalidad tu piel y tu estado de ánimo.

Name: Dahuer
Description:
Nascemos para fazer o bem e somos apaixonados pelo que fazemos.

A Dahuer é uma indústria brasileira especialista em proteção solar e cuidado com a pele. Há mais de 37 anos no mercado, trabalhamos com alta tecnologia cosmética e temos orgulho em tornar acessível o que há de melhor e mais moderno no segmento. Conheça os produtos Anasol, Hidrabene, Ricosol, One Day, Kalasol, Aliviosol e Zaz e sinta na pele a verdadeiro cuidado dos produtos Dahuer.

Name: Gloria Saltos
Description: Novedades Gloria Saltos is a company based out of Ecuador.

Name: boscia
Description:
boscia — the leader and key innovator in preservative-free cosmetics— is a revolutionary skincare line created to restore skin to a healthy, youthful and natural state. Whether it combats years of abuse from other chemically-packed products or jumpstarts a new skincare regimen, boscia performs with a combination of superior botanical ingredients, Japanese technology, and what ultimately sets it apart from the rest — exclusive, 100% preservative-free formulas. 

The American offshoot of $900 million Japanese cosmetic empire FANCL, the entire boscia line has been formulated to address the predominant skin concerns of American women, including stress, sun damage, lack of sleep, diet, exercise and hormonal fluctuations that all surface on the skin. boscia products combat these concerns with an exceptionally high level of effectiveness, yet the gentlest of formulas that work for even those with the most sensitive skin.

Name: FORMA Brands
Description:
We are a dynamic, forward-thinking beauty brand that thrives at the intersection of beauty and digital innovation. Dedicated to empowering self-expression and beauty through our high-quality, accessible products.

FORMA has a flexible work program designed to create options for our corporate team-members, which provide greater flexibility, additional well-being + work life balance options, and allows us the ability to widen our talent pool + increase diversity in our organization. 

Our workspaces are not limited to our offices in San Francisco, Los Angeles, New York + London . We know our team-members want flexibility, with the ability to maintain a physical space to connect + collaborate with each other. We have adapted our ways of working + found the value in the flexibility it provides. Our team-members work with their leaders to determine the best fit for the needs of their role – whether that’s in a hybrid capacity, fully remote, or for a few specific roles – consistently in office.

Name: Seasonly
Description:
Seasonly est une marque française qui croit en une nouvelle manière de prendre soin de sa peau, plus expérientielle, plus clean, plus sensorielle et plus transparente.

L’ambition ? Réinventer votre routine avec le bon geste, le bon ingrédient au bon moment avec des produits 100% clean et vegan, des accessoires de massages innovants et des massages transformatifs.

C’est parce que le pouvoir des actifs est décuplé par le massage que Seasonly a créé ses Skin Studios, des espaces de soin uniques dans Paris; ainsi que ses Face Glow Bars (chez Sephora): un concept unique pour sculpter, lifter, remodeler et illuminer la peau en seulement quelques minutes.

Name: CND
Description: Founded in 1979 and based in San Diego, CA, CND (Creative Nail Design, Inc.) is the global leader in professional nail products and services – including CND SHELLAC Gel Polish. Deeply committed to advancing the nail care industry, CND devotes significant time and resources to product research and development, education and customer support. Only CND delivers high performance nail color on the cutting edge of fashion and technology.

Name: Laboratorios Neum Spain
Description:
Laboratorios Neum Spain es una empresa familiar valenciana con laboratorio propio, situada cerca del mar Mediterráneo. La energía, la vitalidad y la naturaleza de esta costa y su brisa han inspirado la creación de sus aromas y están muy presentes en nuestra cultura como empresa. Especialistas en la creación de marcas y sueños, y con fabricación 100% Made in Spain con más de 30 años liderando el sector de la perfumería, cosmética y ambientación bajo las marcas Flor de Mayo, La Casa de los Aromas y Mikaromas. 
 
El equipo Neum está formado por más de más 170 profesionales cualificados y de gran experiencia. Actualmente  presente en más de 50 países , y con foco en el mercado internacional.  Hemos experimentado durante estas tres décadas una fuerte transformación y crecimiento, sin perder nunca los valores, esencia y agilidad de la empresa familiar.
.
.
Neum Spain Laboratories is a family-owned company from Valencia with its own laboratory, located near the Mediterranean Sea. The energy, vitality, and natural beauty of this coastline and its breeze have inspired the creation of their fragrances and are deeply embedded in our company culture. Specialists in creating brands and dreams, with 100% Made in Spain manufacturing and over 30 years leading the perfume, cosmetics, and home fragrance sectors under the brands Flor de Mayo, La Casa de los Aromas, and Mikaromas.

The Neum team is made up of more than 170 highly qualified and experienced professionals. Currently present in over 50 countries, with a focus on the international market, we have undergone significant transformation and growth over the past three decades, without ever losing the values, essence, and agility of our family business.

https://www.facebook.com/flordemayoes 
www.instagram.com/flordemayoes
https://www.tiktok.com/@flordemayoes?lang=es
https://flormayo.com/

https://lacasadelosaromas.com/
www.facebook.com/casadelosaromas/
www.instagram.com/lacasadelosaromas/

Name: The Wellness Shop
Description:
Our story started in India in early 2021. It began with our belief in something revolutionary: that business could be a force for good. Following this vision, we have been doing our market research for more than 2 years and found concrete issues which everyone is facing related to skin, hair and overall wellness. We aim to impact people’s lives by providing a natural skincare routine that would not exploit nature and enrich your life! Here we present our whole new range of organic skin care and hair care products that are a perfect combination of super nutrients for powerful products that take skin and hair from blah to brilliant. We source the highest quality ingredients for your skin. No parabens, sulfates, formaldehyde, paraffin, mineral oil, or animal testing allowed! We are on a mission to steer people toward better and accessible skin care and hair care that will enable them to shine their brightest. You might ask, how do we do it? The answer is simple - we mix the perfect combination of super nutrients for powerful products.
We derive our values from the concept of Charaka Samhita. In the Indus Valley area around 1000 BC in Sanskrit, the Charaka Samhita is a treatise on general medicine. According to it, the human body comprises three-body states, which include Vata, Pitta, and Kapha. Vata consists of the elements air and ether. Pitta consists of fire and water elements, and Kapha is characterized by earth and water elements. When the three-body states are in perfect harmony, people enjoy good health, whereas an imbalance causes diseases. We seek to address this state of imbalance through a process of natural healing. Our mission has been to develop safe and efficacious products to bring Wellness to every Home and Happiness in every Heart.

Name: Nouvelle Parfumerie Gandour
Description:
Depuis 1961, la famille Gandour a créé son propre centre de recherche en cosmétologie, en Afrique de l'ouest au sein duquel, elle a mis en place un univers de soins et d'esthétique dédié à la beauté de la femme africaine. D'où la naissance de la société la Nouvelle Parfumerie Gandour. Elle développe des formules uniques et novatrices. Leur performance repose sur un savoir-faire depuis longtemps reconnu, l'utilisation de techniques de pointe et une maîtrise absolue de l'esthétique de la peau. Les secrets de fabrication et leur extraordinaire plaisir d'utilisation sont la marque infaillible de la qualité Gandour, plébiscitée par des générations de femmes.

En effet au départ elle était plus spécialisée dans la parfumerie, aujourd'hui ce sont des gammes de produits de beauté dermatologiques, capillaires, alimentaires et autres...
Avec son essor grandissant, elle est devenu une multinationale présente un peu partout en Afrique, au Sénégal, en Côte d'ivoire, au Cameroun et au Maroc.
La Nouvelle Parfumerie Gandour, à travers ses nombreux produits et ses gammes riches et très diversifiées, promeut le développement du continent africain.
En effet, elle participe à la création de nombreux emplois, environ mille cinq cent (1500) personnes. En créant des produits cosmétiques, alimentaires et autres, elle encourage la population africaine voir sénégalaise à la consommation locale. Avec ses produits de très bonne qualité, Gandour a pour mission de promulguer la beauté africaine au sommet avec un rapport qualité prix jamais égalé.
Considéré comme le leader de la parfumerie au Sénégal, l'exigence demeure intacte : l'excellence.

Name: Memebox Corp (YC W14)
Description:
MBX is a multi-brand Korean beauty and personal care company that is venture-backed and has raised over $200M in funding from prominent investors, including Formation 8, Goodwater Capital, Johnson & Johnson, Pear VC, Y Combinator, and other Silicon Valley VCs.
Based in the US, but with the majority of its operations in Seoul, South Korea, MBX operates a portfolio of K-beauty and personal care brands that are co-developed with strategic partners like Sephora and Ulta. The company’s products are developed and manufactured in Korea and leverage the latest K-beauty innovation trends from formulation to packaging. With offices in San Francisco, Los Angeles, Seoul, Shanghai, and Taipei, MBX is proud of its fantastic global team and superb brand portfolio. We invite you to discover our award winning brands: Kaja, I Dew Care, Pony Effect, I’m Meme, and Nooni!
We’re always looking for inspired team members to help take Memebox to the next level. Interested in joining us? Please visit our website.

Name: Arthur Edward Recruitment
Description:
We're more than recruiters – we're beauty industry specialists who understand the unique dynamics of beauty, cosmetics and personal care from the inside out.

Since 2002, we've been connecting exceptional talent with innovative companies, building the teams that create, develop, and market the world's most successful beauty products.

What sets us apart is our deep understanding of how roles in the industry continue to evolve. From the changing demands of NPD in an increasingly sustainable industry to the digital transformation of marketing and sales, we don't just fill positions – we help shape the future of beauty careers.

Our expertise spans the entire product lifecycle, and we work with:
 Global beauty giants seeking strategic hires
 Dynamic indie brands building core teams
 Start-ups looking for transformative leadership
 Investors requiring specialist talent

We reject an outdated, one-size-fits-all recruitment model. We tailor each individual search to reflect:
 Your unique company culture
 Specific technical requirements
 Market conditions and trends
 Career development opportunities

Integrity, honesty and discretion are at the heart of everything we do. We work with the very best people and companies in the industry and are very proud that 100% of our clients say they would recommend Arthur Edward to other businesses.

Whether you're seeking your next career move in beauty or building your dream team, we combine industry expertise with a personalised approach to ensure lasting, successful placements.

Our specialties: Executive Search, Beauty Industry Recruitment, Cosmetics, Personal Care, Technical Roles, Marketing, Sales, NPD, Operations, Quality, Regulatory, Digital, Supply Chain, Finance, HR

Name: GLOSSYBOX
Description:
At the sweet spot between start-up and corporate, GLOSSYBOX offers the best of both worlds: a passionate, innovative and creative work environment and the reach and opportunities of an established business. Our more than 150 employees from 22 different nations direct all their efforts to create THE platform for beauty discovery. From our metropolitan offices in Berlin, Stockholm, London, Paris and New York we deliver boxes to our customers in 10 countries.

Thanks to our exceptional team we established as leading e-commerce beauty subscription service having delivered more than 11 million boxes until today.

Come discover beauty with us!

Name: Laboratoires NaO
Description:
Imaginez un laboratoire industriel à taille humaine, installé au coeur de la Cosmetic Valley, à Saint-Jean-de-Braye, tout proche d’Orléans.

Nous concevons la relation avec nos clients comme un véritable partenariat : nous comprenons vos attentes, vos doutes, vos espoirs.

Nous nous engageons à vous conseiller, vous accompagner de manière personnalisée pour que votre projet cosmétique (conventionnel ou naturel) se concrétise.

Libre à vous de choisir notre étape d'intervention : 
Recherche & Formulation
Recherche seule, développement ex nihilo ou reformulation à partir de nos formules en portefeuille ou d’une formule apportée par vos soins.

Réglementaire
Coordination par nos soins des étapes réglementaires : toute mise sur le marché de produits cosmétiques est soumise au Règlement Européen 1223/2009.

Fabrication
Fabrication selon votre formule ou une formule NaO pour une livraison en vrac ou en produit fini.

Conditionnement
Remplissage et/ou conditionnement secondaire.

Le « why » de NaO est de créer du bonheur en :
     Aidant les porteurs de projets à créer leur marque, à rendre concret leur rêve
     Accompagnant les marques dans leurs problématiques quotidiennes et les faciliter au maximum
     Apportant du plaisir lors d’un moment bien être dans sa salle de bain, autour d’un shampooing ou d’une épilation, avec Capillor ou Naolya (nos marques propres).

Et la RSE dans tout ça ? 
Bien avant que cela ne devienne une tendance, nous avons adopté une organisation fondée sur le développement durable : 
 Recyclage de tous nos déchets de production
 Sélection maximale d'ingrédients Made in France
 Choix de prestataires partenaires locaux et situés en Région Centre Val-de-Loire

En conclusion, voici 5 raisons de nous choisir :
 Production en petites & moyennes séries
 Made in France
 Equipe agile (et sympathique !)
 Gestion de la vie du produit de A à Z
 Expertise capillaire

Name: SKEYNDOR
Description:
SKEYNDOR es una marca de cosmética profesional fundada hace 50 años con la intención de ofrecer una cosmética de alta calidad, inspirada en una investigación pionera y en el continuo desarrollo de fórmulas innovadoras.

La belleza es y ha sido siempre el motor del negocio de la compañía. Su reto a lo largo de todos estos años no ha sido otro que acercar la belleza a las personas y conseguir, a través del cuidado, que se sientan bien.

Los años de experiencia científica, junto a la constante colaboración con las profesionales de la estética, han permitido que SKEYNDOR se sitúe a la vanguardia de la cosmética a nivel internacional, con tratamientos de belleza que combinan productos de cuidado diario con tratamientos en el centro de estética.

SKEYNDOR cuenta con más de 20 líneas de productos, consiguiendo así abarcar todas las áreas de tratamientos estéticos. Sus programas son seguidos a diario por más de 15.000 profesionales en todo el mundo, desde Canadá hasta Nueva Zelanda.

Especialidades:
Belleza, Cosmética, Cuidado personal, Tratamientos profesionales.

Name: MIXER & PACK
Description:
Mixer & Pack – Passion for Perfume & Cosmetics Development 

With over 30 years of experience, Mixer & Pack is one of the leading perfume and cosmetics developers in Europe, recognized globally for creating and manufacturing products for prestigious third-party brands in 130+ countries.

Our 15,000 m² headquarters in Madrid and Guadalajara are fully dedicated to creativity, innovation, sustainability, and operational excellence — from design and formulation to manufacturing, filling, and logistics.

 We offer turnkey solutions, including:
- Strategic product design & fragrance development.
- Regulatory & toxicological documentation management.
- High-volume manufacturing & agile production timelines.

Thanks to our 4 packaging plants, 4 logistics warehouses (14,000+ pallet capacity) and maceration tanks with over 350,000 liters, we deliver at industrial scale — with a capacity exceeding 113 million units per year.

 Creativity is at the heart of everything we do — our in-house teams work closely with clients to translate bold concepts into innovative, market-ready beauty products.

 Our commitment to sustainability includes eco-conscious packaging, responsible sourcing, and strict adherence to health, safety, and environmental standards.

 Mixer & Pack is the ideal partner to launch and grow beauty projects for some of the most prestigious brands in the world — combining passion, expertise, and flexibility in every step of the process.

Our Core Values:
 Motivation |  Innovation |  Customer Focus
 Ethics & Sustainability |  Profitability

 Let’s create something extraordinary: info@mixerpack.es
 Learn more: www.mixerpack.es

Name: Insight Cosmetics
Description:
Insight is a one-stop cosmetic brand for all your beauty needs, providing a wide range of beauty products for all skin types and skin tones.
We are India's #1st toxic-free brand by Bureau Veritas. 
Our products are Vegan, Cruelty-free & Dermatologically tested.

Name: Avon Justine
Description: Bookseller David H. McConnell founded Avon in 1886, 34 years before women in the U.S. had the right to vote. For more than 135 years, Avon has been empowering women around the world through its Representative earnings opportunity. Today, Avon is an iconic global beauty company with breakthrough beauty products in skincare, color cosmetics, fragrance and personal care, and has a Fashion & Home category. Avon is also a leader in the direct-selling industry.

Name: La Roche-Posay USA
Description: La Roche-Posay is committed to making dermatological skin care accessible to those who need it, by partnering with dermatologists from the development to the recommendation of our skin care products. We are committed to offering highly effective products that can be tolerated by even sensitive skin to improve the quality of life of anyone with skin concerns, from acne to aging, and to help spread the word on sun safety through high quality sunscreen and skin cancer awareness messaging.

Name: EuroItalia
Description:
Established in 1978, today EuroItalia is one of the leading global players in the luxury beauty industry. It translates fashion and design into luxury fragrances, strengthening its brands.

EuroItalia works in collaboration with Italian brands and fashion designers to strategically identify market trends, translate these efficiently into successful new fragrance lines, before developing them through to worldwide distribution.It manages every stage of product development: from building the creative concept to the choice of fragrance, from packaging design to industrial production and commercial placement; all underpinned by highly effective marketing, merchandising and communication strategies.EuroItalia has been awarded many international awards and accolades for what we do, and has been nominated as a company which exports the origins and craftsmanship of ‘Made in Italy’ to the world.

Today EuroItalia’s portfolio includes: Versace, Moschino, Missoni, Dsquared2, Reporter, Naj Oleari Beauty.

Name: Vision Cosmetics
Description:
Vision Cosmetics is one of Egypt's leading manufacturers and marketers of quality wide range of personal care products including skincare, body care and hair care products. The company holds a diverse portfolio of brands sold across the Middle East countries.

Since its inception more than two decades ago, in 2001, the company has managed to carve a place for itself, leaving an indelible mark on all aspects of the beauty industry. 
Today, the company has been closely monitoring the latest cosmetics market trends to create an in-depth portfolio of cosmeceuticals.

As the consumers in the beauty & personal care (BPC) products market are constantly demanding innovative & multifunctional beauty products, Vision Cosmetics identifies the introduction of innovative ingredients and technologies as one of the key trends that will lead to the growth of the cosmeceutical market in the coming years.

Name: Hismile
Description:
In 2014, we launched our first Teeth Whitening Kit. The Kit ticked all the boxes. It was safe, easy to use, and completely peroxide-free. 

Every day we’re in the lab, learning from our community, and working with leading dentists to develop products to make you look good, and feel even better.

As always, we’re backed by science, and driven by the belief that smile care can, and should, be both effective and safe.

We’re building the future of smile care, one step at a time.

Name: Aktar Mart
Description: AktarMart is a online marketplace in Bangladesh

Name: Schwan Cosmetics International GmbH
Description:
Schwan Cosmetics is a world market leader in the production of cosmetic pencils: the wide range of color cosmetics extends from wood-encased eyebrow pencils and kohl or liquid eyeliner to mechanical contour pencils or lipsticks. The products are developed and manufactured on behalf of almost every internationally renowned cosmetics Company.

More than 3,000 employees in nine production facilities worldwide contribute to economic success. The global employer has its headquarters in Heroldsberg, Germany, near Nuremberg, and is represented in eight countries by ten subsidiaries.

Schwan Cosmetics is a 100-percent subgroup of the internationally-operating family-owned Schwan-STABILO Group. The family-owned Corporate Group operates in three independent business areas – cosmetics, writing instruments, and outdoor equipment – and is, nowadays, run by its fifth generation. Schwan-STABILO which is, today, among the 100 best German medium-sized companies employs more than 5,000 people worldwide of which almost 50 percent work in German locations. Since its founding in 1855, a swan has been the trademark of the company. 

The Company's expertise in writing instruments was first transferred in 1927 to a completely new sector - cosmetics. The first eyebrow pencil was a huge success for women. The American industrialist Max Factor was among the first cosmetics clients in the 1930s.

Name: PIC Química e Farmacêutica Ltda
Description:
A PIC foi fundada em 1999, com mais de 40 anos de atuação no mercado de insumos do Sr. J.A.L Morais, um nome que é sinônimo de ética e competência.
Somos referência no segmento de matérias-primas e inovação para os campos da cosmética, farmacêutica, fitoterapia, nutracêutica, veterinária e household.
Fornecemos uma completa linha de produtos que são criteriosamente estudados e qualificados aos nossos clientes, advindos de alianças estratégicas e com representadas de reconhecimento know-how internacional, especialistas no que produzem.

Name: MAD Parfumeur

Since May 2017 Dr. Straetmans is part of Evonik. With the closing of the transaction, the company name has changed into Evonik Dr. Straetmans GmbH.

Name: Jorgobé
Description:
Founded in Copenhagen in 2010, Jorgobé set out with a clear ambition: to create skincare products that deliver effective results in the gentlest way possible.
Rooted in Scandinavian minimalism, our philosophy emphasizes simplicity, precision, and quality in everything we do.

We carefully select high-performing active ingredients in precise doses, ensuring they are both scientifically proven and gentle on the skin. This commitment allows us to deliver skin-friendly, noticeable results - always without compromising the integrity of your skin barrier.

Jorgobé - Precision Skin Health

Having the autonomy to play and create your own beauty regimen is a powerful way to express yourself and connect with others. 

Mary Louise Cosmetics was founded in 2017 by Akilah Releford in her college dorm room at Howard University. If you want to join us on this journey towards creating a better future for skincare, please reach out! 

Follow us, we're social :) --->

Name: Cosmetica

Name: Shea Global Trading

Shea Global is a retail and distribution company in Dubai that retails natural and organic beauty products. We are the Exclusive Distributors of the USA brand,  Mitra’s Bath & Body. This brand produces a range of natural products for the body, face, and hair using shea butter and shea oil from Ghana with other unique natural ingredients. We believe that everyone should have access to natural products, and strive to educate our consumers on the benefits of being natural. 

Shea Global offers quality natural ingredients to create private label products to individuals, hotels, salons and spas. We work closely with the retailer, to discuss the ingredient specifications and packaging to ensure the best natural products in the industry.  We offer exemplary customer service from product implementation to delivery and beyond. 

Our Private Label Categories:

Name: Saltyface
Description:
Summer, bottled.

At the beach, beauty feels effortless, life feels care-free. Creating that feeling is what we do. 

Saltyface lives in the space between cosmetics, tanning and skincare to create the look that a day in the sun leaves on your skin. Allowing our customers to feel like their summer selves, year round. 

With a focus on safe ingredients and sustainability, we will always be a brand the conscientious consumer can feel good about.

In 2006 it became the EXCLUSIVE IMPORTER of “Golden Rose” cosmetics and “Roxanne” eau de toilette, while in 2013 it became general importer of the “TRISA Switzerland“ products for oral hygiene.

Name: Agence De Parfumerie
Description:

With our own logistics platform, our success lies in our strategic planning and dedication to our partners and brands, by creating the ideal and most suitable distribution channel for every brand we work with.  

As brand builders we apply our local knowledge to international brand strategies helping to create growth and raise awareness for our partners.  

Agence De Parfumerie works with leading department stores, high street retailers and drugstores plus pharmacies, apothecary and independent retailers. 

As one of the UK’s leading beauty distributors, we continue to build our portfolio and introduce new and exciting brands to the UK and International markets.

Name: Beauty Coiffure | e-commerce
Description:
Tout a commencé par la vente physique de produits professionnels de coiffure et d'esthétique dans nos 8 magasins R'Center en Bourgogne Franche-Comté (Mâcon, Chalon-sur-Saône, Saint-Remy, Chenôve, Dijon, Besançon, Lons-le-Saunier et Montceau-les-Mines). 

Forte de son succès, l'entreprise familiale prend le tournant du digital et le site e-commerce www.beautycoiffure.com voit le jour.

Beauty Coiffure est une boutique de vente en ligne e-commerce spécialisée dans la vente de produits, matériels de coiffure et d'esthétique pour professionnels et particuliers. La logistique se réalise sur plus de 2300m² et la société compte plus de 30 années d'expérience dans la distribution auprès des coiffeurs et instituts de beauté.

Tous les colis sont traités et expédiés sur place. Notre logistique assure l'envoi et le retour des colis grâce à quatre transporteurs : Colissimo, Mondial Relay, dpd et TNT  pour des envois dès 24h.  

Notre service commercial répond à toutes les questions du lundi au samedi de 9:00 à 17:00 heures.

Afin d’acquérir des marques de prestiges, BeautyCoiffure ouvre son propre salon de coiffure à Mâcon (71) nommé "Le Salon by BC" qui propose un grand nombre de prestations.

Name: USU Cosmetics
Description:
El futuro de la belleza está en la fusión de las culturas. USU Cosmetics adapta lo mejor de la cultura de belleza asiática al estilo de vida europeo para crear una gama de cuidado de la piel eficaz y accesible.                                                                                                                                                            

Formulaciones made in Corea, diseñadas y fabricadas con los mejores conocimientos de las tradiciones cosméticas orientales y occidentales, que contienen una óptima concentración de principios activos para asegurar resultados respetando la piel.

USU,  que significa excelencia en coreano, es el objetivo que guía nuestros estándares, apuntando a conseguir lo mejor, lo más cercano a la perfección.

Los productos de USU se encuentran en farmacias, porque quién mejor que un farmacéutico para asesorar y recomendar sobre el cuidado de la piel.

Name: ERPA - European Cosmetics Responsible Person Association
Description:
The association's vision is to promote high standards of services and professionalism among the European Responsible Persons professionals to attain safer cosmetic products on the European market.

As such, ERPA gathers under the same roof the main compliance operators:
 Responsible Persons
 Safety Assessors
 REACh Only Representatives
 Laboratories
 GMP auditors and other associations.

By bringing these professionals together, we strive to create a positive round table for discussing, developing and promoting the fundamental aspects of having only safe cosmetic products on the European market.

Under the ERPA platform, we aim to create working guidelines of the Responsible Person profession, in view of clarifying the roles and obligations entailed by this new profession as well as the roles and obligations of all the other compliance operators in this industry.

Name: Hair & Make-up Artist
Description:
We work independently with Hair & Make Up Stylists
and we are collaborating with cosmetics firms and fashion stylists.

What do we do? 
We provide internationally recognized qualifications for proficiency in professional make-up application techniques. 

What makes our qualifications special? 
Our qualifications are aimed specifically at make-up application for make-up artists – they are not vague ‘beauty’ qualifications for therapists or beauticians. We have a modern approach with realistic and contemporary criteria that are relevant to today’s make-up industry. 

Who do we serve? 
We provide an industry benchmark for make-up artists and those who want to employ make-up artists. To hold a qualification, you must first have achieved a high level of skill in your field, thereby a potential employer or agent can be assured of your talent and credentials. For the qualified make-up artist, we offer a referral resource – simply agree to have an email link from our site and potential employers can reach you and you can follow up jobs that are posted on the Jobs Board Who uses our qualifications? 

Most fashion make-up house who employ counter staff would require a recognized independent qualification to show that the employee has the basic level of understanding in hygiene, application and client care. Any professional who wishes to receive insurance for public liability or against loss or damage to equipment such as your make-up kit through BABTAC you must hold a recognized qualification through an independent awarding body.

Name: DECREE Skincare
Description:
Smart. Straightforward. Scientific. Supportive. 
Decree is a results-driven skincare range created by leading GP and dermatology expert Dr Anita Sturnham. Backed by over 20 years of clinical experience, Decree delivers therapeutic doses of proven actives through a simplified AM, PM, Weekly, and SOS routine of multi-tasking products. 
Designed for all skin types, concerns, ages, and genders, this streamlined system delivers maximum results with minimal effort - supporting consistently clear, healthy, radiant skin.

Name: LAB Cosmeceutical
Description:
LAB COSMECEUTICAL

Cosmecêuticos para o cuidado da saúde da pele e dos cabelos.
Cosméticos OTC de alta performance que ajudam você viver sua vida sem limitações.

A LAB Cosmeceutical é uma indústria focada na pesquisa, inovação, desenvolvimento e fabricação de Cosmeceuticos (cosméticos farmacêuticos) para o cuidado e tratamento de problemas específicos da saúde da pele, couro cabeludo e cabelos, na categoria de não-medicamentos de venda livre.

A inovação e o ineditismo estão em nosso DNA. Através de nossas marcas e produtos inovadores, criamos novas e eficientes abordagens para aliviar os diversos problemas da pele e dos cabelos e assim tornarmos sua vida melhor e mais saudável.

Somos uma empresa ética e socialmente responsável.
Valorizamos as relações humanas e comerciais.

REPRESENTANTES:
Profissionais de venda do canal farma que buscam por novas oportunidades comerciais, encontrarão nos produtos LAB uma extraordinária chance de trabalharem com produtos inéditos e de grande aceitação e reciprocidade com os consumidores.

DISTRIBUIDORES
Caso o seu negócio esteja precisando de uma linha de produtos moderna, atraente e de design inovador, que venha de encontro ao desejo de consumo de seus clientes a um preço justo e com resultados rápidos, não perca a oportunidade de fazer parte desta família, e aumente exponencialmente os lucros de sua empresa.

REDES DE DROGARIAS E FARMÁCIAS
Transforme os clientes insatisfeitos em encontrarem soluções aos problemas de sua pele nos seus PDV’s em consumidores felizes e fidelizados. Não deixe deatender sua clientela com produtos de grande sucesso e real necessidade a eles.

Name: Laboratoires Jerodia
Description:
Les laboratoires Jerodia, la santé et la beauté au naturel.
Mais peut-être nous connaissez-vous sous les marques cosmétiques Bio Phyt’s et Gamarde ? 
C’est dans le somptueux décor du Quercy Lotois que démarre l’aventure des Laboratoires Jérodia en 1993. 
Depuis et toujours guidé par ses principes fondateurs de respect de l’environnement et de bio naturalité made in France, notre groupe est aujourd’hui un acteur majeur de la bio cosmétique et de l'esthétique en France …et à l'International avec une présence dans plus de quarante-cinq pays sur les cinq continents.

Les Laboratoires Jerodia : 
-Une entreprise familiale où réactivité et pragmatisme sont des valeurs travaillées au quotidien.
-La conviction que la nature nous offre déjà tout ce dont nous avons besoin pour créer des produits de grande qualité efficaces.
-Un groupe également tourné vers l’innovation digitale avec le Visioderm, analyseur de peau connecté, véritable concentré de technologie, développé et produit en Occitanie, comme tous nos cosmétiques.

Nous sommes nés d’une conviction simple : la beauté peut être naturelle, efficace, sensorielle… et responsable.
Chez Biosalines, nous créons des soins issus de l’océan et du littoral atlantique — des formules clean, sans ingrédients controversés, avec une exigence forte sur la naturalité, l’efficacité et l’éco-conception.

Notre laboratoire est installé sur l’Île de Ré, là où la nature nous inspire chaque jour. Immortelle des dunes, Salicorne, Algues brunes, rouges, Wakamé, Criste marine… nos actifs marins sont riches, puissants et respectueux de la peau comme de l’environnement.

Rien n’a été laissé au hasard : chaque formule est pensée pour allier performance clinique, plaisir d’utilisation et impact réduit. Des produits que l’on peut recommander — et utiliser — les yeux fermés.

Distribuée en pharmacie, Biosalines compte déjà plus de 500 officines partenaires. Une belle aventure humaine et engagée, portée par des professionnels passionnés, au service d’une beauté plus simple, plus vraie, plus durable.

Name: Inika
Description:
Inika is a glamorous, 100 per cent natural Australian cosmetics brand. Created in 2006 by Miranda Bond and Jenni Williams, the power duo behind the highly successful Thriving Healthy Women Network, Inika has revolutionised natural makeup as we know it.

Unlike some “natural” brands, Inika products are guaranteed to be completely free from harsh petrochemicals, fillers, talc, bismuth oxychloride, GM ingredients, parabens, preservatives, mineral oils, phthalates and fragrances. All products are also non-comedogenic, which means they won’t clog the pores, and are so gentle that women who have suffered allergies and sensitivities to cosmetics for years have been able to wear Inika without any reaction. Available in a range of colours not seen before in natural makeup, Inika cosmetics are routinely recommended by dermatologists and cosmetic surgeons for use following procedures like laser resurfacing, chemical peels and micro-dermabrasion. 

One of the only makeup brands to have all products certified vegan or certified organic or both, Inika, which means “small earth” in Hindi, is also 100 per cent Halal and cruelty free and the brand is committed to environmental awareness . Inika strongly believes that women have the right to choose what they put on their skin and so maintains a transparency policy, readily displaying product ingredients on any packaging and the Inika website. 

The Inika range currently includes 79 permanent products as well as limited edition seasonal products and colour collections released quarterly. Products are currently sold through more than 500 stockists in 13 countries around the world including Australia, New Zealand, the UK, USA, Canada, France, Greece, Thailand, Singapore, Hong Kong, Malaysia and Slovenia.

Dinair has also provided professional airbrush makeup training since the 1980’s to leading makeup artists all around the world.

Leading film and television makeup artists have been using Dinair for over 30 years. It is now even more popular because of the perfect compatibility with High Definition Television and photography. Dinair anticipated that everyone will be seen, filmed and photographed in HD and developed the first high definition, daily wear airbrush makeup.
