Name: Clark's Botanicals
Description:
During the early stages of recovery from my spinal cord injury, it became my mission to help others find the confidence to be fearless in their skin. And when I changed inside, I wanted to change outside…so my father and I started formulating products that would eventually become Clark’s Botanicals. After my injury, I lost the ability to sweat and for my skin to regulate and balance in the ways that most people are used to, leaving it congested and gray. Together with my father, we created the very first (and still best-selling) Clark’s Botanicals product—Smoothing Marine Cream—with what would become a fundamental ingredient in every formula, Jasmine Absolute. Because I have the most demanding skin on earth, our products have a higher bar to get over. If it can work for me, I know it will for you, too.
 

Every ingredient we use in a formulation is pushed past its limits by a combination of science and nature. When I am creating a product, I look at what the known properties of an ingredient are and then figure out how I can make them do even more for your skin. They are truly radical botanicals—with scientifically-proven results. They are efficacious but will never include toxins like formaldehyde, parabens, or sulfates. And we never test on animals or use any animal byproducts.
 

It’s my sincere hope that Clark’s Botanicals gives you confidence that transforms your skin and unlocks your unlimited potential from the outside, in.

Name: LMDC Laboratoire Cosmetique
Description:
LMDC Lab est un laboratoire cosmétique français, spécialisé dans la recherche, la conception, la fabrication et le conditionnement de produits cosmétiques à valeur ajoutée. Avec nous, créez votre marque de cosmétiques grâce à une production en petite ou grande série. 

L’objectif de notre laboratoire est de vous accompagner étape par étape dans vos projets de création de cosmétiques, de soins et de biocides et d’être un allié de taille sur ce marché. Nous avons pour objectifs et volonté de vous proposer des produits de qualités et des services variés afin de développer avec vous des lignes complètes pour votre entreprise. Pour cela, nos priorités sont l’innovation, la qualité et la réactivité.

LMDC Lab est un laboratoire à taille humaine, avec une équipe professionnelle, qualifiée et pluridisciplinaire qui souhaite vous accompagner et vous soutenir avec dynamisme dans la création de votre marque. Nos experts, passionnés par l’univers des cosmétiques, seront ravies de vous apporter tout leur savoir-faire et vous aider à développer votre marque.
Nous vous proposons un accompagnement complet allant de l’aide à la définition et à la création de votre projet , à l’établissement d’une orientation stratégique solide et durable, jusque dans la création marketing de votre projet.

Créer votre propre marque avec des produits et des formules sur mesures pour répondre aux demandes du marché des cosmétiques. LMDC Lab vous propose des solutions en fonction de vos besoins et de vos envies, de votre cible, de vos objectifs et surtout de vos rêves. N’hésitez pas à nous solliciter pour visiter notre laboratoire en toute sécurité, notre équipe est à votre disposition.

Nous sommes à votre service !

Name: Senelle Cosmetics
Description:
Senelle to naturalna pielęgnacja pro-age, świadoma pielęgnacja kobiet akceptujących siebie i zmiany zachodzące w skórze. 

Senelle to również Oléoactif i ponad 95% składników pochodzenia naturalnego.

Używane w kosmetykach Senelle Organic DIAM'Oléoactifi Pomegrante Oléoactifto aktywne kompleksy lipidowe opatentowany przez francuskie laboratorium Oléos. 
DIAM'Oléoactifjest otrzymywany z dębu korkowego oraz palmy kokosowej za pomocą procesu oleo-eko-ekstrakcji. 
Jest nowoczesnym składnikiem naturalnym doskonale ograniczającym procesy starzeniowe skóry wrażliwej.

Pomegrante Oléoactif powstaje w procesie oleo-eko-ekstrakcji z oleju jojoba oraz wyciągu z owoców i kwiatów granatu i działa antyoksydacyjnie oraz chroni barierę hydrolipidową skóry.

Dzięki Oléoactif ochrona młodości skóry wrażliwej bez podrażnień jest możliwa. Już nie musisz stać przed wyborem między skutecznością przeciwzmarszczkową a równowagą skóry wrażliwej.
Senelle nie wybiera, Senelle daje najlepszą ochronę naturalnego piękna,
Senelle to kobieca filozofia pro-age
Senelle – naturalna pielęgnacja pro-age to świadoma pielęgnacja kobiet akceptujących siebie i zmiany zachodzące w skórze z upływem czasu. Senelle wspomaga procesy zachowujące młodość bez agresywnej walki z naturą. To nie znaczy, że Senelle odpuszcza, wręcz przeciwnie pomaga dopasować pielęgnację do stylu życia i naturalnych procesów związanych z wiekiem. 
Naturalna pielęgnacja Senelle:
• Nawilża
• Ochroni wrażliwą skórę;
• Odżywia, kiedy potrzeba;
• Niweluje przebarwieni i niedoskonałości;
• Wzmacniania naczynka;
• Dba o zmysły;
• Pomaga w budowaniu samoakceptacji i daje radość tu i teraz.

Senelle to szacunek dla natury, zwierząt i dla zasobów nieodnawialnych.

Senelle nie testuje produktów na zwierzętach i nie stosuje składników pochodzenia zwierzęcego. Jest wytwarzana w ekologicznych procesach produkcyjnych, korzysta z opakowań biodegradowalnych i ogranicza produkcję odpadów. 

Senelle dba o Ciebie i środowisko.

Name: EDWARD BESS
Description: The beauty of being you. Edward Bess masters the essence of enhancing exactly who you are. Through carefully conceived, expertly edited textures and hues, discover the famed formulas renowned for bringing out your best self. Experience the timelessness of these sought after products you will love for a lifetime.

Name: Héliabrine Monaco
Description:
Héliabrine est la branche "instituts" des Laboratoires Asepta, lun des leaders de la dermo-pharmacie installé à Monaco depuis 1947.

Entièrement formulée et fabriquée en Principauté, la gamme compte plus de 100 références alliant plaisir d'utilisation et efficacité pour satisfaire les esthéticiennes et le grand public. 

Elaborés par des pharmaciens et testés sous contrôle dermatologique, tous nos produits sont formulés à partir d'extraits naturels soigneusement sélectionnés pour offrir à chaque femme un rituel de beauté en parfaire affinité avec son type de peau. 

La richesse du monde végétal est notre source d'inspiration. Nous vous invitons à la découvrir.

Name: Aqua Land Co. Ltd.
Description:
AQUAL LAND started its business in 2001 with the vision to further develop Myanmar's unique culture and beauty through excellent Korean products.
AQUA LAND has started to sell and distribute water purifiers that enable to drink clean water at affordable prices throughout Myanmar, and has grown into a company that sells famous Korean cosmetics, consumer goods and other car accessories.
In addition, since Myanmar is undergoing various socio-economic changes, AQUA LAND is doing its responsibility as a social company through donations and volunteer activities at the company level. Now, AQUA LAND has been honored to be one of the most reliable Korean products distribution company in Myanmar. Based on this background, AQUA LAND intends to strengthen its own brand marketing through online and offline.
AQUA LAND always learns and develops for being a world-class company. Apply for a job at AQUA LAND and join us! We have various opportunities and will give you this opportunity for sure.

Vision
Being a leading company that contributes to the value and development of Myanmar by providing quality goods and services featuring sincerity and integrity.

Mission
Build a customer-focused, sustainable and socially responsible business.

Name: Keune Haircosmetics Pakistan
Description:
Keune Haircosmetics is The Netherlands' largest manufacturer of professional hair products. Founded in 1922 by Jan Keune, one of the progenitors of the modern perm treatment, the company has expanded into the multinational it is today. Keune's international headquarters, laboratories and factories are situated in Soest, where all products are devised, developed and produced before they are shipped off to more than 80 different countries.

Keune Hair cosmetics was launched in Pakistan in 1993 and since then, it has been a leading hair cosmetics brand in Pakistan. It has not only been working towards providing quality hair cosmetics, be it colors, styling products, hair treatments, and many others to its clients and customers but been also playing a pivotal role in educating beauty industry of Pakistan. At Keune Pakistan we treat our resources like our family; because we always believe in empowering those around us.

No matter how much the company grows, we'll never forget our roots and our mission - helping salon professionals in doing the best that they do!

Name: Liban Cosmetics
Description: Liban Cosmetics es una empresa de la industria cosmética, especializada en manufactura y comercialización de productos de alta calidad para el cuidado personal. Nuestro compromiso es crear soluciones innovadoras para las necesidades de bienestar y belleza.

Name: Novel Tissues Pvt Ltd.,
Description:
A young company, which has witnessed tremendous growth and progress, within a short span of time. Qualified and professional team of managers, manages Novel Tissues. Its sales offices and distribution networks, employing adequate qualified officers, are strategically placed in all the major towns and cities in India to ensure sales and also provide after sales support to the customers.

Novel Tissues is an ISO 9001:2000 certified company. As a company, Novel Tissues has benefited tremendously from its steadfast focus on improving quality standard of its offerings. Rightly all our wet tissue products are licensed by the Controller of Drugs, Government of Karnataka, India. Its quality checks are stringent and of high standards. Right from the texture of the tissue fiber to the packaging style, we ensure that you get the best product. The company employs quality professionals and follows ISO certified production processes, which ensures the desired quality in our end products.

Name: Adlux Cosméticos Profissionais
Description:
A ADLUX Cosméticos Profissionais atua no mercado da beleza há 22 anos, lançando constantemente novos produtos. Temos a missão de levar beleza e autoestima a mulheres e homens, através da combinação de excelentes produtos com nanotecnologia e extratos naturais, diferenciais que só a ADLUX tem em sua fórmula exclusiva, além de realizar sonhos e transformar vidas. 
Possui uma megaestrutura fabril, moderna e com alta qualidade de produção. Todos os produtos fabricados são inspecionados e aprovados pela ANVISA, testados e desejados por profissionais renomados no Brasil. Uma empresa que sabe valorizar a grandeza de cada um, tornando o belo ainda mais bonito.

Name: Mit Mongkol Industry
Description:
MIT MONGKOL INDUSTRY CO., LTD was established in 1975 as a manufacturer of personal care products. At the beginning, the company operated under the license of Colgate - Palmolive (Thailand) Ltd. MMK is a leading OEM/ODM private label 
 manufacturer of cosmetics, skin care, personal care and household  cleaning products in Thailand, providing the full service from developing product concept, formulating, packaging and sourcing, to producing and selling to leading multinational and national retailers, beauty stores, hypermarket, supermarket, cash and carry and consumer product company throughout Asia, Europe, America, Africa, Australia and Middle East.

Name: AMRA Skincare
Description:
Our journey began when Sue Jones, the CEO & Founder of AMRA, intertwined her devotion to science with her strive for sustainability. Ensuing a degree in Business & Marketing, training in Physiology, and a myriad of courses around the world, Sue was determined to change the beauty industry from the soul of a lab. She merged her experience as a Cosmetology lecturer, with her holistic Fairtrade mission in India to begin a decade of exhilarating research. Sue developed her own luxury skincare brand alongside expert scientists, leading to what AMRA has become today.

AMRA’s vision is to craft products devoid of any ingredients which do not reflect the brand ethics. We believe in curating luxury products to immerse guests in an opulent lifestyle with alluring and precious spa journeys. For that purpose, AMRA undertakes sustainable practices, and we do not test our products on animals. We feel strongly about our responsibility to protect, honour, and uphold the environment.

Name: Milanesi Skincare
Description:
Milanesi skincare was born with the desire to create a collection of effective, natural and clean products, aimed at protecting the skin from the action of modern-day aggressors such as stress, climate changes, UV & blue lights and the increasingly widespread urban pollution. For this reason, Milanesi skincare has studied innovative, highly performing and anti-pollution formulas, able to make the most of the benefits of organic and natural raw materials, 100% Italian.
We offer solutions for both retail and business to business partners that work in Hotels, Spas and Wellness centres. Our solutions can be personalized based on the needs of our partner. 
For more information, please contact: info@milanesiskincare.com

Name: Gamax
Description:
Da oltre 20 anni, in Gamax ci dedichiamo all’innovazione del settore dell’estetica attraverso la ricerca e la distribuzione di prodotti professionali. 

Abbiamo creato e fondato il #MetodoGamax che predilige: la cura della salute dell’unghia naturale, la velocità del lavoro, l’affidabilità del risultato finale, l’economicità d’uso dei prodotti e l’utilizzo sempre minore della limatura.

Con la cura per l’estetica vogliamo stimolare il miglioramento e la crescita personale dei nostri clienti.

Su questi principi nascono le #GamaxAcademy, un sistema innovativo e moderno per avviare un business di successo nel mondo dell’estetica che mette al centro la valorizzazione dell’imprenditorialità femminile.

Name: Kanzen Skincare
Description:
Kanzen Skincare isn’t just another skincare brand — we’re here to redefine the industry with real science + real results.

Our mission? Clear your acne in just 28 days  — and yep, the results speak for themselves (backed by research, not just hype).

Born from a personal battle with acne, we started Kanzen to make powerful, science-backed skincare accessible to everyone  Here at Kanzen, we blend the magic of nature  with cutting-edge tech  to create formulas that actually work, targeting the root cause, not just the surface.

Every product we make = loaded with bioactive ingredients  that are effective, gentle, and built for the long haul. Because good skin isn’t just a phase — it’s a lifestyle.

At Kanzen, we’re constantly levelling up  pushing boundaries, refining formulas, and staying ahead with the latest scientific breakthroughs because your skin deserves the best, period.

Oh, and we’re not stopping at just helping you...

Our expert team + state-of-the-art labs also help other brands create their own skincare lines from scratch  Bottom line: we’re here to make skincare simple, smart, and life-changing.

Join the Kanzen movement — clear skin, science-powered

Name: Momiji Beauty

Holika Holika derives from English suffix “-holic” and it means addiction.  Korean “holida” means temptation to form the brand name and its concept.

Description:
Spa Sciences provides a category destination for hi-tech beauty devices addressing an array of consumer skin concerns through a combination of innovative solutions, quality and affordable spa-like luxury. 
 
Spa Sciences is committed to providing clinically effective, safe and affordable beauty devices for home use to help you obtain the results you want from your makeup and skincare products. Our clinically-tested beauty devices combine science-based treatments with spa-like luxury so that you are able to “bring the spa home with you".

Name: Control Corrective Skincare Systems
Description:
Control Corrective Skincare Systems is all about transformation. Our purpose is twofold – first to attain results and then to maintain the health and beauty of the skin. Offering comprehensive, collection-based skincare with a deep problem/solution focus. Control Corrective formulas deliver clinical skincare results in practical and accessible way. Whether you have cystic acne, dark spots, rosacea/sensitive skin, or mature, we have products that can help.

An important aspect to our skincare products is quality, consistency and professionalism. We take great pride that we adhere to GMP standards, we do not test on animals, and are completely paraben-free.

Name: Prisha Cosmetics, Inc.

We are re-inventing Beauty!

We have been revolutionizing innovation in the development and manufacturing of color cosmetics, skin care and personal care products for more than 15 years!

We are a privately-owned OTC-licensed and ISO certified company founded in 2003 by our Chief Operating Officer and our Chief Research Chemist, who both bring an abundance of manufacturing and formulating experience in the beauty industry.  We have expanded our manufacturing services to include both private label manufacturing and contract manufacturing of high-quality and exceptional color cosmetics, skin care and personal care products at competitive pricing within a reasonable time frame allowing our customers to maintain their position in the market place.

We nurture our relationships with our discerning clients and partner with our vendors, as they are both an integral part of the Prisha family enabling us to maintain our competitive edge.

Our Creative Team is highly regarded in the industry and well-versed in taking a project from concept to a finished product.

Our Scientific Team is driven by innovation and originality, continuously pushing boundaries; expertly fusing science with nature.

Our Support Teams, comprised of Quality Control, Engineering, Customer Service and Production, are highly proficient in accommodating our clients’ dynamic needs.

Our state-of-the-art manufacturing facility is OTC-licensed and FDA approved. We strictly adhere to the strict manufacturing guidelines set forth by the Good Manufacturing Procedures (GMP). 

Capabilities:
- Tube Filling
- Loose Powder Filling
- Powder Pressing
- Liquid and Crème Filling
-	Lipstick Molding (automatic/semi-automatic)
- Hot-pour Filling
- Pencil Filling (retractable/sharpenable)

Not all businesses are the same. This is why we offer a variety of services:
•	Research and Development

•	Assembly Only

Our first ritual, Nuit de Soie, with our luxurious silk pillowcase and Neo-pearls to mist before bedtime, will give you a sense of well-being, nourished skin, and softened hair continuously during your sleep. This ritual is transformed into true cosmetic care.

Name: Revea
Description:
Revea is a precision skincare company using advanced diagnostics, personal analysis, and machine learning to deliver skincare designed for each individual’s biology.  
Founded in 2020 by a team of skincare enthusiasts, biologists, and data scientists, we’re on a journey to create a world where skincare is rooted in integrity, crafted precisely for you, and never defined by a stereotype. That’s why we’re giving everyone the power to decode their skin and master their skincare journey.

Name: vanitis Cosmetics
Description:
At Vanitis makeup, we take pride in the precision and quality of our products, which are manufactured in Germany and Italy. Our mission is to export our ethical, sustainable makeup to customers all over the world. We believe that everyone deserves access to high-quality makeup that not only enhances their beauty, but also has a positive impact on the environment and animal welfare.

I invite you to join us in supporting ethical and sustainable beauty practices, to make a positive impact on the world together.

Name: Sugarbomb Worldwide
Description:
SugarBomb conceptualized in 2015 in the United Kingdom when the founders met, where idea and direction of the company was discussed. What started as a perfume brand, has since expanded into producing other noteworthy products such as air-fresheners, hand sanitizers, and various other merchandises.

The origin of SugarBomb is derived from two different words, ‘Sugar’ and ‘Bomb’ representing the best in the perfumery. Together it signifies ‘’ sweet fragrance that will blast the perfume industry’

From a humble home workshop, to a large 3-acre factory, Sugarbomb has over 200 talented individuals employed at our Headquarters in Klang and our factory in Meru, Klang.

One of Sugarbomb’s greatest strengths is our quality control.  Our Chemical Advisor graduated from the University of Bristol in the United Kingdom, alongside our highly skilled researchers, closely monitor Sugarbomb’s mixtures and production to ensure that each product achieves world-class standards and international recognition.

Name: Herb UK Ltd
Description:
Since our foundation in 1990, Herb UK Ltd has been manufacturing high performance hair products, which maximise the use of gentle, nourishing, natural and organic ingredients, whilst minimising the necessity for harsh or damaging chemical additives.

Herb UK was co-founded by hairdresser Steven Landreth who was forced to give up hairdressing when he developed a severe allergy to conventional hair colour. Determined to find a product on the market that’s made with fewer nasty chemicals and more natural ingredients, he soon realised that there weren't any alternatives readily available. This is what led him to develop Herb UK’s first brand of naturally better hair care products!

Herb UK’s Managing Director Raoul Perfitt joined the business in 1994. From his very earliest years Raoul always had an interest in herbal medicine and natural cosmetics. Both his grandfather, a Founding Member of the British Herbal Medicines Association, and his father who was recognised by Queen Elizabeth with an MBE for services to herbal medicine, were both highly influential within the industry. From a young age Raoul saw first-hand the huge benefits of plants and natural ingredients in medicines and cosmetics. 	

Today Herb UK is made up of 2 core brands; Organic Colour Systems, supplied to the salon professional market, and Tints of Nature which is sold to the wholesale channel and widely retailed in both independent health food stores and larger healthy grocery chains, including Wholefoods and Sprouts. Exporting to over 40 countries worldwide, our products are still made in the heart of the New Forest, Hampshire, making Herb UK Ltd the largest independent hair care manufacturer based in the UK.

Since day one Herb UK has been a health conscious, ethical, and environmentally aware business, striving to educate and inform our customers about the benefits of using more naturally based hair products,  We also never test on animals nor do we sell to countries who insist on animal testing.

No mundo de hoje, as pessoas buscam cada vez mais a beleza. Fundada em 2004 com a missão de desenvolver produtos de qualidade que busquem atender a esta necessidade das pessoas, proporcionando satisfação e bem estar.
Respeito, lealdade, honestidade e ética são valores fundamentais que norteiam nossas atitutes com nossos clientes, colaboradores, fornecedores e consumidores.
Temos o compromisso de adotar práticas de produção sustentável, preservando o meio ambiente.
Com profissionais qualificados e multidisciplinares, buscamos sempre novas tecnologias para proporcionar produtos de qualidade e eficácia.

Name: CRANBOURN l B CORP
Description:
CRANBOURN | Perfumers, London. Create Atmospheres and discover Sensory Wellbeing. Explore our British-made luxury interior fragrance Collections designed to revitalise, entertain and inspire.

Our scents are created in collaboration with leading international perfumers. They combine traditional and cutting-edge perfumery techniques, using the finest botanicals. As part of The Fragrance Foundation, the CRANBOURN mission is simple: to create exceptional, timeless scents for the modern, conscious consumer. In 2024, CRANBOURN became a Fragrance Foundation UK NextGen Brand.

While our perfumery team has a global outlook, every element of a CRANBOURN product is designed and made exclusively in the UK, ensuring the highest levels of craftsmanship and manufacturing. We are a B-Corporation and members of Ecologi and 1% for the Planet, and we believe business should be a force for good. All our products are certified and accredited by Leaping Bunny and The Vegetarian Society.

Name: The First Spa
Description:
Since 1974, The First spa has been operating in the beauty cosmetic industry dealing with the creation, production and marketing of perfumes and beauty- skincare products for both its own and licensed brands.

Company's main brands are: Arrogance, AcquaDì, GianMarcoVenturi, Valentina (perfume), PZ Pikenz, Looxie and CocoMonoi (beauty-skincare) all produced in a sustainable and ethical way and Made in Italy.

The perfume and beauty-skincare brands created and distributed by TheFirst spa have an average positioning that places them in the beauty-cosmetic segment called "Masstige" (mass-prestige) in which the formal characteristics of the luxury product are accessible to a female and male audience broad and transversal thanks to a democratic purchase price.

Thanks to the variety of its assortment and the positioning of its brands, The First spa is able to supply, both in Italy and abroad, a wide, but selected, range of distributors and retailers ranging from the most prestigious perfume chains to large scale retailers.

Name: Bachellor Cosméticos
Description:
A Bachellor Cosméticos foi criada após anos de pesquisa no setor cosmético internacional e nacional, desenvolvendo um trabalho sério e de qualidade com produtos elaborados através de matérias-primas de última geração, especialmente testadas para as condições climáticas brasileiras. Criamos revestimentos especiais e primamos para um acabamento sofisticado, visando atender aos mais exigentes consumidores, sempre mantendo nosso comprometimento em relação ao meio ambiente e o respeito aos animais.

Com quase 10 anos de mercado, a Bachellor tem cada vez mais se posicionado no mercado nacional e  hoje deseja ser reconhecida como uma empresa comprometida com seus sonhos. Por isso, hoje, está entrando no mercado brasileiro de marketing de relacionamento e oferecendo estrutura e aprimoramento contínuo necessários para que você tenha seu próprio negócio de sucesso. Possui, em seu universo da beleza, uma completa linha com mais de 62 itens para cuidados pessoais, entre eles perfumaria feminina e masculina, produtos capilares e corporais, entre outros.

Name: WELEDA PL
Description:
Weleda rozpoczęła swoją działalność ponad 100 lat temu - w 1921 roku jako farmaceutyczne laboratorium z własnym ogrodem roślin leczniczych. Dziś Weleda jest światowym, wiodącym producentem naturalnych kosmetyków i farmaceutyków. 
Obecnie rozwija się w ponad 50 krajach na 5 kontynentach oferując szeroki asortyment produktów kosmetycznych i farmaceutycznych, nadal częściowo produkowanych na bazie roślin uprawianych we własnych ogrodach. 
Od samego początku Weleda zmierzała do celów, które wyłoniły się z jej założycielskich zasad. Nasze produkty mają wspierać ludzi w ich indywidualnym rozwoju, w pielęgnowaniu i odzyskiwaniu zdrowia oraz w ich wysiłkach, aby osiągnąć stan fizycznego dobrostanu i zrównoważony styl życia. Ta dewiza firmy Weleda determinuje nasze podejście ekonomiczne i pozostanie naszą naczelną zasadą w przyszłości.

Name: Hair Company Professional
Description:
Hair Company Professional è il partner del tuo Salone che ti garantisce prodotti sempre all’avanguardia, formazione di livello internazionale, tecnologie ultra moderne, un’Immagine di successo e tutti i vantaggi esclusivi di una Community Professionale ed Internazionale.
 
I nostri prodotti sono il frutto della ricerca continua dei nostri laboratori e sono studiati solo per il mondo professionale: il più esigente.
 
La nostra qualità è riconosciuta e apprezzata da decenni in tutto il modo.
 
La nostra Accademia ti offre percorsi di crescita professionale tecnici e stilistici e la possibilità di diplomarti anche tu Master Stylist, e gestire corsi di formazione del nostro gruppo, in Italia e nel mondo.
 
I nostri tecnologi hanno sviluppato strumenti elettronici unici di analisi e trattamento dei capelli basati sulle tecnologie più moderne, per offrire al tuo Salone servizi esclusivi per la tua clientela.
 
L’immagine dei nostri prodotti, dei nostri accessori ed arredi e della nostra comunicazione è curata nei minimi particolari, perché noi sappiamo quanto sia importante per te e per il tuo salone presentarsi in modo impeccabile alla clientela.
 
La nostra Community ti assicura vantaggi esclusivi come un tuo spazio WEB sul nostro sito, la possibilità di provare in anteprima i nostri nuovi prodotti, l’accesso a prestigiosi programmi promozionali ed incentive e la partecipazione ad eventi e spettacoli con trattamento VIP.
 
Noi vogliamo che il tuo salone scelga di stare con noi ogni giorno solo perché pienamente soddisfatto del rapporto con noi come deve essere tra partner professionali.

Name: United Cosmetics
Description:
We are a UK-based multi-brand distributor of leading cosmetics and beauty brands. Located in the heart of London's West End and fashion district. Staffed with profoundly skilled teams made up of design, trend, marketing, sourcing and product development. Our focus is to provide quality, trend-led and affordable products to the UK high street.

The United Cosmetics Group Ltd is an internationally renowned player in beauty. Not only do we consist of a merchandising and processing factories in Turkey and across the Far East. But we also have other such operations in Spain, with predicted growth across more continents. 

Our group in London is the primary design, trend, marketing and sourcing arm for the entire group. Ensuring a strong link between the component offices, operations and our customers worldwide. Most of our UK customers predominantly operate in multi-store with prevalent high street and shopping centre presences. As our vastly experienced product development team stays actively informed on the latest beauty trends, we are therefore able to advise clients accordingly. Additionally, we can reach into niche markets to satisfy consumer wants.

With the widespread global sourcing network, our team has access to the most current trends worldwide at the most competitive prices. Thus our specialisation across colour cosmetics, fragrance, skincare, accessories and beauty electronics.
